learnStep2: Ku qor fikradda muhiimka ah erayadaada.

teacherLockSuccess: Habka fasalka ayaa u xiran ardayda.
teacherShareMaterialDesc: U daabac shaqada ama qoraalada dib u eegista degdega ah fasalkaaga.
teacherShareSuccess: Qalabka waxbarashada ee lala wadaago fasalka.
adminLoadError: Aan awoodin inuu soo shubo isticmaalayaasha
invitesLoadError: Aan awoodin in la raro martiqaadyada
settingsCountrySub: Waxay la jaanqaadaysaa miisaanka fasalka, heerarka dugsiga, iyo qaababka nambarada nidaamkaaga waxbarasho.
learnSch_mathematics_title: Aljabradu waxay isticmaashaa xarfo iyo calaamado si ay u matasho tirooyinka una sharaxdo cilaaqaadka. Waa laf dhabarta dhammaan xisaabaadka horumarsan. Waxaad barataa inaad xalliso isla'egta, la shaqeyso doorsoomayaasha, oo waxaad ka heshaa qiyam aan la garanayn adiga oo raacaya tillaabooyin macquul ah.
learnSch_mathematics_f0_name: Xalli: 3x - 5 = 10. Qor tillaabo kasta. Kadib hubi jawaabtaada adoo ku bedelaya x gadaal.
learnSch_mathematics_f0_desc: Doorsoome (sida x ama y) waxay u taagan tahay tiro aan la garanayn.
learnSch_mathematics_f0_task: Isla'egtu waxay muujinaysaa in laba tibaaxood ay siman yihiin (tusaale 2x + 3 = 7).
learnSch_mathematics_f0_kp0: Si loo xalliyo isla'egta, samee qalliin isku mid ah labada dhinac si aad u go'doomiso doorsoomaha.
learnSch_mathematics_f0_kp1: Functions waxay khariidaysaa wax-soo-gelin kasta oo sax ah: f(x) = 2x waxay ka dhigan tahay labanlaab wax-gelinta.
learnSch_mathematics_f0_kp2: To solve an equation, do the same operation on both sides to isolate the variable.
learnSch_mathematics_f0_kp3: Functions map every input to exactly one output: f(x) = 2x means double the input.
learnSch_mathematics_f0_kp4: Halbeegyada kala duwan waa tibaaxo leh erayo badan: 3x² + 2x - 1.
learnSch_mathematics_f1_desc: Joometri wuxuu bartaa qaababka, xaglaha, iyo cilaaqaadka dhulka. Waxay ku baraysaa inaad si macquul ah u fahanto oo aad caddayso weedhaha adoo isticmaalaya qeexitaanno iyo aragtiyo. Joometri wuxuu ka muuqdaa qaab-dhismeedka, farshaxanka, injineernimada, iyo nolol maalmeedka.
learnSch_mathematics_f1_task: Saddex xagalka midig wuxuu leeyahay lugaha 3 cm iyo 4 cm. Xisaabi hypotenuse adoo isticmaalaya a² + b² = c².
learnSch_mathematics_f1_kp0: Bar ma laha cabbir; xariiqdu si aan xad lahayn ayay u fidaysaa labada jiho.
learnSch_mathematics_f1_kp1: Xaglaha waxaa lagu cabbiraa darajo: xagal toosan = 90°, xagal toosan = 180°.
learnSch_mathematics_f1_kp2: Wadarta xaglaha saddexagal kasta mar walba waa 180°.
learnSch_mathematics_f1_kp3: Aragtida Pythagorean: ee saddexagalka saxda ah, a² + b² = c² (c waa hypotenuse).
learnSch_mathematics_f1_kp4: Qaababka isku midka ah waa isku mid cabbir ahaan iyo qaab ahaan; qaabab isku mid ah ayaa leh xaglo isku mid ah laakiin cabbirro kala duwan.
learnSch_mathematics_f2_desc: Tirakoobku wuxuu kaa caawinayaa inaad ururiso, habayso, oo tarjumto xogta si aad u gaadho gunaanad. Itimaalka wuxuu cabbiraa sida ay u badan tahay dhacdo. Wadajir ahaan waxay lagama maarmaan u yihiin sayniska, dhaqaalaha, iyo go'aan qaadashada maalin kasta.
learnSch_mathematics_f2_task: Soo rogo dhimis: waa maxay suurtogalnimada helitaanka lambar siman? Muuji xisaabinta.
learnSch_mathematics_f2_kp0: Mean = wadarta dhammaan qiyamka ÷ tirada qiyamka.
learnSch_mathematics_f2_kp1: Dhexdhexaad = qiimaha dhexe marka xogta la kala saaro.
learnSch_mathematics_f2_kp3: Histogram-ku waxa uu tusinayaa inta jeer ee xogta la qaybinayo.
learnSch_mathematics_f2_kp4: Xidhiidhku wuxuu muujinayaa in laba doorsoome ay u janjeeraan inay isla socdaan - laakiin maaha sabab.
learnSch_mathematics_f3_desc: Trigonometry waxay barataa xiriirka ka dhexeeya xaglaha iyo dhererka dhinac ee saddexagalka. Waxaa loo isticmaalaa fiisigiska, injineernimada, navigation, iyo muusiga. Saddexda hawlood ee ugu waaweyn - sine, cosine, iyo tangent - waxay ku xidhaan xaglaha ilaa saamiga dhinacyada.
learnSch_mathematics_f3_task: Salaanka dhererkiisu yahay 5 mitir wuxuu ku tiirsan yahay gidaarka 60°. Intee ayuu sarreeyaa? Isticmaal dembi (60°) = √3/2.
learnSch_mathematics_f3_kp0: Saddex-xagalka saxda ah: sin(θ) = ka soo horjeeda/hypotenuse, cos(θ) = ku xiga/hypotenuse, tan(θ) = ka soo horjeeda/ku dhow.
learnSch_mathematics_f3_kp2: Goobabada halbeeggu waxay ku fidsan tahay xagal kasta oo ka baxsan 90°.
learnSch_mathematics_f3_kp3: Sine iyo cosine waa xilliyo: waxay ku celiyaan 360° (2π radians).
learnSch_mathematics_f4_desc: Aragtida nambarku waxay barataa sifooyinka is dhexgalka - gaar ahaan tirooyinka ugu muhiimsan, kala qaybsanaanta, iyo qaybinta. Waa mid ka mid ah laamaha xisaabta ee ugu da'da weyn, waxayna hoosta ka xariiqday cryptography casriga ah.
learnSch_mathematics_f4_task: Soo hel GCD(48, 18) adoo isticmaalaya algorithm Euclidean. Kadib hel LCM(48, 18).
learnSch_mathematics_f4_kp0: Tirada ugu muhiimsan waxay leedahay laba arrimood oo sax ah: 1 iyo laftiisa (tusaale. 2, 3, 5, 7, 11).
learnSch_mathematics_f4_kp1: Halbeeg kasta> 1 waxaa loo qori karaa sidii badeecad gaar ah oo aasaasi ah (aragti aasaasiga ah ee xisaabta).
learnSch_mathematics_f4_kp2: Xeerarka kala qaybinta: nambarku waxa loo qaybiyaa 3 haddii wadarta lambarkiisu 3 loo qaybiyo.|| GCD (qaybiyaha guud ee ugu weyn): tirada ugu badan ee qaybisa labadaba. Adeegso algorithm Euclidean: GCD(a, b) = GCD(b, mod b).
learnSch_mathematics_f4_kp3: LCM (kuwa ugu caansan): LCM(a, b) = (a × b) ÷ GCD(a, b).
learnSch_mathematics_f4_tp2: Xajmiga wuxuu leeyahay cabbirka (cabbirka) iyo jihada labadaba. Vectors ayaa lama huraan u ah fiisigiska (xoogagga, xawaaraha) iyo xisaabta sare. Waa lagu dari karaa, la dhimi karaa, oo la miisaami karaa, waxayna si dabiici ah u soo ururiyaan booska 3D.
learnSch_mathematics_f5_name: Siiyay u = (2, 3) iyo v = (4, -1), hel: (a) u + v, (b) |u|, (c) u · v. Ma adiga iyo v siman yihiin?
learnSch_mathematics_f5_desc: Xajmiga waxa loo qoraa sida fallaadho ama iskudubarid ahaan: v = (3, 4) waxa loola jeedaa 3 cutub oo sax ah, 4 unug kor.
learnSch_mathematics_f5_kp0: Isku-darka unugyada: (a, b) + (c, d) = (a+c, b+d). Kala goyntu waa la mid marka laga jaro.
learnSch_mathematics_f5_kp1: Isku dhufashada scalar: 2· (3, 4) = (6, 8) - waxay miisaamaysaa xididka.
learnSch_mathematics_f5_kp2: Alaabta dhibicda: (a, b) · (c, d) = ac + bd. Haddii badeecada dhibco = 0, faleefayaashu waa siman yihiin.
learnSch_mathematics_f6_desc: Tixdu waa liis la dalbaday oo lambaro raacaya qaab. Taxanuhu waa wadarta shuruudaha isku xigxiga. Labaduba waxay ka muuqdaan xisaabta iyo qaabaynta aduunka dhabta ah (kobaca, maaliyadda, fiisigiska).
learnSch_mathematics_f6_task: Tixdu waxay bilaabataa 2, 6, 18, 54, … (a) Ma xisaab baa mise joomatari? (b) Hel muddada 7aad. (c) Soo hel wadarta 5-ta shuruudood ee ugu horreeya.
learnSch_mathematics_f6_kp0: Tixraaca xisaabta: erey kasta wuxuu ku kala duwan yahay qaddar go'an d (farqiga guud). aₙ = a₁ + (n-1) d.
learnSch_mathematics_f6_kp1: Wadarta isku xigxiga xisaabta: Sₙ = n/2 · (a₁ + aₙ).
learnSch_mathematics_f6_kp2: Isku xigxiga joomatari: erey kasta waxa lagu dhuftaa saami go'an r. aₙ = a₁ · rⁿ⁻¹.
learnSch_mathematics_f6_kp3: Isku darka joomatari isku xigxiga: Sₙ = a₁ · (1 − rⁿ) / (1 − r) ee r ≠ 1.
learnSch_mathematics_f6_kp4: Taxane joomatari ah oo aan dhammaad lahayn ayaa isugu taga S = a₁ / (1 − r) marka |r| < 1.
learnSch_mathematics_f7_desc: Daraasadaha kalkuluuska kala duwan ee heerarka isbeddelka iyo jiirada qalooca. Kala soocida ayaa kuu sheegaysa sida ugu dhaqsaha badan ee shaqadu isu beddesho mar kasta. Waxay aasaas u tahay fiisigiska, injineernimada, dhaqaalaha, iyo dhammaan cilmiga tirada.
learnSch_mathematics_f7_task: Soo hel kala soocida f(x) = 4x³ − 2x² + 5. Ka dib hel halka jiirada ay u dhiganto eber.
learnSch_mathematics_f7_kp0: Kala soocida f'(x) waxay ku siinaysaa jiirada xariiqda tangent f(x) barta x.
learnSch_mathematics_f7_kp1: Xeerka awoodda: haddii f(x) = xⁿ, dabadeed f'(x) = nxⁿ⁻¹. Tusaale: (x³)′ = 3x².
learnSch_mathematics_f7_kp2: Xeer guud: (f + g)' = f'+ g'. Xeerka badeecada: (fg)′= fg + fg′.
learnSch_mathematics_f7_kp3: Xeerka silsiladda: ka soo jeeda f(g(x)) waa f'(g(x)) · g'(x).
learnSch_mathematics_f7_kp4: Shaqadu waxay leedahay ugu badnaan ama ugu yaraan maxalli halka f′(x) = 0 (dhibic muhiim ah).
learnSch_mathematics_f8_desc: Xisaabinta isku dhafan waxay xisaabisaa meelaha qalooca hoostooda ah iyo tiro urursan. Waa hawl galkii kala-duwanaanshaha. Isku-dhafka waxaa loo isticmaalaa fiisigiska (shaqada, masaafada), tirakoobka (ixtimaalka), iyo injineernimada.
learnSch_mathematics_f8_task: Qiimee ∫₀² (3x² + 2) dx. Tus tillaabooyinka oo dhan adigoo isticmaalaya aragtida aasaasiga ah ee kalkulus.
learnSch_mathematics_f8_kp0: Isku xidhka aan xad lahayn ∫f(x)dx waxa uu siinayaa qoys hawlo ah oo asalkoodu yahay f.
learnSch_mathematics_f8_kp1: Xeerka awooda isku xidhka: ∫xⁿ dx = xⁿ⁺¹/(n+1) + C (loogu talagalay n ≠ -1).
learnSch_mathematics_f8_kp2: Qeexitaanka dhabta ah ∫ₐᵇ f(x)dx waxa uu siinayaa aagga saxda ah ee u dhexeeya qalooca iyo dhidibka x laga bilaabo a ilaa b.
learnSch_mathematics_f8_kp3: Aragtida aasaasiga ah ee kalkulus: ∫ₐᵇ f(x)dx = F(b) − F(a), halka F'= f.
learnSch_mathematics_f8_kp4: Meesha u dhaxaysa labada qaloocood: ∫ₐᵇ [f(x) − g(x)] dx, halka f(x) ≥ g(x).
learnSch_physics_f0_desc: Makaanikada waa daraasadda dhaqdhaqaaqa iyo xoogagga sababa. Saddexda sharci ee dhaqdhaqaaqa Newton waa aasaaska. Fahmidda makaanikada waxay gacan ka geysataa sharraxaadda wax walba laga bilaabo walxaha dhacaya ilaa gantaallada riddada.
learnSch_physics_f0_task: Kubad 2 kg ah waxay ku socotaa 3 m/s². Xooggee ku dhaqmaa? Isticmaal F = ma.
learnSch_physics_f0_kp0: Sharciga 1aad ee Newton: shayga nasashada wuxuu ku sugnaadaa nasasho haddii aan xoog lagu dhaqmin.
learnSch_physics_f0_kp1: Sharciga 2aad ee Newton: Xoog = dardargelin ballaaran (F = ma).
learnSch_physics_f0_kp2: Sharciga 3aad ee Newton: fal kastaa wuxuu leeyahay falcelin siman oo iska soo horjeeda.
learnSch_physics_f0_kp3: Tamarta Kinetic = ½ × cuf × xawaare² (KE = ½mv²).
learnSch_physics_f0_kp4: Shaqada = Xoog × masaafada jihada ciidanka (W = Fd).
learnSch_physics_f1_desc: Korontadu waa socodka khidmadaha korantada ee dhex mara kirishbooyada. Magnetism-ku wuxuu ka yimaadaa kharashyada dhaqdhaqaaqa iyo walxaha magnetic. Labaduba waxay ku midaysan yihiin electromagnetism, taas oo awood u siinaysa tignoolajiyada casriga ah.
learnSch_physics_f1_task: Wareeggu wuxuu leeyahay batari 12 V ah iyo 4 Ω resistor ah. Waa maxay hadda? Isticmaal V = IR.
learnSch_physics_f1_kp0: Sharciga Ohm: Voltage = Hadda × Caabbin (V = IR).
learnSch_physics_f1_kp1: Wareegga Taxanaha: Isla hadda dhex mara dhammaan qaybaha; korontadu waxay kordhisaa.
learnSch_physics_f1_kp2: Wareegga isku midka ah: koronto isku mid ah dhammaan qaybaha; durdurrada is biirsadaan.
learnSch_physics_f1_kp4: Goobaha magnetic waxay ku xoojiyaan kharashyada dhaqdhaqaaqa: F = qvB.
learnSch_physics_f2_desc: Mowjadaha waxay wareejiyaan tamarta iyaga oo aan wareejin walxaha. Cod iyo iftiin labaduba waa hirar. Optics-ku waxay daraaseeyaan sida iftiinku u dhaqmo - ka tarjumaya muraayadaha, ku foorarsiga muraayadaha, iyo samaynta sawirro.
learnSch_physics_f2_task: Hirarka dhawaaqu wuxuu leeyahay inta jeer ee 440 Hz iyo xawaarihiisa 340 m/s. Waa maxay dhererkiisu Isticmaal v = fλ.
learnSch_physics_f2_kp0: Xawaaraha hirarka = inta jeer × hirarka dhererka (v = fλ).
learnSch_physics_f2_kp1: Codku wuxuu dhex maraa maadada; kuma safri karto meel bannaan.
learnSch_physics_f2_kp2: Iftiinku wuxuu ku socdaa 300,000 km/s meel banaan ah (c).
learnSch_physics_f2_kp4: Dib-u-soo-celinta: leexashada iftiinka marka ay dhex marto walxaha cufnaanta kala duwan (Sharciga Snell).
learnSch_chemistry_f0_desc: Wax walba waxay ka samaysan yihiin atamka. Atom kastaa wuxuu leeyahay xudunta (protons + neutrons) oo ay ku wareegsan yihiin elektaroonno. Jadwalka xilliyeedku waxa uu u habeeyaa curiyayaasha lambarkooda atamka iyo sifooyinka kiimikaad.
learnSch_chemistry_f0_task: Kaarboon waxa uu leeyahay lambarka atomiga 6. Immisa borotoon, elektaroonno, iyo neutron ayaa ¹² C haysta?
learnSch_chemistry_f0_kp0: Tirada atomiga = tirada borotoonnada; ayaa go'aaminaya curiyaha uu yahay.
learnSch_chemistry_f0_kp2: Electron-yadu waxay hayaan heerarka tamarta (qofof); Elektroonada ugu dambeeya ayaa go'aamiya falcelinta.
learnSch_chemistry_f0_kp3: Isotopeyadu waa atomyo isku mid ah oo leh tirooyin kala duwan oo neutron ah.
learnSch_chemistry_f0_kp4: Ionic bonds: wareejinta elektarooniga. Xirmooyinka covalent: elektaroonnada waa la wadaagaa.
learnSch_chemistry_f1_desc: Falcelinta kiimikaad waxay dib u habeeyaan atamka si ay u sameeyaan walxo cusub. Reactants waxa loo beddelaa alaab. Fahamka falcelinta waxay caawisaa daawada, sayniska agabka, cunto karinta, iyo warshadaha.
learnSch_chemistry_f1_task: Dheelitir isla'egtan: H₂ + O₂ → H₂O. Immisa molecules H₂ iyo O₂ ayaad u baahan tahay?
learnSch_chemistry_f1_kp0: Sharciga ilaalinta tirada: atamka lama abuurin mana la baabi'in falcelin.
learnSch_chemistry_f1_kp1: Isku dheelli tirka isla'egta: tirada atamka kasta waa in ay siman yihiin labada dhinac.
learnSch_chemistry_f1_kp2: Heerka falcelinta ayaa kor u kacda heerkulka sare, xoogga saarista, ama aagga dusha sare.
learnSch_chemistry_f1_kp3: Kataliyayaashu waxay dedejiyaan falcelinta iyada oo aan la isticmaalin.
learnSch_chemistry_f1_kp4: Stoichiometry waxay isticmaashaa saamiga mole si ay u xisaabiso tirada falcelinta.
learnSch_chemistry_f2_desc: Asiidhyadu waxay ku deeqaan ion hydrogen (H⁺); saldhigyadu aqbaleen. Qiyaasta pH waxay cabbirtaa aysidhka min 0 (aad u acidic) ilaa 14 (aad u aasaasi ah), iyadoo 7 ay dhexdhexaad yihiin. Dareen-celinta dhexdhexaadinta waxay isku daraan asiidh iyo saldhigyo si ay u sameeyaan biyo iyo milix.
learnSch_chemistry_f2_task: Haddii aad ku darto hydrochloric acid (HCl) iyo sodium hydroxide (NaOH), alaab noocee ah ayaa sameysma? Qor isla'egta
learnSch_chemistry_f2_kp0: pH <7 = acidic (tusaale, khal pH ≈ 3). pH> 7 = aasaasiga ah (tusaale, baking soda pH ≈ 9).
learnSch_chemistry_f2_kp2: Tilmaamayaasha (sida litmus) waxay beddelaan midabka asiidhka iyo saldhigyada.
learnSch_chemistry_f2_kp3: Asiidhyo xooggan ayaa si buuxda u kala baxa (HCl); asiidh daciif ah oo qayb ahaan kala baxa (CH₃COOH).
learnSch_chemistry_f2_kp4: Titration ayaa go'aamisa diiradda aan la garanayn iyada oo ka falcelinaysa xal la yaqaan.
learnSch_biology_f0_desc: Unuggu waa unugga aasaasiga ah ee noolaha oo dhan. Unugyadu waxay qabtaan dhammaan hawlaha nolosha: helidda tamar, ka jawaabista deegaanka, koraan, iyo taran. Fahamka unugyadu waa aasaaska bayoolaji oo dhan.
learnSch_biology_f0_task: Magacaw saddex farqi oo u dhexeeya unugga dhirta iyo unugga xayawaanka oo leh hal shaqo oo kala duwanaansho kasta.
learnSch_biology_f0_kp0: Prokaryotes (bakteeriyadu) ma laha nukleus; eukaryotes (xoolaha, dhirta, fangaska) waxay leeyihiin xudunta.
learnSch_biology_f0_kp1: Nucleus-ku waxa uu ka kooban yahay DNA, naqshadda hidde-sidaha unugga.
learnSch_biology_f0_kp2: Mitochondria waxay tamar ku soo saartaa neefsiga gacanta (ATP).
learnSch_biology_f0_kp3: Mitosis waxay soo saartaa laba unug oo isku mid ah oo gabdhaha ah si ay u koraan una dayactiraan.
learnSch_biology_f0_kp4: Meiosis waxay soo saartaa afar unug oo galmo ah (gametes) oo leh numbarka koromosoomyada.
learnSch_biology_f0_tp1: Mitosis iyo meiosis || DNA iyo RNA || Biology-ga Aadanaha
learnSch_biology_f0_tp2: Jidhka bini'aadamku waa nidaam kakan oo ka mid ah hababka xubnaha ka wada shaqeeya ilaalinta nolosha. Fahamka sida nidaamyadani u shaqeeyaan waxay ka caawisaa caafimaadka, daawada, iyo samaqabka qofka.
learnSch_biology_f1_name: Raad raac dariiqa neefta ogsijiinta ee sanka ilaa unugga muruqa. Magaca nidaamka xubin kasta oo ku lug leh.
learnSch_biology_f1_desc: Habka wareegga dhiigga ayaa dhiigga ku shuba jidhka, isaga oo keena ogsijiinta iyo nafaqooyinka.
learnSch_biology_f1_task: Habka dheefshiidka ayaa cuntada u jebiya nafaqooyinka jidhku nuugi karo.
learnSch_biology_f1_kp0: Nidaamka neerfayaasha ayaa habeeya macluumaadka oo isku duwo jawaabaha.
learnSch_biology_f1_kp1: Homeostasis wuxuu ilaaliyaa xaaladaha gudaha mid deggan (tusaale heerkulka jidhka oo ah 37°C).
learnSch_biology_f1_kp2: Nafaqada: karbohaydraytyadu waxay bixiyaan tamar; borotiinno dhisma; dufanku waxay kaydiyaan tamarta waxayna ilaaliyaan xubnaha.
learnSch_biology_f1_kp3: Homeostasis keeps internal conditions stable (e.g. body temperature at 37°C).
learnSch_biology_f1_kp4: Nutrition: carbohydrates give energy; proteins build; fats store energy and protect organs.
learnSch_biology_f2_desc: Ecology waxay barataa sida nooluhu ula falgalaan midba midka kale iyo deegaankooda. Fahamka nidaamyada deegaanka waxay naga caawiyaan ilaalinta kala duwanaanshaha noolaha, maaraynta kheyraadka, iyo wax ka qabashada isbedelka cimilada.
learnSch_biology_f2_task: Ku sawir shabakad cunto fudud oo leh 5 noole. Calaamadee soosaarayaasha, macaamiisha aasaasiga ah, iyo macaamiisha sare.
learnSch_biology_f2_kp0: Soosaarayaasha (dhirta) waxay cuntada ku sameeyaan photosynthesis; macaamiishu way cunaan.
learnSch_biology_f2_kp1: Silsilad cunto ayaa muujinaysa socodka tamarta: Qorraxda → geedka → herbivore → hilib hilib ah.
learnSch_biology_f2_kp2: Kaliya 10% tamarta ayaa u gudbisa heerka koobabka xiga.
learnSch_biology_f2_kp3: Kala duwanaanshiyaha nooluhu wuxuu ka dhigaa hab-nololeedyada kuwo u adkeysanaya isbeddelka.
learnSch_biology_f2_kp4: Isbeddelka cimiladu waxa ay beddeshaa degaannada, waxa ay beddeshaa noocyada kala duwan ee kala duwan, oo ay carqaladayso mareegaha cuntada.
learnSch_computer_science_f0_desc: Fikirka xisaabinta waa hab mushkilad xalin ah oo loo isticmaalo barnaamijyada iyo wixii ka dambeeya. Waxay u jebisaa dhibaatooyinka adag qaybo la maarayn karo oo waxay heshaa xal-tallaabo tallaabo ah oo kombuyuutar (ama aadanaha) raaci karo.
learnSch_computer_science_f0_task: Ku qor algorithm-tallaabo-tallaabo ah (luqad cad) si aad u kala soocdo sagxadda isku shaandhaynta ee 5 kaar oo lambar ah.
learnSch_computer_science_f0_kp0: Burburinta: u jebi dhibaato weyn oo u kala qaybisa dhibaatooyin hoose oo yaryar oo la xallin karo.
learnSch_computer_science_f0_kp1: Aqoonsiga qaabka: aqoonso waxa ay isaga mid yihiin iyo sida joogtada ah ee dhibaatooyinka.
learnSch_computer_science_f0_kp2: Soo koobid: diirada saar qaybaha muhiimka ah iskana dhaaf faahfaahinta aan khusayn.
learnSch_computer_science_f0_kp3: Algorithm: waa taxane sax ah oo tillaabooyinka lagu xalliyo dhibaatada.
learnSch_computer_science_f0_kp4: Pseudocode wuxuu caawiyaa qorsheynta algorithm ee luqadda cad ka hor inta aan koodka la dhigin.
learnSch_computer_science_f1_desc: Barnaamijku wuxuu u tarjumaa fikradaha macquulka ah ee tilmaamaha kombuyuutarku fulin karo. Barnaamij kastaa waxa uu isticmaalaa doorsoomayaasha, xaaladaha, loops, iyo hawlaha. Dejinta - raadinta iyo hagaajinta khaladaadka - waa xirfad lagama maarmaan ah.
learnSch_computer_science_f1_task: Qor pseudocode ama koodka saxda ah oo weydiiya isticmaalaha lambar oo daabac haddii ay tahay khayaali ama xitaa.
learnSch_computer_science_f1_kp0: Doorsoomuhu waxa uu kaydiyaa qiime bedeli kara: x = 5.
learnSch_computer_science_f1_kp1: Loop wuxuu ku soo celiyaa koodka: waayo, waxaan ku jiraa tirada (5) wuxuu wadaa jirka 5 jeer.
learnSch_computer_science_f1_kp2: Haddii-bayaanku uu gaaro go'aan: haddii x> 0: daabac("positive").
learnSch_computer_science_f1_kp3: Kooxaha shaqada kood dib loo isticmaali karo: def salaan(magaca): soo celi "Hello" + magac.
learnSch_computer_science_f1_kp4: Noocyada khaladaadka caadiga ah: khaladaadka syntax (hingaad qaldan), khaladaadka runtime (shil), khaladaad macquul ah (natiijo khaldan).
learnSch_computer_science_f2_desc: Nidaamyada dhijitaalka ah ayaa sameeya kaabayaasha internetka iyo xisaabinta casriga ah. Fahamka shabakadaha, matalaada xogta, iyo amniga internetka ayaa lama huraan u ah qof kasta oo isticmaalaya ama dhisaya tignoolajiyada.
learnSch_computer_science_f2_task: U beddel tobanlaha nambarka 13 ee binary. Tus shaqadaada (u qaybi 2 si isdaba joog ah).
learnSch_computer_science_f2_kp0: Xogta waxa lagu kaydiyaa binary (0s iyo 1s): 8 bits = 1 byte.
learnSch_computer_science_f2_kp1: ASCII iyo Unicode nambarada khariidad ee jilayaasha (tusaale A = 65 gudaha ASCII).
learnSch_computer_science_f2_kp2: Intarneetku waa shabakad caalami ah oo isku xidhan oo isticmaalaya borotokoolka TCP/IP.
learnSch_computer_science_f2_kp3: HTTP waxaa loo isticmaalaa bogagga shabakadda; HTTPS waxay ku darsataa sirta amniga
learnSch_computer_science_f2_kp4: Sirintu waxay xoqdaa xogta si qofka loogu talagalay kaliya uu u akhriyo.
learnSch_language_arts_f0_desc: Akhriska iyo falanqaynta waxay ku barayaan inaad si qotodheer u fahanto oo aad u qiimayso qoraalada. Waxaad baranaysaa inaad aqoonsato ujeedada qoraaga, doodaha qaabdhismeedka, oo aad qiimeyso tayada caddaynta la isticmaalay.
learnSch_language_arts_f0_task: Akhri hal cutub oo maqaal kasta ah. Aqoonso: (1) sheegashada ugu weyn, (2) hal caddaymo, (3) hal eex oo suurtagal ah.
learnSch_language_arts_f0_kp0: Noocyada qaab dhismeedka qoraalka: sooyaalka soo jireenka ah, xalinta mushkiladda, sabab-saamaynta, isbarbardhigga-barbardhigga.
learnSch_language_arts_f0_kp1: Doodda ugu weyni waa sheegashada dhexe ee qoraagu doonayo in aad aqbasho.
learnSch_language_arts_f0_kp2: Caddaynta waxay taageertaa sheegashooyinka: raadi xaqiiqooyinka, tirakoobyada, xigashooyinka khabiirada, iyo tusaalooyinka.
learnSch_language_arts_f0_kp3: Qiimee isha: qoraagu ma yahay mid la aamini karo? Caddeyntu miyay dhowdahay oo ma khusaysaa?
learnSch_language_arts_f0_kp4: Eexdu waxay dhacdaa marka qoraalku soo bandhigo hal dhinac oo dood ah.
learnSch_language_arts_f1_desc: Qorista wanaagsani waxay u gudbisaa fikradaha si cad oo qancin leh. Nidaamku wuxuu ku lug leeyahay qorsheynta, diyaarinta, dib-u-eegista, iyo tafatirka. Qaab-dhismeedka iyo caddayntu waxay muhiim u yihiin sida erayada.
learnSch_language_arts_f1_task: Qor hal cutub oo PEEL (5-7 jumlad) adoo ku doodaya in shaqada gurigu faa'iido leedahay ama waxyeello leedahay. Isticmaal hal caddaymo.
learnSch_language_arts_f1_kp0: Baaragaraaf PEEL: Point → Caddeyn → Sharax → Dib u xidhidh.
learnSch_language_arts_f1_kp1: Hordhac qormo ah ayaa sheegaya doodda; Gabagabada waxa ay dib ugu celinaysaa aragti.
learnSch_language_arts_f1_kp2: Qorista rasmiga ahi waxay ka fogaataa foosha, af-lagaadada, iyo qofka koowaad ilaa la cayimo mooyee.
learnSch_language_arts_f1_kp3: Codka firfircooni wuu cad yahay: "Ardaygu dhibka wuu xalliyey" (ma'ay "xalinin").
learnSch_language_arts_f1_kp4: Had iyo jeer dib u eeg: hubi caqligalka, caddaynta, naxwaha, iyo jumlada kala duwan.
learnSch_language_arts_f2_desc: Xeerarka naxwaha ayaa xukuma sida ereyadu isugu daraan weedho sax ah. Erayada xooggani waxay ka dhigtaa qorista mid sax ah oo qancisa. Labaduba waxay u baahan yihiin ku celcelin firfircoon - ma aha oo kaliya akhrinta dadban.
learnSch_language_arts_f2_task: Dib ugu qor jumladan saddex xilli oo kala duwan: "Kooxda ayaa badisay ciyaarta." ( hore, mustaqbalka, hadda kaamil ah)
learnSch_language_arts_f2_kp0: Weedhu waxay u baahan tahay mawduuc iyo fal: "Waxay ordaa."
learnSch_language_arts_f2_kp1: Xiisaduhu waxay muujinayaan waqti: xaadir (orod), hore (orod), mustaqbal (waa ordi doona), xaadir qumman (waa orday).
learnSch_language_arts_f2_kp2: Qodobbada: qodob muhiim ah ayaa keligiis taagan; Qodobka hoose wuxuu u baahan yahay qodob muhiim ah.
learnSch_language_arts_f2_kp3: Calaamadayntu waxay hagtaa akhristaha: comma = hakad kooban, hal-ku-dhig = ku biir fikradaha la xidhiidha.
learnSch_language_arts_f2_kp4: Tilmaamaha macnuhu waxa ay gacan ka geystaan ​​dejinta ereyada aan la aqoon: eeg erayada ku xeeran.
learnSch_history_f0_name: Taariikhda Adduunka || Taariikhda dunidu waxay raadraacaysaa sida bulshooyinka bani-aadmigu u horumareen kumannaan sano, laga soo bilaabo ilbaxnimadihii hore ee soo maray boqortooyooyin, kacdoono, iyo dagaalladii adduunka ilaa nidaamka casriga ah ee caalamiga ah. Taariikhdu waxay ina caawisaa inaan fahanno sababta dunidu u tahay sida ay tahay.
learnSch_history_f0_desc: Dooro hal dhacdo oo taariikhi ah oo weyn oo sharax: (1) sababteeda, (2) wixii dhacay, (3) saameynteeda muddada dheer.
learnSch_history_f0_task: Mesopotamia (Ciraaq) iyo Masar waxay ka mid yihiin ilbaxnimadii hore ee la yaqaan.
learnSch_history_f0_kp0: Kacaankii Warshadaha (18-19aad c.) waxa uu dhaqaalihii ka bedelay beeralayda una bedelay wax soo saar.
learnSch_history_f0_kp1: Dagaalkii Dunida I (1914-1918) iyo Dagaalkii Labaad (1939-1945) waxay dib u habeeyeen nidaamka caalamiga ah.
learnSch_history_f0_kp2: Dagaalkii qaboobaa (1947-1991) wuxuu dunida u kala qaybiyay US iyo Soviet Union.
learnSch_history_f0_kp3: Caalamaynta laga soo bilaabo 1990-meeyadii waxa ay abuurtay dhaqaale iyo dhaqamo isku xidhan.
learnSch_history_f1_name: Ilaha aasaasiga ah waa dukumeenti ama farshaxanno asal ah oo laga soo bilaabo xilliga la daraaseeyay - xarfo, khudbado, sawirro, sharciyo, xusuus qor. Taariikhyahanadu waxay u isticmaalaan inay dib u dhisaan wixii la soo dhaafay sida ugu saxsan ee suurtogalka ah.
learnSch_history_f1_desc: Soo hel xigasho gaaban oo taariikhi ah (hadal ama warqad). Aqoonso qoraaga, taariikhda, iyo hal eexda suurtagalka ah.
learnSch_history_f1_task: Ilaha aasaasiga ah waxaa ka mid ah xusuus qor, sharciyo, sawirro, khudbado, iyo heshiisyo.
learnSch_history_f1_kp0: Ilaha labaad waxay fasiraan ilaha aasaasiga ah: buugaagta wax lagu barto, taariikh nololeedka, dukumentiyada.
learnSch_history_f1_kp1: Weydii: Yaa qoray kan? Goorma? Maxaa dhagaystayaal ah? Waa maxay aragtidooda?
learnSch_history_f1_kp2: Ask: Who wrote this? When? For what audience? What is their perspective?
learnSch_history_f1_kp3: Eexdu ma samayso ilo aan faa'iido lahayn - waxay muujinaysaa aragtida qoraaga.
learnSch_history_f1_kp4: Xaqiijinta: ka hubi isha laga soo xigtay caddaynta kale si loo qiimeeyo isku halaynta.
learnSch_geography_f0_desc: Juqraafiga jireed wuxuu daraaseeyaa astaamaha dabiiciga ah ee dhulka - qaab-dhismeedka dhulka, webiyada, cimilada, iyo nidaamka deegaanka. Fahamka juqraafiga jireed wuxuu sharxayaa sababta magaalooyinka, waddooyinka ganacsiga, iyo ilbaxnimooyinka u horumareen halka ay sameeyeen.
learnSch_geography_f0_task: Sharax sababta dhulgariirku uga dhaco "Ring of Fire" adoo isticmaalaya tectonics saxan.
learnSch_geography_f0_kp0: Plate tectonics: qolofta dhulku waxay u qaybsantaa taariko dhaqaaqa, taasoo keenta dhulgariir iyo foolkaanooyin.
learnSch_geography_f0_kp1: Wareegga biyaha: uumi-baxa → Uumiga → roobka → qulqulaya → ku celceli.
learnSch_geography_f0_kp2: Aagagga cimilada: kulaylaha, oomane, dhexdhexaad ah, qaarad, polar.
learnSch_geography_f0_kp3: Nidaamka webigu wuxuu leeyahay il (dhul sare), biyo-mareenno, iyo af (meesha uu badda kula kulmo).
learnSch_geography_f0_kp4: Khataraha dabiiciga ah (dhulgariir, daadad, duufaano) waxaa qaabeeya juqraafi.
learnSch_geography_f1_desc: Juquraafiga aadamuhu wuxuu daraaseeyaa sida dadku ula falgalaan deegaankooda iyo sida ay u habeeyaan meel bannaan. Mawduucyada waxaa ka mid ah halka ay dadku ku nool yihiin, sababta ay magaalooyinku u koraan, iyo sida dhaqaalahoodu u kala duwan yihiin adduunka oo dhan.
learnSch_geography_f1_task: Is barbar dhig labada waddan HDI-dooda. Aqoonso laba sababood oo mid ka mid ah laga yaabo inuu ka sareeyo kan kale.
learnSch_geography_f1_kp0: Cufnaanta dadweynaha = dadka ÷ aagga. Cufnaanta gobollada xeebta iyo barwaaqo; ku yar saxaraha iyo buuraha.
learnSch_geography_f1_kp1: Magaaleynta: dadka u guura miyiga una guura magaalooyinka shaqo iyo adeegyo.
learnSch_geography_f1_kp2: Arrimaha riixa ayaa dadka kaxeeya (tusaale faqri, colaad); arrimaha jiidaya iyaga (tusaale, shaqooyinka, badbaadada).
learnSch_geography_f1_kp3: Caalamaynta: badeecooyinka, raasamaal, dadka, iyo fikradaha waxay si xor ah uga gudbaan xuduudaha.
learnSch_geography_f1_kp4: Horumarka waxa lagu qiyaasi karaa GDP qofkiiba, rajada nolosha, iyo waxbarashada (HDI).
learnSch_economics_f0_name: Microeconomics waxay daraasaysaa sida shakhsiyaadka iyo shirkaduhu u qaataan go'aannada ku saabsan ilaha. Waxay sharraxaysaa sida qiimaha loo dejiyay, sababta suuqyadu u fashilmaan mararka qaarkood, iyo sida dhiirigelintu u qaabayso hab-dhaqanka.
learnSch_economics_f0_desc: Haddii qiimaha qaxwaha uu sare u kaco, maxaa ku dhacaya dalabka shaaha? Sharax adigoo isticmaalaya alaab beddel ah.
learnSch_economics_f0_task: Baahida: marka uu qiimuhu hoos u dhaco, tirada la rabo ayaa kor u kacda (xidhiidhka rogan).
learnSch_economics_f0_kp0: Supply: marka uu qiimihiisu kordho, tirada la keenay ayaa kor u kacda (xidhiidh toos ah).
learnSch_economics_f0_kp1: Equilibrium: halka sahaydu ka soo baxdo baahida - qiimaha nadiifinta suuqa.
learnSch_economics_f0_kp2: Elasticity waxay cabbirtaa sida baahida xasaasiga ah ama sahaydu ay ugu tahay isbeddellada qiimaha.
learnSch_economics_f0_kp3: Fashilka suuqa: marka ay suuqyadu soo saaraan wax badan (negative externalities) ama aad u yar (alaabta guud).
learnSch_economics_f1_desc: Maaliyadda shakhsi ahaaneed waxay kaa caawinaysaa inaad si xikmad leh u maamusho lacagtaada. Fahamka miisaaniyad-samaynta, kaydinta, iyo credit-ku waxay ka dhigan tahay inaad samayn karto go'aamo xog-ogaal ah inta aad nooshahay.
learnSch_economics_f1_task: Waxaad heshaa €800 bishii. Liis garee 5 qaybood oo kharash ah oo u qoondee miisaaniyad mid kasta oo lagu daro ilaa €800.
learnSch_economics_f1_kp0: Miisaaniyada waxay la socotaa dakhliga iyo kharashyada. Kharash ka yar inta aad hesho si aad u kaydsato.
learnSch_economics_f1_kp1: Xiisaha fudud: I = P × r × t (Maamulaha × heerka × wakhtiga).
learnSch_economics_f1_kp2: Dulsaarka isku dhafan wuxuu u koraa kaydka si aad ah - hore u bilow.
learnSch_economics_f1_kp3: Daynta: amaahashada hadda oo dib u bixinta dulsaarka; si taxadar leh u isticmaal.
learnSch_economics_f1_kp4: Sanduuqa xaaladaha degdegga ahi waa inuu daboolaa 3-6 bilood oo kharash ah.
learnSch_earth_science_f0_name: Geology-ga waxa uu daraaseeyaa qaab-dhismeedka dhulka, dhagaxyada uu ka samaysan yahay, iyo sida uu wakhtiga isu beddelo. Dhulku wuxuu jiraa ilaa 4.5 bilyan oo sano. Lakabyadiisa - qolof, gooyo, xudunta dibadda, xudunta gudaha - waxay leeyihiin sifooyin kala duwan.
learnSch_earth_science_f0_desc: Qulqulka lafaha ayaa qaboojiya oo adkaata. Waa maxay nooca dhagaxa Maxaa u rogi kara dhagax metamorphic muddo ka dib?
learnSch_earth_science_f0_task: Wareega dhagaxa: igneous → sedimentary → metamorphic → dib ugu noqo magma.
learnSch_earth_science_f0_kp0: Dhagaxyada igneous waxay ka samaysan yihiin magma la qaboojiyey ama lava (tusaale granite, basalt).
learnSch_earth_science_f0_kp1: Dhagaxyada sedimentary waxay ka samaysan yihiin lakabyo wasakh ah (tusaale, dhagax ciid, nuurad).
learnSch_earth_science_f0_kp2: Dhagaxyada Metamorphic waxaa lagu beddelaa kulayl iyo cadaadis (tusaale marmar, slate).
learnSch_earth_science_f0_kp3: Plate tectonics wuxuu sharxayaa dhulgariirrada, foolkaanaha, iyo dhismaha buuraha.
learnSch_earth_science_f0_kp4: Plate tectonics explains earthquakes, volcanoes, and mountain building.
learnSch_earth_science_f1_desc: Astronomy waxay barataa wax kasta oo ka baxsan Dhulka - meerayaasha, xiddigaha, galaxyada, iyo caalamka laftiisa. Nidaamkeena qorraxdu wuxuu sameeyay qiyaastii 4.6 bilyan sano ka hor. Caalamka waxa lagu qiyaasaa in uu jiro 13.8 bilyan oo sano.
learnSch_earth_science_f1_task: Xisaabi: iftiinku wuxuu ku socdaa 300,000 km/s. Intee in le'eg ayuu iftiinku ku socdaa 1 daqiiqo? 1 saac gudahood?
learnSch_earth_science_f1_kp0: Nidaamkeena qorraxdu: 8 meere ayaa ku wareegaya qorraxda. Dalabka: Mercury, Venus, Earth, Mars, Jupiter, Saturn, Uranus, Neptune.
learnSch_earth_science_f1_kp1: Xiddiguhu waxay tamar ku soo saaraan isku-dhafka nukliyeerka: atomyada hydrogen-ka ayaa isku fidinaya si ay u sameeyaan helium.
learnSch_earth_science_f1_kp2: Sannad-iftiintu waa masaafada uu iftiinku socdo hal sano gudaheed (≈9.46 trillion km).
learnSch_earth_science_f1_kp3: Jidka caanuhu waa galaxyadayada; waxa ku jira in ka badan 200 oo bilyan oo xiddigood.
learnSch_earth_science_f1_kp4: Aragtida Big Bang: Caalamku wuxuu ku bilaabmay meel aad u kulul, oo cufan ~ 13.8 bilyan sano ka hor.
learnSch_health_f0_desc: Caafimaadka shakhsi ahaaneed wuxuu daboolayaa caadooyinka iyo doorashooyinka saameeya caafimaadkaaga jir iyo maskaxeed. Ficilada yaryar ee maalinlaha ah - hurdo, nafaqo, jimicsi - waxay saameyn dheer ku leeyihiin caafimaadka.
learnSch_health_f0_task: Qorshee cunto dheeli tiran oo leh ugu yaraan 4 kooxood oo cunto ah. Aqoonso hal nafaqo iyo shaqadeeda cunto kasta.
learnSch_health_f0_kp0: Dadka waaweyni waxay u baahan yihiin 7-9 saacadood oo hurdo ah habeenkii; dhalinyaradu waxay u baahan yihiin 8-10 saacadood.
learnSch_health_f0_kp1: Cunto isku dheeli tiran waxaa ka mid ah karbohaydraytyo, borotiinno, dufan caafimaad qaba, fiitamiinno, iyo macdanno.
learnSch_health_f0_kp2: Dhaqdhaqaaqa jireed ee joogtada ah (150 daqiqo/isbuucii xoojinta dhexdhexaadka ah) waxay yaraynaysaa khatarta cudurada.
learnSch_health_f0_kp3: Fuuq-baxa: ujeeddadiisu waa ≈2 litir oo biyo ah maalintii iyadoo ku xiran dhaqdhaqaaqa iyo cimilada.
learnSch_health_f0_kp4: Daryeelka caafimaadka ka hortagga: baaritaanno joogto ah, tallaallo, iyo booqashooyinka ilkaha.
learnSch_health_f1_desc: Caafimaadka dhimirka ayaa muhiim u ah sida caafimaadka jirka oo kale. Waxay saamaysaa sida aynu u fikirno, dareemeyno, iyo sida aan u dhaqmayno. Fahamka walbahaarka iyo shucuurta - iyo halka laga helo caawimo - waa xirfad nololeed.
learnSch_health_f1_task: Liis garee 3 siyaabood oo caafimaad qaba oo aad u maareyso walbahaarka. Sharax sababta istaraatiijiyad kastaa ay u shaqeyso jir ahaan ama maskax ahaan.
learnSch_health_f1_kp0: Cadaadisku waa jawaab celin caadi ah caqabadaha; Cadaadiska joogtada ahi wuxuu waxyeeleeyaa caafimaadka.
learnSch_health_f1_kp1: Farsamooyinka: Neefsashada qoto dheer, jimicsiga jirka, la hadalka qof, maaraynta waqtiga.
learnSch_health_f1_kp2: Walaaca iyo niyad-jabka waa caadi - waa xaalado caafimaad, ma aha daciifnimo.
learnSch_health_f1_kp3: Caawinta saaxiib: dhegayso xukun la'aan, dhiirigeli taageerada xirfadeed.
learnSch_health_f1_kp4: Hurdada, jimicsiga, iyo xidhiidhka bulshada ayaa hagaajiya caafimaadka maskaxda.
learnSch_arts_f0_desc: Farshaxan muuqaalku wuxuu ku muujiyaa fikradaha, shucuurta, iyo sheekooyinka iyada oo loo marayo sawirro iyo walxo. Sawir-gacmeedka, rinjiyeynta, farshaxanimada, iyo naqshadeynta dhammaan waxay isticmaalaan waxyaabo aasaasi ah: xariiq, qaab, midab, muuqaal, bannaan, iyo qaab.
learnSch_arts_f0_task: U sawir shay kasta adigoo isticmaalaya khadadka kooraska oo kaliya ( dulmar kaliya). Kadibna hadh hal aag si aad u muujiso qoto dheer.
learnSch_arts_f0_kp0: Midabka midabka: aasaasiga ah (cas, jaalle, buluug) → sare (orange, cagaar, violet).
learnSch_arts_f0_kp1: Midabada dhameystiran waxay ku fadhiyaan iska soo horjeeda midba midka kale ee giraangiraha (casaan-cagaar, buluug-orange).
learnSch_arts_f0_kp2: Halabuurka: sida walxaha loo habeeyey. Xeerka seddexaad wuxuu u qaybiyaa jir 9 qaybood oo siman.
learnSch_arts_f0_kp3: Line: waxay soo jeedin kartaa dhaqdhaqaaqa, dareenka, jihada.
learnSch_arts_f0_kp4: Meel xun: asalka ku xeeran mawduuc - sida muhiimka ah sida mawduuca laftiisa.
learnSch_music_f0_desc: Aragtida muusikadu waa luqadda muusigga. Waxay sharxaysaa sida codadka loo habeeyey ee laxanka, wada noolaanshaha, iyo qaafiyada. Akhrinta qoraalka muusikadu waa sida akhrinta qariirada codka.
learnSch_music_f0_task: Sacab laxanka heesta aad taqaan. Ku qor calaamado dhaadheer (—) iyo gaaban (·) Immisa garaac baa barkiiba?
learnSch_music_f0_kp0: Pitch: sareynta ama hoos u dhaca codka. Lagu cabiray Hz
learnSch_music_f0_kp1: Qoraalada ku saabsan shaqaalaha: Xadhkaha jeexjeexa ee Treble (EGBDF), meelaha bannaan (FACE).
learnSch_music_f0_kp2: garaaca = garaaca garaaca wadnaha. Tempo = Xawaaraha (BPM). Laxanka = qaababka dhawaaqyada dhaadheer iyo kuwa gaaban.
learnSch_music_f0_kp3: Miisaanku waa qoraalo taxane ah oo qaab gaar ah ku jira (tusaale miisaan weyn: dhan-dhan-nus-dhammaan-dhan-badh-dhan).
learnSch_music_f0_kp4: Xarkadu waa 3+ qoraalo oo la wada ciyaaro; dhawaaqyada waaweyni waxay u dhawaaqaan dhalaal, xargaha yaryar ayaa u dhawaqaya madow.
learnSch_physical_education_f0_desc: Jir-dhiska jidhku waxa uu leeyahay afar qaybood oo waaweyn: adkaysiga wadnaha iyo xididdada dhiigga, xoogga murqaha, dabacsanaanta, iyo isku-dhafka jidhka. Tababar goob kasta si joogto ah ayuu u wanaajiyaa caafimaadka iyo waxqabadka.
learnSch_physical_education_f0_task: Naqshad qorshe jimicsi 30-daqiiqo ah toddobaadle ah adoo isticmaalaya mabda'a FITT. Ku dar ugu yaraan 2 nooc oo jimicsi ah.
learnSch_physical_education_f0_kp0: Jimicsiga hawada (orodka, dabaasha) wuxuu xoojiyaa wadnaha iyo sambabada.
learnSch_physical_education_f0_kp1: Jimicsiga anaerobic (miisaanka qaadista, orodka) waxay dhistaa xoogga muruqa.
learnSch_physical_education_f0_kp2: Culays horusocod ah: si tartiib tartiib ah u kordhi xoojinta si aad u sii wanaajiso.
learnSch_physical_education_f0_kp3: Nasasho iyo soo kabasho waa marka muruqyadu dhab ahaantii koraan.
learnSch_physical_education_f0_kp4: Mabda'a FITT: Soo noqnoqoshada, xoojinta, Waqtiga, Nooca - tiirarka qorshaha tababarka.
learnSch_german_language_title: Luuqadda Jarmalka || Qaabka Naxwaha iyo Xukunka
learnSch_german_language_f0_name: Naxwaha Jarmalku wuxuu ku dhisan yahay afar kiis (Nominativ, Akkusativ, Dativ, Genitiv) kuwaas oo go'aamiya magacyada iyo foomamka maqaallada. Fahamka kiisasku waa furaha samaynta weedho Jarmal ah oo sax ah.
learnSch_german_language_f0_desc: Dib ugu qor kiis sax ah: 'Der Hund (beißen) ____ Mann.' Geli maqaalka Akkusativ saxda ah ee 'Mann'.
learnSch_german_language_f0_task: Nominativ = mawduuc (Yaa ficilka sameeya?). Akkusativ = shay toos ah (Waa maxay?). Dativ = shay aan toos ahayn (To/Yaa loogu talagalay?). Genitiv = lahaanshaha.
learnSch_german_language_f0_kp0: Maqaallada qeexan waxay ku beddelaan kiis: der/die/das (Nom.) → den/die/das (Akk.) → dem/der/dem (Dat.).
learnSch_german_language_f0_kp1: Booska falka: faqradaha waaweyn, falku had iyo jeer waa labaad. Qodobada hoose, falku wuxuu tagayaa dhamaadka.
learnSch_german_language_f0_kp2: Verb position: in main clauses, the verb is always second. In subordinate clauses, the verb goes to the end.
learnSch_german_language_f0_kp3: Dhamaadka sifadu way isbedeshaa iyadoo ku xidhan maqaalka iyo kiiska (xoog, daciif ah, hoos u dhac isku dhafan).
learnSch_german_language_f0_kp4: Hababka shaqallada (können, müssen, dürfen, sollen, wollen, mögen) had iyo jeer waxay la socdaan wax aan dhammaad lahayn dhammaadka.
learnSch_german_language_f1_desc: Falanqaynta qoraalka Jarmalku waxay ku baraysaa inaad aqoonsato aaladaha suugaanta, fasirto macnaha, oo aad qorto dood habaysan. Xirfadahani waxay khuseeyaan gabayada, sheekooyinka gaagaaban, iyo tiraab dhaadheer.
learnSch_german_language_f1_task: Ka hel hal tusaale iyo hal tusaale oo gabay Jarmal ah oo gaaban. Qor hal jumlad oo sharxaysa mid walba waxa uu ka dhigan yahay.
learnSch_german_language_f1_kp0: Falanqaynta qaab-dhismeedka: hordhac, jidhka ugu weyn, gunaanad (Einleitung, Hauptteil, Schluss).
learnSch_german_language_f1_kp1: Qalabka suugaanta: Sarbeeb (tusaale), Vergleich (la mid ah), Alliteration, Personifikation.
learnSch_german_language_f1_kp2: Textsorte matters: gabayga waxa loo lafa guraa si ka duwan warbixinta wararka.
learnSch_german_language_f1_kp3: Thesis (Kuwan) + caddayn (Beleg) + faallo (Deutung) = qaab-dhismeedka falanqaynta caadiga ah.
learnSch_german_language_f1_kp4: Hadalka dadban wuxuu isticmaalaa Konjunktiv I: Er sagt, er könne helfen.
learnSch_german_language_f2_desc: Qoraal Jarmal ah oo wanaagsan waa sax, si wanaagsan loo habeeyey, oo adeegsada erayo iyo jumlado kala duwan. Ku celcelinta noocyada kala duwan ee qoraalka waxay dhistaa kalsoonida imtixaannada iyo isgaarsiinta nolosha dhabta ah.
learnSch_german_language_f2_task: Ku qor Erörterung 5- jumlad ah: 'Telefoonnada casriga ah ee casriga ah ee der Schule verboten werden?' Isticmaal 'einerseits…andererseits'.
learnSch_german_language_f2_kp0: Erörterung (qoraal dood leh) ayaa soo bandhigaysa doodaha iyo doodaha iyo gunaanad shakhsiyeed.
learnSch_german_language_f2_kp1: Kommentar (faalooyin) ayaa ku doodaya hal mawqif oo leh caddayn iyo su'aalo hadal-hayn ah.
learnSch_german_language_f2_kp2: Zusammenfassung (koob): kooban, qof saddexaad, xaalad joogta ah, fikrado la'aan.
learnSch_german_language_f2_kp3: Kala beddel jumladaha bilawga ah: isticmaal isku-xidhaha hoos yimaada (weil, obwohl, damit, wenn) ee dhismayaasha adag.
learnSch_german_language_f2_kp4: Xarakayn: hakad ka hor dhammaan faqradaha hoose (Nebensätze).
learnSch_religion_ethics_f0_name: Diimaha Caalamka || Fahamka diimaha waaweyn ee adduunka waxay gacan ka geysataa horumarinta ixtiraamka, dareenka, iyo aqoonta dhaqanka. Dhaqan kastaa wuxuu bixiyaa jawaabo gaar ah oo ku saabsan su'aalaha ku saabsan nolosha, dhimashada, caddaaladda, iyo macnaha.
learnSch_religion_ethics_f0_desc: Is barbar dhig sida labada diimood ee aad baratay uga jawaabaan su'aasha: 'Maxaa dhacaya dhimashada ka dib?' Midkiiba u qor 3 jumladood.
learnSch_religion_ethics_f0_task: Masiixiyadda: rumaynta hal Ilaah, Ciise oo ah badbaadiye; qoraalka xurmada leh = Baybalka; ~ 2.4 bilyan oo raacsan.
learnSch_religion_ethics_f0_kp0: Islaamku: rumaynta Alle, Muxamed nabi ahaan; qoraalka xurmada leh = Quraan; shan tiir ayaa haga nolol maalmeedka.
learnSch_religion_ethics_f0_kp1: Yuhuuda: tawxiid; Tawreed (Baybalka Cibraaniga); 613 amar (mitzvot); ~ 15 milyan oo taageerayaal ah.
learnSch_religion_ethics_f0_kp2: Hinduism: ilaahyo badan, hal xaqiiqo kama dambeys ah (Brahman); fikradaha karma, dharma, reincarnation.
learnSch_religion_ethics_f0_kp3: Buddhism: waxbaridda Budha; Afar Xaqiiqo Sharaf leh, Jid Siddeed Laab leh; gool = Nirvana (ka xoraynta dhibaatada).
learnSch_religion_ethics_f1_desc: Anshaxa ayaa waydiinaya: maxaa sax ah iyo khaladka, iyo sababta? Fikradaha ugu muhiimsan ee anshaxa ayaa bixiya qaabab kala duwan oo lagu gaaro go'aannada anshaxa. Fahamkooda waxay kaa caawinaysaa inaad ka fikirto jaahwareerka dhabta ah ee aduunka.
learnSch_religion_ethics_f1_task: Baabuurka iskiis wada waa in uu doortaa: 1 qof ku dhufto ama leexleex oo ku dhufo 5. Ka falanqeyso dhibaatadan adigoo eegaya faa'iidada iyo aragtida deontological.
learnSch_religion_ethics_f1_kp0: Natiijooyinka (tusaale ka faa'iidaysi): ku xukuma ficilada natiijooyinkooda. U wanagsan tirada ugu badan (Bentham, Mill).
learnSch_religion_ethics_f1_kp1: Deontology (Kant): Falalka qaarkood waa sax ama khalad laftooda, iyadoon loo eegayn cawaaqibka ka dhalan kara. Muhiimadda Qaybta: u dhaqan oo kaliya sida aad awooddo in qof kastaa sameeyo.
learnSch_religion_ethics_f1_kp2: Anshaxa Wanaagga (Aristotle): diiradda saar dabeecadda, ee maaha xeerarka. Qofka wanaagsani wuxuu dooranayaa celceliska dahabiga ah ee u dhexeeya darafyada.
learnSch_religion_ethics_f1_kp3: Contractarianism (Rawls): cadaaladdu waa waxa dadka caqliga lihi ku heshiiyaan inay ka dambeeyaan 'xijaab jaahilnimo' (aan garanaynin meesha ay bulshada kaga jiraan).
learnSch_religion_ethics_f1_kp4: Anshaxa la dabaqay: sida ay aragtiyahani u sheegaan doodaha dhabta ah - euthanasia, xuquuqda xayawaanka, AI, caddaaladda cimilada.
learnSch_social_studies_f0_desc: Fahamka sida dawladuhu u shaqeeyaan waxay lama huraan u tahay muwaadinimada firfircoon. Nidaamyada dimoqraadigu waxay ilaaliyaan xuquuqda, awoodaha kala soocaan, waxayna siiyaan muwaadiniinta codkooda doorashooyin.
learnSch_social_studies_f0_task: Sharaxaad ka bixi saddexda waaxood ee dawladda ee dalkaaga. Sii hal tusaale oo ah laan kasta awooddeeda.
learnSch_social_studies_f0_kp0: Dimuqraadiyad: Awooddu waxay ku fadhidaa dadka, oo lagu muujiyaa doorashooyin xor ah iyo xuquuq la ilaaliyo.
learnSch_social_studies_f0_kp1: Kala saaridda awoodaha: sharci-dejinta (waxay dejiyaan shuruuc), fulin (fulisa shuruuc), garsoor (sharci tarjumaan).
learnSch_social_studies_f0_kp2: Nidaamyada federaalku waxay awood u qaybiyaan dawladda dhexe iyo dawlad goboleedyada (tusaale Jarmalka, USA).
learnSch_social_studies_f0_kp3: Xuquuqul insaanku waa caalami, xuquuq lama taabtaan ah (tusaale. Baaqa Qaramada Midoobay ee Xuquuqul Insaanka, 1948).
learnSch_social_studies_f0_kp4: Barlamaan iyo Nidaamyada Madaxtooyada: Nidaamyada baarlamaanka waxaa ka yimaada fulinta sharci-dejinta.
learnSch_social_studies_f1_name: Bulshada iyo Dhaqanka || Bulshada waxaa qaabeeya dhaqanka, dhaqaalaha, hay'adaha, iyo xoogag taariikhi ah. Cilmi-nafsiga iyo cilmi-baarista dhaqameed waxay naga caawiyaan inaan fahamno sinnaan la'aanta, aqoonsiga, iyo isbeddelka bulsheed.
learnSch_social_studies_f1_desc: Sii hal tusaale oo ku saabsan sida caalamiyeynta isu beddeshay nolol maalmeedka dalkaaga. Saamayntu ma mid togan, taban, mise labadaba? Sharax.
learnSch_social_studies_f1_task: Bulsho-wadaag: waa habka ay ashkhaastu ku bartaan hab-dhaqanka, qiyamka, iyo doorka bulshadooda.
learnSch_social_studies_f1_kp0: Kala soocida bulshada: sinnaan la'aanta habaysan ee bulshada (fasalka, jinsiga, qowmiyadda).
learnSch_social_studies_f1_kp1: Dhaqanka: qiyamka la wadaago, caqiidada, dhaqamada, iyo calaamadaha isku xidha koox.
learnSch_social_studies_f1_kp2: Caalamiyaynta waxa ay dardar galisay isdhaafsiga dhaqanka iyo ku tiirsanaanta dhaqaalaha.
learnSch_social_studies_f1_kp3: Aqoonta warbaahinta: qiimaynta ilaha eexda, aragtida, iyo caddayntu waa xirfad qarnigan 21aad muhiim ah.
learnSch_philosophy_f0_name: Epistemology waxay waydiisaa: maxaan ku ogaan karnaa, sideese ku ogaan karnaa? Waxay baartaa ilaha iyo xadka aqoonta aadanaha - sababta, waayo-aragnimada, dareenka, iyo awoodda.
learnSch_philosophy_f0_desc: Suurtagal ma tahay in wax hubaal ah lagu ogaado? Qor jawaab 4- jumlad ah oo ka timid caqli-yaqaan iyo aragti-dhaqaale.
learnSch_philosophy_f0_task: Rationalism (Descartes, Kant): sababtu waa isha koowaad ee aqoonta. 'Cogito ergo sum' - Waxaan qabaa, sidaas darteed waxaan ahay.
learnSch_philosophy_f0_kp0: Empiricism (Locke, Hume): aqoontu waxay ka timaadaa waayo-aragnimada dareenka. Maskaxdu waxay ku bilaabataa sidii xaashi madhan (tabula rasa).
learnSch_philosophy_f0_kp1: Shaki: waa in aan ka shakino dhammaan sheegashooyinka oo aan aqbalno kaliya waxa la xaqiijin karo.
learnSch_philosophy_f0_kp2: Skepticism: we should doubt all claims and accept only what can be proven.
learnSch_philosophy_f0_kp3: Rumaynta Dhabta ah ee Xaqa ah (Plato): aqoonta = wax waa run, waad rumaysantahay, waxaadna leedahay cudurdaar.
learnSch_philosophy_f0_kp4: Dhibaatooyinka Gettier waxay muujinayaan in caqiidada dhabta ah ee xaqa ah aysan had iyo jeer ku filnayn aqoonta.
learnSch_philosophy_f1_name: Falsafadda Maskaxda iyo Doonista Xorta ah
learnSch_philosophy_f1_desc: Waa maxay maskaxdu? Xor ma u nahay inaan samayno doorashooyin dhab ah? Su'aalahani waxay fadhiyaan isgoyska falsafada, cilmiga neerfaha, iyo nolol maalmeedka.
learnSch_philosophy_f1_task: Run ahaantii aadanuhu ma xor baa? Qor doodda 5- jumladood ee iswaafajinta ama go'aaminta adag.
learnSch_philosophy_f1_kp0: Dualism (Descartes): maskaxda iyo jidhku waa walxo kala duwan. Dhibaato: sidee bay u falgalaan?
learnSch_philosophy_f1_kp1: Physicalism: maskaxdu gabi ahaanba waa wax ka dhasha dhaqdhaqaaqa maskaxda.
learnSch_philosophy_f1_kp2: Functionalism: xaaladaha maskaxeed waxaa lagu qeexaa doorkooda shaqo, ma aha walaxdooda jireed.
learnSch_philosophy_f1_kp3: Dhibaatada adag ee miyir-qabka: waa maxay sababta farsamaynta jireed ay u keento waayo-aragnimada shakhsi ahaaneed?
learnSch_philosophy_f1_kp4: Waafaqid: doonista xorta ah iyo go'aan-qaadashadu way wada noolaan karaan - xorriyadda = u dhaqmida si waafaqsan sababahaaga, xitaa haddii ay sababto.
learnSch_technology_f0_desc: Fikirka nakhshaduhu waa hab bini'aadmigu udub dhexaad u yahay oo lagu xalliyo mashaakil si hal abuur leh iyo habaysan. Waxaa loo istcimaalaa naqshadaynta alaabta, injineernimada, UX, iyo hal-abuurka dhammaan warshadaha.
learnSch_technology_f0_task: Dooro dhibaato dugsigaaga. Codso 3-da marxaladood ee ugu horreeya ee naqshadaynta: qeex dhibaatada, qeex cidda ay saamaysay, oo dhali 3 fikradood.
learnSch_technology_f0_kp0: 5 marxaladood: Dareen → Qeexi → Fikir → Prototype → Imtixaan.
learnSch_technology_f0_kp1: Dareen: fahan baahiyaha dhabta ah ee isticmaalayaasha adiga oo isticmaalaya cilmi baadhis iyo indho-indhayn.
learnSch_technology_f0_kp2: Ideate: dhalin fikrado badan oo aan xukun lahayn; tirada ka hor tayada.
learnSch_technology_f0_kp3: Prototype: dhis noocyo degdeg ah, oo raqiis ah si aad u tijaabiso fikradaha ka hor intaanad maalgelin agabka.
learnSch_technology_f0_kp4: Dib-u-eegis: naqshaddu waa meerto; warcelintu waxay hagaajinaysaa nooc kasta.
learnSch_technology_f1_desc: Aqoonta dhijitaalka ah macneheedu waa fahamka sida tignoolajiyadu u shaqeyso, sida xogta loo isticmaalo, iyo sida si badbaado leh oo xasaasi ah loogu dhex maro aduunka dhijitaalka ah. AI waxay beddeshaa goob kasta.
learnSch_technology_f1_task: Liis garee 3 nooc oo ah xogta shakhsi ahaaneed ee taleefankaagu ururiyo. Mid kasta, u sharax hal khatar iyo hal faa'iido ururinta xogtaas.
learnSch_technology_f1_kp0: Algorithms waa habraacyo tallaabo-tallaabo ah oo kombuyuutarku raacaan. Waxay awood u leeyihiin raadinta, talooyinka, iyo AI.
learnSch_technology_f1_kp1: Barashada mashiinka: nidaamyada ka wanaajiya xogta iyada oo aan si cad loo qorsheyn.
learnSch_technology_f1_kp2: Qarsoodinimada Xogta: faham waxa abka ay ururiyaan adiga iyo sida loo isticmaalo.
learnSch_technology_f1_kp3: Macluumaad khaldan: been-abuurka qoto dheer, xumbo shaandhaynta, iyo kordhinta algorithmamka ayaa ka dhigaya qiimayn muhiim ah.
learnSch_technology_f1_kp4: Aasaaska amniga internetka: isticmaal furaha sirta ah ee adag, karti 2FA, aqoonso isku dayga phishingka.
learnSch_arabic_language_f0_desc: Carabiga waxa loo qoraa midig-ilaa-bidix (RTL) iyadoo la isticmaalayo 28 xaraf. Qaababka xarfaha ayaa isbeddela iyadoo ku xiran booska ereyga (bilowga, dhexe, u dambeeya, go'doonsan). Carabi waxay isticmaashaa tirooyinka bari ee Carabi-Indic (٠١٢٣٤٥٦٧٨٩) - nambarada reer galbeedka 0-9 taariikh ahaan kuwan ayaa laga soo qaatay.
learnSch_arabic_language_f0_task: Ku qor tirooyinka 1-10 ee tirooyinka Carabiga-Indic ee Bari (١ ٢ ٣ ...). Is barbar dhig mid walba dhiggiisa reer galbeedka. Dabadeed ku qor ereyga Carabiga ee "lambar" (رقم – raqm).
learnSch_arabic_language_f0_kp0: Carabiga waa la akhriyaa oo laga qoraa midig ilaa bidix (RTL).
learnSch_arabic_language_f0_kp1: Alifbeetada waxay ka kooban tahay 28 xaraf; badankoodu waa shibbaneyaal. Shaqallada waxaa inta badan loo muujiyaa sifaaxayaal ahaan (Harakāt).
learnSch_arabic_language_f0_kp2: Xaraf kastaa wuxuu leeyahay ilaa 4 foom: gooni-gooni ah (م), bilowga (مـ), dhexdhexaad (ـمـ), final (ـم).
learnSch_arabic_language_f0_kp3: Carabi waxay isticmaashaa nambarada Carabiga Bari-Indic: ٠ ١ ٢ ٣ ٤ ٥ ٦ ٧ ٨ ٩ (0-9). Tirooyinka reer galbeedka ee 0-9 waxay ka soo baxeen kuwan iyagoo isticmaalaya xisaabta Islaamka dhexe - ereyga "tirooyinka Carabiga" ee Galbeedka dhab ahaantii waxay tilmaamayaan kuwan asalka ah ee Bariga.
learnSch_arabic_language_f0_kp4: Heerka Carabiga Casriga ah (Fuṣḥā) waxa loo adeegsadaa waxbarashada iyo warbaahinta; Lahjadaha Daarija/Levantine/Gulf way kala duwan yihiin gobol ahaan.
learnSch_arabic_language_f1_desc: Naxwaha Carabiga wuxuu ku salaysan yahay xidid saddex xaraf ah (جذور) oo soo saara kelmado la xidhiidha. Magacyadu waxay leeyihiin jinsi naxwe ahaaneed (lab/dheddig), nambar (hal/laba/ jamac), iyo kiis. Falalku waxa ay isugu xidhmaan qofka, lab iyo dheddigga, iyo tirada.
learnSch_arabic_language_f1_task: Aqoonso xarfaha asaasiga ah ee: كَاتِب (qoraa), مَكْتُوب (qoran), كِتَابَة (qoraal). Waa maxay xididka guud?
learnSch_arabic_language_f1_kp0: Nidaamka xidid saddex geesoodka ah: xididka ك-ت-ب (k-t-b) wuxuu bixiyaa: كَتَبَ (kataba, wuu qoray), كتَاب (kitāb, book), مَكْتَبَة (maktaba, maktabad).
learnSch_arabic_language_f1_kp1: Magacyadu waa lab ama dheddig. Magacyada dheddigga badanaa waxay ku dhammaadaan ة (tā' marbūṭa).
learnSch_arabic_language_f1_kp2: Labaduba waxay samaysmaan iyadoo ان- (magacaabid) lagu daro magac: كِتَابَان = laba buug.
learnSch_arabic_language_f1_kp3: Jamac jaban: jamac badan oo Carabi ah ayaa beddela shaqallada gudaha, tusaale; كِتَاب → كُتُب (buugaagta).
learnSch_arabic_language_f1_kp4: Fal-mawduuca-walxaha (VSO) waa hab-raaca kelmadda caadiga ah ee Carabiga qadiimiga ah; SVO waxay ku badan tahay Carabiga Heerka Casriga ah.
learnSch_arabic_language_f1_tp1: Jinsiga iyo tirada || Isku xidhka falka
learnSch_arabic_language_f2_name: Dhisida erayada Carabiga way fududahay markaad fahanto nidaamka xididka. Salaan guud, lambaro, iyo kelmado maalinle ah ayaa ku siinaya aasaaska xidhiidhka dhabta ah.
learnSch_arabic_language_f2_desc: U tarjun Carabi: 'Wuxuu akhriyay buug.' (هو يقرأ كتاباً). Kadibna ku qor jumlada adoo isticmaalaya ficil-koowaad (VSO) habka caadiga ah.
learnSch_arabic_language_f2_task: Salaan: السلام عليكم (As-salāmu Calaykum) — Asalaamu Calaykum. Jawaab: وعليكم السلام.
learnSch_arabic_language_f2_kp0: Tirooyinka: وَاحِد (1), اثْنَان (2), ثَلَاثة (3), أَرْبَعَة (4), خَمْسَة (5), سِتَّة (6), سَبْعَة (7), ثَمَانِيَة), ثَمَانِيَة (8), عشرة (10).
learnSch_arabic_language_f2_kp1: Maalmaha: الأحد (Axad), الاثنين (Isniin), الثلاثاء (Talaado), الأربعاء (Arbaca), الخميس (Khamiis), الجمعة (Jimco), السبت (Sabti).
learnSch_arabic_language_f2_kp2: Ficilka caadiga ah: ذَهَبَ (dhahaba, go'aan), أَكَلَ (akala, in la cuno), قَرَأَ (qara'a, in la akhriyo), كَتَبَ (kataba, in la qoro).
learnSch_arabic_language_f2_kp3: Rasmi vs aan rasmi ahayn: Carabiga casriga ah ee caadiga ah waxa loo isticmaalaa waxbarashada; Lahjadaha af-ku-hadalku way ku kala duwan yihiin dunida Carabta.
learnSch_french_language_f0_name: Ku dhawaaqida Faransiiska waxay ku noqon kartaa caqabad dadka ku hadla Ingiriisiga sababtoo ah shaqallada sanka, xarfaha aamusan, iyo isku xidhayaasha. Qabashada dhawaaqyada goor hore waxay ka dhigtaa hadalka iyo fahamka mid aad u fudud.
learnSch_french_language_f0_desc: Kor u akhri: 'Les enfants ont un ami anglais.' Calaamadee xiriiriyeyaasha aad u baahan tahay inaad sameyso. Ku celceli 3 jeer.
learnSch_french_language_f0_task: Shaqalada sanka: en/em, in/im/ain/ein, on/om, un — shibbanaha kama dambaysta ah laguma dhawaaqin: 'bon' = /bɔ̃/.
learnSch_french_language_f0_kp0: Xarfaha aamusan: shibbanayaasha kama dambaysta ah badanaa waa aamusan yihiin (tusaale 'vous' = /vu/), marka laga reebo shaqalka (xidhiidhiyaha).
learnSch_french_language_f0_kp1: Xidhiidhka: shibbanaha kama dambaysta ah ee caadiyan aamusan waxa lagu dhawaaqaa marka erayga soo socda uu ku bilaabo shaqal: 'les amis' = /le.z‿ami/.
learnSch_french_language_f0_kp2: Liaison: a normally silent final consonant is pronounced when the next word starts with a vowel: 'les amis' = /le.z‿ami/.
learnSch_french_language_f0_kp3: R ee Faransiisku waa cod mindhicir ah (uvular), oo ka duwan Ingiriisi r.
learnSch_french_language_f0_kp4: Calaamadaha lahjadda: é (xiran e), è (furan e), ê (taariikheed), ç (jilicsan c = /s/), î, ô, û (inta badan taariikhi).
learnSch_french_language_f1_desc: Naxwaha Faransiisku waxa uu isticmaalaa magacyo lab iyo dhedig ah, isku xidhka fal ee 6 qofood ah, iyo waqtiyo kala duwan. Xirfadda ugu muhiimsan waa haynta hadda, hore (passé composé), iyo waqtiyada aan fiicnayn.
learnSch_french_language_f1_task: Isku xidh 'parler' (si aad u hadasho) wakhtigan xaadirka ah dhammaan 6da qof. Kadibna ku qor 2 jumladood adiga oo isticmaalaya baas curiye.
learnSch_french_language_f1_kp0: Dhammaan magacyada Faransiisku waa lab ama dheddig: le livre (m.), miiska (f.). Maqaalladu waa isku raacsan yihiin: un/une, le/la, les.
learnSch_french_language_f1_kp1: Sifooyinku waxay ku heshiiyaan lab iyo dheddig ahaan iyo lambar ahaanba: un grand livre / une grande maison.
learnSch_french_language_f1_kp2: Passé composé = avoir/être + qayb hore: j'ai mangé (waan cunay), il est allé (wuu tagay).
learnSch_french_language_f1_kp3: Imperfect (imparfait) waxay qeexaysaa dawladihii hore ee socda: je mangeais (waan wax cunayay), il faisait chaud.
learnSch_french_language_f1_kp4: Negation: ne ... pas ayaa ku wareegsan falka: Je ne sais pas (ma aqaano).
learnSch_french_language_f2_desc: Ku qorista Faransiiska waxay u baahan tahay fiiro gaar ah xeerarka heshiiska, xarakaynta (meelaha ka horreeya! ; :), iyo diiwaanka rasmiga ah. Qaab dhismeed cad - hordhac, horumarin, gunaanad - ayaa udub dhexaad u ah qorista akadeemiyada Faransiiska.
learnSch_french_language_f2_task: Ku qor cutubka 6- jumlad ee Faransiiska xilliga aad jeceshahay. Isticmaal ugu yaraan 3 xidhiidhiye oo hadal ah iyo hal subjunctive.
learnSch_french_language_f2_kp0: Calaamadaha faransiiska waxay ku daraan meel bannaan ka hor: ; ! ? iyo gudaha "guilmets" (calaamadaha xigashada).
learnSch_french_language_f2_kp1: Subjunctive (subjonctif) wuxuu muujiyaa shaki, shucuur, ama lama huraan: Il faut que tu viennes.
learnSch_french_language_f2_kp2: Xidhiidhiyayaasha hadalka: d'abord (horta), ensuite/puis (ka dibna), enfin (ugu dambeyntii), cependant (si kastaba ha ahaatee), en effet (runtii).
learnSch_french_language_f2_kp3: Qaab-dhismeedyo aan shakhsi ahayn waa caadi: Il est muhim de + infinitive; On peut dire que...
learnSch_french_language_f2_kp4: Qaab xaraf ah: Madame/Monsieur (furitaanka rasmiga ah), Veuillez agréer l'expression de mes salutations distinuées (oo rasmi ah).
learnSch_spanish_language_f0_desc: Isbaanishku waa luqad dhawaaq ahaan joogto ah - kelmadaha waxaa loogu dhawaaqaa sida saxda ah ee loo qoro. Tani waxay ka dhigaysaa mid ka mid ah luqadaha loogu heli karo kuwa bilowga ah. Qabashada dhawaaqa iyo habka lahjadda goor hore waa furaha.
learnSch_spanish_language_f0_task: Calaamadee diiqada: universidad, hablar, árbol, joven. Codso qaanuunka caadiga ah oo hubi kuwa u baahan calaamadda lahjadda.
learnSch_spanish_language_f0_kp0: Isbaanishku wuxuu leeyahay 5 shaqal oo saafi ah: a, e, i, o, u — dhammaan si joogto ah ayaa loogu dhawaaqaa.
learnSch_spanish_language_f0_kp1: Xarafka ñ wuxuu u eg yahay 'ny' (España, mañana). Labanlaabku wuxuu u eg yahay 'y' inta badan lahjadaha.
learnSch_spanish_language_f0_kp2: Cadaadiska: ereyada ku dhamaanaya shaqal, n, ama s ayaa lagu cadaadiyay dhawaaqa labaad ilaa ugu dambeeya. Calaamadaha lahjadda (á, é) ayaa meesha ka saaraya tan.
learnSch_spanish_language_f0_kp3: Xarafka h had iyo jeer waa aamusan yahay: hola = /ola/.
learnSch_spanish_language_f0_kp4: Lahjadaha: Castilian (Spain) waxay isticmaashaa /θ/ c/z; Isbaanishka Laatiin Ameerika wuxuu isticmaalaa /s/.
learnSch_spanish_language_f1_desc: Naxwaha Isbaanishka waa nidaamsan oo joogto ah. Hagaajinta magaca jinsiga, isku xidhka falka, iyo labadii wakhti ee la soo dhaafay (preterite iyo imperfect) waxay ku siinaysaa agabka aad si kalsooni leh ula xidhiidho.
learnSch_spanish_language_f1_task: Sharax goorta la isticmaalayo ser vs. estar. Ku qor 4 jumladood oo tusaale ah: 2 with ser, 2 with estar.
learnSch_spanish_language_f1_kp0: Magacyadu waa lab ama dheddig: el libro (m.), la mesa (f.). Sifooyinku waa ku raacsan yihiin: un libro interesante / una mesa interesante.
learnSch_spanish_language_f1_kp1: Ser vs. estar: labaduba waxay ka dhigan yihiin 'noqosho'. Ser = sifooyinka joogtada ah; estar = dawlado ku meel gaar ah: Soy médico / Estoy cansado.
learnSch_spanish_language_f1_kp2: Preterite (indefinido) = la soo dhaafay: Ayer comí pizza. Imperfecto (imperfecto) = soo dhaafay socota: Cuando era niño, jugaba...
learnSch_spanish_language_f1_kp3: Falal falcelin ah: me lavo (waan is dhaqay), se llama (magaceeda waa).
learnSch_spanish_language_f1_kp4: Subjunctive rabitaanka/shakiga: Quiero que vengas. Waa suurtogal que lueva.
learnSch_spanish_language_f2_desc: Qorista Isbaanishka waxay raacdaa xeerar cad. Qoraalada akadeemiyada waxay adeegsadaan diiwaanka rasmiga ah, halka wada xiriirka maalinlaha ahi uu inta badan yahay mid diiran oo toos ah. Amarka adag ee isku xirayaasha iyo subjunctive waxay kor u qaadaan qoraalkaaga.
learnSch_spanish_language_f2_task: Ku qor iimayl gaaban (6 jumlad) oo Isbaanish ah adiga oo saaxiib ku martiqaadaya xaflad dhalasho. Isticmaal diiwaan rasmi ah iyo mid aan rasmi ahayn - ka dibna barbar dhig.
learnSch_spanish_language_f2_kp0: Isbaanishku wuxuu adeegsadaa su'aal rogan ¿ iyo calaamo ¡ calamadaha bilawga jumlada.
learnSch_spanish_language_f2_kp1: Diiwaanka rasmiga ah: la lunsaday (adiga rasmiga ah), ma jiro foosho, oo hoos imanaya codsiyada asluubta.
learnSch_spanish_language_f2_kp2: Xidhiidhiyayaasha: sin embargo (si kastaba ha ahaatee), además (sidoo kale), por lo tanto (sidaas darteed), aunque (inkasta oo), es decir (taas oo ah).
learnSch_spanish_language_f2_kp3: Furitaanka warqadda: Estimado/a Sr./Sra. + magaca qoyska. Xiritaanka: Le saluda atentamente / Un cordial saludo.
learnSch_spanish_language_f2_kp4: Qaab dhismeedka curis: horudhac (tesis), desarrollo (argumentos con ejemplos), gunaanad.
learnSch_spanish_language_f2_tp0: Diiwaanka rasmiga ah vs. aan rasmi ahayn
learnSch_english_as_foreign_language_f0_: Naxwaha Ingiriisku qaab ahaan wuu fudud yahay laakiin waxa uu leeyahay qaabab badan oo aan joogto ahayn. Fahamka xiisadaha, maqaallada, iyo shaqallada modal waa furaha isgaarsiinta saxda ah.
Dib ugu qor weedhahan firfircoon cod dadban: (1) 'Macallimku wuxuu sharraxay casharka.' (2) Saynis yahanadu waxay heleen nooc cusub.
Ingiriisigu wuxuu leeyahay 12 jeer oo fal ah. Kan ugu caansan: xaadirka fudud (waan shaqeeyaa), joogto joogto ah (waan shaqaynayaa), hore fudud (waan shaqeeyay), xaadir qumman (waan shaqeeyay).
Maqaallo: 'a/an' magacyo aan gaar ahayn (buug); 'the' ee magacyo gaar ah (buugga aan ka hadalnay).
Hababka shaqallada (karti, kara, waa, waa, waa, dooni karaa, laga yaabaa, laga yaabaa) inay muujiyaan kartida, ogolaanshaha, waajibaadka, ama itimaalka.
Shuruudaha: Haddii + hore u fudud → lahaan lahaa + aan dhammaad lahayn (shuruudaha 2aad: Haddii aan waqti haysto, waan safri lahaa).
Cod dadban: Shaygu wuxuu noqonayaa mawduuca: 'Warqada waxaa qoray arday'.
learnSch_english_as_foreign_language_f1_: Fahamka akhriska adag macnihiisu waa fahamka macnaha cad, samaynta fikrado, iyo qiimaynta ujeedada iyo farsamada qoraaga. Waxay lama huraan u tahay guusha tacliimeed ee maaddo kasta.
Akhri maqaal kasta oo hal-baaro ah. Qor: (1) fikradda ugu weyn, (2) hal caddaymo oo la bixiyay, (3) ujeedada qoraaga.
Skimming: dhaqso u akhri si aad u hesho fikradda ugu muhiimsan. Sawirka: raadi faahfaahin gaar ah.
Tixgalin: akhrinta 'inta u dhaxaysa xadadka' - maxaa la maldahan yahay laakiin aan si toos ah loo sheegin?
Ujeedada qoraaga: in lagu wargeliyo, ka dhaadhiciyo, lagu maaweeliyo, ama lagu tilmaamo.
Erayada macnaha guud: isticmaal erayada ku xeeran si aad u qeexdo macnaha erayada aan la garanayn.
Akhrinta xasaasiga ah: aqoonso sheegashooyinka, qiimee caddaynta, iyo mala-awaalka su'aalaha.
learnSch_english_as_foreign_language_f2_: Qoritaanka Ingiriisiga tacliimeed wuxuu raacayaa heshiisyo cad: diiwaanka rasmiga ah, erayada saxda ah, iyo qaab dhismeedka macquulka ah. Qabashada heshiisyadan waxay ka caawisaa imtixaanada, codsiyada jaamacadda, iyo nolosha xirfadeed.
U qor horudhac 5- jumlad ah oo loogu talagalay qormo ku saabsan: 'Saameynta warbaahinta bulshada ee caafimaadka maskaxda ee dhalinyarada.' Ku dar qoraalka qoraalka
Qaab dhismeedka qoraalka: Horudhac (hook + macnaha guud + qoraalka), Jidhka (dhibic, caddaynta, sharraxaadda cutubka), Gabagabo (dib u soo celinta qoraalka + muhiimad ballaadhan).
Qoraalka qoraalka: hal weedh cad oo sheegaya doodda ugu weyn ee qormada.
Luqadda ka-hortagga qoraalka akadeemiyadda: 'Waxaa lagu doodi karaa in…', 'Caddaynta ayaa soo jeedinaysa…', 'Tani waxay muujin kartaa…'
Ka fogow luqadda aan rasmiga ahayn: ha isticmaalin foosha (ha → ha isticmaalin), af-duub, ama sheeko qofka koowaad haddii aan la waydiin.
Tixraaca: si sax ah u sheeg ilaha (APA, MPLA, Harvard) si aad uga fogaato been-abuurka.
learnUni_mathematics_f0_desc: Calculus waa xisaabta isbeddelka. Xisaabinta kala duwani waxay heshaa heerarka isbeddelka (derivatives); Calculus-ku-dhex-dhexaadku wuxuu helaa tiro urursan (isku-dhafan). Waxay taageertaa fiisigiska, injineernimada, dhaqaalaha, iyo dhammaan cilmiga tirada.
learnUni_mathematics_f0_task: Soo hel derivative of f(x) = 3x³ - 2x² + 5x - 7. Tus tillaabo kasta adoo isticmaalaya xeerka awooda.
learnUni_mathematics_f0_kp0: Xadku wuxuu qeexayaa qiimaha shaqadu ku soo wajahan tahay marka x u dhawaado dhibic.
learnUni_mathematics_f0_kp1: Soosaar: f'(x) = heerka isbeddelka. F(x) = xⁿ, f'(x) = nxⁿ⁻¹ (xeerka awoodda).
learnUni_mathematics_f0_kp3: Integral = aagga qalooca hoostiisa. ∫xⁿ dx = xⁿ⁺¹/(n+1) + C.
learnUni_mathematics_f0_kp4: Aragtida aasaasiga ah ee calculus: kala soocidda iyo isdhexgalka waa hawlgallo rogan ah.
learnUni_mathematics_f1_desc: Aljabrada toosan waa xisaabta tibaaxaha, matriyada, iyo isbeddellada toosan. Waxay lagama maarmaan u tahay barashada mashiinka, sawirada kombiyuutarka, injineernimada, iyo sayniska xogta.
learnUni_mathematics_f1_task: Ku dhufo matrix A = [[1,2], [3,4]] matrix B = [[5,6], [7,8]]. Muuji dhammaan xisaabaadka
learnUni_mathematics_f1_kp0: Xubintu waxay leedahay baaxadda iyo jihada. Vectors waa lagu dari karaa oo la miisaami karaa.
learnUni_mathematics_f1_kp1: Matrix-ku wuxuu u taagan yahay isbeddel toosan ama nidaamka isla'egta.
learnUni_mathematics_f1_kp2: Isku dhufashada Matrix ma aha mid gudbinaysa: AB ≠ BA guud ahaan.
learnUni_mathematics_f1_kp3: Go'aamiye: waa scalar sheegaya in matrixku yahay mid aan leexan karin. det(A) = 0 → lama rogi karo.
learnUni_mathematics_f1_kp4: Eigenvalues ​​iyo eigenvectors: Av = λv. Loo isticmaalo PCA, fiisigiska, iyo Google's PageRank.
learnUni_mathematics_f2_desc: Tirakoobyada jaamacaduhu waxa ay ka guuraan qeexitaan una guuraan wax aan macno lahayn - iyada oo la isticmaalayo xog muunad ah si loo gaadho gunaanad ku saabsan dadweynaha. Aragtida itimaalka ayaa bixisa aasaaska adag.
learnUni_mathematics_f2_task: Muunad 30 arday ah ayaa celcelis ahaan dhererkeedu yahay 170 cm, SD 8 cm. Xisaabi inta u dhaxaysa kalsoonida 95%.
learnUni_mathematics_f2_kp0: Doorsoome random: doorsoome qiimihiisu ay go'aamiso dhacdo aan toos ahayn.
learnUni_mathematics_f2_kp1: Qaybinta caadiga ah: qalooca gambaleelka, celceliska = dhexdhexaad = hab; 68-95-99.7 xeer.
learnUni_mathematics_f2_kp2: Tijaabada mala awaalka: H₀ (null) vs H₁ (kaduwan). p-qiimaha <0.05 → diido H₀.
learnUni_mathematics_f2_kp3: Kalsoonida muddada u dhaxaysa: kala duwanaanshiyaha kaas oo cabbirka dhabta ahi uu ku jiro ixtimaalka la sheegay.
learnUni_mathematics_f2_kp4: Isku xidhka isku xidhka r: -1 = taban qumman, 0 = xidhiidh toosan ma jiro, +1 = togan qumman.
learnUni_mathematics_f3_desc: Isla'egyada kala duwani waxay qeexayaan sida ay tirooyinku isu beddelaan marka loo eego tirada kale. Waxay yihiin luqadda fiisigiska, injineernimada, bayoolajiga, iyo dhaqaalaha - wax kasta oo laga soo bilaabo kobaca dadweynaha ilaa meeraha meeraha.
learnUni_mathematics_f3_task: Xalli dy/dx = 2xy leh y(0) = 1. Doorsoomayaasha kala duwan, dhexgal, mari xaalada bilowga ah.
learnUni_mathematics_f3_kp0: ODE (isle'egyada kala duwanaanta caadiga ah) waxay ku lug leedahay derivatives marka loo eego hal doorsoome: dy/dx = f(x, y).
learnUni_mathematics_f3_kp1: ODE kala saari kara: dy/dx = g(x) · h (y) → doorsoomayaal kala saar oo isku dar labada dhinac.
learnUni_mathematics_f3_kp2: Dalabka kowaad ee toosan ODE: dy/dx + P(x)y = Q(x), lagu xaliyay isdhexgalka μ = e^∫P(x)dx.
learnUni_mathematics_f3_kp3: ODE toosan oo dalbo labaad leh oo leh isugeyn joogto ah: ay″ + by′ + cy = 0. Ku xalliya isla'egta sifada ar² + br + c = 0.
learnUni_mathematics_f3_kp4: Dhibaatooyinka qiimaha bilowga ah (IVP): Isticmaal shuruudaha bilowga ah si aad u hesho xalka gaarka ah ee joogtada ah C.
learnUni_mathematics_f4_desc: Tirooyinka isku dhafan waxay kordhiyaan tirooyinka dhabta ah iyagoo soo bandhigaya i = √(-1). Waxay lagama maarmaan u yihiin injineernimada korantada, habaynta calaamadaha, makaanikada tirada, iyo falanqaynta kakan.
learnUni_mathematics_f4_task: Express z = 1 + i qaab polar ah. Soo hel moduleskeeda, dooddeeda oo u qor re^(iθ).
learnUni_mathematics_f4_kp0: Nambar kakan: z = a + bi, halkaasoo a ay tahay qaybta dhabta ah iyo b qaybta mala-awaalka ah.
learnUni_mathematics_f4_kp2: Foomka Polar: z = r (cosθ + i·sinθ) = re^(iθ) (qaabka Euler).
learnUni_mathematics_f4_kp3: Aqoonsiga Euler: e^(iπ) + 1 = 0 - inta badan waxaa loogu yeeraa isla'egta ugu quruxda badan xisaabta.
learnUni_mathematics_f4_kp4: Aragtida De Moivre: (cosθ + isinθ)ⁿ = cos(nθ) + isin(nθ).
learnUni_physics_f0_desc: Farsamoyaqaannada qadiimiga ah ayaa qeexaya dhaqdhaqaaqa walxaha makroscopic iyadoo la adeegsanayo sharciyada Newton. Makaanikada Lagrangian iyo Hamiltonian ayaa ah dib-u-habayn xooggan oo lagu isticmaalo fiisigiska sare.
learnUni_physics_f0_task: Miisaanka 3 kg ayaa hoos u dhigaya jilicsanaan la'aan oo ah 30 °. Xisaabi dardargelinteeda addoo isticmaalaya sharciga 2aad ee Newton.
learnUni_physics_f0_kp0: Sharciga 2aad ee Newton ee qaabka vector: ΣF = ma.
learnUni_physics_f0_kp1: Ilaalinta xawaaraha: wadarta guud ee nidaamka xiran waa joogto.
learnUni_physics_f0_kp2: Ilaalinta tamarta: nidaamka xiran, wadarta tamarta farsamada waa joogto.
learnUni_physics_f0_kp3: Dhaqdhaqaaq xagal L = Iω (daqiiqad xawli-la'aan × xagasha).
learnUni_physics_f0_kp4: Makaanikada Lagrangian: L = T - V (kinetic-ka laga jaray tamarta suurtagalka ah). Euler-Lagrange isla'egyadu waxay keeneen dhaqdhaqaaq.
learnUni_physics_f1_desc: Electromagnetism-ku waxa uu mideeyaa korontada, magnetismka, iyo iftiinka. Afarta isla'eg ee Maxwell ayaa si buuxda u qeexaya ifafaalaha elektromagnetic-ka waxayna saadaaliyaan hirarka korantada.
learnUni_physics_f1_task: Sheeg sharciga Faraday oo bixi hal codsi oo adduunka dhabta ah (tusaale koronto dhaliyaha ama beddelka).
learnUni_physics_f1_kp0: Sharciga Coulomb: F = kq₁q₂/r² (xoog u dhexeeya dacwadaha).
learnUni_physics_f1_kp1: Sharciga Gauss: qulqulka korantada ee korka xiran ∝ lacag xiran.
learnUni_physics_f1_kp2: Sharciga Faraday: beddelka qulqulka magnetic waxay keenaysaa EMF.
learnUni_physics_f1_kp3: Isla'egyada Maxwell waxay saadaaliyaan in hirarka elektromagnetic-ku ay ku socdaan xawaaraha iftiinka.
learnUni_physics_f1_kp4: Iftiinku waa hirarka korantada: E iyo B fields waxay u wareegaan midba midka kale iyo jihada loo socdo.
learnUni_computer_science_f0_desc: Qaab dhismeedka xogta ayaa si hufan u habeeya xogta; Algorithms ayaa farsameeya. Doorashada qaab dhismeedka xogta saxda ah iyo algorithm waxay go'aamisaa in barnaamijku ku socdo millise seconds ama saacado badan oo xog-ururin ah.
learnUni_computer_science_f0_task: Raad raac raadinta binary ee shaxda la soocay [2, 5, 8, 12, 16, 23] adoo raadinaya 12. Immisa tillaabo?
learnUni_computer_science_f0_kp0: Array: cabbir go'an, O(1) gelid. Liiska isku xidhan: cabbirka firfircoon, gelida O(n).
learnUni_computer_science_f0_kp1: Stack (LIFO) iyo Queue (FIFO): waxaa loo istcimaalaa hab-nololeedka dib-u-noqoshada, socdaalka BFS/DFS.
learnUni_computer_science_f0_kp2: Miiska xashiishka: O(1) celceliska eegida iyadoo la isticmaalayo hawsha xashiishka.
learnUni_computer_science_f0_kp3: Raadinta binary: O(log n) - waxay u baahan tahay xog la kala soocay. Raadinta toosan: O(n).
learnUni_computer_science_f0_kp4: Tilmaanta Big-O waxay cabbirtaa sida runtime-ku u kordho cabbirka wax gelinta: O(1) < O(log n) < O(n) < O(n²).
learnUni_computer_science_f1_desc: Database-yadu waxay kaydiyaan oo habeeyaan xogta si wax-ku-ool ah loo soo celiyo iyo wax-is-daba marin. Xogta la xidhiidha waxay isticmaalaan miisaska iyo SQL; Xogta NoSQL waxay qabtaa xogta aan habaysan ama qaybsan
learnUni_computer_science_f1_task: Qor su'aal SQL ah si aad u hesho dhammaan ardayda darajooyinka ka sarreeya 80 ka miiska la yiraahdo "ardayda" tiirar (id, magac, grade).
learnUni_computer_science_f1_kp0: Xogta laxidhiidha waxay ku kaydisaa xogta shaxda (safka = diiwaanka, tiirarka = sifooyinka).
learnUni_computer_science_f1_kp1: Weydiinta SQL ee Xulashada: Tiirka ka dooro miiska HALKEE shuruud ku dalbashada tiirka.
learnUni_computer_science_f1_kp2: Furaha aasaasiga ah: aqoonsi u gaar ah saf kasta. Furaha ajnabiga ah: wuxuu isku xiraa safafka miisaska.
learnUni_computer_science_f1_kp3: JOIN waxa uu isku daraa safaf badan
learnUni_computer_science_f1_kp4: Guryaha ACID: Atomity, Joogteynta, Go'doominta, Joogteynta - hubi macaamil ganacsi la isku halayn karo.
learnUni_economics_f0_name: Macroeconomics waxay daraasaysaa dhaqaalaha guud ahaan: GDP, sicir bararka, shaqo la'aanta, siyaasadda lacagta iyo maaliyadda. Bangiyada dhexe iyo dawladuhu waxay u isticmaalaan agabkan si ay kor ugu qaadaan koboca deggan.
learnUni_economics_f0_desc: Macroeconomics studies the economy as a whole: GDP, inflation, unemployment, monetary and fiscal policy. Central banks and governments use these tools to promote stable growth.
learnUni_economics_f0_task: Haddii bangiga dhexe kor u qaado heerka ribada, maxaa ku dhacaya amaahda, maalgashiga, iyo sicir-bararka? Sharax silsiladda saamaynta
learnUni_economics_f0_kp0: GDP = C + I + G + (X-M): isticmaalka + maalgashiga + kharashaadka dawladda + dhoofinta saafiga ah.
learnUni_economics_f0_kp1: Sicir bararka: guud ahaan qiimaha kor u kaca. Deflation: hoos u dhaca qiimaha. Labaduba waxay noqon karaan waxyeelo haddii ay xad dhaaf tahay.
learnUni_economics_f0_kp2: Shaqo la'aan: khilaaf (shaqo u dhaxaysa), qaab dhismeed (xirfad la'aan), meerto (hoos u dhac).
learnUni_economics_f0_kp3: Bangiyada dhexe waxay kor u qaadaan heerka ribada si ay ula dagaalamaan sicir bararka; hoos u dhig si ay u kiciyaan koritaanka.
learnUni_economics_f0_kp4: Dhaqaalaha Keynesian: dawladuhu waa inay kordhiyaan kharashaadka xilliga hoos u dhaca.
learnUni_biology_f0_desc: Bayoloji molecular waxay barataa hababka molecular ee nolosha - nuqul DNA-da, qorista, tarjumaada, iyo habaynta hidda-wadaha. Waa saldhigga bayotechnoolajiyada, daawada, iyo hidaha.
learnUni_biology_f0_task: Marka la eego taxanaha DNA-da ATG-GCC-TAA, waa maxay isku xigxiga mRNA? (T ku beddel U, iyo A↔T, C↔G)
learnUni_biology_f0_kp0: DNA → RNA → Protein: dogma dhexe ee bayoolaji molecular.
learnUni_biology_f0_kp1: Qoraal: DNA waxaa lagu koobiyeeyay Messenger RNA (mRNA) ee xuddunta.
learnUni_biology_f0_kp2: Turjumaada: ribosomes waxay akhriyaan mRNA waxayna ku ururiyaan asiidhyada amino-ga borotiin.
learnUni_biology_f0_kp3: Codonku waa taxane 3-nucleotide ah oo codeeynaya hal amino acid.
learnUni_biology_f0_kp4: CRISPR-Cas9: waa aalad tafatirka hidda-sidaha oo si sax ah u jari kara oo wax ka beddeli kara taxanaha DNA-da.
learnUni_biology_f1_desc: Hidde-yaqaanku waxa uu sharxayaa sida sifooyinka loo kala dhaxlo. Evolution waxa uu sharxayaa sida noocyadu isu beddelaan waqti ka dib iyada oo loo marayo xulashada dabiiciga ah iyo kala duwanaanshaha hidde-raaca. Waxay si wada jir ah u sharxayaan kala duwanaanshaha nolosha.
learnUni_biology_f1_task: Isticmaal laba jibaaran Punnett si aad u muujiso iskutallaabta Aa × Aa. Waa maxay saamiga genotype iyo phenotype?
learnUni_biology_f1_kp0: Sharciyada Mendel: sharciga kala soocida (alleles waxay kala soocaan inta lagu jiro samaynta gamete); sharciga kala-duwanaanshaha madaxbannaan.
learnUni_biology_f1_kp1: Maaskaro-xiran ee alleles-ku-masgarasyada dib-u-celinta ee heterozygote (Aa).
learnUni_biology_f1_kp2: Hardy-Weinberg equilibrium: celceliska allele waxay joogtaa maqnaanshaha horumarka.
learnUni_biology_f1_kp3: Xulashada dabiiciga ah: Shakhsiyaadka leh sifooyin si fiican ugu habboon deegaanka ayaa badbaada oo taran wax ka badan.
learnUni_biology_f1_kp4: Isbeddellada ayaa ah isha ugu dambeysa ee kala duwanaanshaha hidde-sidaha; badankoodu waa dhexdhexaad.
learnSch_physics_f3_desc: Thermodynamics waxay barataa kulaylka, heerkulka, iyo u beddelka tamarta shaqada. Saddexda sharci ee ugu waaweyn ayaa xukuma matoorka kulaylka kasta, qaboojiyaha, iyo falcelinta kiimikaad kasta ee Dhulka. Fahamka thermodynamics ayaa sharaxaysa sababta matoorada aysan u noqon karin 100% hufan iyo sababta barafku u dhalaaliyo marka la taabto.
learnSch_physics_f3_kp0: Heerkulka wuxuu cabbiraa celceliska tamarta kinetic ee qaybaha; waxa lagu qiyaasaa Kelvin (K) ama Celsius (°C).
learnSch_physics_f3_kp1: Sharciga 1aad ee Thermodynamics: tamarta waa la ilaaliyaa - kulaylka lagu daray nidaamka wuxuu la mid yahay isbeddelka tamarta gudaha iyo shaqada la qabtay (ΔU = Q - W).
learnSch_physics_f3_kp2: Sharciga 2aad: kulaylku si iskiis ah ayuu uga socdaa kulayl iyo qabow, marna kama soo noqonayo. Entropy (xanuunka) ayaa had iyo jeer ku kordha nidaamka go'doonsan.
learnSch_physics_f3_kp3: Awoodda kulaylka gaarka ah (c): Q = mcΔT - tamarta loo baahan yahay si kor loogu qaado 1 kg oo walax ah 1 ° C.
learnSch_physics_f3_kp4: Waxtarka mashiinka kulaylka: η = W/Q_hot = 1 - T_cold/T_hot
learnSch_physics_f3_task: Qalabka birta ah ee 200 g (c = 0.45 J/g·°C) ayaa lagu kululeeyaa 20 °C ilaa 100 °C. Intee tamar ayaa loo baahan yahay? Kadib xisaabi waxtarka Carnot ee mishiinka ku shaqeeya inta u dhaxaysa 500 K iyo 300 K.
learnSch_physics_f4_desc: Fiisigiska Nukliyeerka ayaa sahaminaya qaab dhismeedka nuclei-yada iyo ciidamada isku haya. Nuclei-yada aan xasilloonayn waxay sii daayaan tamarta shucaac ahaan si ay u gaaraan xaalad xasilloon. Falcelinta nukliyeerka waxay awood u leedahay Qorraxda, dhirta nukliyeerka, waxayna sharaxdaa asalka curiyayaasha xiddigaha.
learnSch_physics_f4_kp0: Nucleus-ku wuxuu ka kooban yahay borotoons (positive) iyo neutrons (dhexdhexaad ah), oo ay isku hayaan xoogga nukliyeerka ee xooggan - aad uga xoog badan dib-u-celinta elektrostatic.
learnSch_physics_f4_kp1: Alfa (α) suusku wuxuu soo saaraa nukleus helium (2 protons + 2 neutrons). Beta (β) qudhuntay waxay sii daysaa elektaroonig ama positron. Gamma (γ) qudhunka ayaa soo saara shucaaca korantada ee tamarta sare leh.
learnSch_physics_f4_kp2: Nolosha nuska ah: wakhtiga nuska muunada shucaaca ahi ay qudhunto. Nolol badhkii ka dib, jajabka soo hadhay waa (½)ⁿ.
learnSch_physics_f4_kp3: U dhigmidda cufka-tamarta: E = mc² - tiro yar ayaa isu beddesha tamar aad u weyn (c = 3×10⁸ m/s).
learnSch_physics_f4_kp4: Fission wuxuu kala qaybiyaa xudunta culus (tusaale ²³⁵U) soo daynta tamarta; fiyuusku waxa uu ku biiraa nuclei nuclei ( tusaale ²H + ³H → ⁴He) sii daaya xitaa tamar ka badan halbeegkiiba.
learnSch_physics_f4_task: Isotope-ka shucaaca leh wuxuu cimrigiisu yahay 5 sano. Haddii aad ku bilowdo 80 g, imisa ayaa hadhay 15 sano kadib? Qor tallaabo kasta. Ka dib isticmaal E = mc² si aad u hesho tamarta la sii daayo haddii 1 g oo cufan ah gebi ahaanba loo beddelo tamar.
learnSch_physics_f5_desc: Fiisigiska Quantum wuxuu qeexayaa hab-dhaqanka walaxda iyo tamarta atamka iyo miisaanka subatomic. Heerkan, qaybuhu waxay u dhaqmaan sida hirarka, tamarta waxay ku timaadaa baakado kala duwan (quanta), iyo ficilka cabbirku wuxuu saameeyaa waxa la arko. Fiisigiska Quantum wuxuu hoosta ka xariiqayaa lasers, semiconductors, iyo MRI scanners.
learnSch_physics_f5_kp0: Xiriirka Planck: tamarta photon waa E = hf, halka h = 6.63×10⁻³⁴ J·s (Planck's joogto ah) iyo f waa inta jeer.
learnSch_physics_f5_kp1: Saamaynta sawir-qaadista: iftiinka wuxuu ka saaraa elektaroonnada dusha birta ah - wuxuu caddeeyaa iftiinka u dhaqmo sida qaybo (sawiro). Einstein wuxuu ku guuleystey abaalmarinta Nobel Prize sharaxaaddan.
learnSch_physics_f5_kp2: Wave–particle duality: electrons (iyo dhammaan qaybaha) waxay u dhaqmaan sida mawjadaha iyo qaybaha labadaba; de Broglie wavelength λ = h/(mv).
learnSch_physics_f5_kp3: Heisenberg hubanti la'aanta mabda'a: Δx · Δp ≥ ℏ/2 - ma ogaan kartid labadaba booska iyo xawliga qayb isku mar ah.
learnSch_physics_f5_kp4: Electron-yadu waxay ku jiraan heerarka tamarta kala duwan ee atamka; marka elektarooniga uu hoos ugu dhaco heerka hoose, wuxuu soo daayaa sawir qaade leh tamar u dhiganta faraqa u dhexeeya.
learnSch_physics_f5_task: Sawirku wuxuu leeyahay soo noqnoqda 6.0×10¹⁴ Hz. Xisaabi tamarteeda (h = 6.63×10⁻³⁴ J·s). Ka dib raadi hirarka dhererka korantada oo ku socda 2.0×10⁶ m/s (cuf = 9.11×10⁻³¹ kg).
