learnSch_physics_f5_tp0: Sawirada iyo saamaynta korantada ee sawirka
learnSch_physics_f6_desc: Einstein's special relativity (1905) waxa uu isbadal ku sameeyay fiisigiska isago tusay in booska iyo wakhtigu aanay ahayn mid dhamaystiran - way kala fidiyaan oo isku ururiyaan iyadoo ku xidhan xawliga qaraabada ah. Xawaaraha ku dhow xawaaraha iftiinka, waqtigu wuu gaabiyaa, shayada ayaa gaabinaya, cufkuna wuu kordhaa. Saamayntan, oo ay xaqiijiyeen dayax-gacmeedyada GPS-ka iyo dardar-geliyayaasha walxaha, waxay beddelaan sida aan u fahamno caalamka.
learnSch_physics_f6_kp0: Ku dhajinta 1aad: sharciyada fiisigiska waa isku mid marka la eego dhammaan tixraacyada aan firfircoonayn (aan degdegin).
learnSch_physics_f6_kp1: 2nd postulate: Xawaaraha iftiinka c = 3×10⁸ m/s waa mid joogto ah dhammaan goobjoogayaasha, iyadoon loo eegin dhaqdhaqaaqa isha ama kormeeraha.
learnSch_physics_f6_kp2: Wakhtiga fidinta: saacada dhaqaaqaysa si tartiib ah ayay u socotaa. Δt' = Δt / √(1 - v²/c²). Hadba sida ugu dhakhsaha badan ee aad u dhaqaaqdo, wakhtiga gaabiska ah ayaa kugu dhacaya.
learnSch_physics_f6_kp3: Dhererka foosha: shay dhaqaaqa wuu ka gaaban yahay jihada dhaqdhaqaaqa. L' = L₀ √(1 - v²/c²).
learnSch_physics_f6_kp4: Mass–energy equivalence E = mc²: cufka nasashada waa nooc tamar kaydsan. Tani waa sababta falcelinta nukliyeerka ay sii daayaan tamar aad u badan.
learnSch_physics_f6_task: Gantaalku wuxuu dhererkiisu yahay 100 mitir oo nasasho ah wuxuuna ku socdaa 0.8c. Waa imisa dhererkiisa sida uu ku cabiray goobjoogaha dhulka? Isticmaal L' = L√(1 - v²/c²). Sidoo kale, immisa ilbiriqsi ayay 1 daqiqo ee gantaalku kaga duwan yahay 1 daqiqo ee dhulka?
learnSch_chemistry_f3_desc: Kiimikada Dabiiciga ah waxay daraasad ku samaysaa xeryahooda kaarboon ku salaysan. Awoodda gaarka ah ee kaarboon si loo sameeyo afar curaarta isku xidhan waxay abuurtaa noocyo kala duwan oo unugyo ah oo aan dhammaad lahayn ku dhawaad ​​- baloogyada dhismaha nolosha, daawooyinka, shidaalka, iyo balaastikada. Hagaajinta kooxaha shaqada iyo noocyada falcelinta waxay furaysaa bayoolaji, farmashiistaha, iyo sayniska agabka.
learnSch_chemistry_f3_kp0: Dhammaan unugyadu waxay ka kooban yihiin kaarboon, sida caadiga ah ku xidhan hydrogen (C-H) iyo inta badan sidoo kale O, N, S, ama halogens.
learnSch_chemistry_f3_kp1: Hydrocarbons: alkynes (C-C hal bonds, saturated), alkenes (C=C double bond, unsaturated), alkynes (C≡C saddex laablaaban).
learnSch_chemistry_f3_kp2: Kooxaha shaqada ayaa go'aamiya sifooyinka kiimikada: -OH (khamriga), -COOH (carboxylic acid), -NH₂ (amine), -CHO (aldehyde), -C=O (ketone).
learnSch_chemistry_f3_kp3: Soomerayaasha qaab-dhismeedku waxay leeyihiin isla qaacido kelli laakiin isku xirnaan kala duwan; stereoisomers waxay leeyihiin isku xirnaan isku mid ah laakiin habayn booseed oo kala duwan.
learnSch_chemistry_f3_kp4: Polymers waa unugyo waaweyn oo laga dhisay unugyo monomer ah oo soo noqnoqda: isku-darka polymerisation (ethene → polyethene) iyo polymerisation uumiga (amino acids → borotiinnada).
learnSch_chemistry_f3_task: Sawir qaab dhismeedka buuxa ee etanoic acid (CH₃COOH). Aqoonso kooxda shaqaynaysa. Ku qor isla'egta falcelinteeda sodium hydroxide (NaOH) oo magaca alaabta.
learnSch_chemistry_f4_desc: Electrochemistry waxay sahamisaa xidhiidhka ka dhexeeya falcelinta kiimikada iyo tamarta korantada. Baytariyadu waxay tamarta kiimikaad u beddelaan koronto; Electrolysis ayaa gadaal ka dhigaya. Dareen-celinta dib-u-celinta - wareejinta elektarooniga ah ee u dhaxaysa noocyada - ayaa udub dhexaad u ah geeddi-socod kasta oo kiimiko ah, laga bilaabo birta daxalaysa ilaa dallacaadda taleefankaaga.
learnSch_chemistry_f4_kp0: Oxidation = luminta elektarooniga (OIL); Dhimista = korodhka korantada (RIG). Falcelin kasta oo redox ah waxay leedahay labada habraac isku mar.
learnSch_chemistry_f4_kp1: Unug galvanic ah (voltaic), falcelin isbiirsaday oo iskiis ah ayaa dhaqaajisa socodka korantada. Anode waa taban (oxidation); cathode waa togan (dhimista).
learnSch_chemistry_f4_kp2: Electrolysis waxay isticmaashaa tamar koronto oo dibadeed si ay u kaxayso falcelin aan iskeed ahayn - loo isticmaalo in lagu saxo biraha, soo saaro aluminium, oo u kala qaybiya biyaha H₂ iyo O₂.
learnSch_chemistry_f4_kp3: Awoodda koronto ee caadiga ah (E°): sare E° macnaheedu waa wakiilka oksaydhka ee xooggan. Danab unug = E°cathode - E°anode.
learnSch_chemistry_f4_kp4: Sharciyada Faraday: tirada walaxda lagu shubay korantada waxay u dhigantaa kharashka la gudbiyay (Q = It) iyo cufka molarka.
learnSch_chemistry_f4_task: Electrolysis-ka ee sulfuric acid ku milmi, ku qor isla'egyada nuska ah ee eleteroodh kasta. Aqoonso anode-ka iyo alaabada cathode. Haddii qulqulka 2 A uu ku socdo 500 s, imisa moles oo elektaroonik ah ayaa la wareejiyaa? (F = 96 500 C/mol)
learnSch_chemistry_f5_desc: Isku dheelitirnaanta kiimikadu waxay ku dhacdaa nidaam xidhan marka falcelinta hore iyo dib u celinta ay ku socdaan heerar isleeg, sidaa awgeed xadiga falcelinta iyo alaabtu waxay ahaanaysaa mid joogto ah. Fahamka dheellitirka ayaa lagama maarmaan u ah kiimikada warshadaha (habka Haber) iyo hababka bayoolojiga (pH dhiigga, dhaqdhaqaaqa enzyme).
learnSch_chemistry_f5_kp0: Marka la eego isku dheelitirnaanta, heerka falcelinta hore waxay la mid tahay heerka falcelinta gadaasha - uruurintu waa joogto laakiin lama sina.
learnSch_chemistry_f5_kp1: Isku dheelitirnaanta joogtada ah K = [alaabta] ^ n / [reactants] ^ m. K >> 1: alaabooyinka la doorbido. K << 1: falceliyeyaasha ayaa la doortay.
learnSch_chemistry_f5_kp2: Mabda'a Le Chatelier: haddii nidaamka dheellitirka la carqaladeeyo, wuxuu u wareegayaa inuu ka hortago isbeddelka oo uu soo celiyo dheellitirka.
learnSch_chemistry_f5_kp3: Kordhinta xoogga falcelinta falcelinta waxay u beddeshaa dheellitirka alaabada. Ka saarida badeecada waxay samaysaa si la mid ah.
learnSch_chemistry_f5_kp4: Gaasaska: Cadaadiska sii kordhaya wuxuu u rogaa dheellitirka dhinaca oo leh burooyin gaas yar. Heerkulka kororka ayaa doorbidaya jihada endothermic.
learnSch_chemistry_f5_task: N₂(g) + 3H₂(g) ⇌ 2NH₃(g) ΔH = -92 kJ/mol. Saadaali isbeddelka dheellitirka marka: (a) cadaadiska la kordhiyo, (b) heerkulka kor loo qaado, (c) N₂ badan lagu daro. Sharax mid kasta adoo isticmaalaya mabda'a Le Chatelier.
learnSch_chemistry_f5_tp1: Isku dheelitirnaanta joogtada ah ee Kc iyo Kp
learnSch_chemistry_f6_desc: Kiimikada deegaanku waxay baartaa sida walxaha kiimikaad ay ula falgalaan hawada, biyaha, iyo ciidda - iyo sida dhaqdhaqaaqa bani'aadamku u beddelo nidaamyadan. Waxay sharxaysaa isbeddelka cimilada, xaalufka ozone, wasakhowga biyaha, iyo kimisteriga ka dambeeya xalalka waara sida kiimiko cagaaran iyo agabka noolaha.
learnSch_chemistry_f6_kp0: Gaasaska cagaaran (CO₂, CH₄, N₂O, H₂O uumiga) nuugo oo dib u sii daaya shucaaca infrared, kululaynta dusha dhulka - saamaynta aqalka dhirta lagu koriyo.
learnSch_chemistry_f6_kp1: Roobka aysiidhka ah: SO₂ iyo NOₓ (laga bilaabo gubashada shidaalka fossil) waxay ku milmaan biyaha roobka ee samaynta H₂SO₃ iyo HNO₃, hoos u dhigaan pH waxayna waxyeelleeyaan hab-nololeedyada deegaanka.
learnSch_chemistry_f6_kp2: Ozone-ka oo yaraada: CFC-yadu waxay sii daayaan Cl·radicals ee stratosphere, kuwaas oo si firfircoon u burburiya O₃: Cl· + O₃ → ClO· + O₂ (falcelinta silsiladda).
learnSch_chemistry_f6_kp3: Eutrophication: Nitrate iyo fosfate oo ka soo dareera bacrimiyeyaasha ayaa sababa ubaxyada algae-ga oo baabi'iya ogsijiinta milanta oo dila nolosha biyaha.
learnSch_chemistry_f6_kp4: Mabaadi'da chemistry-ga cagaaran: falcelinta naqshadaynta ee yaraysa qashinka, adeegsata kaydka quudinta la cusboonaysiin karo, ka fogow dareerayaasha halista ah, oo sare u qaada dhaqaalaha atamka.
learnSch_chemistry_f6_task: Sharax falcelinta silsiladda oo dhammaystiran oo hal unug CFC uu ku burburin karo kumanaan molecules ozone. Qor labada tallaabo ee muhiimka ah. Kadib xisaabi dhaqaalaha atamka ee falcelinta 2H₂ + O₂ → 2H₂O.
learnSch_chemistry_f6_tp1: Roobka aysiidhka ah iyo lakabka ozone
learnSch_biology_f3_desc: Hidde-yaqaanku waa cilmiga dhaxalka - sida dabeecadaha looga gudbiyo waalidiinta una gudbiyaan farcanka iyada oo loo marayo hiddo-wadaha iyo koromosoomyada. Waxay taageertaa daawada (cudurrada hidde-sideyaasha, daawaynta shakhsi ahaaneed), beeraha (taranta dalagga), iyo cilmiga dambi-baarista (DNA). Fahamka genetics macnaheedu waa fahamka sababta ay shakhsiyaadku u kala duwan yihiin iyo sida cudurrada la iska dhaxlo u soo baxaan.
learnSch_biology_f3_kp0: Hidde-sideyadu waa qaybo DNA ah oo u codee borotiinnada. Hidde kasta waxa uu ku jiraa meel gaar ah (goob) koromosoomyada.
learnSch_biology_f3_kp1: Aadanuhu waxay leeyihiin 23-labo oo koromosoomyo ah (46 wadar); mid ka mid ah waalid kasta. Koromosoomyada galmada: XX = dhedig, XY = lab.
learnSch_biology_f3_kp2: Allele (B) maaskarada dib u celinta (b) ee heterozygote (Bb). Sifooyinka dib-u-dhacu waxay soo baxaan kaliya marka qaniisyada (bb).
learnSch_biology_f3_kp3: Fagaarayaasha Punnett waxay saadaaliyaan ixtimaalka faraca genotypes. Iskutallaab monohybrid Bb × Bb waxa uu siinayaa 3:1 saamiga phenotype.
learnSch_biology_f3_kp4: Sifooyinka ku xidhan galmada (tusaale, midabka indho la'aanta, haemophilia) waxa lagu qaadaa koromosoomka X; ragga (XY) ayaa inta badan saameeya.
learnSch_biology_f3_task: Laba waalid oo indho bunni ah (Bb × Bb) ayaa leh carruur. Sawir fagaaraha Punnett Waa maxay suurtagalnimada in ilmuhu leeyahay indho buluug ah (bb)? Waa maxay saamiga genotype iyo phenotype?
learnSch_biology_f4_desc: Evolution waa isbeddelka dabeecadaha dhaxalka ah ee dadwaynaha ka ab ka ab. Doorashada dabiiciga ah ee Darwin ayaa ah habka ugu muhiimsan: shakhsiyaadka leh sifooyin faa'iido leh ayaa badbaaday oo soo saara wax badan. Evolution waxa uu sharxayaa kala duwanaanshaha weyn ee nolosha Dunida iyo sifooyinka la wadaago ee noocyada kala duwan.
learnSch_biology_f4_kp0: Xulashada dabiiciga ah: Shakhsiyaadka leh sifooyin ku habboon deegaanka ayaa badbaada oo taran wax badan, iyaga oo sifooyin faa'iido leh u gudbinaya faraca.
learnSch_biology_f4_kp1: Caddaynta horumarka: diiwaanka fosilka, anatomy is barbar dhig (qaab-dhismeedka isku midka ah), isku ekaanshaha DNA, taariikh nololeed, muuqaal la arkay.
learnSch_biology_f4_kp2: Isbeddellada ku jira DNA-da ayaa ah isha ugu dambeysa ee kala duwanaanshaha hidde-raaca cusub. Badankoodu waa dhexdhexaad; qaarkood waa waxyeelo; wax yar ayaa bixiya faa'iido.
learnSch_biology_f4_kp3: Gaar ahaan: marka dadku ay go'doonsan yihiin (Juqraafi, taran) in ku filan, waxay u xuubsiibtaan noocyo kala duwan oo aan hadda is dhexmari karin.
learnSch_biology_f4_kp4: Iska caabbinta antibiyootiga waa horumar ficil ahaan: bakteeriyada leh hiddo-wadaha iska caabbinta ayaa badbaaday oo soo saara, taasoo ka dhigaysa noocyada iska caabbinta ah ee ugu sarreeya.
learnSch_biology_f4_task: U sharax 4 tillaabo sida iska caabbinta antibiyootiga ay ugu koraan dadka bakteeriyada isticmaalaya xulashada dabiiciga ah. Ka dib sharax laba nooc oo kala duwan oo caddayn ah oo loogu talagalay korriinka oo sharax mid walba waxa uu muujinayo.
learnSch_biology_f5_desc: Dhirtu waa soosaarayaasha aasaasiga ah ee ku dhawaad ​​dhammaan nidaamyada deegaanka - waxay qabtaan tamarta qoraxda waxayna u beddelaan maadada organic iyada oo loo marayo photosynthesis. Fahamka bayoolajiga dhirta waxa ay dabooshaa qaab-dhismeedka (xididdada, afkoda, caleemaha, ubaxa), photosynthesis, taran, iyo doorka muhiimka ah ee dhirtu ka ciyaarto nidaaminta jawiga dhulka iyo quudinta nolosha.
learnSch_biology_f5_kp0: Photosynthesis: 6CO₂ + 6H₂O + tamarta iftiinka → C₆H₁₂O₆ + 6O₂. Waxay ku dhacdaa chloroplasts ka kooban chlorophyll.
learnSch_biology_f5_kp1: Caleemaha waxaa loo habeeyey photosynthesis: meel weyn oo dusha sare ah, dhuuban, epidermis hufan, stomata gelitaanka CO₂, iyo shabakad qani ah oo xididdada dhiigga ah.
learnSch_biology_f5_kp2: Xylem waxay ka soo qaadaa biyaha iyo macdanta xididada ilaa caleemaha. Phloem waxay sonkorta ka soo qaadaa caleemaha ilaa geedka intiisa kale.
learnSch_biology_f5_kp3: Transpiration: biyuhu waxay ku uumi baxaan stomata, iyagoo biyaha kor u soo jiidaya dhexda xylem (transpiration stream).
learnSch_biology_f5_kp4: Taranka dhirta: dhirta ubaxu waxay isticmaalaan pollination (wareejinta manka) iyo bacriminta si ay u soo saaraan miraha; abuurka ayaa u kala firdhiya meelo cusub.
learnSch_biology_f5_task: Samee tijaabo si aad u tijaabiso in xoogga iftiinka uu saameeyo heerka photosynthesis ee balliyada. Sheeg doorsoomayaasha madaxbannaan, ku tiirsan, iyo kuwa la xakameeyey. Saadaali oo sharax natiijada.
learnSch_biology_f6_desc: Microbiology waa daraasadda noolaha yaryar - bakteeriyada, fayrasyada, fungi, iyo protists. Hay'adahan yaryar ayaa qaabeeya caafimaadka bini'aadamka, beeraha, wax soo saarka cuntada, iyo meertada kaarboonka adduunka. Fahamka microbes-ka ayaa muhiim u ah daawada (antibiotics, tallaalada), bayotechnoolajiyada, iyo fahamka cudurada.
learnSch_biology_f6_kp0: Bakteeriyadu waa prokaryotes (aan lahayn nukleus). Badankoodu waa kuwo aan waxyeello lahayn ama faa'iido leh; qaar waa cudur-sidaha keena caabuqa sida qaaxada iyo daacuunka.
learnSch_biology_f6_kp1: Fayrasyadu ma aha unugyo - waa xadhkaha DNA/RNA ee jaakad borotiinka ah. Waxay ku celceliyaan kaliya inay afduubaan mashiinada unugga martida loo yahay.
learnSch_biology_f6_kp2: Antibiyootigyadu waxay dilaan ama joojiyaan bakteeriyada laakiin faa'iido ma leh fayraska (hargabka caadiga ah, ifilada). Isticmaalka xad dhaafka ah wuxuu keenaa iska caabbinta antibiyootiga.
learnSch_biology_f6_kp3: Nidaamka difaaca: difaacyo aan gaar ahayn (maqaarka, phagocytes) iyo difaacyo gaar ah (lymphocytes oo soo saara unugyada difaaca jirka). Tallaaladu waxay tababaraan habka difaaca jirka iyaga oo aan keenin cudur.
learnSch_biology_f6_kp4: Microbes faa'iido leh: bakteeriyada xiidmaha waxay caawisaa dheefshiidka; fangaska waxay soo saaraan antibiyootiko (penicillin oo laga helo Penicillium); khamiirku wuxuu khamiiriyaa sonkorta rootiga iyo biirka.
learnSch_biology_f6_task: Is barbar dhig qaabka bakteeriyada iyo fayraska. Sharax sababta antibiyootiga mid ka mid ah u shaqeeyo laakiin aysan u shaqeynin kan kale. Kadib sharax laba siyaabood oo uu jidhku iskaga difaaco caabuqa bakteeriyada.
learnSch_computer_science_f3_desc: Qaab dhismeedka xogta waa habab habaysan oo lagu kaydiyo laguna galo xogta; Algorithms waa habab tallaabo-tallaabo ah oo lagu xalliyo dhibaatooyinka. Doorashada qaab dhismeedka xogta saxda ah iyo algorithm ayaa go'aamisa in barnaamijku ku socdo millise seconds ama saacado. Mawduucan waa laf-dhabarta horumarinta software wax ku ool ah.
learnSch_computer_science_f3_kp0: Arraysku waxay ku kaydiyaan curiyayaasha si isdaba joog ah; Helitaanka index waa O(1). Liisaska waxay ogolaadaan cabbirka firfircoon laakiin waxa laga yaabaa inay helaan gaabis.
learnSch_computer_science_f3_kp1: Xirmooyinka (LIFO - u dambeeya, marka hore) iyo safafka (FIFO - marka hore, marka hore) waxay maamulaan ururinta la amray kiisaska isticmaalka gaarka ah.
learnSch_computer_science_f3_kp2: Raadinta toosan waxay hubisaa shay kasta (O(n)); Raadinta binary waxay u baahan tahay xog la kala soocay oo kala bar barta goob raadinta tallaabo kasta (O(log n)).
learnSch_computer_science_f3_kp3: Kala soocida xumbo waxay isbarbar dhigtaa canaasiirta ku dhow oo isbeddesha (O(n²)). Isku dhafka kala qaybsanaanta oo si isdaba joog ah isugu milmaan (O(n log n)) - aad ugu dhaqso badan xogta weyn.
learnSch_computer_science_f3_kp4: Qoraalka Big-O wuxuu qeexayaa hufnaanta algorithm: O(1) waa joogto, O(n) waa toosan, O(n²) waa quadratic - hoos ayaa u fiican wax-soo-saarka waaweyn.
learnSch_computer_science_f3_task: Raad raac qaabka xumbo ee liiska [5, 3, 8, 1, 4]. Muuji baas kasta. Tiri wadarta isbarbardhigga iyo isdhaafsiga Kadibna ku qor pseudocode raadinta binary liiska la soocay.
learnSch_computer_science_f4_desc: Xog-ururintu waa xog habaysan oo ururinaysa. Xogta la xidhiidha waxay kaydisaa xogta shaxanka ay furayaasha ku xidhan yihiin. SQL waxay kuu ogolaataa inaad abuurto, waydiiso, cusboonaysiiso, oo aad tirtirto diiwaanada. Databases-ku waxay xoojiyaan codsi kasta oo weyn min nidaamka maamulka dugsiga ilaa goobaha warbaahinta bulshada.
learnSch_computer_science_f4_kp0: Xogta laxidhiidha waxay ku kaydisaa xogta shaxaha ( saf = diiwaan, tiirar = beero). Jadwallada waxa ku xidhan furayaasha aasaasiga ah iyo kuwa shisheeye.
learnSch_computer_science_f4_kp1: Furaha aasaasiga ah: aqoonsi u gaar ah diiwaan kasta oo miis ku jira. Furaha shisheeye: wuxuu ku xidhaa hal miis furaha koowaad ee mid kale.
learnSch_computer_science_f4_kp2: Weydiinta SQL ee Xulashada: Tiirka ka dooro miiska HALKEE shuruud ku dalbashada tiirka. Tusaale: MAGACA ARDAYDA KA DOORO HALKEE shahaado = 'A'.
learnSch_computer_science_f4_kp3: Caadiyan waxay yaraynaysaa nuqul ka mid ah xogta iyadoo la kala qaybinayo miisaska si markaas qayb kasta oo xog ah loo kaydiyo hal mar oo keliya.
learnSch_computer_science_f4_kp4: Hawlgallada CRUD: Abuur (GALI), Akhri (Dooro), Cusbooneysii (Cusbooneysii), Tirtir (tirtir) - afarta ficil ee aasaasiga ah ee xogta.
learnSch_computer_science_f4_task: U qaabee xog ururin fudud oo loogu talagalay maktabadda dugsiga (buugaag, arday, amaah). Qeex ugu yaraan 3 miis, beerahooda, iyo xiriirada. Kadib qor su'aal SQL ah si aad u hesho dhammaan buugaagta hadda amaahda lagu siinayo aqoonsiga ardayga 42.
learnSch_computer_science_f5_desc: Shabakad ayaa isku xirta kombiyuutarada si ay u wadaagaan xogta iyo agabka. Intarneetku waa shabakadda adduunka ugu weyn - shabakad shabakadeed. Fahamka sida xogtu u socoto (protocols, cinwaanada IP, DNS) iyo sida loo ilaaliyo (sirta, dab-damiska) ayaa muhiim u ah da'da dhijitaalka ah.
learnSch_computer_science_f5_kp0: LAN (Shabakadda Aagga Maxalliga): waxay ku xidhaa aaladaha meel yar. WAN (Shabakadda Aagga Balaadhan): waxay ku xidhaa LAN-yada masaafo aad u weyn - internetku waa WAN.
learnSch_computer_science_f5_kp1: Cinwaanka IP: calaamad nambareed gaar ah oo qalab kasta oo shabakad ah (tusaale 192.168.1.1 ee IPv4). DNS wuxuu u tarjumaa magacyada domainka (google.com) ciwaannada IP
learnSch_computer_science_f5_kp2: TCP/IP borotokoolka suite: Hab-maamuuska Xakamaynta Gudbinta waxay hubisaa in baakadaha xogta ay si sax ah u yimaadaan; Protocol-ka Internetka iyagaa dariiqa.
learnSch_computer_science_f5_kp3: HTTP (HyperText Transfer Protocol) waxay wareejisaa boggaga internetka. HTTPS waxay ku darsataa sirta TLS - sumadda qufulka waxay muujinaysaa in xidhiidhkaagu yahay mid sir ah.
learnSch_computer_science_f5_kp4: Baakadaha beddelka: xogta waxa loo kala qaybiyaa baakado, mid walbana si madax bannaan ayaa loo mariyaa shabakadda, ka dibna la isugu geeyaa meesha loo socdo.
learnSch_computer_science_f5_task: Raad raac waxa dhacaya marka aad ku qorto 'www.example.com' browserka oo tabo Gelida - laga bilaabo raadinta DNS ilaa helitaanka bogga shabakadda. Magacaabi borotokool kasta iyo tallaabo kasta oo ku lug leh.
learnSch_language_arts_f3_desc: Hadalku waa fanka isgaadhsiinta qancisa - adeegsiga luqadda si wax ku ool ah si loogu wargaliyo, looga dhaadhiciyo, ama lagu dhiirigaliyo dhagaystayaasha. Dooddu waxay ku baraysaa inaad dhisto doodo macquul ah, caddayn ku salaysan iyo inaad aqoonsato oo aad ka hortagto caqliga daciifka ah. Xirfadahani waxay lagama maarmaan u yihiin doodaha, qormooyinka, dacwadaha sharciga, iyo nolosha bulshada.
learnSch_language_arts_f3_kp0: Saddexda nooc ee Aristotle ee qancinta: Ethos (kalsoonida afhayeenka), Pathos (rafcaan shucuur ah), Logos ( dood macquul ah iyo caddayn).
learnSch_language_arts_f3_kp1: Dood adagi waxay leedahay: sheegasho cad (thesis), sababo taageeraya, caddayn, iyo jawaab celinta doodaha.
learnSch_language_arts_f3_kp2: Khaladaadka macquulka ah ayaa wiiqaya doodaha: ad hominem (weerara qofka), nin caws ah (oo si khaldan u muujinaya aragtida ka soo horjeeda), dichotomy been ah (laba doorasho oo keliya ayaa la soo bandhigay).
learnSch_language_arts_f3_kp3: Sababta ka go'a waxay ka guurtaa mabaadi'da guud ilaa gabagabo gaar ah (dhammaan bini'aadamku waa dhimanayaan, Socrates waa bini'aadam, sidaas darteed Socrates waa dhiman).
learnSch_language_arts_f3_kp4: Caqiidada soo jiidashada leh waxay soo saartaa gabagabada guud ee indha-indhaynta gaarka ah - awood leh laakiin waxay noqon kartaa khalad haddii tusaalooyinku aysan matali karin.
learnSch_language_arts_f3_task: Akhri ra'yi wargeys. Aqoonso sheegashada ugu weyn, saddex qaybood oo cadaymo taageeraya, dhagaystayaasha loogu talagalay, iyo hal khalad oo macquul ah (haddii ay jirto). Dabadeed qor 200-erey oo ka-hortag ah adiga oo isticmaalaya dhammaan saddexda hab ee Aristotle.
learnSch_history_f2_desc: Xiliga casriga ah waxa uu aduunka ku bedelay sahan, kacaan, iyo warshadayn. Balaadhinta Yurub ee ku xidhnayd qaaradaha, Iftiinku waxay ka hortimid caadooyinka caqliga, kacaannada dimuqraadiga ah ayaa qaabeeyey dawladihii, iyo Kacaankii Warshadaha ayaa beddelay sida dadku u noolaayeen oo u shaqaynayeen - oo dhidibbada u taagayay dunidan casriga ah.
learnSch_history_f2_kp0: Da'da Sahminta (1400s-1600s): Quwadaha Yurub (Portugal, Spain, England, Netherlands) waxay u socdeen Ameerika, Afrika, iyo Aasiya, abuurista shabakado ganacsi oo caalami ah iyo boqortooyooyin gumeysi.
learnSch_history_f2_kp1: Kacaanka Sayniska iyo Iftiinka (1600s-1700s): Mufakiriinta sida Galileo, Newton, Locke, iyo Voltaire waxay isticmaaleen sabab iyo indho-indhayn si ay uga hortagaan awoodda kaniisadda iyo awoodda dhaqanka.
learnSch_history_f2_kp2: Kacaanka Mareykanka (1776) iyo Kacaanka Faransiiska (1789): waxaa dhiirigeliyay fikradaha Iftiinka, gumeysi iyo muwaadiniintu waxay afgembiyeen boqortooyooyin si ay u dhistaan ​​xuquuq, dastuuro, iyo madax-banaani dadweyne.
learnSch_history_f2_kp3: Kacaankii Warshadaha (1760-meeyadii-1850-meeyadii): waxa uu ka bilaabmay Britain - dhuxusha, matoorada uumiga, warshadaha, iyo jidadka tareenada waxay u beddeleen bulshooyin ku salaysan beeralayda dhaqaalaha magaalooyinka.
learnSch_history_f2_kp4: Gumeysiga: Waddamada Yurub waxay gumeysan jireen Afrika, Aasiya iyo Ameerika - ka soo saarista kheyraadka, barakicinta dadka, waxayna ka tageen cawaaqib siyaasadeed iyo dhaqameed oo waara.
learnSch_history_f2_task: Dooro hal dhacdo laga bilaabo 1500-1900 (tusaale Kacaankii Faransiiska). Sharax: (a) Saddex sababood, (b) laba dhacdo oo muhiim ah, (c) laba cawaaqib oo mustaqbalka fog ah. Isticmaal taariikho gaar ah iyo dad.
learnSch_history_f3_desc: Qarnigii 20-aad waxa uu keenay dagaalladii adduunka, kalitalisnimadii, gumaystihii, iyo dagaalkii qaboobaa - dib-u-qaabaynta qaran kasta oo Dunida ku nool. Waxa kale oo ay ahayd qarni horumar la yaab leh: jabkii faashistaha, kor u kaca xuquuqda aadanaha, dayax soo degay, iyo kacaankii dhijitaalka ahaa. Fahamka waa lama huraan in la fahmo adduunka maanta.
learnSch_history_f3_kp0: Dagaalkii Dunida I (1914-1918): waxaa kiciyay dilkii Archduke Franz Ferdinand; oo ay sababto waddaniyad, Imperialism, militarism, iyo nidaamyada isbahaysiga. ~ 17 milyan ayaa ku dhintay.
learnSch_history_f3_kp1: Dagaalkii Labaad ee Adduunka (1939-1945): Naasigii Jarmalka, Faashiistaha Talyaaniga, iyo Imperial Japan oo ka soo horjeeda xulafada. Holocaust wuxuu dilay ~ 6 milyan oo Yuhuudi ah. Waxay ku dhammaatay bambooyinka atomiga ee Hiroshima iyo Nagasaki.
learnSch_history_f3_kp2: Dagaalkii qaboobaa (1947-1991): Fikir iyo xafiiltan juquraafiyeed oo u dhexeeya USA (caasimadnimada, dimuqraadiyadda) iyo USSR ( shuuciyadda). Dagaaladii Proxy, Space Race, tartanka hubka nukliyeerka, iyo darbiga Berlin ayaa kala qaybiyay adduunka.
learnSch_history_f3_kp3: Decolonization (1945-1975): Dhaqdhaqaaqyadii xornimada ee Afrika, Aasiya, iyo Bariga Dhexe waxay soo afjareen boqortooyooyinkii gumeysiga Yurub. Inta badan waxaa weheliya khilaaf iyo xasillooni darro.
learnSch_history_f3_kp4: Qaramada Midoobay waxay aasaastay 1945 si loo ilaaliyo nabadda; Baaqa Caalamiga ah ee Xuquuqda Aadanaha ayaa la ansixiyay 1948 - labadaba jawaabaha tooska ah ee xasuuqii WWII.
learnSch_history_f3_task: Is barbar dhig sababaha iyo cawaaqibka WWI iyo WWII. Samee miis leh: Sababta ugu weyn, Barta leexinta furaha, Tirada dhimashada, cawaaqibka weyn. Kadib sharax sida WWII uu toos ugu horseeday Dagaalkii Qabow.
learnSch_history_f3_tp1: Xuquul insaanka iyo gumeysiga oo laga takhaluso
learnSch_history_f4_name: Taariikhdu maaha taariikho iyo dhacdooyin kaliya - waa fasiraadda caddaynta. Taariikhyahanadu waxay falanqeeyaan ilaha aasaasiga ah (dokumentiyada asalka ah, artefacts) iyo ilaha labaad (buugaagta qoraalka, taariikh nololeedka) si ay dib ugu dhisaan wixii tagay. Barashada sida loo qiimeeyo ilaha si dhab ah waxay kaa dhigaysaa cilmi baadhe wanaagsan, mufakir, iyo muwaadin.
learnSch_history_f4_desc: Isha aasaasiga ah: la sameeyay wakhtiga dhacdada (xusuus-qoraal, sawir, heshiis, wargeys). Isha labaad: mar dambe la sameeyay, tarjumaadda ilaha aasaasiga ah (nolol-nololeed, dukumeenti, buug-waxbarasho).
learnSch_history_f4_kp0: Falanqaynta SOAPS: Isha, Dhacdooyinka, Dhegaystayaasha, Ujeedo, Mawduuca - qaabdhismeedka fahamka dukumeenti kasta oo taariikhi ah.
learnSch_history_f4_kp1: SOAPS analysis: Source, Occasion, Audience, Purpose, Subject — a framework for understanding any historical document.
learnSch_history_f4_kp2: Kalsoonida iyo faa'iidada: isha eexdu waxay weli noqon kartaa mid faa'iido leh oo caddaynaysa waxa qoraagu rumaysnaa ama dacaayadihii jiray wakhtigaas.
learnSch_history_f4_kp3: Sababta vs. isku xidhka: sababtoo ah laba dhacdo ayaa wada dhacaya macnaheedu maaha mid ayaa kan kale sababay. Taariikhyahanadu waxay raadiyaan caddaynta xidhiidhka tooska ah.
learnSch_history_f4_kp4: Taariikh-qoraalku waa barashada sida taariikhda loo qoray loona fasiray. Dhacdo isku mid ah (tusaale Kacaankii Faransiiska) waxaa si aad u kala duwan u arki kara taariikhyahanno kala duwan.
learnSch_history_f4_task: Ka hel hadal ama warqad taariikhi ah xilli kasta. Codso falanqaynta SOAPS. Qiimee in lagu kalsoonaan karo ( tixgeli mawqifka iyo ujeedada qoraaga) iyo faa'iidada uu leeyahay ( su'aalaha taariikhiga ah maxay ka jawaabaan?).
learnSch_geography_f2_desc: Khariidadaha waa qalab awood leh oo lagu matalo macluumaadka goobta. Sawir-gacmeedku waa sayniska iyo farshaxanka samaynta maab. Laga soo bilaabo kaniiniyada qadiimiga ah ee dhoobada ilaa sawirada dayax-gacmeedka GPS, maabku waxay hagayeen sahaminta, qaabeeyeen siyaasadda, waxayna sameeyeen macno adduunkeena. Akhrinta iyo abuurista khariidado waa xirfad aasaasi ah oo juquraafi ah.
learnSch_geography_f2_kp0: Miisaanka: saamiga u dhexeeya masaafada khariidada iyo masaafada dhabta ah ee aduunka. Khariidadda cabbirka 1:50,000 macnaheedu waa 1 cm = 500 m.
learnSch_geography_f2_kp1: Tixraacyada xariiqda: laydhka loolka (horizontal, cabbir waqooyi/koonfur) iyo dhererka (toosan, cabbirada bari/galbeed) waxay si sax ah u helaan meel kasta oo dhulka ah.
learnSch_geography_f2_kp2: Xariiqyada koontu waxay isku xiraan dhibcaha dhererka siman; sagxadaha si dhow u kala fogaada = jiirar dheer; kala fogaansho badan = jiirada jilicsan.
learnSch_geography_f2_kp3: Saadaasha khariidadu waxay qalloocinaysaa oogada dhulka ee qaloocan oo ku taal khariidad fidsan. Saadaasha Mercator waxay ilaalisaa qaabka laakiin way leexisaa cabbirka; Saadaasha Peters waxay ilaalisaa aagga laakiin qaabkeeda way qalloocisaa.
learnSch_geography_f2_kp4: GIS (Nidaamka Macluumaadka Juqraafiga) waxa uu lakabyo xogo badan (dadweynaha, isticmaalka dhulka, cimilada) ku dhejiya khariidado dhijitaal ah si loo gorfeeyo iyo go'aan qaadashada.
learnSch_geography_f2_task: Adigoo isticmaalaya khariidad muuqaal ah (ama sawir adiga kuu gaar ah), aqoonso: (a) jiirada dheer, (b) dooxada, (c) buurta sare. Qor tixraaca 6-tiro ee shirwaynaha. Xisaabi masaafada dhabta ah ee dariiqa 4cm ee khariidad 1:50,000 ah.
learnSch_geography_f3_desc: Cimiladu waa jawiga muddada gaaban; cimiladu waa celceliska muddada dheer. Aagagga cimilada dhulka - laga bilaabo kulaylaha ilaa polar - waxaa qaabeeya loolka, qulqulka badda, joogga, iyo dabaylaha jira. Fahamka nidaamyada cimiladu waxay muhiim u tahay beeraha, u diyaargarowga masiibada, iyo wax ka qabashada isbedelka cimilada.
learnSch_geography_f3_kp0: Waxyaabaha saameeya cimilada: loolka (xagalka qoraxda), joogga (heerkulka hoos u dhaca ~6.5°C 1000 m), fogaanta badda, qulqulka badda, dabaylaha jira.
learnSch_geography_f3_kp1: Cimilada kulaylaha: kulul iyo qoyan sanadka oo dhan, meel u dhow dhulbaraha. Mediterranean: xagaa kulul oo qalalan, jiilaal qoyan oo khafiif ah. Polar: qabow joogto ah, roobab yar.
learnSch_geography_f3_kp2: Roobabka hore: hawada diiran iyo qabowgu way kulmaan; hawada diiran ayaa ka kacda qabow, qaboojiso, oo isku ururso. Caadi ahaan ulka dhexe (UK, Germany).
learnSch_geography_f3_kp3: Wareegga biyaha: uumi-baxa → Uumi-saarid (samaynta daruuraha) → roobka → dusha sare ee qulqulaya / dhex galka → dib ugu noqoshada uumiga.
learnSch_geography_f3_kp4: Isbeddelka cimilada: kor u kaca CO₂ waxay xoojisaa saamaynta aqalka dhirta lagu koriyo, taasoo keenta kulaylka caalamiga ah, dhacdooyin cimilo oo aad u daran, kor u kaca heerarka badda, iyo beddelidda aagagga cimilada.
learnSch_geography_f3_task: Is barbar dhig jawiga goobta kaynta roobka kulaylaha iyo meel saxare ah. Mid kasta: gobolka celcelis ahaan heerkulka sannadlaha ah, roobka sannadlaha ah, sababaha, iyo laba la qabsiga noolaha halkaas ku nool.
learnSch_geography_f3_tp2: Wejiga hore ee cimilada iyo wareegga biyaha
learnSch_economics_f2_desc: Ganacsiga caalamiga ah waxa uu u ogolaadaa wadamadu in ay ku takhasusaan waxa ay sida ugu hufan u soo saaraan wax kasta oo kale. Caalamiyaynta - xidhiidhka sii kordhaya ee dhaqaalaha, dhaqamada, iyo dadka - ayaa boqolaal milyan ka saaray faqriga laakiin waxa ay sidoo kale abuurtay sinnaan la'aanta iyo caqabadaha deegaanka.
learnSch_economics_f2_kp0: Faa'iidada isbarbardhigga: waddanku waa inuu ku takhasuso wax soo saarka alaabada halkaasoo qiimaha fursaddiisu ugu yar tahay, ka dibna ganacsiga - xitaa haddii ay aad uga fiican tahay wax kasta.
learnSch_economics_f2_kp1: Dhoofinta: badeecadaha iyo adeegyada dibadda loo iib geeyo (dakhliga dalka). Soo dejinta: badeecadaha iyo adeegyada laga soo iibsado dibadda (kharash).
learnSch_economics_f2_kp2: Caqabadaha ganacsiga: tacriifada (canshuurta soo dejinta), kootada (xadka soo dejinta), cunaqabataynta (wadarta mamnuucida) - ilaalinta warshadaha gudaha laakiin waxay kor u qaadaan qiimaha macaamiisha.
learnSch_economics_f2_kp3: Heshiisyada ganacsiga xorta ah (tusaale EU Single Market, NAFTA) waxay yareeyaan caqabadaha u dhexeeya wadamada xubnaha ka ah, kor u qaadida ganacsiga iyo kobaca dhaqaalaha.
learnSch_economics_f2_kp4: Isku dheelitirka ganacsiga: dhoofinta - soo dejinta. Wax-soo-saarka ganacsiga macnaheedu waa wax badan ayaa la dhoofiyaa; hoos u dhac ganacsi micnaheedu waa wax badan ayaa la soo dhoofiyaa.
learnSch_economics_f2_task: Dalka A wuxuu soo saari karaa 100 kombiyuutar AMA 200 oo tan oo sarreen ah sannadkii. Dalka B wuxuu soo saari karaa 60 kombiyuutar AMA 180 tan oo sarreen ah. Tus waddanka uu leeyahay faa'iidada isbarbardhigga ee badeecad kasta oo sharax sababta ay labaduba uga faa'iidaysanayaan takhasuska iyo ganacsiga.
learnSch_economics_f2_tp1: Caqabadaha ganacsiga iyo ganacsiga xorta ah
learnSch_economics_f3_desc: Maaliyadda shakhsi ahaaneed waxa ay dabooshaa maaraynta dhabta ah ee lacagta: kasbashada, kaydinta, miisaaniyadaynta, amaahda, iyo maalgashiga. Aqoonta maaliyadeed waxay kaa caawinaysaa inaad iska ilaaliso dabinada deynta, dhisto maal, oo aad samayso go'aamo xog ogaal ah inta aad nooshahay - laga bilaabo shaqadaada ugu horreysa ilaa hawlgab. Xirfadahaan waa dhif in la baro laakiin si caalami ah ayaa looga baahan yahay.
learnSch_economics_f3_kp0: Miisaaniyadu waxay u qoondaysaa dakhligaaga baahiyaha (kiro, cunto), rabitaan (madadaalada), iyo kaydka. Xeerka 50/30/20: 50% baahida, 30% ayaa raba, 20% kayd.
learnSch_economics_f3_kp1: Dulsaarka isku dhafan: dulsaarka waxaa laga helaa maamulaha iyo dulsaarka la ururiyey labadaba. €1,000 oo ah 5% dulsaarka sanadlaha ah wuxuu noqdaa €1,629 10 sano kadib.
learnSch_economics_f3_kp2: Deynta wanaagsan (amaahda amaahda, amaahda ardayga) waxay dhisi kartaa hanti ama xirfado. Daynta xun (kaarka deynta dulsaarka sare leh, amaahda maalinta mushaharka) waxay kugu dabinaysaa wareegga lacag bixinta.
learnSch_economics_f3_kp3: Sicir-bararku waxa uu baabi’iyaa awoodda wax iibsiga: haddii sicir-bararku yahay 3% oo kaydkaagu uu kasbado 1%, lacagtaadu waxay lumisaa qiimaha dhabta ah sannad kasta.
learnSch_economics_f3_kp4: Kala-duwanaanshaha: ku faafinta maalgashiga hantida kala duwan ( kaydka, curaarta, hantida) waxay yaraynaysaa khatarta - 'dhammaan ukumahaaga ha gelin hal dambiil'.
learnSch_economics_f3_task: U samee miisaaniyad bishii ardayga qaata €800 bishii. U qoondee qadar adiga oo isticmaalaya qaanuunka 50/30/20. Ka dib xisaabi inta €500 u korto ilaa 5 sano gudaheed 4% ribada isku dhafka sanadlaha ah: A = P(1 + r)^n.
learnSch_earth_science_f2_desc: Badweynuhu waxay daboolaan 71% oogada dhulka waxayna nidaamiyaan cimilada, soo saaraan ogsijiinta, waxayna taageeraan kala duwanaanshaha noole ee aan caadiga ahayn. Wareegga biyuhu wuxuu si joogto ah ugu dhex dhaqaaqaa biyaha u dhexeeya badaha, jawiga, iyo dhulka, taas oo ka dhigaysa Earth meeraha kaliya ee biyo dareere ah oogada ku yaal - xaalad muhiim ah oo nolosha ah.
learnSch_earth_science_f2_kp0: Wareegga biyaha: uumi-baxa (dareere gaasta, oo ay kaxayso tamarta cadceedda) → Uumiga (gaaska dhibco, samaynta daruuraha) → roobka (roobka, baraf) → qulqulka iyo qulqulka → dib ugu noqoshada uumiga.
learnSch_earth_science_f2_kp1: Badweynuhu waxay kaydiyaan kulaylka iyo cimilada dhexdhexaadka ah: waxay nuugaan CO₂ iyo kulaylka qorraxda, iyagoo si tartiib ah u sii daaya oo ilaaliya heerkulka ugu sarreeya.
learnSch_earth_science_f2_kp2: Biyo-mareenada badweynta (tusaale Gacanka Gacanka) waxa ay wareejiyaan kulaylka aduunka oo dhan, kulaalaya ama qaboojinta gobolada xeebaha ee ka fog dhulbaraha.
learnSch_earth_science_f2_kp3: Aashitada badweynta: sida CO₂ ugu milanto biyaha badda waxay samaysaa karbonik acid (H₂CO₃), oo hoos u dhigta pH oo khatar ku ah reefs coral iyo shellfish.
learnSch_earth_science_f2_kp4: Biyaha dhulka hoostiisa: biyaha lagu kaydiyo biyo-mareennada dhulka hoostiisa mara. Soo saarista xad-dhaafka ah waxay baabi'isaa biyo-mareennada si ka dhaqso badan inta ay ku shubayaan - arrin sii kordheysa ee amniga biyaha caalamiga ah.
learnSch_earth_science_f2_task: Sawir oo si buuxda u calaamadee wareegga biyaha. Marxalad kasta, sheeg habka jireed ee ku lug leh ( uumi-baxa, uumiga, iwm.) iyo isha tamarta. Ka dib sharax laba hawlood oo bini'aadmi ah oo carqaladeeya wareegga biyaha.
learnSch_earth_science_f3_desc: Khataraha dabiiciga ah - dhulgariirrada, volcanoes, tsunamis, duufaanno - waxay ka dhashaan tamarta gudaha iyo hawada ee dhulka. Fahamka sababahooda, qaybintooda, iyo saamayntooda waxay u ogolaataa bulshooyinka inay isu diyaariyaan, yareeyaan dhaawaca, oo ay badbaadiyaan nafaha. Khatarta dadka bini'aadamku waxay ku xiran tahay arrimo bulsho iyo dhaqaale sida khatarta jireed lafteeda.
learnSch_earth_science_f3_kp0: Dhulgariirku wuxuu ka dhacaa xuduudaha saxanka tectonic (muxaafid, wax dumiya, wax dhisa). Qiyaasta cabbirka Richter/daqadda waxay cabbirtaa sii deynta tamarta; halbeeg kasta = × 32 jeer ka badan tamar.
learnSch_earth_science_f3_kp1: Foolkaanooyinku waxay ka sameeyaan aagagga hoos-u-dhigga (wax qarxa, lava viscous) iyo meelaha kulul/xudduudaha wax dhisaya (wax-qabad, lava-daaqsan, tusaale Iceland, Hawaii).
learnSch_earth_science_f3_kp2: Tsunamis waa mowjado badweyn oo ka dhasha dhulgariirrada badda hoosteeda ama qarax foolkaanooyin. Tsunamigii badweynta Hindiya ee 2004tii ayaa dilay ~230,000 oo qof.
learnSch_earth_science_f3_kp3: Duufaanno kulaylaha ah (dabaylo/ duufaanno) ayaa ku kor samaysma biyaha badweynta diiran (≥26°C). Waxay keenaan dabaylo aad u daran, duufaano badan, iyo daadad.
learnSch_earth_science_f3_kp4: U nuglaanshaha khataraha dabiiciga ahi waxay ku xidhan tahay faqriga, tayada dhismaha, nidaamyada digniinta, iyo dawladnimada - waddamada faqiirka ah ayaa si aan qiyaas lahayn u dhibaataysan.
learnSch_earth_science_f3_task: Is barbar dhig sababaha iyo waxyeelada dhulgariir weyn (tusaale Haiti 2010) oo leh foolkaanada weyn ee qarxinta (tusaale Mount Pinatubo 1991). Isticmaal miis: Sababta, Weynaanta, Saamaynta aasaasiga ah, Saamaynta Labaad, Jawaabta Aadanaha.
learnSch_health_f2_desc: Gargaarka degdegga ah waa gargaarka degdegga ah ee la siiyo qof dhaawacmay ama buka ka hor intaysan iman gargaar caafimaad oo xirfad leh. Ogaanshaha gargaarka degdega ah waxa ay badbaadisaa nolosha - oo ay ku jirto 'silsiladda badbaadada' ee xiritaanka wadnaha. Aqoonta badbaadada shakhsi ahaaneed waxay caawisaa ka hortagga shilalka, aqoonsato khatarta, iyo qaadashada go'aannada wanaagsan ee xaaladaha degdegga ah.
learnSch_health_f2_kp0: Sahanka aasaasiga ah (ABCDE): Marin-haweedka, Neefsashada, Wareegga, Naafanimada (heerka miyirka), Soo-gaadhista (dhaawacyada muuqda).
learnSch_health_f2_kp1: CPR (Dib-u-soo-nooleynta Wadnaha): 30 cadaadis laabta ah oo qotodheer 5-6 cm iyo ~ 100-120 daqiiqaddii, ka dibna 2 neefsasho samatabbixin ah. Ku celi ilaa caawimo laga helayo.
learnSch_health_f2_kp2: Booska soo kabashada: qofka miyir daboolan laakiin neefsanaya - wuxuu ka ilaaliyaa matagga oo wuxuu ilaaliyaa marinka hawadu furan yahay.
learnSch_health_f2_kp3: Gubashada: ku qabooji biyo socda qabow hoostooda 10 daqiiqo. Ha isticmaalin baraf, subag, ama daawada cadayga. Ku dabool maro nadiif ah oo aan jilicsanayn.
learnSch_health_f2_kp4: Wicida adeegyada degdega ah: sheeg goobtaada, nooca xaaladda degdega ah, iyo tirada dadka ay saamaysay. Ku joog khadka oo raac tilmaamaha.
learnSch_health_f2_task: Qor tilmaan tallaabo-tallaabo ah oo loogu jawaabayo qof dumay oo aan u jawaabin. Ku dar: hubinta badbaadada, qiimaynta miyir-qabka, u yeedhida caawimaad, tillaabooyinka CPR, iyo goorta la joojinayo. Ku dar nambarada qiyaas ahaan (heerka cadaadis, qoto dheer).
learnSch_arts_f1_desc: Farshaxanadu waxay ka doortaan farsamooyin iyo agabyo kala duwan - sawir, rinjiyeyn, daabacaad, farshaxan, farshaxan dhijitaal ah - mid kasta oo leh tayo iyo adeegsi kala duwan. Fahamka warbaahinta farshaxan ee kala duwan waxay kaa caawinaysaa inaad doorato qalabka saxda ah ee ujeedadaada faneed, waxayna dhistaa eray bixin si aad uga doodo oo aad u qiimeyso farshaxanimada si adag.
learnSch_arts_f1_kp0: Warbaahin sawireed: qalin (graphite), dhuxul, khad - mid kastaa wuxuu soo saaraa tayada xariiqda kala duwan, cod, iyo muuqaal. Farsamooyinka hadhka: dillaacin, dillaacis-is-dhaafsi, dharbaaxo, isku-dar.
learnSch_arts_f1_kp1: Rinjiyeynta warbaahinta: midabka biyaha (transparent, meelaha iftiinka ah ee aan rinji lahayn), acrylics (biyo-ku-salaysan, qalajin degdeg ah, badan), saliid (qallajin tartiib ah, midab qani ah, farsamo dhalaalid dhaqameed).
learnSch_arts_f1_kp2: Daabacaadda: daabacaadda gargaarka (linocut - gooyn si aad naqshadda uga baxdo), daabacaadda shaashadda, etching - daabacado isku mid ah oo badan oo hal shax ah.
learnSch_arts_f1_kp3: Farshaxanka: wax lagu daro (qaabaynta dhoobada, isku-dhafka), kala-soocida (dhagaxa xardho ama alwaax), shubid (bronze, resin). Farshaxanka rakibidda wuxuu u adeegsadaa booska laftiisa dhexdhexaad ahaan.
learnSch_arts_f1_kp4: Aaladaha farshaxanka dhijitaalka ah (Procreate, Photoshop, Blender) waxay soo celiyaan oo kordhiyaan farsamooyinka dhaqanka - lakabyada, burushyada, iyo qaabaynta 3D - laakiin waxay u baahan yihiin aqoonta isla mabaadi'da hoose.
learnSch_arts_f1_task: Dooro hal farshaxan iyo hal farshaxan oo aanad hore u isticmaalin. Baadh sifooyinkeeda, ka dibna samee daraasad adoo isticmaalaya dhexdhexaadintaas. Qor 150 kelmadood oo aad ku qiimaynayso waxa shaqeeyay, waxa adkaa, iyo sida ay dhexdhexaadintu u saamaysay natiijada.
learnSch_arts_f2_desc: Midabku waa cunsurka muuqaalka ugu awoodda badan - wuxuu kiciyaa shucuur, wuxuu abuuraa qoto dheer, wuxuuna hagaa isha daawadaha. Aragtida midabku waxay sharraxaysaa xidhiidhka ka dhexeeya midabada iyo sida ula kac loogu isticmaalo. Laga soo bilaabo giraangiraha midabka ilaa isku dhafka indhaha, midabaynta midabaynta ayaa beddeleysa saameynta farshaxan kasta.
learnSch_arts_f2_kp0: Midabada asaasiga ah (RYB ee rinjiga: casaan, jaalle, buluug) laguma samayn karo isku darka. Midabada labaad (orange, cagaar, guduud) ayaa laga sameeyay laba horudhac.
learnSch_arts_f2_kp1: Midabada dhameystiran waxay ku fadhiyaan iska soo horjeeda midba midka kale ee giraangiraha midabka (tusaale: casaan-cagaar, buluug-orange). Marka la is barbar dhigo waa la is xoojinayaa; isku darka waxay dhexdhexaadinayaan cawl/brown.
learnSch_arts_f2_kp2: Heerkulka midabka: midabyo diirran (casaan, liin, jaalle) waxay dareemaan tamar iyo horumar xagga aragga ah. Midabada qabow (buluug, cagaar, guduud) waxay dareemaan deganaansho iyo dib u gurasho.
learnSch_arts_f2_kp3: Midab = midab + cad (ka fudud). Hoos = midab + madow (madow). Cod = midab + cawl. Kuwani waxay abuuraan kala duwanaansho qiimo leh farshaxanka.
learnSch_arts_f2_kp4: Nidaamyada midabka isku midka ah (midabka ku xiga) ayaa abuuraya wada noolaansho. Nidaamyada saddex-geesoodka ah (saddex midab oo siman oo siman) waxay abuuraan kala duwanaansho firfircoon. Monochromatic waxay isticmaashaa hal midab oo qiimayaal kala duwan ah.
learnSch_arts_f2_task: Samee shaag midab leh oo muujinaya dhammaan 12 midab (3 hoose, 3 sare, 6 jaamacadeed). Dabadeed rinji ama sawir laba geesood oo yaryar oo dhinac ah adigoo isticmaalaya lammaane dhammaystiran oo sharax saamaynta muuqaalka. Ku qor: midab, hadh, iyo cod ka mid ah hal midab.
learnSch_arts_f2_tp1: Nidaamyo dhammaystiran iyo kuwo la mid ah
learnSch_music_f1_desc: Qalabka muusiga ee dunidu waxa loo qaybiyaa qoysas sida ay codka u soo saaraan. Noocyada muusiga - laga bilaabo qadiimiga ilaa jazz ilaa hip-hop - waxay ka tarjumayaan dhaqanka, taariikhda, iyo macnaha guud. Aqoonta qalabyada iyo noocyada waxay ku siinaysaa labadaba eray bixin wax ku ool ah iyo qadarin ballaadhan oo muusiko ah sida noole, qaab farshaxan oo kobcaya.
learnSch_music_f1_kp0: Qoysaska qalabka: xadhkaha (violin, gitaarka - xargaha gariiraya), dabaysha alwaax (flute, clarinet - tiirarka hawada gariiraya), naxaas (trumpet, trombone - bushimaha dhawaaqa), garaaca (durbaannada, xylophone - garaac), kiiboodhka ( biyaano, organ - habab badan).
learnSch_music_f1_kp1: Qaybaha Orchestra: xargaha, dabaysha alwaaxa, naxaasta, garaaca. Daareeyaha waxa uu isku xidhaa dhammaan qaybaha isaga oo isticmaalaya tilmaan iyo budh.
learnSch_music_f1_kp2: Muusigga qadiimiga ah (1750-1820): foomamka habaysan (sonata, symphony, concerto), halabuurayaasha sida Mozart, Haydn, Beethoven. Muusigga jaceylka ah (1820-1900): muujin shucuur badan, orkestras waaweyn, Brahms, Tchaikovsky, Wagner.
learnSch_music_f1_kp3: Jazz (1900-meeyadii, asalka Afrikaanka-Maraykanka): hagaajinta, isku-dhafka, laxanka lulida. Nooc-hoosaadyada: bebop, jazz qabow, fusion. Buluugga: wac-iyo-jawaab, foom 12-bar.
learnSch_music_f1_kp4: Pop and rock (1950-meeyadii-): gitaar koronto, bass, durbaanno, codad. Hip-hop (1970-meeyadii, Bronx NY): DJing, muunad, heeso, jebin - dhaqdhaqaaq dhaqameed dhamaystiran.
learnSch_music_f1_task: Dhegayso hal gabal oo ka mid ah labada nooc ee kala duwan (tusaale Beethoven symphony iyo heesta blues). Mid kasta: aqoonso qalabka la isticmaalay, tempo, firfircoonida, niyadda, iyo hal sifo muusig oo u gaar ah noocaas. Isku barbar dhig miis.
learnSch_music_f1_tp2: Jazz, blues, iyo noocyada casriga ah
learnSch_music_f2_name: Taariikhda Muusiga || Taariikhda muusiggu waxay raadraacdaa sida qaababka muusiga, aaladaha, iyo fikradaha ay u kobceen qarniyo iyo dhaqamo. Laga soo bilaabo heesta Gregorian ilaa heesaha Beethoven ilaa muusiga qoob ka ciyaarka elektaroonigga ah, xilli kastaa wuxuu ka tarjumayaa qiyamka bulshada, tignoolajiyada, iyo aragtida adduunka. Fahamka taariikhda muusikadu waxay sii qoto dheeraysaa qaddarinta waxayna gelinaysaa muusigga hadda jira macnaha guud.
learnSch_music_f2_desc: Medieval (500-1400): Heesta Gregorian ( monophonic, muusig codka aan lala socon ee kaniisadda). Renaissance (1400-1600): polyphony (qaybo badan oo cod ah oo madaxbannaan); Muusig cilmaani ah ayaa soo baxaya.
learnSch_music_f2_kp0: Medieval (500–1400): Gregorian chant (monophonic, unaccompanied vocal music for the church). Renaissance (1400–1600): polyphony (multiple independent vocal parts); secular music emerges.
learnSch_music_f2_kp1: Baroque (1600-1750): J.S. Bach, Handel, Vivaldi. Barta koontada qurxisay, basso continuo, foomamka: fugue, suite, oratorio. Opera waxaa lagu alifay Florence (~ 1600).
learnSch_music_f2_kp2: Muddada qadiimiga ah (1750-1820): dheelitirnaanta, caddaynta, horumarinta symphony, qaabka sonata, string rubuc. Mozart, Haydn, hore Beethoven.
learnSch_music_f2_kp3: Xilligii Romantic (1820-1900): xoojinta shucuureed, barnaamijka muusiga (sheeko ayuu ka sheekeynayaa), wadaninimo (Grieg, Sibelius, Dvořák), orkestras oo si weyn loo ballaariyay.
learnSch_music_f2_kp4: Qarnigii 20-aad: Casriyeyn (Stravinsky, Schoenberg's 12-tone system), Jazz Age, Rock & Roll revolution (1950-meeyadii), minimalism (Philip Glass), iyo kacaankii dhijitaalka ahaa ee abuuraya muusigga elektaroonigga ah iyo kumbuyuutarka.
learnSch_music_f2_task: Samee wakhti muusik reer galbeed ah laga bilaabo 500 CE ilaa hadda. Muddo kasta: ku qor magaca, taariikhaha, laba laxan/fannaaniin, hal muusik oo muhiim ah, iyo hal qalab ama qaab sifo ah. Sharax ama sharax hal qayb muusik oo ka mid ah xilli kasta.
learnSch_music_f2_tp0: Dhexe, Renaissance, Baroque || Waayihii Qaraamiga iyo Jacaylka
learnSch_physical_education_f1_name: Isboortiga kooxdu waxay horumariyaan xirfado jireed, fikir taatikada, isgaarsiinta, iyo hogaaminta. Haddi ay noqoto kubbadda cagta, kubbadda koleyga, kubbadda laliska, ama kubbadda gacanta - mid kastaa wuxuu dalbanayaa fahamka xeerarka, boosaska, iyo xeeladaha kooxda. Barashada akhrinta ciyaarta iyo samaynta go'aamo degdeg ah ayaa muhiim u ah sida awoodda jireed.
learnSch_physical_education_f1_desc: Isgaadhsiinta: kubbadda oo loogu yeero, abaabulidda difaaca, iyo dhiirigelinta asxaabta ayaa muhiim u ah sida xirfadda farsamada ee ciyaaraha kooxda.
learnSch_physical_education_f1_kp0: Xeeladaha kubbadda cagta: qaab-dhismeedka (4-4-2, 4-3-3) ayaa go'aamiya sida ciyaartoyda loo meeleeyo. Cadaadiska sare ee garoonka iyo difaaca qoto dheer ayaa ah habab istaraatiijiyadeed oo iska soo horjeeda.
learnSch_physical_education_f1_kp1: Go'aan-qaadasho: ciyaartoyda ugu fiican waxay si joogto ah u baadhayaan deegaankooda, odorosaan tallaabada xigta, oo doortaan ikhtiyaarka faa'iido u leh kooxda halkii ay muujin lahaayeen xirfad shakhsi ahaaneed.
learnSch_physical_education_f1_kp2: Xeerar ayaa u jira caddaaladda iyo badbaadada. Fahamka sharciga offsideka (kubadda cagta), shaashado sharci darro ah (kubadda kolayga), ama khaladaadka wareegga (kubadda laliska) waxay ka hortagtaa khaladaadka iyo ciqaabta.
learnSch_physical_education_f1_kp3: Hoggaaminta iyo ciyaar-wanaagga: kabtanadu waxay dhiirigeliyaan oo xidhiidhiyaan; Ciyaartoyda oo dhan waxay ixtiraamaan kuwa ka soo horjeeda, garsoorayaasha, iyo natiijooyinka - qiyamka asaasiga ah ee isboortiga.
learnSch_physical_education_f1_kp4: Dooro ciyaar kooxeed aad ciyaareyso ama daawato. Samee layli ku tababarasho si aad u horumariso hal xirfad gaar ah (tusaale saxnaanta kubbada cagta). Gobolka: xirfadda la beegsaday, qalabka loo baahan yahay, tilmaamaha layliga, sida loo adkeeyo, iyo sida loo qiimeeyo horumarinta.
learnSch_physical_education_f2_desc: Ladnaanta ayaa ka badan taam ahaanshiyaha jirka - waxay ka kooban tahay caafimaadka maskaxda, hurdada, nafaqada, xiriirka bulshada, iyo maareynta cadaadiska. Hab nololeed caafimaad leh oo lagu dhisay dhaqdhaqaaq joogto ah, cunto isku dheeli tiran, hurdo kugu filan, iyo xidhiidho togan ayaa ka ilaaliya cudurrada daba dheeraada waxayna taageertaa fayoobi nolosha oo dhan.
learnSch_physical_education_f2_kp0: WHO waxay ku talisaa 150-300 daqiiqo oo dhaqdhaqaaq aerobic dhexdhexaad ah usbuucii dadka waaweyn (tusaale socod degdeg ah, baaskiil wadid) ama 75 daqiiqo oo dhaqdhaqaaq xoog leh.
learnSch_physical_education_f2_kp1: Hurdo: dhalinyaradu waxay u baahan yihiin 8-10 saacadood habeenkii. Hurdo la'aantu waxay wax u dhimaysaa xoojinta xusuusta, niyadda, shaqada difaaca, iyo wakhtiga falcelinta.
learnSch_physical_education_f2_kp2: Farsamooyinka maareynta cadaadiska: jimicsiga jirka, miyir-qabka, neefsashada qoto dheer, maareynta waqtiga, iyo la hadalka qof la aamini karo dhamaantood waa habab caddayn ku saleysan.
learnSch_physical_education_f2_kp3: Waqtiga shaashadda: isticmaalka xad dhaafka ah (gaar ahaan warbaahinta bulshada habeenkii) waxay carqaladeysaa hurdada waxayna la xiriirtaa welwelka iyo isku kalsooni hoose ee dhalinyarada. Burburinta dhijitaalka ah iyo xuduudaha ayaa caawinaya.
learnSch_physical_education_f2_kp4: Ogaanshaha walxaha: khamriga iyo tubaakada waa sharci laakiin waxyeello leh - aalkoladu waxay dhaawacdaa beerka iyo maskaxda; sigaarku wuxuu keenaa kansarka sanbabada iyo cudurrada wadnaha iyo xididdada dhiigga. Labaduba waxay si gaar ah waxyeelo ugu yihiin jirka soo koraya.
learnSch_physical_education_f2_task: Samee qorshe fayoobi shaqsiyeed todobaadle ah. Ku dar: 5 fadhiyo dhaqdhaqaaq jireed (nooca, muddada, xoojinta), jadwal hurdo, 3 farsamooyin maareynta cadaadiska, iyo 2 yoolal nafaqo. Ka fiirso aagga u baahan hagaajinta ugu badan iyo sababta.
learnSch_physical_education_f2_tp2: Wacyigelinta caafimaadka iyo walaxda dhijitaalka ah
learnSch_religion_ethics_f2_desc: Anshaxa falsafadu waxay waydiisaa: sidee baan u dhaqmi karnaa? Maxaa ka dhigaya fal sax ama khalad? Saddex qaab-dhismeed anshaxeed oo waaweyn - cawaaqib xumo, deontology, iyo anshaxa suubban - ayaa bixiya jawaabo kala duwan. Ku dabaqida qaab-dhismeedkan jaahwareerka dhabta ah ee aduunka (euthanasia, cadaalada cimilada, AI) waxay horumarisaa caqli-gal cad oo habaysan.
learnSch_religion_ethics_f2_kp0: Natiijooyinka (Utilitarianism - Mill, Bentham): falku waa sax haddii uu soo saaro farxadda ugu weyn ee tirada ugu badan. Natiijadu waxay go'aamisaa anshaxa.
learnSch_religion_ethics_f2_kp1: Deontology (Kant): Ficilada qaar waa sax ama khalad, iyada oo aan loo eegin cawaaqibta. Muhiimadda Qaybta: ku dhaqan oo keliya xeerar waxaad noqon kartaa sharciyo caalami ah.
learnSch_religion_ethics_f2_kp2: Anshaxa Wanaagga (Aristotle): diiradda saara dabeecadda halkii aad ka ahaan lahayd xeerar ama natiijooyin. Qofka wanaagga badan waxa uu ku barbaaray caadooyinka geesinimada, daacadnimada, caddaaladda, iyo is-dejinta.
learnSch_religion_ethics_f2_kp3: Erayada anshaxa: anshaxu way ku kala duwan yihiin dhaqamada iyo shakhsiyaadka - ma jiro halbeeg caalami ah. Akhlaaqda akhlaaqda: falalka qaarkood had iyo jeer waa sax ama khalad iyadoon loo eegin dhaqanka.
learnSch_religion_ethics_f2_kp4: Anshaxa la dabaqay ayaa baaraya khilaafyo gaar ah: anshaxa caafimaadka (euthanasia, ilmo iska soo rididda), anshaxa deegaanka (waajibaadka dabeecadda aan aadanaha ahayn), iyo anshaxa AI (hubka madaxbannaan, sirnimada).
learnSch_religion_ethics_f2_task: Dalbo mid kasta oo ka mid ah saddexda hab-dhismeedka anshaxa ee waaweyn (utilitarianism, deontology, virtue ethics) dhibaatadan: 'Ma anshax baa in been la sheego si loo ilaaliyo dareenka qof?' Mid walba, u sheeg qaab-dhismeedka mabda'a asaasiga ah iyo jawaabta uu ka bixinayo jahwareerka.
learnSch_religion_ethics_f2_tp2: Anshaxa suuban iyo akhlaaqda lagu dhaqmo
learnSch_social_studies_f2_desc: Xuquuqul insaanku waa xuquuq caalami ah oo uu haysto qof kasta, iyadoon loo eegayn dhalasho, lab iyo dhedig, midab, ama diin. Baaqa Caalamiga ah ee Xuquuqda Aadanaha (1948) waxa uu dhigayaa sharciga caalamiga ah. Dhalashada caalamiga ah macneheedu waa fahamka xuquuqdaada iyo mas'uuliyadahaga adduun isku xiran iyo inaad tallaabo u qaaddo mustaqbal waara oo cadaalad ah.
learnSch_social_studies_f2_kp0: Baaqa Caalamiga ah ee Xuquuqda Aadanaha (UDHR, 1948) waxa uu leeyahay 30 qodob oo ka hadlaya xuquuqda madaniga, siyaasadda, dhaqaalaha, bulshada, iyo dhaqanka - aasaaska sharciga caalamiga ah ee xuquuqda aadanaha.
learnSch_social_studies_f2_kp1: Xuquuqda jiilka kowaad: madaniga iyo siyaasadda (hadalka xorta ah, xaq u yeelashada maxkamad cadaalad ah, xaqa codbixinta). Jiilka labaad: dhaqaale iyo bulsho (xaqa waxbarasho, daryeel caafimaad, shaqo).
learnSch_social_studies_f2_kp2: Hay'adaha Xuquuqul Insaanka: Golaha Xuquuqul Insaanka ee Qaramada Midoobay, Maxkamadda Caalamiga ah ee Dambiyada (waxay ku oogaysaa dembiyada dagaalka iyo dembiyada ka dhanka ah aadanaha), Maxkamadda Yurub ee Xuquuqda Aadanaha.
learnSch_social_studies_f2_kp3: Xuquuqda Carruurta: Heshiiska Qaramada Midoobay ee Xuquuqda Carruurta (1989) wuxuu dammaanad qaadayaa xuquuqda carruurta ee waxbarashada, ilaalinta, daryeelka caafimaadka, iyo ka qaybgalka. Waxaa ansixiyay 196 waddan.
learnSch_social_studies_f2_kp4: Dhalashada caalamiga ah: qaadashada mas'uuliyadda arrimaha caalamiga ah (isbeddelka cimilada, sinnaan la'aanta, colaadaha) iyo ku dhaqanka gudaha iyo caalamkaba. NGO-yada (Amnesty International, Médecins Sans Frontières) ayaa qeexaya mabda'an.
learnSch_social_studies_f2_task: Ka dooro saddex maqaal oo ka mid ah Baaqa Caalamiga ah ee Xuquuqda Aadanaha. Mid kasta: sheeg xaqa, u soo qaado tusaale dhabta ah ee dunida maanta lagu tunto, una soo jeediso hal tallaabo oo shaqsi ama dawlad ay qaadi karto.
learnSch_philosophy_f2_desc: Anshaxu waa laanta falsafada ee waydiisa sida aan u noolaano oo aan u dhaqmo. Falsafadda akhlaaqdu waxay baartaa aasaaska qiyamkayaga: maxaa wanaagsan, maxaa xaq ah, sideese aan ula dhaqmi karnaa kuwa kale? Su'aalahani maaha kuwo aan la taaban karin - waxay xoojinayaan sharciyada, go'aamada caafimaadka, horumarinta AI, iyo doorashooyinka maalinlaha ah.
learnSch_philosophy_f2_kp0: Xaqiiqda Akhlaaqda: Xaqiiqada akhlaaqda ee ujeedadu waxay u jirtaa si ka madax banaan waxa qof kastaa u malaynayo. Akhlaaqda lidka ku ah xaqiiqada: anshaxa waxaa dhisay dad, bulshooyin, ama waa uun muujinta shucuur.
learnSch_philosophy_f2_kp1: Dhibaatada trolleyga (Judith Jarvis Thomson / Philippa Foot): ma leexin lahayd gaadhiga baxsadka ah si aad hal qof u disho una badbaadiso shan? Hababka kala duwan waxay bixiyaan jawaabo kala duwan.
learnSch_philosophy_f2_kp2: Caddaaladda (Rawls): bulshada ka qaabeeya gadaasha 'daaha jaahilnimada' - adigoon garanayn jagadaada, waxaad doorataa sharciyo cadaalad ah oo qof kastaa ku heshiin karo.
learnSch_philosophy_f2_kp3: Horumarka akhlaaqda: bulshooyinku waxay beddelaan aragtidooda anshaxeed muddo ka dib - addoonsigu mar buu ahaa mid sharci ah oo la aqbalay; jirdil ayaa mar loo adeegsan jiray maxkamadaha. Tani waxay kor u qaadaysaa: akhlaaqdu ma waxay la xiriirtaa waqtiga?
learnSch_philosophy_f2_kp4: Anshaxa Xayawaanka: Doodda faa'iido doonka ah ee Peter Singer ee ah in silica xayawaanku uu si la mid ah u tiriyo dhibaatada bani'aadamka. ma qabtaa? Maxaa raacaya sida aan wax u cunno oo aan u baarno?
learnSch_philosophy_f2_task: Falanqaynta dhibaatada trolleyga adigoo isticmaalaya laba qaab oo kala duwan oo anshaxeed. Qaab-dhismeedka kasta keebaa ku talin lahaa? Dabadeed hindiso niyad-jabkaaga oo falanqee. Ka wada hadal haddii ay jirto jawaab 'sax' ah ama kuwa caqli-gal ah oo keliya.
learnSch_philosophy_f2_tp1: Cadaalad iyo Rawl || Anshaxa xoolaha iyo qalafsanaanta la dabaqay
learnSch_technology_f2_name: Robotics-ku waxay isku daraan injineernimada makaanikada, elektiroonigga, iyo barnaamijyada si ay u abuuraan mashiino si madax-bannaan ama is-maamul hoose u qabta hawlaha. Automation -ku beddelka shaqada bini'aadamka ee mashiinada - waxay beddelaysaa warshadaha, daawada, iyo nolol maalmeedka. Fahamka robotics-ka ayaa kuu diyaarinaysa adduun ay bini'aadamka iyo mishiinadu si isa soo taraysa u wada shaqeeyaan.
learnSch_technology_f2_desc: Robot-yadu waxay leeyihiin saddex qaybood oo waaweyn: dareemayaal (ogaan deegaanka), hawl-wadeennada (dhaqdhaqaaqa oo ficil), iyo kontaroole (wuxuu socodsiiyaa xogta dareemayaasha wuxuuna go'aamiyaa ficillada - 'maskaxda').
learnSch_technology_f2_kp0: Heerarka xorriyadda (DoF): tirada siyaabaha madaxbannaan ee uu robotku u dhaqaaqi karo. Cudud roboti ah oo leh 6 DoF waxay gaari kartaa boos kasta iyo hanuuninta booska 3D.
learnSch_technology_f2_kp1: Robots-warshadaha: alxanka, rinjiyeynta, isu-ururinta warshadaha baabuurta. Robots-ka-wada-jirka ah (cobots) waxay si badbaado leh ula shaqeeyaan bini'aadamka. Robot-yada qalliinka (Da Vinci) waxay ogolaadaan hawlgallo sax ah.
learnSch_technology_f2_kp2: Sirdoonka macmalka ah (AI) waxa ay kor u qaadaa robots leh aragti (aqoonsiga walxaha), habaynta luuqada dabiiciga ah (amarada codka), iyo barashada mishiinka (ka hagaajinta khibrada).
learnSch_technology_f2_kp3: Automation iyo dhaqaalaha: Robots-yadu waxay kordhiyaan wax soo saarka laakiin waxay barakiciyaan shaqooyinka qaarkood. Shaqooyin cusub ayaa laga abuuray dayactirka robot-ka, barnaamijka, iyo naqshadeynta. Saamaynta saafiga ah ayaa laga dooday.
learnSch_technology_f2_kp4: Samee robot fudud si uu u qabto hawl gaar ah (tusaale kala soocida dib-u-warshadaynta). Sharaxaad ka bixi: dareemayaasha loo baahan yahay, hawlgeliyayaasha ayaa loo baahan yahay, xakamaynta macquulka ah (flowchart ama pseudocode), iyo hababka fashilka iman kara. Ka dib kala hadal hal walaac anshax oo ku saabsan habaynta hawshan.
learnSch_politics_civics_f0_name: Nidaamyada dawladu waxay go'aamiyaan sida bulsho u habaysan tahay iyo sida awoodda loo qaybsado. Dimuqraadiyaddii — oo ay dadku ku taliyaan - waxay u kala baxdaa qaabab badan: toos ah, wakiil, madaxweyne, iyo baarlamaan. Nidaamyada isbarbardhigga waxay naga caawinayaan inaan fahamno sababta waddamada qaar u xasiloon yihiin oo xor yihiin halka kuwa kalena ay yihiin kuwo kali-talis ah ama aan degganayn.
learnSch_politics_civics_f0_desc: Dimuqraadiyad: muwaadiniintu waxay doortaan wakiilo sharci u sameeya magacooda. Mabaadi'da muhiimka ah: sarreynta sharciga, kala-soocidda awoodaha, xorriyadda hadalka, garsoor madaxbannaan.
learnSch_politics_civics_f0_kp0: Habka Madaxweynaha (USA): fulinta (madaxweyne) si toos ah ayaa loo soo doortaa oo waa ka go'an tahay sharci-dejinta. Nidaamka baarlamaanka (UK, Germany): fulinta waxay ka timaadaa oo ay la xisaabtamaan baarlamaanka.
learnSch_politics_civics_f0_kp1: Kala saaridda awoodaha: sharci-dejinta (waxay dejiyaan shuruuc), fulin (fulisa shuruuc), garsoor (sharci tarjumaan). Jeegaga iyo dheelitirka ayaa ka hortagaya in laan kasta ay noqoto mid aad u xoog badan.
learnSch_politics_civics_f0_kp2: Nidaamyada kali-taliska ah: awoodda ku urursan hal hoggaamiye ama xisbi iyada oo aan lahayn isla xisaabtan dhab ah oo dimuqraadi ah (tusaale Waqooyiga Kuuriya, Belarus). Nidaamyada isku-dhafka ah: doorashooyin la qabtay laakiin aan xor iyo xalaal ahayn.
learnSch_politics_civics_f0_kp3: Authoritarian regimes: power concentrated in one leader or party without genuine democratic accountability (e.g. North Korea, Belarus). Hybrid regimes: elections held but not free or fair.
learnSch_politics_civics_f0_kp4: Dawladdu: waa dhul leh dad joogto ah, dawlad tayo leh, iyo madax-banaani la aqoonsan yahay. Ummaduhu waxa ay ka koobnaan karaan kooxo qawmiyad badan; Dawlad-goboleedyadu waxay toosiyaan qowmiyadaha iyo xuduudaha siyaasadeed.
learnSch_politics_civics_f0_task: Is barbar dhig nidaamyada siyaasadeed ee USA (madaxweynaha) iyo Jarmalka (baarlamaanka). Mid kasta: u sharax sida loo doorto fulinta, sida sharciyada loo sameeyo, iyo waxa dhacaya haddii dawladdu waydo taageerada dadweynaha. Kee baad u malaynaysaa inuu leeyahay isla xisaabtan dimuqraadi ah? qiil.
learnSch_politics_civics_f1_desc: Sharciga caalamiga ah ayaa maamula xiriirka ka dhexeeya dowladaha wuxuuna ilaaliyaa xuquuqda aasaasiga ah ee qofka. Amarka ka dib WWII wuxuu abuuray Qaramada Midoobay, Maxkamadda Caalamiga ah ee Dambiyada, iyo heshiisyada ku xiran dalalka si ay u ilaaliyaan xuquuqda aadanaha. Fahamka hay'adahan waxay kaa caawinaysaa inaad qiimeyso sida dunidu uga jawaabto iskahorimaadyada, caddaalad-darrada, iyo dhibaatooyinka bani'aadamnimada.
learnSch_politics_civics_f1_kp0: Qaramada Midoobay (oo la aasaasay 1945, 193 waddan): waxay ilaalisaa nabadda iyo amniga caalamiga ah, waxay kor u qaadaa horumarka iyo xuquuqda aadanaha iyada oo loo marayo 15-ka hay'adood ee gaarka ah.
learnSch_politics_civics_f1_kp1: Sharciga caalamiga ah ee bini'aadantinimada (Heshiiska Geneva): wuxuu ilaaliyaa rayidka, askarta dhaawacantay, iyo maxaabiista dagaalka inta lagu jiro iskahorimaadyada hubaysan. Ku xad gudubkooda waxay ka dhigan tahay dembi dagaal.
learnSch_politics_civics_f1_kp2: Maxkamadda Caalamiga ah ee Dambiyada (ICC, The Hague): waxay dacwad ku oogtaa shakhsiyaadka xasuuqa, dembiyada ka dhanka ah bini'aadminimada, iyo dembiyada dagaal marka ay maxkamadaha qaranku wax ka qabtaan.
learnSch_politics_civics_f1_kp3: Madaxbanaanida vs. faragelinta: dawladuhu waa madax-banaan (ma jirto faragelin dibadda ah oo lagu sameeyo arrimaha gudaha), laakiin 'Mas'uuliyadda Ilaalinta' (R2P) caqiidada waxay ogolaataa faragelinta marka gobolku sameeyo xad-gudubyo ballaaran.
learnSch_politics_civics_f1_kp4: Sharciga Qaxootiga: Xeerka Qaxoontiga ee 1951 waxa uu qeexayaa qaxootiga in uu yahay qof ka soo cararaya cadaadis ku salaysan isir, diin, dhalasho, fikrad siyaasadeed, ama koox bulsho. Dawlad-goboleedyadu waa in aanay dib ugu celin khatarta (aan-ka-noqosho).
learnSch_politics_civics_f1_task: Baadhid xiisad caalami ah oo hadda ama dhawaanahan (tusaale colaad ama xaalad degdeg ah oo bini'aadantinimo). Aqoonso: (a) Xeerarka caalamiga ah ee lagu dabaqo, (b) tallaabooyinka ay UN ama ICC qaadeen, (c) hal dood iyo mid ka dhan ah faragelinta milatariga.
learnSch_politics_civics_f2_desc: Ka-qaybgalka dimuqraadigu way dhaafsiisan tahay cod-bixinta - waxaa ku jira olole, codsi, mudaaharaad, iyo u tartamidda xafiiska. Nidaamyada doorashadu waxay go'aamiyaan sida codadka loogu beddelo kuraasta iyo qaabaynta natiijooyinka siyaasadeed. Fahamka ka-qaybgalku wuxuu kaa caawinayaa inaad isticmaasho xuquuqdaada oo aad aqoonsato faraqa u dhexeeya dimuqraadiyadda caafimaadka qabta iyo cabudhinta codbixiyayaasha.
learnSch_politics_civics_f2_kp0: Nidaamyada cod bixinta: First-Past-The-Post (UK, USA) - Musharaxa haysta codadka ugu badan ayaa guuleysta, wuxuu u janjeeraa inuu soo saaro nidaam laba xisbi ah. Saami qaybsiga (Jarmalka, Nederland) — xisbiyadu waxay ku guulaystaan ​​kuraas saami ahaan codadka, waxay dhiirigeliyaan isbahaysiga xisbiyada badan.
learnSch_politics_civics_f2_kp1: Axsaabta siyaasaddu waxay abaabulaan dad isku aragti ah si ay doorasho ugu tartamaan oo ay dawlado u dhistaan. Garabka Bidix: sinnaan weyn, faragelin dawladeed. Garabka midig: xorriyadda shakhsiga, suuqyada xorta ah. Xarunta: boosaska dhexdhexaadka ah.
learnSch_politics_civics_f2_kp2: U soo bixida codbixiyayaashu way kala duwan yihiin: ka qayb qaadashada sare ee bulshada waxay xoojisaa dimuqraadiyadda. Caqabadaha waxaa ka mid ah: diiwaangelinta adag, shuruudaha aqoonsiga codbixiyaha, goobaha codbixinta oo aan la geli karin, iyo niyad-jab.
learnSch_politics_civics_f2_kp3: Ka qaybqaadashada aan doorashada ahayn: codsiyo, mudaaharaadyo, caasinimo rayid ah (sharci-jebin nabadeed si loo muujiyo caddaalad-darrada - oo ay adeegsadeen Gandhi, Martin Luther King), dhaqdhaqaaqa warbaahinta bulshada.
learnSch_politics_civics_f2_kp4: Warbaahinta iyo dimoqraadiyada: Saxaafad xor ah ayaa xukuumadaha la xisaabtanta (4th Estate). Kala shaandheynta xumbooyinka iyo macluumaadka khaldan waxay khatar gelinayaan codeynta la wargeliyey - aqoonta saxaafaddu waa xirfad bulsho.
learnSch_politics_civics_f2_task: Is barbar dhig FPTP iyo matalaada saami qaybsiga adoo isticmaalaya shuruudahan: cadaalada matalaada, xasiloonida dawlada, doorashada codbixiyayaasha, iyo suurtogalnimada isbahaysiga. Kadibna qorshee olole doorashada golaha dugsiga - qor qoraal, cadee codbixiyayaashaada, oo qorshee saddex hawlood oo olole ah.
learnSch_politics_civics_f2_tp1: Xisbiyada Siyaasada || Ka qaybgalka aan doorashada ahayn
learnSch_psychology_school_f0_name: Cilmi-nafsiga waa daraasad cilmiyeed ee maskaxda, maskaxda, iyo dhaqanka. Waxay raadisaa inay fahmaan sababta ay dadku u fikiraan, dareemaan, oo u dhaqmaan sida ay u dhaqmaan - laga bilaabo hurdada iyo xusuusta ilaa jacaylka iyo gardarrada. Hababka cilmi-nafsiga waa saynis: tijaabooyin la xakameeyey, indho-indhayn, iyo falanqaynta tirakoobka. Waxay beddeshay dawo, waxbarasho, iyo nolol maalmeedka.
learnSch_psychology_school_f0_desc: Aragtida ugu waaweyn ee cilmi-nafsiga: nafleyda (maskaxda, hiddo-wadaha), garashada (habsocodka fikirka), hab-dhaqanka (dabeecadaha la arki karo, qaboojinta), cilmi nafsiga (wax-qabad la'aanta), iyo bini-aadminimo (is-dhaqaajin).
learnSch_psychology_school_f0_kp0: Habka cilmi-nafsiga ee cilmi-nafsiga: mala-awaal → tijaabo → xog ururin → falanqayn → gunaanad. Dib u eegista asaaga waxay hubisaa in natiijooyinka la hubiyay ka hor intaan la daabicin.
learnSch_psychology_school_f0_kp1: Meelaha muhiimka ah ee maskaxda: kortex hore (go'aan-qaadasho, shakhsiyad), amygdala (dareen, jawaab-celin cabsi), hippocampus (samaynta xusuusta), cerebellum (iskudubarid).
learnSch_psychology_school_f0_kp2: Dabeecada vs. kobcinta doodda: ilaa xad intee le'eg ayay genetics (dabeecada) vs. deegaanka iyo waayo-aragnimada (kobcinta) qaabeeyaan shakhsiyadda, sirdoonka, iyo caafimaadka maskaxda? Heshiiska hadda jira: labaduba way wada falgalaan.
learnSch_psychology_school_f0_kp3: Anshaxa cilmu-nafsiga: ka qaybgalayaashu waa inay bixiyaan oggolaansho xog ogaal ah, way ka bixi karaan wakhti kasta, xogtu waa qarsoodi, daraasaduhuna waa inaanay sababin waxyeello waarta. Tijaabada Milgram (1960-meeyadii) waxay soo saartay su'aalo anshaxeed oo waaweyn.
learnSch_psychology_school_f0_kp4: Samee daraasad indho-indhayn anshaxeed si loo baadho in ardaydu aad u mashquul san yihiin marka ay wax ku baranayaan muusig ama aamusnaan. Sheeg: su'aasha cilmi-baarista, habka, doorsoomayaasha, jahwareerka suurtagalka ah, iyo sida aad u falanqeyn lahayd xogta.
learnSch_psychology_school_f1_name: Garashada waxaa loola jeedaa dhammaan hababka maskaxda: garashada, dareenka, xusuusta, fikirka, luqadda, iyo xalinta dhibaatada. Fahamka xusuusta - sida loo sameeyo, loo kaydiyo, iyo dib loo soo celiyo - waxay si toos ah u khusaysaa waxbarashada. Cilmi-baadhistu waxay muujinaysaa in dib-u-eegis firfircooni leh iyo ku celceliska fogaanta ah ay si weyn uga sarreeyaan dib-u-akhrinta dadban ee haynta muddada-dheer.
learnSch_psychology_school_f1_desc: Cognition refers to all mental processes: perception, attention, memory, thinking, language, and problem-solving. Understanding memory — how it is formed, stored, and retrieved — is directly relevant to studying. Research shows that active recall and spaced repetition dramatically outperform passive re-reading for long-term retention.
learnSch_psychology_school_f1_kp0: Qaabka bakhaarrada badan (Atkinson & Shiffrin): xusuusta dareenka (jajab ilbiriqsi) → xusuusta muddada-gaaban (7 ± 2 shayada, ~ 20 sek) → xusuusta muddada-dheer (awood aan xadidneyn, suurtagal ahaan joogto ah).
learnSch_psychology_school_f1_kp1: Codeynta: u beddelashada khibrada raadadka xusuusta. Codaynta tafatiran (ku xidhidhinta xogta cusub iyo aqoonta jirta) ayaa aad uga waxtar badan ku celcelinta joogtada ah.
learnSch_psychology_school_f1_kp2: Saamaynta kala dheeraynta: barashada isku walxaha ee kalfadhiyo badan oo kala duwan (ku celcelin kala fogaansho) waxay horseedaa dib u soo celin waqti dheer ah oo aad uga wanaagsan marka loo eego 'xannibaad'.
learnSch_psychology_school_f1_kp3: Ku celcelinta dib u soo celinta: si firfircoon dib u xasuusinta macluumaadka (is tijaabinta, kaadhadhka flashcards) waxay xoojisaa raadadka xusuusta in ka badan dib-u-akhrinta. Tani waa 'saamaynta tijaabada'.
learnSch_psychology_school_f1_kp4: Xusuustu waa wax dib-u-dhis, ee ma tarmo: mar kasta oo aan xasuusano xusuusta, si hoose ayaanu u beddelnaa. Markaa marag-furka indhihiisu waa mid aan la isku halayn karin - si isdaba joog ah ayaa loogu muujiyay baadhitaanka qolka maxkamadda.
learnSch_psychology_school_f1_task: Tijaabi saamaynta kala fogeynta: baro 20 erey oo cusub oo erayo ah adiga oo isticmaalaya hab-dhaqan badan (oo dhan hal mar maanta). Is tijaabi 1 maalin kadib. Ka dib baro 20 kelmadood oo cusub muddo 5 maalmood ah (4 maalintii). Tijaabi 7 maalmood ka dib. Is barbar dhig dhibcahaaga oo qor natiijooyinkaaga.
learnSch_psychology_school_f2_desc: Cilmi-nafsiga bulshada waxa uu daraaseeyaa sida ay dadku u fakaraan, dareemaan, iyo u dhaqmaan marka ay jiraan kuwa kale - run ama male. Waxay muujinaysaa sida qotodheer ee macnaha guud inoo qaabeeyo: waxaanu raacnaa kooxaha, adeecsannaa maamulka, waxaanu horumarinaa eexda - inta badan si miyir la'aan ah. Fahamka saamaynta bulsheed waxay naga caawinaysaa inaan gaarno go'aamo madax-bannaan oo anshax leh.
learnSch_psychology_school_f2_kp0: U hoggaansanaanta (Tijaabada Asch, 1951): Kaqeybgalayaashu waxay si cad u bixiyeen jawaabo khaldan markii ay arkeen kuwa kale oo siinaya - muujinta caadi ah (rabta inay ku habboonaato) iyo macluumaad (aminta kuwa kale inay saxan yihiin) saameynta bulshada.
learnSch_psychology_school_f2_kp1: Adeecitaanka (Milgram, 1963): Kaqeybgalayaashu waxay maamuleen shoog koronto oo khatar ah sababtoo ah qof mas'uul ah ayaa u sheegay - 65% waxay aadeen ugu badnaan. Waxay tusinaysaa sida ay awooddu uga sarrayso damiirka shakhsi ahaaneed.
learnSch_psychology_school_f2_kp2: Saamaynta goob-joogga: mar kasta oo ay dad badani joogaan xaalad degdeg ah, way yaraanaysaa suurtogalnimada in qof kastaa caawiyo (fidinta mas'uuliyadda). Kiiskii Kitty Genovese, 1964.
learnSch_psychology_school_f2_kp3: Aragtida dabeecadda: waxaan ku sharaxnaa dabeecadda anagoo u nisbaynnayna gudaha (shakhsinimada, kartida) ama dibadda (xaaladda, nasiibka). Khaladka aas aasiga ah: in la qiyaaso sababaha gudeed ee dadka kale dhaqankooda xun
learnSch_psychology_school_f2_kp4: Eexda koox ahaan iyo koox ahaanba: waxaanu u eexnaa dadka aanu isku hayno ('anaga') oo aanu takoori karno kuwa kale ('iyaga'). Tijaabada godka tuugta ayaa muujisay sida tartanka kooxuhu u dhaliyo cadaawad.
learnSch_psychology_school_f2_task: Waxa aad arkaysaa in aanu qofna ku jirin hool cidhiidhi ah oo caawiya qof buugaagtoodii iska tuuray oo xanuun dareemaya. Adigoo isticmaalaya cilmi-nafsiga bulshada, sharax: (a) sababta ay tani u dhici karto, (b) Maxay yihiin arrimaha gaarka ah ee kordhiya ama yaraynaya fursadda caawinta, (c) waxa adiga shakhsi ahaan aad samayn karto si aad uga gudubto saamaynta taagan.
learnSch_astronomy_f0_desc: Nidaamkeena qorraxdu waxa uu sameeyay ilaa 4.6 bilyan oo sano ka hor daruur gaas iyo boodh ah. Waxay ka kooban tahay hal xiddig (Qorraxda), siddeed meere, daraasiin dayaxyo, iyo jiryo yaryar oo aan la tirin karin - asteroids, majaajillo, iyo meerayaal dwarf. Fahamka qaab-dhismeedkiisa iyo xoogagga maamula waxa ay isku xidhaa physics, chemistry, iyo meesha aynu ka joogno cosmos-ka.
learnSch_astronomy_f0_kp0: Qorraxdu waxay ka kooban tahay 99.86% cufka nidaamka qoraxda. Waxa ay tamar ku abuurtaa isku-dhafka nukliyeerka: hydrogen nuclei waxay fiyuus u samaysaa helium, waxay sii daynaysaa iftiin iyo kulayl aad u badan.
learnSch_astronomy_f0_kp1: Meeraha dhagaxyada gudaha ah: Mercury, Venus, Earth, Mars - yar, cufan, oo u dhow Qorraxda. Gaaska dibadda/Barafka: Jupiter, Saturn, Uranus, Neptune - aad uga weyn, kana fog qorraxda.
learnSch_astronomy_f0_kp2: Sharciyada Kepler: meerayaashu waxay ku wareegaan qorraxda ellipses (maaha goobo); Dhaqso u dhaqaaq marka aad u dhowdahay Qorraxda; iyo laba jibbaaran ee xilliga orbital-ku waxay u dhigantaa cube ee raadiyaha orbital.
learnSch_astronomy_f0_kp3: Suunka asteroid wuxuu u dhexeeyaa Mars iyo Jupiter; Kuiper suunka ka baxsan Neptune waxaa ku jira Pluto iyo meerayaasha kale ee dwarf. Comets waxay ka yimaadeen Oort Cloud.
learnSch_astronomy_f0_kp4: Cufisjiidku waxa uu hayaa wax kasta oo ku dul wareega. Xawaaraha baxsadka: xawaaraha loo baahan yahay si looga xoroobo cufisjiidka jidhka - Dhulku waa ~11.2 km/s; Dayaxu waa ~2.4 km/s.
learnSch_astronomy_f0_task: Samee jaantus qeexan ee nidaamka qoraxda. Meere kasta: sheeg cabbirkiisa marka loo eego Dhulka, xilliga orbital, hal sifo gaar ah, iyo haddii ay taageeri karto nolosha. Calaamadee suunka asteroid iyo Kuiper Belt. Sharax sharciga Kepler 2aad adiga oo isticmaalaya jaantuskaaga.
learnSch_astronomy_f0_tp1: Meeraha bannaanka iyo jirka yar yar
learnSch_astronomy_f1_desc: Xiddigohu ma aha kuwo waara - way dhashaan, noolaadaan, wayna dhintaan, inta badan qaraxyo cajiib ah. Masiirka xiddiggu wuxuu ku xiran yahay baaxaddiisa. Qorraxdu waxay aakhirka u balaadhi doontaa giant cas ka dibna u duni doonta cawl cad, halka xiddigo badan oo waaweyni ay ku dhammaan doonaan sida supernovae iyo neutron stars ama godad madow. Dhammaan curiyayaasha ka culus hydrogen waxa lagu been abuurtay xiddigaha.
learnSch_astronomy_f1_kp0: Xiddigohu waxay ku abuurmaan nebulae (daruur gaas iyo boodh ah) marka cufisjiidku keeno kuuskuus inay dumaan oo ay kulaadaan ilaa fiyuuska nukliyeerka uu shido - dhalashada protostar, ka dibna xiddig isku xigxiga ah.
learnSch_astronomy_f1_kp1: Taxanaha ugu muhiimsan: xiddiguhu waxay ku qaataan noloshooda inteeda badan iyagoo ku daraya hydrogen ilaa helium xaalad deggan. Qorraxdu waxay ku jirtay taxanaha ugu muhiimsan ~ 4.6 bilyan sano waxayna ka tagtay ~ 5 bilyan.
learnSch_astronomy_f1_kp2: Jaantuska Hertzsprung-Russell (HR) wuxuu sawiraa xiddigaha iftiinka iyo heerkulka. Taxanaha ugu muhiimsan wuxuu u socdaa qaab; Rafaa cas (midig sare) iyo dhogorta cad (bidix hoose) ayaa ka baxsan khadkan.
learnSch_astronomy_f1_kp3: Xiddigo tiro yar (sida Qoraxda): taxanaha ugu muhiimsan
learnSch_astronomy_f1_kp4: Xiddigaha tirada badan: taxanaha ugu muhiimsan → supergiant cas → qaraxa supernova (waxay abuuraan walxo ka culus birta, waxayna u kala firdhiyaan meel bannaan) → xidigta neutron ama god madow.
learnSch_astronomy_f1_task: Ku sawir laba dariiqo horumareed oo heersare ah jaantuska HR: mid xiddig sida Qoraxda oo kale ah, mid xiddig 20 jeer ka weyn. Marxalad kasta: sheeg magaca, wakhtiga, iyo habka ugu wayn ee nukliyeerka dhacaya. Sharax waxa supernova yahay iyo sababta ay muhiim ugu tahay asalka curiyayaasha Dhulka.
learnSch_astronomy_f1_tp0: Sameynta Xiddigaha iyo taxanaha ugu muhiimsan
learnSch_astronomy_f2_desc: Marka laga soo tago nidaamkayaga qorraxdu waxaa jira balaayiin xiddigood oo loo kala qaybiyay galaxies, iyo galaxyada ka shisheeya waxaa jira caalamka la arki karo - qiyaastii 93 bilyan oo iftiin-sanno ah oo dhan iyo 13.8 bilyan oo sano. Cosmology - sayniska asalka koonku ka yimid - ayaa daaha ka qaaday sawir la yaab leh: Bangi weyn, ballaarinta meel bannaan, walxaha madow, iyo tamarta madow.
learnSch_astronomy_f2_kp0: Waddada caanuhu waa galaxyo wareeg ah oo ka kooban ~250 bilyan oo xiddigood. Qorraxdeennu waxay ku taallaa ~ 27,000-sano iftiin u jirta xarunta galactic. Waxay ku qaadataa qorraxda ~ 225 milyan oo sano inay ku wareegaan galaxyada.
learnSch_astronomy_f2_kp1: Noocyada Galaxy: spiral (sida Milky Way iyo Andromeda), elliptical (xiddigaha da'da weyn, gaas yar), aan joogto ahayn (qaab aan la qeexin, badanaa waxay ka dhashaan isku dhacyada galactic).
learnSch_astronomy_f2_kp2: Aragtida Big Bang: ~ 13.8 bilyan sano ka hor, caalamku wuxuu ku bilaabmay meel aad u kulul, cufan wuxuuna sii fidayay ilaa hadda. Caddaynta: shucaaca asalka ah ee microwave-ka, sharciga Hubble (Galaxiyadu si dhakhso ah ayay dib ugu noqonayaan inta ay fog yihiin).
learnSch_astronomy_f2_kp3: Madow: shay aan la arki karin oo aan ifin soo saarin balse saameyntiisa cufisjiideed ay isku hayaan galaxyada. Wuxuu ka kooban yahay ~ 27% tamarta-weyn ee caalamka. Dabeecaddeeda lama garanayo.
learnSch_astronomy_f2_kp4: Tamar madow: xoog dahsoon oo kaxaysa dardargelinta ballaarinta caalamka. Wuxuu ka kooban yahay ~ 68% caalamka. Maaddada caadiga ah (xiddigaha, meeraha, gaaska) waa ~ 5% kaliya.
learnSch_astronomy_f2_task: U samee 'cinwaanka' Dhulka: meeraha, nidaamka xiddigaha, galaxyada, kooxda galaxyada, supercluster, caalamka la arki karo. Sii masaafo/cabbir heer kasta. Ka dib sharax laba cadeymo oo caddayn ah oo ku saabsan aragtida Big Bang, oo ay ku jiraan waxa shucaaca asalka ah ee microwave ka uu yahay.
learnSch_latin_language_f0_desc: Laatiinka waa luqad la rog-rogay - dhammaadka kelmad (ma aha hab kelmad) waxay tusinayaan shaqada naxwaha. Hagaajinta magac-xumada iyo isku-xidhka falku waxay furaysaa macnaha qoraal kasta oo Laatiinka ah, laga bilaabo warbixinnada dagaalka Kaysar ilaa gabayada epic ee Virgil. Naxwaha Laatiinka wuxuu kaloo wanaajiyaa fahamka Ingiriisi, Faransiis, Isbaanish, Talyaani, iyo Boortaqiis.
learnSch_latin_language_f0_kp0: Laatiinka waxa uu leeyahay shan magac oo declension. Diidmo kastaa waxa ay leedahay lix kiis: magac-u-yaal (mawduuc), eedayn (shay), genitive (lahaanshaha), dative (shay aan toos ahayn), ablative (kala duwan), vocative (cinwaan).
learnSch_latin_language_f0_kp1: Tusaalaha 1aad ee hoos u dhigista: puella (gabadha) - puella (nom.), puellam (acc.), puellae (gen.), puellae (dat.), puella (abl.), puella (voc.). jamac: puellae, puellas, puellarum, puellis, puellis, puellae.
learnSch_latin_language_f0_kp2: Falalku waxa ay isugu xidhmaan qofka (1/2/3aad), nambar (kaliya/ jamac), kacsan (joog, aan dhammaystirnayn, kaamil ah, mustaqbal), cod (firfircoon/ dadban), iyo niyadda (tilmaan, hoos-u-dhac, lama huraan ah).
learnSch_latin_language_f0_kp3: Present tense of amare (to love): amo, amas, amat, amamus, amatis, amant — I love, you love, he/ she/ it loves, we love, you (pl.) love, they love.
learnSch_latin_language_f0_kp4: Habaynta kelmad ee Laatiinka waa dabacsanaan sababtoo ah dhamaadka waxa ay gudbisaa shaqada: 'Puella aquam portat' iyo 'Aquam puella portat' labaduba waxay la macno yihiin 'gabadha ayaa biyo sidataa.' Xoog saaridu way is bedbedeshaa laakiin macnuhu waa joogsanayaa.
learnSch_latin_language_f0_task: Diid magaca 'Dominus' (master, 2nd declension lab) dhammaan lixda xaaladood, kali iyo jamac. Ka dib isku xidh 'videre' (si aad u aragto) wakhtigan xaadirka ah, dhammaan dadka. Turjum: 'Dominus puellas amat' iyo 'Puellae dominum vident'.
learnSch_latin_language_f1_desc: Akhrinta qoraallada Laatiinka ee saxda ah - Kaysar, Cicero, Virgil, Ovid - waxay kugu xiraysaa 2,000 oo sano oo fikirka, sharciga, suugaanta, iyo sayniska Galbeedka. Xirfadda tarjumaada waxay dhistaa saxnaanta gorfaynta, dulqaadka, iyo awooda lagu shaqeeyo weedho adag. Xitaa qoraallada fudud waxay muujinayaan qiyamka Roomaanka, taariikhda, iyo aftahanimada.
learnSch_latin_language_f1_kp0: Istaraatiijiyada turjumaada: cadee falka marka hore (waxay kuu sheegaysaa ficilka iyo kacsanaanta), ka dib mawduuca (magacaabid), ka dibna shayga (eedaynta), ka dibna walxo kale.
learnSch_latin_language_f1_kp1: Kaysar ee 'De Bello Gallico' wuxuu u qoran yahay si cad, Laatiinka militariga - ku habboon bilowgayaasha. Khudbadaha Cicero waxay adeegsadaan hadallo adag. Virgil's 'Aeneid' waa gabayo leh mitir iyo af maldahan.
learnSch_latin_language_f1_kp2: Qodobada hoose: eedayn + aan dhammays tirnayn (hadal toos ah), jumlado cum ah (goorma/tan iyo), qodobbada qaraabada ah (qui, quae, quod — who, which), clauses natiijada (ut + subjunctive).
learnSch_latin_language_f1_kp3: Xiisad sax ah: ficilladii hore waa la dhammaystiray. Dhamaadka joogtada ah ee qumman: -i, -isti, -it, -imus, -istis, -erunt. Tusaale: amavi = waan jeclaa / waan jeclaa.
learnSch_latin_language_f1_kp4: Xeeladaha wax-akhrinta: Tilmaamaha macnaha guud ayaa caawiya marka naxwaha aanu caddayn. Isticmaal aqoonta ereyada xididka - kelmado badan oo Ingiriisi ah ayaa ah asal Laatiinka ah (tusaale 'dekedda' portare = si loo qaado).
learnSch_latin_language_f1_task: Ka tarjun tuducan Kaysar: 'Milites Romani castrum magnum aedificaverut. Galli per silvas fugerunt et in montibus se celaverunt.' Falanqaynta: aqoonso mawduuca, falka, shay, iyo weedho kasta oo aflagaado ah. Waa maxay xiisadda shaqaladu? Maxay tani nooga sheegaysaa wixii hore u dhacay?
