learnSch_latin_language_f2_name: Dhaqanka Roomaanka oo Luuqad u soo maray
learnSch_latin_language_f2_desc: Laatiinka ma ahayn luqad kaliya - waxay ahayd baabuurkii ilbaxnimada oo dhan oo qaabaysay sharciga, dhismaha, diinta, iyo fikirka siyaasadeed ee Yurub iyo adduunka oo dhan. Fikradaha Roomaanku waxay ku guntan yihiin Laatiinka - res publica, imperium, senatus, ius - waxay si toos ah na siiyeen 'Jamhuuriyadda', 'Boqortooyada', 'Senate', iyo 'cadaalad'. Fahamka dhaxalkan waa mid aan ka maarmin fahamka taariikhda reer galbeedka.
learnSch_latin_language_f2_kp0: Dhaxalka Laatiinka: ~ 60% ereyada Ingiriisiga waxaa laga soo qaatay Laatiinka ama Faransiiska oo saameyn ku leh. Magacyada sayniska, ereyada sharciga ah, iyo erayada caafimaadka ayaa inta badan Laatiinka ah.
learnSch_latin_language_f2_kp1: Fikradaha qaanuuniga ah ee Roomaanku wali waa la isticmaalayaa: habeas corpus (waa inaad soo saartaa jirka - xaqa inaadan xabsiga lagu dhigin dacwad la'aan), garsoor hoosaad (xaakimka hoos yimaada), maqnaanshaha, pro bono, ex parte.
learnSch_latin_language_f2_kp2: Wax ku biirinta diinta iyo dhaqanka Roomaanka: kalandarka (bilaha loogu magac daray ilaahyada Roomaanka iyo boqorrada: Jannaayo/Janus, Maarso/Mars, Julaay/Julius Caesar), amarrada dhismaha (Doric, Ionic, Korintos).
learnSch_latin_language_f2_kp3: Hal-ku-dhegyada Laatiinka ayaa weli la isticmaalaa: carpe diem (qabso maalinta), cogito ergo sum (waxaan u maleynayaa, sidaas darteed waxaan ahay), veni vidi vici (waan imid, waxaan arkay, waan ka adkaaday - Julius Caesar), e pluribus unum (oo ka mid ah kuwa badan, hal - USA motto).
learnSch_latin_language_f2_kp4: Suugaanta Roomaanka: Virgil's 'Aeneid' ( khuraafaadka aasaasiga ah ee Rome ), Ovid's 'Metamorphoses' ( khuraafaadka isbeddelka ), khudbadaha Cicero, faallooyinka milatari ee Caesar - dhammaantood wali waa la akhriyay oo la bartay maanta.
learnSch_latin_language_f2_task: Ka hel 10 kelmadood oo Ingiriis ah oo laga soo qaatay xididdada Laatiinka hal cutub oo buug kasta ah. Mid kasta: ku qor xididka Laatiinka, macnihiisa, iyo ereyga Ingiriisiga. Kadib sharax hal fikrad sharci oo Roomaan ah oo tus sida ay u khuseyso nidaamka sharciga casriga ah.
learnSch_latin_language_f2_tp0: Xididdada Laatiinka ee Ingiriisiga iyo Sayniska
learnSch_media_studies_f0_desc: Aqoonta warbaahintu waa awoodda lagu galo, falanqaynta, qiimaynta, iyo abuurista warbaahinta. Adduunyada ay ka buuxaan macluumaadka - wararka, warbaahinta bulshada, xayaysiisyada, madadaalada - awoodda si qotodheer loo qiimeeyo ilaha, loo aqoonsado eexda, iyo aqoonsiga wax-is-daba-marintu waa xirfad dimuqraadi ah oo aasaasi ah. Muwaadiniinta aqoonta u leh warbaahinta way adag tahay in la khiyaamo.
learnSch_media_studies_f0_kp0: Dhammaan fariimaha warbaahinta waa la dhisay: waxaa sameeyay qof, ujeedo, daawadayaasha, iyadoo la adeegsanayo farsamooyin gaar ah, oo leh saameyn suurtagal ah. Qaab dhismeedka CAGE: Dhismaha, Dhegaystayaasha, Nooca, Saamaynta.
learnSch_media_studies_f0_kp1: Eexda wararka: eexda xulashada (waxa sheekooyinka la daboolay), qaabaynta eexda (sida loo soo bandhigo), iyo eexda isha (kuwaas oo codadkooda la maqlo). Dhammaan warbaahintu waxay leeyihiin xoogaa eex ah - su'aashu waxay tahay intee iyo jihadee.
learnSch_media_studies_f0_kp2: Macluumaad khaldan: war been ah oo la faafiyay iyada oo aan ujeedadu tahay in la khiyaamo. Faafin: xog been ah oo ula kac ah oo loo abuuray in lagu marin habaabiyo. Mareegaha Xaqiiqda hubinta (Snopes, Xaqiiqada buuxda, Siyaasadda) waxay caawiyaan xaqiijinta sheegashada.
learnSch_media_studies_f0_kp3: Farsamooyinka xayeysiinta: soo jiidashada shucuureed, taageerada caanka ah, bandwagon ('qof kastaa wuu isticmaalaa'), yaraanta ('dalab xadidan'), ku celcelin. Xayeysiintu waxay u shaqeysaa si miyir la'aan ah - xitaa haddii aan ognahay khiyaamada.
learnSch_media_studies_f0_kp4: Arrimaha lahaanshaha: tiro yar oo shirkado ah ayaa leh inta badan warbaahinta caalamiga ah (News Corp, Disney, Google, Meta). Lahaanshaha xoogga leh waxay xaddidi kartaa kala duwanaanta fikradaha.
learnSch_media_studies_f0_task: Dooro hal sheeko oo ay dabooleen saddex xarumood oo kala duwan (tusaale, maqaal BBC, tabloid, iyo baraha bulshada). Is barbar dhig: ciwaanka, codka, caddaymaha la isticmaalay, oraahdooda lagu daray, iyo waxa ka haray. Mid kasta ku qiimee isku halaynta. Gabagabo kan ugu kalsoonida badan iyo sababta.
learnSch_media_studies_f1_desc: Filimku waa mid ka mid ah warbaahinta ugu awoodda badan sheeko-sheekeysiga ee abid la hindiso. Waxay isku daraysaa sawirka, codka, dhaqdhaqaaqa, iyo tafatirka si ay macne u abuurto. Barashada 'akhrinta' filimka sida qoraalka - falanqaynta xaglaha kamaradaha, iftiinka, naqshadaynta codka, iyo qaab dhismeedka sheeko - waxay kuu furaysaa waayo-aragnimo qani ah oo shaleemo waxayna ku siinaysaa qalab aad ku abuurto sheekooyin muuqaal ah.
learnSch_media_studies_f1_kp0: Sawirada kamarada: isu soo dhawaansho xad dhaaf ah ( shucuur, tafatiran), ku dhawaad ​​( falcelin dabeecadeed), toogashada dhexdhexaadka ah (dabeecad + macnaha guud), toogashada dheer (dejinta), toogashada dheer ee xad dhaafka ah (go'doomin, muuqaalka). Mid kastaa wuxuu abuuraa saameyn shucuureed oo kala duwan.
learnSch_media_studies_f1_kp1: Xaglaha kamaradaha: xagal hooseeya (mawduca waxay ka dhigtaa mid awood leh), xagal sare (mawduuca waxay ka dhigaysaa mid yar/ nugul), heerka indhaha (dhexdhexaad ah), foorarsiga Nederlandka (la'aan/ kacsanaan). Sawirrada aragtidu waxay quusiyaan daawadayaasha aragtida jilaha.
learnSch_media_studies_f1_kp2: Tafatirka: gooyn (kala-guur degdeg ah), dhumuc (si tartiib tartiib ah madow - waxay soo jeedinaysaa waqti dhaaf), milmi (isku-dhafka - waxay soo jeedinaysaa isku xirnaanta). Tafatirka Montage wuxuu macne ku abuuraa isku xigxig (Eisenstein).
learnSch_media_studies_f1_kp3: Cod: dhawaaqa dheef-shiid kiimikaadka (ka jira adduunka filimka - wada-hadal, raad-raac), aan-diegetic ahayn (dhawaaqa maqalka kaliya ee dhagaystayaasha). Muusigu wuxuu abuuraa niyadda; aamusnaanta waxay abuurtaa xiisad.
learnSch_media_studies_f1_kp4: Mise-en-scène: wax kasta oo lagu dhejiyay qaabka - naqshadaynta, dharka, iftiinka, meelaynta jilayaasha. Cunsuri kastaa wuxuu u gudbiyaa macnaha si ula kac ah.
learnSch_media_studies_f1_task: Ka dooro muuqaal 2-daqiiqo ah filimka. Falanqaynta: (a) Saddex nooc oo toogto ah oo la isticmaalo iyo saamayntooda, (b) iftiiminta (furaha sare = dhalaalaya/farxad leh ama furaha hoose = mugdi/dahsoon?), (c) dhawaaq (sharaxaad ka bixi dheefshiidka iyo kuwa aan cuntada ahayn), (d) sida tafatirku u abuurto xawaaraha. Gabagabo waxa niyadda abuuray iyo sida.
learnSch_media_studies_f2_desc: Baraha bulshada ayaa bedelay sida dadku u wada xiriiraan, u cunaan wararka, oo ay u sameystaan ​​aqoonsiyo. Waxa kale oo ay soo bandhigeen khataro cusub: wax-is-daba-marin algorithm ah, cagajuglaynta internetka, nabaad-guurka sirta ah, iyo siyaasad-xumaynta. Fahamka sida aaladaha ay u shaqeeyaan iyo sida loogu isticmaalo si adag oo badbaado leh waa muwaadinnimo dhijitaal ah oo lama huraan ah.
learnSch_media_studies_f2_kp0: Algorithms waxay shakhsiyeeyaan macluumaadka ku salaysan habdhaqankaaga - waxaad gujiso, jeceshahay, oo wadaagto. Tani waxay abuurtaa xumbo shaandhaynta halkaas oo aad ku aragto kaliya aragtiyaha xaqiijinaya, kor u qaadaya kala soocida.
learnSch_media_studies_f2_kp1: Qaabka ganacsiga: inta badan goobaha bulshadu waa lacag la'aan sababtoo ah xogta isticmaalayaasha iyo dareenka ayaa ah badeecada laga iibiyo xayaysiiyayaasha. "Haddii aadan lacag bixin, waxaad tahay badeecada."
learnSch_media_studies_f2_kp2: Raadka dhijitaalka ah: wax kasta oo aad dhejiso, jeceshahay, ama raadiso waxay ka tagaysaa raad joogto ah. Loo-shaqeeyayaasha mustaqbalka, jaamacadaha, iyo fulinta sharciga waxay geli karaan macluumaadkaaga guud iyo mararka qaarkood gaarka ah.
learnSch_media_studies_f2_kp3: Cagajuglaynta internetka: dhibaataynta khadka tooska ah oo noqon karta qarsoodi, gaarta dhibbanayaasha meel kasta, oo ka taga diiwaan joogto ah. Saamaynta caafimaadka dhimirka ayaa aad u daran; waa dembi sharciyeed dalalka badidooda.
learnSch_media_studies_f2_kp4: Deepfakes iyo warbaahinta synthetic: AI waxay abuuri kartaa fiidiyowyo been abuur ah oo qancin kara dadka dhabta ah. Tani waxay caddaynta muuqaalka ka dhigaysa mid aan la aamini karin - 'arki' ma sii ahaanayso 'rumayn'.
learnSch_media_studies_f2_task: Hubi joogitaankaaga warbaahinta bulshada: waa maxay sawirkaaga ay abuuraan fariimahaaga guud? Algorithm-kaagu muxuu ku tusayaa? Ma raacdaa xisaabaadka leh aragtiyo iska soo horjeeda? Ka dib u qaabee hage ardayga Year 7 ee isticmaalka warbaahinta bulshada ee badbaadada iyo halista ah - ku dar 5 tilmaamo gaar ah, oo la taaban karo.
learnSch_media_studies_f2_tp2: Cagajuglaynta internetka iyo been abuurka hoose
learnSch_chinese_language_f0_desc: Mandarin Shiineesku waxa uu leeyahay in ka badan 1 bilyan oo ku hadla adduunka oo dhan waana luqadda ugu badan ee ay ku hadlaan dadka hooyo. Si ka duwan luqadaha alifbeetada, Mandarin waxay isticmaashaa dhawaaqyo - isbeddellada dhawaaqa oo beddela macnaha - iyo habka qorista logographic. Qabashada nidaamka romanisation ee Pinyin iyo afarta cod waa tallaabada koowaad ee muhiimka ah.
learnSch_chinese_language_f0_kp0: Pinyin: habka rasmiga ah ee romanisation ee Mandarin. Waxay adeegsataa xarfo Laatiinka ah oo leh calaamado dhawaaq si ay u matalaan ku dhawaaqida. Muhiim u ah barashada jilayaasha iyo adeegsiga hababka wax gelinta dhijitaalka ah.
learnSch_chinese_language_f0_kp1: Afarta cod: 1aad (heer sare, ā) — 'mā' macnaheedu waa hooyo. 2nd ( kacaysa, á) - 'má' macnaheedu waa hemp. 3-aad (diridda, ǎ) - 'mǎ' macnaheedu waa faras. 4aad (ku dhacay, à) - 'mà' macneheedu waa canaan. Lagu daray cod dhexdhexaad ah (calaamad la'aan).
learnSch_chinese_language_f0_kp2: Bilowga ( shibbanayaasha): b, p, m, f, d, t, n, l, g, k, h, j, q, x, zh, ch, sh, r, z, c, s. Dhamaadka (shaqaalaha iyo dhammaadka): a, o, e, i, u, ü, ai, ei, ao, ou, an, en, ang, eng, ong, iwm
learnSch_chinese_language_f0_kp3: Salaan lama huraan ah: 你好 (nǐ hǎo) - hello; 谢谢 (xièxiè) - mahadsanid; 不客气 (bù kèqì) - waa lagu soo dhawaynayaa; 对不起 (duìbuqǐ) - waan ka xumahay; 再见 (zàijiàn) - nabad gelyo.
learnSch_chinese_language_f0_kp4: Naxwaha Mandarinku wuu ka fudud yahay luqadaha Yurub siyaabaha qaar: ma jiro xiriirin fal, ma jiro jinsi naxwe ah, ma jiro dhammaad jamac ah. Sida loo habeeyo erayga (Mawduuca- falka- Shayga) waxa uu xambaarsan yahay macne.
learnSch_chinese_language_f0_task: Dhageyso dhammaan afarta dhawaaq ee 'ma' oo ku celi ilaa aad mid kasta si gaar ah u soo saari karto. Ku qor 'Waxaan ahay arday' Mandarin adoo isticmaalaya Pinyin: 'Wǒ shì xuéshēng.' Dabadeed qor: 'Waxaan rabaa in aan cuno bariis' - 'Wǒ xiǎng chī mǐfàn.' Sharax faraqa micnaha uu keeno isbeddelka codka ee 'mā/mǎ'.
learnSch_chinese_language_f1_desc: Jilayaasha Shiinaha (汉字, Hànzì) waa mid ka mid ah hababka wax-qorista ee ugu da'da weyn adduunka, oo leh in ka badan 50,000 oo xaraf - inkasta oo akhris-qoris ay u baahan tahay in la ogaado 2,000-3,000 oo kuwa caadiga ah. Calaamaduhu maaha sawiro aan toos ahayn - waxay ka soo dhismeen qaybo macno leh oo loo yaqaan xag-jir, kuwaas oo siinaya tilmaamo macnaha iyo mararka qaarkood ku dhawaaqida.
learnSch_chinese_language_f1_kp0: Calaamaduhu waxay ku qoran yihiin shabag labajibbaaran waxayna ka kooban yihiin istaroog si gaar ah. Xeerarka nidaamka istaroogga waxay xaqiijinayaan joogtaynta iyo xusuusta gargaarka: guud ahaan kor ilaa hoose, bidix ilaa midig, toosan ka hor inta aan toosnayn.
learnSch_chinese_language_f1_kp1: Radicals: dhammaan jilayaasha waxay ka kooban yihiin xag-jir semantic taasoo tilmaamaysa macnaha. 水 (biyo xagjir ah 氵) ayaa ka muuqda 海 (bad), 河 (webiga), 泳 (dabaasha). Ogaanshaha ~ 200 xag-jirku waxay furaysaa qaabab kumanaan jilayaal ah.
learnSch_chinese_language_f1_kp2: La Fududeeyay vs. Dhaqanka: Jilayaasha la fududeeyay (oo lagu isticmaalo dhul weynaha Shiinaha, Singapore) waxay leeyihiin istaroog yar. Jilayaasha dhaqameed (Taiwan, Hong Kong, jaaliyadaha dibada) waxay ilaaliyaan qaababka taariikhiga ah. Tusaale: jacayl - 爱 (la fududeeyay) vs. 愛 (dhaqameed).
learnSch_chinese_language_f1_kp3: HSK (Hanyu Shuiping Kaoshi): Imtixaanka aqoonta Shiinaha ee caadiga ah. HSK 1 = 150 erey, HSK 2 = 300, ilaa HSK 6 = 5,000 eray. Halbeegga muhiimka ah ee bartayaasha Shiinaha.
learnSch_chinese_language_f1_kp4: Jilayaasha caadiga ah ee marka hore la barto: 一二三四五六七八九十 (1–10), 人 (qof), 大 (weyn), 小 (yar), 中 (dhexe/Shiinaha), 日 (qorrax/maalin), 月 (moon/bishii), 山 (Biyo), 屰(dab).
learnSch_chinese_language_f1_task: Baro oo qor (sida ay u kala horreeyaan istaroogga saxda ah) tirooyinka 1-10 ee xarfaha Shiinaha. Ka dib baro shan xaraf oo kale adoo isticmaalaya xag-jirkooda sidii qalab xasuuseed - u sharax xidhiidhka mid kasta. Ugu dambeyntii, ku qor magacaaga Pinyin oo dooro xuruufta Shiinaha ku habboon.
learnSch_chinese_language_f2_desc: Barashada wada sheekaysiga Mandarin waxay albaabada u furaysaa 1.4 bilyan oo wada sheekaysi iyo mid ka mid ah dhaqamada ugu firfircoon adduunka. Mawduucyada muhiimka ah - horudhac, waqti, dukaameysi, cunto, tilmaamo - waxay bixiyaan ereyada la taaban karo ee isgaarsiinta maalinlaha ah. Joogteynta naxwaha Shiinaha ayaa wada hadalka ka dhigaya mid si la yaab leh loo heli karo marka codadka iyo erayada aasaasiga ah la barto.
learnSch_chinese_language_f2_kp0: Qaabka jumlada: Mawduuca + Waqtiga + Goobta + Fal + Shayga. Tusaale: 我 (I) 明天 (berri) 在图书馆 (maktabka) 学习 (waxbarasho) 中文 (Shiine) = 我明天在图书馆学习中文.
learnSch_chinese_language_f2_kp1: Weydiinta su'aalaha: ku dar 吗 (ma) bayaanka haa/maya su'aalo. 你是学生 ( waxaad tahay arday) → 你是学生吗? (Ma arday baad tahay?). Ama isticmaal erayada su'aasha: 什么 (shénme, maxay), 哪里 (nǎlǐ, halka), 什么时候 (shénme shíhòu, goorma).
learnSch_chinese_language_f2_kp2: Tirooyinka iyo qiimaha: 一百 (100), 两百五十 (250). Dukaamada dhexdiisa: 这个多少钱? (zhège duōshǎo qián?) — Waa imisa? 太贵了 (tài guì le) - Aad u qaali ah! 便宜一点 (piányi yīdiǎn) - Wax yar ka jaban fadlan.
learnSch_chinese_language_f2_kp3: Cuntada iyo dalbashada: 我要一碗米饭 (Wǒ yào yī wǎn mǐfàn) — Waxaan rabaa baaquli bariis ah. 我不吃肉 (Wǒ bù chī ròu) - Ma cuno hilib. 好吃! (Hǎochī!) - macaan!
learnSch_chinese_language_f2_kp4: Xaaladda dhaqanka: ku beddelashada kaararka ganacsiga ee laba gacmood; si rasmi ah ula hadlaya odayaasha; Muhiimadda 面子 (miànzi, 'wejiga' - sumcadda, sharafta); akhlaaqda hadyad bixinta. Afka iyo dhaqanku ma kala maarmaan.
learnSch_chinese_language_f2_task: Door-ciyaar (qor ama duub) wada sheekaysiga makhaayad Shiinees ah. Ku dar: salaanta kabalyeeriyada, weydiinta waxa wanaagsan, dalbashada laba saxan iyo cabitaan (adoo isticmaalaya erayo sax ah), weydiinta qiimaha, iyo macsalaameynta. Ujeedo ugu yaraan 10 beddelasho. Ku sharax Pinyin iyo tarjumaada Ingiriisiga.
learnSch_environmental_studies_f0_desc: Isbeddelka cimiladu waa caqabadda qeexda ee waayaheenna. Sii daynta bini'aadamka ee gaasaska aqalka dhirta lagu koriyo ayaa kulaalya Dhulka heer aan hore loo arag, khalkhal galiyay qaabka cimilada, dhalaalidda daboolka barafka, iyo hanjabaada deegaanka iyo bulshooyinka aadanaha. Fahamka sayniska - meertada kaarboonka, dhibcaha tilmaamida, iyo wareegyada jawaab celinta - waxay lama huraan u tahay muwaadin kasta oo xog ogaal ah.
learnSch_environmental_studies_f0_kp0: Wareegga kaarboon: CO₂ waxa uu u dhexeeyaa jawiga, badaha, dhulka (dhirta iyada oo loo marayo photosynthesis), iyo noolaha noolaha (iyada oo loo marayo neefsiga). Shidaalka fosil ee gubanaya waxay sii daayaan kaarboonka lagu kaydiyo malaayiin sano, taasoo carqaladaynaysa wareegga.
learnSch_environmental_studies_f0_kp1: Saamaynta aqalka cagaaran: shucaaca cadceeddu wuu diiriyaa Dhulka; Dhulku wuxuu sii daayaa shucaaca infrared; Gaasaska aqalka dhirta lagu koriyo (CO₂, CH₄, N₂O, H₂O uumiga) way nuugaan oo dib u dhalaaliyaan kulaylka, iyagoo diirinaya dusha sare. La'aanteed, dhulku wuxuu ahaan lahaa -18 ° C; iyada (dabiici ah), 15 ° C; la xoojiyay = kululaynta khatarta ah.
learnSch_environmental_studies_f0_kp2: Heerka hadda (2024): jawiga CO₂ wuxuu ka sarreeyaa 420 ppm (warshad hore: 280 ppm). Celceliska heerkulka caalamiga ah ayaa kor u kacay ~1.2°C oo ka sarreeya heerarkii hore ee warshadaha. Heshiiska Paris wuxuu higsanayaa in lagu xaddido kulaylka ilaa 1.5°C.
learnSch_environmental_studies_f0_kp3: Qodobbada cimilo-bixinta: marinnada ka baxsan kuwaas oo isbeddeladu noqdaan kuwo is-xoojiya. Barmafrost dhalaalaysa waxay sii deysaa CH₄; dhalaalida barafka Arctic waxay soo bandhigtaa badweynta madow, oo nuugta kulayl badan; Xaalufinta dhirta Amazon waxay halis u tahay inay kaymaha roobka u beddelaan savanna.
learnSch_environmental_studies_f0_kp4: Cadaalada Cimilada: Dawladaha soo koraya ayaa ugu yaraan gacan ka geysta qiiqa qiiqa, laakiin inta badan waxay la il daran yihiin saamaynta cimilada (kor u kaca heerka badda, kulaylka xad dhaafka ah, dalagyada oo xumaada). Dhinacyada anshaxa iyo siyaasadda ee ficilka cimiladu waa kuwo aan ka sooci karin sayniska.
learnSch_environmental_studies_f0_task: Sawir oo sharax wareegga kaarboonka, oo muujinaya socodka dabiiciga ah iyo carqaladaynta bini'aadamka. Xisaabi: haddii waddan uu sii daayo 500 Mt CO₂ sannadkii oo uu dhirbaaxo geedo 50 Mt/sanad ah iyada oo loo beddelayo wax-qabadyada la cusboonaysiin karo waxay badbaadinaysaa 100 Mt / sannadkii, imisa sano ayaa lagu gaari karaa eber saafi ah (iyadoo loo maleynayo in aan wax cusub loo qaadin)? Qiimee saddex tallaabo oo dheeri ah oo waddanku qaadi karo.
learnSch_environmental_studies_f0_tp0: Wareegga Kaarboon iyo saamaynta aqalka dhirta lagu koriyo
learnSch_environmental_studies_f0_tp2: Qodobbada talo bixinta iyo caddaaladda cimilada
learnSch_environmental_studies_f1_desc: Kala duwanaanshiyaha noolaha - noocyada kala duwan ee nolosha Dunida - waa aasaaska nidaamyada deegaanka caafimaadka leh ee na siiya cunto, biyo nadiif ah, daawo, iyo jawi deggan. Waxaan hadda la kulmaa dabar-goynta lixaad ee baaxadda leh, oo ay horseeday burburka deegaanka, wasakhowga, noocyada soo duulayaasha, iyo isbeddelka cimilada. Fahamka nidaamyada deegaanka ayaa muujinaya sababta nooc kasta oo lumay ay muhiim u tahay.
learnSch_environmental_studies_f1_kp0: Adeegyada deegaanka: faa'iidooyinka dabiiciga ahi waxay ku bixiyaan lacag la'aan - pollination (oo lagama maarmaan u ah 75% dalagyada cuntada), nadiifinta biyaha, xakamaynta daadka, kaydinta kaarboon, samaynta ciidda, iyo ilaalinta xeebaha.
learnSch_environmental_studies_f1_kp1: Dabar-goynta lixaad ee lixaad: noocyada ayaa dabar go'aya 100-1,000 jeer ka dhakhso badan heerka asalka dabiiciga ah. 1 milyan oo nooc ayaa hadda halis ku jira. Sababaha asaasiga ah: is-beddelka isticmaalka dhulka (la'aanta deegaanka), ka faa'iidaysiga xad-dhaafka ah, wasakhowga, noocyada soo gelitaanka, isbeddelka cimilada.
learnSch_environmental_studies_f1_kp2: Noocyada furaha: noocyada ka ciyaara door aan qiyaas lahayn oo ku jira hab-nololeedkooda. Ka saaristooda waxay sababtaa burburka nidaamka deegaanka - tusaale; yeyda ku nool dadka deerada ee Yellowstone ay gacanta ku hayaan, taas oo u ogolaatay dhirtu inay soo kabsato, taasoo saamaysay webiyada.
learnSch_environmental_studies_f1_kp3: Biomes: bulshooyin badan oo deegaanka ah oo lagu qeexay cimilada iyo dhirta - kaymaha kulaylaha (kala duwanaanshaha noole ee ugu badan), kaymaha cimilada, dhul-daaqsimeedka/savanna, lamadegaanka (xaalad aad u daran), tundra (permafrost), badweynta (biome ugu weyn).
learnSch_environmental_studies_f1_kp4: Istaraatiijiyada ilaalinta: meelaha la ilaaliyo (Xirmooyinka qaranka, kaydka badda), dib u soo celinta (dib u soo celinta noocyada dabiiciga ah iyo geeddi-socodka), ilaalinta goobtii hore (xayawaanka, bangiyada abuurka), heshiiska CITES (wuxuu xakameynayaa ganacsiga noocyada dabar-go'aya).
learnSch_environmental_studies_f1_task: Cilmi baadh hal nidaam deegaan oo dabar-go’aya (tusaale, reefs coral reefs, Amazon rainforest, peat bogs). Nidaamka deegaanka ee aad dooratay: (a) sharax kala duwanaanshaha nooleheeda, (b) sharax saddex khatarood, (c) qiyaasi qiimaha dhaqaale ee adeegyadeeda deegaanka, (d) qiimee saddex xeeladood oo ilaalin ah iyo waxtarkooda.
learnSch_environmental_studies_f2_desc: Joogteynta macneheedu waa daboolida baahiyaha hadda jira iyada oo aan la wiiqin awoodda jiilalka mustaqbalka si ay ula kulmaan tooda ( qeexitaanka Brundtland, 1987). U wareejinta adduun waara waxay u baahan tahay isbeddel xagga tamarta, cuntada, gaadiidka, iyo isticmaalka - oo ay ku lug leedahay qof kasta oo ka socda dawladaha iyo shirkadaha ilaa shakhsiyaadka.
learnSch_environmental_studies_f2_kp0: Himilooyinka Horumarinta Joogtada ah (SDGs): 17 yool oo ay ansixiyeen dhammaan waddamada xubnaha ka ah Qaramada Midoobay 2015, ee lagu beegsanayo saboolnimada, caafimaadka, waxbarashada, tamarta nadiifka ah, waxqabadka cimilada, iyo kala duwanaanshaha noolaha 2030.
learnSch_environmental_studies_f2_kp1: Tamarta dib loo cusboonaysiin karo: qoraxda, dabaysha, biyaha, tamarta dhulka hoostiisa, iyo tamarta barafku waxay soo saaraan koronto leh gaaska aqalka dhirta lagu sii daayo ee ugu yar. Qiimaha qorraxda iyo dabaysha ayaa hoos u dhacay 90%+ ilaa 2010 - hadda waa ilaha tamarta ugu jaban ee abid la dhisay.
learnSch_environmental_studies_f2_kp2: Dhaqaalaha wareegtada ah: halkii laga qaadan lahaa-samaynta- tuurista, alaabta dib ayaa loo isticmaalaa, dib loo hagaajiyaa, oo dib loo warshadeeyaa siddooyin xiran. Wuxuu yareeyaa qashinka, wuxuu kaydiyaa kheyraadka, wuxuuna abuuraa shaqooyin.
learnSch_environmental_studies_f2_kp3: Nidaamyada cuntada: beeruhu waxay ka yihiin ~25% qiiqa gaaska aqalka dhirta lagu koriyo ee caalamiga ah. Yaraynta isticmaalka hilibka (gaar ahaan hilibka lo'da), jarista qashinka cuntada, iyo u wareejinta beerashada waarta (organic, agroforestry) ayaa ah kabayaal waaweyn.
learnSch_environmental_studies_f2_kp4: Arrimaha ficilka shakhsi ahaaneed: raad-raacyada kaarboonku aad bay u kala duwan yihiin. Duulidda, cunista hilibka, iyo kaxaynta baabuurta shidaalka ayaa ah doorashada shakhsi ahaaneed ee ugu saamaynta badan. Laakiin isbeddelka nidaamka - siyaasadda dawladda, ku-dhaqanka shirkadaha, kaabayaasha - ayaa leh saamayn weyn oo guud.
learnSch_environmental_studies_f2_task: Xisaabi raadkaaga kaarboonka bishii adiga oo isticmaalaya xisaabiyaha khadka ah. Aqoonso saddexdaada hawlood ee saamaynta ugu badan leh. Cilmi baaris oo soo jeedi hal isbeddel shakhsi ah iyo hal isbeddel nidaam (siyaasad dawladeed ama shirkad) kaas oo yarayn doona raadkaaga. Hadda: raadka hadda, raad-raaca la beegsanayo, iyo wakhtiga.
learnSch_environmental_studies_f2_tp0: SDGs iyo tamarta la cusboonaysiin karo
learnSch_environmental_studies_f2_tp2: Nidaamyada cuntada iyo shakhsi vs. ficil habaysan
learnUni_mathematics_f5_desc: Falanqaynta dhabta ah waa aasaaska adag ee calculus, caddaynta natiijooyinka ku saabsan xadka, sii wadida, kala duwanaanta, iyo isdhexgalka iyada oo la adeegsanayo qeexitaanno ε-δ saxda ah. Waxay ku beddeshaa sababaynta dareenka leh doodaha macquulka ah ee aan biyaha lahayn - isbeddel aasaasi ah oo qaan-gaarnimada xisaabta looga baahan yahay heer jaamacadeed.
learnUni_mathematics_f5_kp0: ε-δ xadka: lim_{x→a} f(x) = L macnaheedu waa ε>0 kasta waxaa jira δ>0 sida 0<|x−a|<δ ka dhigan |f(x) -L|<ε. Tani waxay meesha ka saaraysaa madmadowga fikradda 'soo dhawaada'.
learnUni_mathematics_f5_kp1: Aragtida Bolzano-Weierstrass: taxane kasta oo xaddidan oo ku jira ℝⁿ wuxuu leeyahay soo-socod isku-dhafan. Heine-Borel: qayb ka mid ah ℝⁿ waa is haysta haddii ay xidhan tahay oo ay xidhan tahay.
learnUni_mathematics_f5_kp2: Aragtida Qiimaha Dhexdhexaadka ah: haddii f ku sii socoto [a,b] iyo f(a) iyo f(b) ay leeyihiin calamdo iska soo horjeeda, waxa jira c ∈ (a,b) f(c) = 0. Si adag looga caddeeyey dhammaystirka ℝ.
learnUni_mathematics_f5_kp3: Joogitaanka lebbiska ah: hal δ wuxuu u shaqeeyaa dhammaan x isku mar - wuxuu ka xoog badan yahay sii socoshada. Shaqa kasta oo joogto ah oo ku jirta set is haysta waa mid joogto ah.
learnUni_mathematics_f5_kp4: Riemann vs. Lebesgue integral: Lebesgue integral waxay ku fidinaysaa Riemann iyada oo cabbiraysa jaangooyooyin (aragti cabbir) oo waxay qabataa hawlo badan oo aad u badan, oo ay ku jiraan xadka taxanaha.
learnUni_mathematics_f5_task: Adigoo isticmaalaya qeexida ε-δ, caddeyso lim_{x→3} (2x−1) = 5. Ka dib isticmaal IVT si aad u muujiso in x⁵ − x − 1 = 0 uu leeyahay ugu yaraan hal xal oo dhab ah. Caddayn in f(x) = 1/x aanu si isku mid ah u soconayn (0,1) balse uu yahay [0.5, 2].
learnUni_mathematics_f6_name: Algebra Abstract || Aljabrada Abstract waxay guudmarisaa hawlaha xisaabinta si ay u dhisaan qaab-dhismeed aan la taaban karin: kooxo (hal hawlgal), faraanti (laba hawlgal), iyo goobo (laba hawlgal oo rogaal celis ah). Tani waxay midaynaysaa xisaabaadka kala duwan waxayna taageertaa cryptography casriga ah (qalloocyada elliptik ee meelaha kooban) iyo fiisigiska (kooxaha asymmetry ee fiisigiska qaybta).
learnUni_mathematics_f6_desc: Axioms kooxeed: xidhidh (a★b ∈ G), associativity ((a★b)★c = a★(b★c)), aqoonsiga (e★a = a), rogan (a★a⁻¹ = e). Tusaalooyinka: (ℤ+), (ℚ\{0},×), kooxda dihedral Dₙ (symmetries of n-gon).
learnUni_mathematics_f6_kp0: Aragtida Lagrange: haddii H ay tahay koox-hoosaadka kooxda G, ka dib |H| qaybsada |G|. Isku-dubarid: siday u kala horreeyaan curiye kasta wuu qaybiyaa |G|. Koox-hoosaadyada caadiga ah waxay oggolaadaan koox-kooxeed dhisme G/N.
learnUni_mathematics_f6_kp1: Lagrange's theorem: if H is a subgroup of finite group G, then |H| divides |G|. Corollary: order of any element divides |G|. Normal subgroups allow quotient group construction G/N.
learnUni_mathematics_f6_kp2: Aragtida giraanta: (R+,×) halka (R+) ay tahay kooxda abeliyaanka, × waa wax wadaag iyo qaybin. Qaybaha isku dhafan (ma jiraan wax qaybiyayaal eber ah). Fikradaha ayaa guudmaraya koox-hoosaadyada giraanta. Meelaha ugu habboon ee ugu muhiimsan (PIDs): fikrad kasta oo ay dhaliso hal shay.
learnUni_mathematics_f6_kp3: Goobaha: curiye kasta oo aan eber ahayn wuxuu leeyahay rogaal-celin isku-dhufasho ah. Tusaalooyinka: ℚ, ℝ, ℂ, iyo garoomo kooban 𝔽_p = ℤ/pℤ (p prime). Goobo kooban ayaa hoosta ka xariiqaya sirta AES iyo koodka saxida qaladka.
learnUni_mathematics_f6_kp4: Aragtida Galois: waxay ku xidhaa xididdada polynomials iyo aragti kooxeed. Kooxda Galois oo ka mid ah koox-kooxeedyo badan ayaa qabta astaamaha xididdadooda. Halbeegga badan waxaa lagu xalin karaa xagjiriinta haddii kooxda Galois ay tahay koox la xalin karo - waxay sharraxaysaa la'aanta darajada≥5 isla'egyada guud.
learnUni_mathematics_f6_task: Xaqiiji in ℤ₆ ay ku jiraan koox. Soo hel dhammaan koox-hoosaadyada oo xaqiiji aragtida Lagrange. Caddee ℤ₂×ℤ₃ ≅ ℤ₆ adigoo muujinaya isomorphism cad. Kadib tus ℤ₂×ℤ₂ ≇ ℤ₄ adiga oo helaya hanti kala saarta.
learnUni_mathematics_f6_tp0: Kooxo, koox-hoosaadyo, iyo Lagrange || Xalqada iyo Garoomada
learnUni_mathematics_f7_name: Falanqaynta murugsan waxay ku fidisaa kalkuluus ilaa hawlaha doorsoome adag. Hawlaha Holomorphic (isku-dhafan-kala-duwanaanshaha) ayaa ah kuwo aan la koobi karin oo kala duwanaan kara waxayna ku kaydiyaan macluumaadka caalamiga ah ee xogta deegaanka. Cauchy's theorem integral, calculus haraaga, iyo khariidaynta waafaqsan ayaa ka dhigaysa mid awood u leh fiisigiska, injineernimada, iyo aragtida tirada.
learnUni_mathematics_f7_desc: Kala duwanaansho isku dhafan: f'(z) = lim_{h→0} [f(z+h) -f(z)]/h (h ∈ ℂ). Isla'egyada Cauchy-Riemann: haddii f = u+iv uu yahay holomorphic markaas ∂u/∂x = ∂v/∂y iyo ∂u/∂y = -∂v/∂x.
learnUni_mathematics_f7_kp0: Cauchy's Theorem: ee holomorphic f gudaha iyo konturrada fudud ee xiran C, ∮_C f(z) dz = 0. Cauchy's formula: f(z₀) = (1/2πi) ∮_C f(z)/(z−z₀) dz.
learnUni_mathematics_f7_kp1: Taxanaha Taylor iyo Laurent: Hawlaha holomorphic waxay u fidayaan sida taxanaha awoodda. Taxanaha Laurent waxa uu ogolaadaa awoodo taban - lama huraan u dhaw kali kali gooni ah (tiro, kalinimo lama huraan ah).
learnUni_mathematics_f7_kp2: Aragtida hadhaaga: ∮_C f(z) dz = 2πi × Σ Res(f, zₖ) ee dhammaan tiirarka zₖ gudaha C. Hadhaaga tiirka fudud z₀: Res = lim_{z→z₀} (z−z₀) f(z). Loo isticmaalo in lagu qiimeeyo integrals dhabta ah iyadoo la dooranayo contour xariif ah.
learnUni_mathematics_f7_kp3: Khariidadaha iswaafajinta: hawlaha holomorphic oo leh xaglo ilaalin aan eber ahayn. Möbius waxay u beddeshaa khariidad wareegyada/xariiqyada goobo/xariiqyo. Loo isticmaalo dhaq-dhaqaaqa dareeraha, electrostatics, iyo sawir-gacmeed.
learnUni_mathematics_f7_kp4: Xaqiiji f(z)=z² waa holomorphic iyadoo loo marayo isla'egyada Cauchy-Riemann. Xisaabi ∮_{|z|=2} dz/(z²−1) adoo isticmaalaya aragtida hadhaaga: raadi tiirarka, hubi waxa dhex jira |z|=2, xisaabi hadhaaga, oo mari aragtida. Ku xaqiiji jajabyo qayb ahaan
learnUni_physics_f2_name: Isla'egyada Maxwell waxay mideeyaan koronto, magnetism-ka, iyo optic-yada hal qaab oo qurxoon. Waxay saadaaliyaan mowjadaha korantada ee ku socda c, waxay sharxaan shucaaca, waxayna sameeyaan aasaaska dhammaan injineernimada korontada. Fahamka iyaga heerka calculus vector waa astaanta waxbarashada fiisigiska.
learnUni_physics_f2_desc: Maxwell's equations unify electricity, magnetism, and optics into one elegant framework. They predict electromagnetic waves travelling at c, explain radiation, and form the basis of all electrical engineering. Understanding them at the vector calculus level is a hallmark of a physics education.
learnUni_physics_f2_kp0: Isla'egyada Maxwell: ∇·E = ρ/ε₀, ∇·B = 0, ∇×E = -∂B/∂t, ∇×B = μ₀(J + ε₀∂E/∂t). Si wada jir ah ayay u mideeyaan dhammaan ifafaalaha elektromagnetic-ka qadiimiga ah.
learnUni_physics_f2_kp1: Mowjadaha Electromagnetic: meel banaan ah, E iyo B waxay ku qancaan ∇²E = μ₀ε₀∂²E/∂t², siinta xawaaraha hirarka c = 1/√(μ₀ε₀) ≈ 3×10⁸ m/s. Iftiinku waa mowjadda korantada.
learnUni_physics_f2_kp2: Tilmaamida vector S = (1/μ₀) E×B: jihada iyo heerka socodka tamarta korantada. Cadaadiska shucaaca: Mowjadaha EM waxay qaadaan xawaare p = U/c.
learnUni_physics_f2_kp3: Xaaladaha xuduudaha ee isdhaafsiga walxaha: tangential E iyo caadiga B waa joogto. Wuxuu go'aamiyaa milicsiga iyo dib-u-celinta (Islee'egyada Fresnel waxay bixiyaan baaxad weyn; Sharciga Snell wuxuu bixiyaa xaglo).
learnUni_physics_f2_kp4: Balaadhinta tiirarka badan: ka fog qaybinta lacag bixinta, beeruhu waxa u badan ereyo hogaamineed - monopole (1/r²), dipole (1/r³), afarle (1/r⁴). Oscillating dipoles waxay soo saartaa hirarka EM - saldhigga anteenooyinka.
learnUni_physics_f2_task: Laga bilaabo isla'egta Maxwell ee faakuumka (ρ=0, J=0), ka dheeho isla'egta hirarka korantada ee E. Show c = 1/√(μ₀ε₀). Kadibna ku qor goobaha mowjad diyaaradeed oo ku faafinaysa jihada z oo tus in E, B, iyo k ay labada dhinacba siman yihiin iyo in |E|/|B| = c.
learnUni_physics_f3_desc: Farsamoyaqaanka tira-koobka ayaa ka soo saara heerkulbeegga heerkulbeegga ee macroscopic hab-dhaqanka tirakoobka ee qaybaha yaryar. Qaybinta Boltzmann, shaqada qaybinta, iyo entropy sida log of microstates waxay ku xidhaan fiisigiska atomiga ilaa ifafaale kulaylka maalinlaha ah - laga bilaabo shucaaca jidhka madow ilaa marxaladda kala-guurka.
learnUni_physics_f3_kp0: Qaybinta Boltzmann: itimaalka microstate leh tamar E waa P ∝ e ^ {-E/k_BT}. Heerkulka sare wuxuu u oggolaanayaa qabsashada dawladaha tamarta sare. Isla'egtan kaliya ayaa hoosta ka xariiqaysa kimisteriga, astrophysics-ka, iyo bayoolaji.
learnUni_physics_f3_kp1: Shaqada qaybinta Z = Σᵢ e ^ {-βEᵢ} (β=1/k_BT). Tamar bilaash ah F = -k_BT ln Z. Dhammaan qiyaasaha heerkulbeegga ayaa raacaya: ⟨E⟩ = -∂ln Z/∂β, entropy S = -∂F/∂T, cadaadiska P = -∂F/∂V.
learnUni_physics_f3_kp2: Boltzmann entropy: S = k_B ln Ω (Ω = tirada microstates). Sharciga labaad: Ω si kedis ah ayuu u kordhaa → S had iyo jeer wuxuu kordhiyaa nidaamyada go'doonsan. Falaadhida wakhtiga ayaa ka soo baxda tirakoobka.
learnUni_physics_f3_kp3: Tirakoobka tirada: bosons waxay addeecaan qaybinta Bose-Einstein (waxyaabo badan gobolkiiba → superfluidity, lasers, condensate Bose-Einstein). Fermions waxay adeecaan Fermi-Dirac (mid gobol kasta → qaab dhismeedka elektarooniga ah ee biraha, dhogorta cad, xiddigaha neutron).
learnUni_physics_f3_kp4: Marxaladda kala-guurka: heerkulka muhiimka ah ee Tc, dalbo cabbirka boodboodka (dalabka 1aad) ama u kaca si joogto ah (dalabka 2aad). Habka ising wuxuu qabtaa feromagnetism. Meel xasaasi ah oo u dhow: sharciyada miisaamidda caalamiga ah, dhererka isku xidhka kala duwan, fasallada caalamiga ah.
learnUni_physics_f3_task: U soo saar shaqada qaybinta nidaam laba-heer ah (tamarta 0 iyo ε). Soo hel ⟨E⟩, C_V = ∂⟨E⟩/∂T, iyo entropy S. Sketch C_V vs. T (Schottky peak). U turjun meesha ugu sarreysa jir ahaan. Codso qodobka Boltzmann si aad u qiyaasto jajabka molecules ee xaalad kacsan T = 300 K haddii ε = 0.025 eV.
learnUni_physics_f4_desc: Makaanikada Quantum waa aragtida ugu saxsan ee la tijaabiyay, oo sax ah 12 meelood oo jajab tobanle ah ee saadaasha QED. Waxay ku beddeshaa dariiqyada qadiimiga ah iyada oo la adeegsanayo mowjadaha hirarka ee hoos imanaya isla'egta Schrödinger waxayna sharraxaysaa atamka, molecules, lasers, semiconductors, iyo sawir-qaadayaasha MRI. Sido kale si qoto dheer falsafad ahaan waa wareer.
learnUni_physics_f4_kp0: Wavefunction ψ(x,t): |ψ|² waa cufnaanta ixtimaalka. Caadiyan: ∫|ψ|² dx = 1. Horumarka waqtiga: iℏ ∂ψ/∂t = Ĥψ. Dawladaha taagan: Ĥψ_n = E_n ψ_n - tamarta eigenstates.
learnUni_physics_f4_kp1: ceel afar geesle ah: ψ_n = √(2/L) sin(nπx/L), E_n = n²π²ℏ²/(2mL²). Heerarka tamarta la tiriyey - waxay sharraxaysaa spectra atomigga. Tamar-dhibceed eber E₁> 0 xitaa at T=0.
learnUni_physics_f4_kp2: Quantum harmonic oscillator: E_n = (n+½)ℏω, n=0,1,2,... Kor u qaadida/hoos u dhigista hawlwadeenada â±. Gobolka dhulku wuxuu leeyahay hawl-hawleedka Gaussian. Nashqado gariirka molecular iyo tirada goobta.
learnUni_physics_f4_kp3: Atom Hydrogen: Awooda Coulomb oo qaabaysan. Xalalka lagu calaamadeeyay tirooyinka quantum n (tamar), l (xakamaynta xaglaha), m (magnetic). Qaababka orbital (s, p, d, f) ayaa go'aamiya isku xidhka kiimikada.
learnUni_physics_f4_kp4: Entanglement iyo theorem Bell: laba qaybood ayaa la isku xidhi karaa siyaabo aan lagu macnayn karin doorsoomayaasha qarsoon ee maxaliga ah. Sinnaan la'aanta Bell ayaa lagu xadgudbay si tijaabo ah - waxay caddeysaa in aysan meesha ku jirin makaanikada tirada. Salka loo yaqaan 'quantum cryptography'.
learnUni_physics_f4_task: Si fiican u xalli afargeeska aan dhamaadka lahayn ee 1D: qor ψ_n iyo E_n. U xisaabi E₁ koronto ku jirta L = 1 nm ceel. Qayb ayaa lagu diyaariyay ψ = (1/√2)(ψ₁ + ψ₂). (a) Kani ma tamarta eigenstate? (b) Xisaabi ⟨E⟩. (c) Sharaxaad ka bixi sida ⟨x⟩ u horumariyo wakhtiga. (d) Sharax waxa dhacaya markaad cabbirto tamarta.
learnUni_physics_f5_desc: Optics-yada casriga ahi waxay ilayska ula dhaqmaan sida hirarka korantada (wave optics) iyo sida photon-yada (quantum optics). Wave optics waxay si sax ah u sharaxdaa faragelinta, kala duwanaanshaha, iyo kala soocida. Photonics - sayniska iyo tignoolajiyada jiilka iyo xakamaynta sawir-qaadista - waxay taageertaa laysarka, fiilooyinka indhaha, unugyada qorraxda, iyo tignoolajiyada tirada soo baxaya.
learnUni_physics_f5_kp0: Wave optics: faragelinta iyo kala fogaanshiyaha ayaa ka soo baxa mabda'a Huygens-Fresnel (meel kasta oo wavefront waa il labaad). Laba-jeex ee dhallinyaradu waxay siinaysaa kala fogaanshiyaha cirifka Δy = λL/d.
learnUni_physics_f5_kp1: Fourier optics: lens-ku waxa uu sameeyaa beddelka Fourier ee diyaaradda focal. Shaandhaynta meelaha bannaan - xannibaadda soo noqnoqoshada meelaha qaarkood - ayaa saldhig u ah habaynta sawirka iyo microscopy.
learnUni_physics_f5_kp2: Fiisigiska laser-ka: rogaal celinta dadweynaha ee lagu gaaro bamgareynta indhaha ama koronto. Sii daynta la kiciyay waxay soo saartaa isku xidhan, monochromatic, iftiin jihada. Godadka leysarka ayaa doorta hababka. Codsiyada: qaliinka, lidar, tweezers indhaha, sawirka barcode.
learnUni_physics_f5_kp3: Fiilooyinka indhaha: wadarta milicsiga gudaha (xagalka> xagal muhiim ah θ_c = arcsin(n₂/n₁)) dabinno iftiinka xudunta u ah. Fiilooyinka hal-habka ah ee isgaadhsiinta dheer; qaab-badan oo masaafo gaaban ah. Attenuation ~0.2 dB/km at 1550 nm.
learnUni_physics_f5_kp4: Quantum optics: statistics photon (isku xidhan vs. kulaylka iyo iftiinka la tuujiyey), ilo sawir leh, lammaane sawireed isku xidhan (iyada oo loo marayo isbedbeddelka is-beddelka is-beddelka ah). Codsiyada: qaybinta furaha quantum (Bartakoolka BB84), teleportation quantum.
learnUni_physics_f5_task: Shabaqyo kala duwanaansho leh oo leh 500 xariiq/mm ayaa lagu iftiimiyay iftiinka λ=600 nm. U hel xaglaha m=1 iyo m=2 amarrada kala-duwanaanshaha. Xisaabi awoodda xallinta R = mN ee N = 1000 xariiq. Ka dib u qaabee fiber indhaha oo leh xudunta n₁=1.50 iyo cladding n₂=1.45: hel xagasha muhiimka ah iyo daloonka nambarada NA = √(n₁²−n₂²).
learnUni_chemistry_f0_desc: Kiimikada jidhku waxa ay khusaysaa fiisigiska - thermodynamics, kinetics, makaanikada tirada - hababka kiimikaad. Waxay sharraxaysaa sababta fal-celintu u dhacdo (thermodynamics), sida ugu dhakhsaha badan ee ay u socdaan (kinetics), iyo waxa go'aamiya qaab-dhismeedka molecular (chemistry quantum). Waa laf-dhabarta aragtiyeed ee dhammaan kimistariga.
learnUni_chemistry_f0_kp0: Gibbs tamar bilaash ah: ΔG = ΔH - TΔS. ΔG <0: iskeed ah; ΔG> 0: aan iskeed ahayn; ΔG = 0: dheellitirka. Marka loo eego: ΔG° = -RT ln K.
learnUni_chemistry_f0_kp1: Kinetics kiimikaad: heerka = k[A]ᵐ[B]ⁿ. Dalabka koowaad: t₁/₂ = ln2/k. Isla'egta Arrhenius: k = Ae^{-Ea/RT}. Aragtida gobolka kala-guurka: heerka lagu go'aamiyay ΔG‡ (Tamarta Gibbs ee gobolka kala-guurka).
learnUni_chemistry_f0_kp2: Aragtida orbital molecular: orbital atomiisku waxay isku daraan (LCAO) si ay u sameeyaan isku xidhid (tamar hoose) iyo antibonding (tamar sare) MOs. Dalabka dammaanadda = ½ (isku-xidhka - qalabka elektarooniga ah ee lidka ku ah).
learnUni_chemistry_f0_kp3: Spectroscopy: UV-Vis (Beer-Lambert: A = εcl, wareejinta elektarooniga ah), IR (gariirrada molecular - faraha kooxda shaqada), NMR (deegaanada nukliyeerka nukliyeerka ayaa bixiya isku xirka iyo stereochemistry), spec mass (cusub molecular iyo jajab).
learnUni_chemistry_f0_kp4: Guryaha isku-dhafka ah (waxay kuxirantahay tirada qaybaha solutes, ma aha aqoonsiga): kor u kaca barta karkarinta (ΔT_b = K_b m), niyad-jabka barafka (ΔT_f = K_f m), cadaadiska osmotic (Π = MRT). Waxaa loo isticmaalaa in lagu ogaado osmometry iyo cryoscopy.
learnUni_chemistry_f0_task: falcelinta N₂ + 3H₂ → 2NH₃ at 298 K, ΔH° = -92 kJ/mol iyo ΔS° = -198 J/mol·K. (a) Xisaabi ΔG ° iyo K. (b) Fal-celintu ma tahay mid iska timid 298 K? Markay tahay 600 K? (c) Turjumaan sida heerkulka iyo cadaadisku u saameeyaan wax-soo-saarka habka Haber. La xidhiidh mabda'a Le Chatelier.
learnUni_chemistry_f0_tp0: Gibbs tamar bilaash ah iyo dheelitirnaan
learnUni_chemistry_f1_desc: Kiimikada dabiiciga ah ee jaamacadda waxay barataa hababka falcelinta ee heerka elektaroonigga ah, stereochemistry, qorsheynta isku dhafka, iyo isbeddellada kooxda shaqeyneysa. Kartidu waxay lama huraan u tahay farmashiistaha, sayniska agabka, bayolojiyada kiimikada.
learnUni_chemistry_f1_kp0: Falaadh qaloocan: fallaadho madax buuxa ayaa muujinaya dhaqdhaqaaqa lammaanaha elektarooniga ah (nucleophile to electrophile). Fallaadhaha madaxa badhku waxay muujinayaan habab xagjir ah. Falaadh kastaa waa inay ka soo bilaabataa isha elektarooniga ah (lammaane ama curaarta kali ah).
learnUni_chemistry_f1_kp1: Habka SN2: Weerar dhabarka ah oo hal-tallaabo ah oo wadajira → roga qaabeynta (rogid Walden). La door biday: nucleophile xooggan, substrate hoose, dareeraha aprotic polar (DMF, DMSO, acetone).
learnUni_chemistry_f1_kp2: Habka SN1: laba tillaabo iyada oo loo marayo dhexdhexaadiyaha karbocation. La doorbiday: substrate sare, dareeraha protic polar (biyaha, ethanol). Qiimaha = k[substrate] kaliya. Siinaya jinsiyadda.
learnUni_chemistry_f1_kp3: Stereochemistry: xarumaha chiral, enantiomers, diastereomers. Xeerarka Cahn-Ingold-Prelog (CIP) waxay ku meeleeyaan qaabeynta R/S. Dhaqdhaqaaqa indhaha oo lagu cabbiro polarimetry. Thalidomide: R-enantiomer therapeutic, S-enantiomer teratogenic - muhiimada nadiifinta stereochemical.
learnUni_chemistry_f1_kp4: Falanqaynta dib-u-dhiska (Corey): Qorshe-ku-samaynta gadaal-u-sheeg kala-goynta (jebinta curaarta muhiimka ah) si loo muujiyo agab bilawga diyaarka ah. Ilaalinta istaraatiijiyad kooxeed, isweydaarsiga kooxeed shaqeynaya, iyo raadraaca gobolka oksaydhisku waa xirfado muhiim ah.
learnUni_chemistry_f1_task: Soo jeedi hab dhammaystiran oo leh fallaadho qalloocan: (a) falcelinta SN2 ee (R) -2-bromobutane oo leh NaOH - muuji qaabeynta badeecada, (b) falcelinta SN1 ee (CH₃) ₃CBr oo leh biyo - muuji carbocation, jinsiyadda, iyo labadaba stereoisomers ee alaabta. Sharax sababta isla substrate-ka uusan u mari karin labada hab isku mar.
learnUni_chemistry_f2_desc: Kiimikada Inorganic waxay ka kooban tahay iskudubarid kimistari, organometallics, walxaha adag, iyo kimistariga noolaha. Biraha kala-guurka oo leh kiimiko-orbital-kooda hodanka ah ayaa hoosta ka xarriiqay catalysis-ka warshadaha, agabka shaqaynaya, iyo hababka noole ee muhiimka ah.
learnUni_chemistry_f2_kp0: Dhismayaasha isuduwidda: ion birta dhexe + ligands (saldhigyada Lewis ee ku deeqaya lammaane elektaroonig ah). Saamaynta Chelate: ligands polydentate (EDTA) waxay sameeyaan dhismayaal ka xasilloon kuwa monodentate-ka ah - faa'iidada heerkulbeegga ee entropy.
learnUni_chemistry_f2_kp1: Aragtida goobta Crystal (CFT): d-orbitals waxay ku kala qaybsan yihiin beerta ligand. Qaybinta Octahedral Δ_o waxay kala saartaa t₂g (hoos) iyo e_g (sare) sets. Xirmooyinka garoonka adag (CN⁻, CO) → weyn Δ_o → hoose. Goobta daciifka ah (F⁻, H₂O) → yar Δ_o → sare u kaca.
learnUni_chemistry_f2_kp2: Midabka iyo magnetism ka CFT: d-d kala-guurka waxay nuugaan iftiinka muuqda → midab dhammaystiran oo la arkay. Dhismayaasha lafdhabarta sare waa paramagnetic (elektaroono aan lammaane lahayn); lafdhabarta hoose waa diamagnetic.
learnUni_chemistry_f2_kp3: Chemistry Organometallic: Biraha-carbon bonds (birta carbonyls M(CO)ₙ, metallocenes, kicinta Wilkinson [RhCl(PPh₃)₃] ee hydrogenation). 18-Xeerka elektiroonigga ah wuxuu saadaaliyaa xasilloonida dhismayaasha organometallic.
learnUni_chemistry_f2_kp4: Kiimikada nooleorganic: Fe ee hemoglobin (la beddeli karo O₂ xidhitaan), Fe-S kooxaha (wareejinta elektarooniga ah), Zn in carbonic anhydrase, Mg in chlorophyll (photosynthesis), Cu in cytochrome c oxidase (neefsashada), Co ee Vitamin B₁₁.
learnUni_chemistry_f2_task: U sawir jaantuska qaybinta octahedral [Fe(CN)₆]³⁻ iyo [Fe(H₂O)₆]³⁺. U qoondee elektaroonnada adoo isticmaalaya CFT, go'aami heerka wareegga wareegga iyo tirada elektaroonnada aan lammaane ahayn mid kasta. Saadaali midka nuuga iftiinka tamarta sare iyo sababta. Xisaabi xaaladda oksaydhka ee Fe ee dhismo kasta oo u aqoonso seedaha sida beer adag ama daciif ah adoo isticmaalaya taxanaha spectrochemical.
learnUni_chemistry_f3_desc: Kiimikada falanqaynta ayaa bixisa qalabka lagu garto walxaha oo lagu cabbiro uruurintooda maaddooyinka adag. Farsamooyinka falanqaynta casriga ah - HPLC, GC-MS, NMR, nuugista atomiga - ayaa lagama maarmaan u ah dawooyinka, la socodka deegaanka, badbaadada cuntada, baadhitaanada, iyo ogaanshaha kiliinikada.
learnUni_chemistry_f3_kp0: Falanqaynta Titrimetric: Aashitada-saldhigga, complexometric (EDTA), redox, iyo titration roobab. Ogaanshaha barta dhamaadka: tilmaamayaasha, mitirka pH, conductimetry, potentiometry. Xalalka caadiga ah, heerarka aasaasiga ah, iyo titration-ka dambe.
learnUni_chemistry_f3_kp1: Chromatography: marxaladda taagan ayaa si kala duwan dib u dhigaysa qaybaha. GC (falanqaynta kacsan, ogaanshaha kulaylka), HPLC (aan isbeddelayn, UV / fluorescence / MS ogaanshaha), IC (isweydaarsiga ion), SFC (dareeraha sare). Qaraarka R = 2(t₂−t₁)/(w₁+w₂).
learnUni_chemistry_f3_kp2: Mass spectrometry: ionisation elektaroonik (EI) waxay soo saartaa cations xagjir ah kuwaas oo si gaar ah u jajaban. Miisaanka sare ee MS wuxuu bixiyaa qaacido molecular oo sax ah. LC-MS/MS waxa ay siisaa xulashada matris bayooloji oo adag.
learnUni_chemistry_f3_kp3: NMR spectroscopy: ¹H NMR: isbeddel kiimikaad (δ, ppm) waxay tusinaysaa bay'ada, isku xidhka (J, Hz) waxay tusinaysaa isku xidhka H ee ku xiga, is dhexgalku wuxuu siinayaa saamiga noocyada H. ¹³C NMR iyo farsamooyinka 2D (COSY, HMBC, NOESY) ayaa go'aamiya qaab dhismeedka 3D buuxa.
learnUni_chemistry_f3_kp4: Habka ansaxinta: xadka ogaanshaha (LOD), xadka qiyaasida (LOQ), linearity (R²), saxnaanta (% soo kabashada), saxsanaanta (RSD%), xulashada (faragelin la'aan), adkeyd (ka soo saari kara shaybaadhka oo dhan). Looga baahan yahay soo gudbinta sharciyeynta (FDA, EMA).
learnUni_chemistry_f3_task: Iskudhis dabiici ah oo aan la garanayn ayaa muujinaya: MW = 122 uu qoray MS; IR: fidsan OH 3200-3500, carbonyl 1680 cm⁻¹; ¹H NMR: δ 7.8 (d, 2H), 7.5 (d, 2H), 3.9 (s, 3H). Soo jeedi qaab dhismeed. U cadee fiirsi kasta oo spectroscopic ah. Ka dib sharax sida aad u ansixin lahayd habka HPLC si aad u qiyaasto xaruntan kiniiniga dawooyinka.
learnUni_chemistry_f4_desc: Biochemistry waxay barataa hababka kiimikaad ee nolosha - catalysis enzyme, dariiqyada dheef-shiid kiimikaadka, taranka DNA, iyo calaamadaynta unugyada. Waxay isku xidhaa kimisteriga iyo daawada: fahamka kinetics-ka enzymku waxay awood u siinaysaa naqshadaynta daroogada; fahamka dheef-shiid kiimikaad wuxuu daaha ka qaadaa bartilmaameedyada lagu daweeyo sonkorowga, kansarka, iyo buurnaanta; Biochemistry DNA waxay taageertaa tafatirka hiddasidaha CRISPR.
learnUni_chemistry_f4_kp0: Kinetics enzyme: Michaelis-Menten isla'egta v = Vmax [S]/(Km+[S]). Km: xooga saarista substrate ee xawaaraha ugu badan ee nuska ah - waxay ka tarjumaysaa isku xirnaanta substrate-ka enzyme-ka. Vmax: heerka ugu sarreeya ee saturating substrate. Ku toosan by Lineweaver-Burk plot (1/v vs. 1/[S]).
learnUni_chemistry_f4_kp1: Ka-hortagga enzyme: tartan (xakameeyaha wuxuu xiraa goobta firfircoon, wuxuu kordhiyaa Km muuqda, Vmax aan isbeddelin); aan tartan ahayn (xakameeyaha ayaa ku xidhan meel kale, hoos u dhigaya Vmax, km aan isbeddelin); aan laga noqon karin (Covalent - aspirin acetylates COX si joogto ah).
learnUni_chemistry_f4_kp2: Dheef-shiid kiimikaad: catabolism (glucose → 2 pyruvate iyada oo loo marayo glycolysis, 2 ATP; wareegga Krebs 2 ATP; fosforyaal oksaydh ah ~ 32 ATP iyada oo loo marayo gradient proton gudaha xuubka mitochondrial gudaha). Wadarta ≈36 ATP gulukooskiiba.
learnUni_chemistry_f4_kp3: biochemistry DNA: helix labanlaab ah oo ay dejisay isku xidhka saldhigga Watson-Crick (A:T, G:C) iyo isugaynta salka (π-π isdhexgalka). Dib-u-celinta DNA-ga ee nus-xakameedka: polymerase DNA wuxuu ku daraa 5'→3', wuxuu u baahan yahay asal (RNA). Heerka khaladka ~ 1 10⁹ ka dib marka la saxo.
learnUni_chemistry_f4_kp4: Qaab dhismeedka borotiinka iyo laalaabida: aasaasiga ah (isku xigxiga amino acid) → labaad (α-helix: H-bonds i to i +4; β-sheet: strallel or anti-parallel strands) → heer jaamacadeed (3D laab, burbur hydrophobic) → rubuc (hoosaadyo badan). Chaperones waxay caawiyaan laalaabida; Qaladaynta waxay sababtaa cudurro (Alzheimer, Parkinson, cudurada prion).
learnUni_chemistry_f4_task: Enzyme wuxuu leeyahay km = 2 mM iyo Vmax = 60 μmol/daqiiqo. (a) Xisaabi v at [S] = 1, 2, 6 mM. (b) U sawir qaab-dhismeedka Michaelis-Menten iyo Lineweaver-Burk ee labada gobol ee aan la xannibin iyo kuwa tartanka la isku hayo (inhibitor labanlaabaya Km). (c) Nakhshad mukhaadaraad: soo jeedi sida aqoonta joomatariga goobta firfircoon ee ensaymku u hagi karo naqshadaynta ka-hortagga analoogga ee gobolka-ku-meel-gaadhka ah.
learnUni_biology_f2_desc: Cilmi-nafsiga jaamacadda waxay khusaysaa moodooyinka tiro-koobka dhaqdhaqaaqa dadweynaha, isdhexgalka noocyada, iyo hawlaha nidaamka deegaanka. Bayoolaji ilaalinta waxay adeegsataa aragtida deegaanka - dadka ugu yar ee lagu dhaqmi karo, naqshadaynta kaydka, deegaanka ecology - si loo ilaaliyo kala duwanaanshaha noole ee adduunka ku socda isbeddel deegaan degdeg ah.
learnUni_biology_f2_kp0: Qaababka dadweynaha: kobaca saadka dN/dt = rN(1-N/K) halkaasoo r ay tahay heerka korodhka gudaha iyo K uu sido awood. Wax-soo-saarka ugu badnaan waara (MSY) ee laga goostay N = K/2 halkaasoo dN/dt ugu badnaan
learnUni_biology_f2_kp1: Nooca Lotka-Volterra ugaadhsiga-ugaadhsiga: dN/dt = rN-aNP (ugaadhsi); dP/dt = baNP-mP (ugaarsi). Dadku si meerto ah ayay u meermeeraan - waxaa muujiyay xogta Hare-lynx. Falanqaynta xasilloonida iyada oo loo marayo eigenvalues ​​of Jacobian.
learnUni_biology_f2_kp2: Biogeography Island (MacArthur & Wilson): S_eq laga bilaabo dheelitirka socdaalka (hoos u dhaca S) iyo dabar-goynta (kordhinta S). Jasiiradaha waaweyn, ee u dhow waxay leeyihiin hodannimo noocyo sare leh → Doodda SLOSS ee naqshadaynta kaydka.
learnUni_biology_f2_kp3: Aragtida Metapopulation Theory (Levins): Shabakad ka mid ah dadka deegaanka oo ku xiran kala firdhis Jajabka qabsatay balastar p horumariyo: dp/dt = cp(1-p) - ep. Degenaansho halis ah oo ka hooseeya dabar-goynta caalamiga ah waa lama huraan.
learnUni_biology_f2_kp4: Genomics ilaalinta: Qalabka hidde-sidaha dadweynaha (FST, cabbirka dadwaynaha waxtarka leh ee Ne, isku-dhafan F) waxay aqoonsadaan dadka hidde ahaan kala duwan, cabbira socodka hidda-wadaha, iyo ogaanshaha niyad-jabka taranka ee barnaamijyada taranka maxaabiista.
learnUni_biology_f2_task: Dad dhan 200 oo yey ah (K=1000, r=0.3/yr) ayaa la goostaa sanadkii. (a) Ku xisaabi heerka kobaca dadweynaha N=200 iyo MSY. (b) Dalaggee sannadlaha ah ayaa le'eg heerka kobaca ee MSY? (c) Dadka labaad ee jasiirada deriska la ah waxay leeyihiin Ne=15 - waa maxay khataraha uu wajaho tani, maxayse tahay tallaabooyinka ilaalinta ee ku habboon?
learnUni_biology_f2_tp2: Taariikh nololeedka Jasiiradda iyo genomics ilaalinta ilaalinta
learnUni_biology_f3_desc: Biology-ga unuggu ee heer jaamacadeed waxa uu baaraa is-beddelka calaamadaha, wareegga unugyada, epigenetics, iyo hababka molecular ee cudurka. Bayoloji molecular-ka casriga ah - PCR, hidda-wadaha cloning, RNA-seq, CRISPR - waxa ay siisaa qalab lagu akhriyo, qoro, oo wax lagaga beddelo genome. Farsamooyinkani waxay bedelayaan daawada, beeraha, iyo sayniska aasaasiga ah.
learnUni_biology_f3_kp0: Nidaaminta wareegga unugyada: cyclins iyo CDKs (kinases-based cyclin) waxay wadaan wareegga unugyada. CDK inhibitors (p21, p27) waxay u dhaqmaan sidii biriiga. Rb burada xakameysa sequesters E2F factor transcribing ilaa fosforylated by Cyclin D-CDK4/6.
learnUni_biology_f3_kp1: Dariiqooyinka gudbinta calaamada: RTK (receptor tyrosine kinase) firfircoonida → RAS/MAPK cascade → fakarka qoraalka phosphorylation → isbeddellada muujinta hiddaha. Waddada PI3K/Akt/mTOR: koritaanka iyo badbaadada. Labaduba inta badan waxay ku beddelan yihiin kansarka.
learnUni_biology_f3_kp2: Epigenetics: isbeddellada dhaxalka ah ee muujinta hidde-sidaha iyada oo aan isbeddelin taxanaha DNA-da. Wax ka beddelka hiddaha (acetylation - firfircoon; methylation - ku tiirsanaanta macnaha guud), DNA methylation (CpG methylation sinces genes), dib u habeynta chromatin. Dib u habaynta Epigenetic ee embriyaha iyo kansarka.
learnUni_biology_f3_kp3: Bayoloji RNA: kala-baxa (spliceosomes waxay ka saaraan introns), kala-bax kale (hal hidde-side → borotiinno badan - ~ 95% hiddo-wadaha bini'aadamka ayaa si kale u kala qaybsan), RNA aan codayn (miRNA aamusiin mRNA, lncRNA waxay xakameysaa chromatin), ribozymes.
learnUni_biology_f3_kp4: CRISPR-Cas9: hagaha RNA wuxuu ku hagayaa Cas9 si loo beegsado taxanaha (ku xiga taxanaha PAM). Cas9 ayaa kala jeexa labada qaybood. Dayactirka NHEJ (khalad-u nugul → garaacid) ama HDR (template → wax ka beddel sax ah). Codsiyada: daaweynta hidda-socodka, beeraha, cilmi-baarista aasaasiga ah, ogaanshaha.
learnUni_biology_f3_task: Unug kansarku waxa uu leeyahay: (1) isu beddelka RAS oo firfircoon, (2) la tirtiray hidde-sideyaasha Rb, (3) isbeddellada p53. Raad raac cawaaqibka molecular ee isbeddel kasta iyada oo loo marayo wareegga unugyada iyo waddooyinka calaamadaha. Aqoonso: Isbaarada mid walba ku guuldarreysata, maxay tahay cawaaqibka ka dhalan kara kororka unugyada, iyo laba xeeladood oo daaweyneed oo lagu beegsanayo cilladahan.
learnUni_biology_f4_desc: Cilmiga neerfayaasha ayaa buundooyinka molecular biology, physiology, and psychology si ay u sharxaan sida maskaxdu u abuurto dabeecad. Laga soo bilaabo kanaalka ion ilaa wareegyada neerfaha ilaa miyir-qabka, waa mid ka mid ah xuduudaha ugu adag uguna xiisaha badan bayoloji. Cudurrada neerfaha waxay saameeyaan 1 qof 6dii qof adduunka oo dhan - fahamkooda waxay u baahan tahay aqoon qoto dheer oo ku saabsan qaabka iyo shaqada maskaxda.
learnUni_biology_f4_kp0: Awoodda waxqabadka: hoos u dhigista marinnada waxay furaysaa kanaalka Na⁺ danab ku xiran (degdegga depolarisation ilaa + 40 mV) → la'aanta kanaalka Na⁺ + furitaanka K⁺ kanaalka (dib u celinta) → hyperpolarisation (xilli dib u dhac). Dhammaan-ama-waxba, waxay ku faaftaa iyada oo aan hoos loo dhigin axon.
learnUni_biology_f4_kp1: Gudbinta synaptic: Ca²⁺ qulqulka qulqulaya waxay kicisaa SNARE-dhexdhexaadinta isku-dhafka xididdada → sii-deynta neurotransmitter Reseptors Ionotropic (AMPA, GABA_A): ion dhaqsaha badan. Qaboojiyaha dheef-shiid kiimikaadka (mGluR, β-adrenergic): gaabin G-protein cascades.
learnUni_biology_f4_kp2: Plasticity Synaptic: LTP (xoog-dheeraad ah) - Baaraha isku-soo-dhoweynta soo-dhoweynta NMDA (wuxuu u baahan yahay labadaba glutamate-ku-xidhka iyo depolarisation postsynaptic) → gelinta AMPA receptor → kordhinta xoogga synaptik. Saldhigga molecular ee barashada iyo xusuusta.
learnUni_biology_f4_kp3: Wareegyada neerfaha: excitatory (glutamatergic) iyo xannibaado (GABAergic) neurons waxay sameeyaan wareegyo soo noqnoqda. Dheelitirka E/I: khalkhalku wuxuu keenaa suuxdin (kacsi xad-dhaaf ah) ama suuxdin (joojin xad-dhaaf ah). Oscillations (theta, gamma) waxay dejiyaan macluumaadka oo isku daraan gobollada maskaxda.
learnUni_biology_f4_kp4: Hababka cudurrada neerfaha: Alzheimer's (amyloid-β plaques waxay carqaladeeyaan gudbinta synaptic; tau hyperphosphorylation destabilises microtubules → dhimashada neerfaha), Parkinson's (dopaminergic neuron loss in substantia nigra; α-synuclein Lewy jirka), Huntington's (polyglutamine ballaarinta borotiinka neurodeggre).
learnUni_biology_f4_task: Waxaad ka duubtaa neuron-ka hippocampal. Kicinta soo noqnoqoshada badan ee neerfaha presynaptic ayaa sababa LTP. Sharax tallaabo-tallaabo dhacdooyinka molecular: NMDA receptor activation, Ca²⁺ signaling, CaMKII firfircoonida, AMPA phosphorylation receptor phosphorylation iyo galinta, iyo muddada dheer isbedel qaabdhismeedka. Kadib sharax sababta xannibaadda NMDA reseptors ay uga hortagayso samaynta LTP.
learnUni_biology_f5_desc: Immunology waa daraasadda hababka difaaca jirka. Nidaamka difaaca jirku wuu takooraa nafta aan ahayn, wuxuu baabi'iyaa cudur-sidaha iyo unugyada kansarka, wuxuuna abuuraa xusuusta difaaca jirka. Nidaam la'aantu waxay sababtaa cudurrada difaaca jirka, xasaasiyad, iyo difaac la'aan. Immunotherapies casriga ah - horjoogayaasha isbaarada, unugyada CAR-T, tallaalada mRNA - ayaa beddelaya daawada.
learnUni_biology_f5_kp0: Xasaanadda Innate: Receptors aqoonsiga hannaankii (PRRs, tusaale ahaan. Toll-like reseptors) waxay ogaadaan qaababka molecular-la-xidhiidha cudur-sidaha (PAMPs). Dhaqdhaqaaq NF-κB → cytokines bararka (IL-6, TNF-α, IL-1β). Buuxi cascade opsonises iyo lyses pathogens.
learnUni_biology_f5_kp1: Difaaca la qabsiga: unugyada antigen-soo bandhigaya (unugyada dendritic, macrophages) waxay farsameeyaan antigens waxayna joogaan peptides MHC I (ilaa CD8⁺ cytotoxic T unugyada) ama MHC II (CD4⁺ caawiyayaasha T unugyada). Xulashada clonal iyo balaarinta lymphocytes ee antigen-gaarka ah.
learnUni_biology_f5_kp2: Dhaqdhaqaaqa unugyada B iyo unugyada difaaca jirka: Dhaqdhaqaaqa T-ku-tiirsanaanta wuxuu u baahan yahay unugyada T-ga caawiya (CD40L-CD40 isdhexgalka + cytokines). Dareen-celinta xarunta Germinal: hypermutation somatic + affinity affinity + beddelashada fasalka (IgM → IgG, IgA, IgE). Unugyada xusuusta B waxay sii jiraan tobanaan sano.
learnUni_biology_f5_kp3: Dulqaadka difaaca iyo difaaca jirka: dulqaad dhexe - unugyo is-xakameyn leh oo T-ga oo lagu tirtiro thymus (doorashada xun). Dulqaadka durugsan - Unugyada T-da ee nidaamsan (Tregs) waxay xakameeyaan unugyada autoreactive. Fashil: lupus erythematosus systemic, rheumatoid arthritis-ka, nooca 1aad ee sonkorowga.
learnUni_biology_f5_kp4: Kansarka difaaca jirka: PD-1/PD-L1 horjoogayaasha isbaarada ayaa xannibaya baxsiga difaaca burada → Dib u kicinta unugyada T (pembrolizumab, nivolumab - Nobel Prize 2018). Daaweynta unugyada CAR-T: Unugyada bukaan-socodka ee injineerka T-unugyada oo leh chimeric antigen reseptor bartilmaameedka buro antigen - jawaabaha lama filaanka ah ee unugyada leukemia ee unugyada B.
learnUni_biology_f5_task: Bukaanku wuxuu soo bandhigaa caabuqyada bakteeriyada soo noqnoqda iyo heerarka immunoglobulin oo aad u hooseeya. Dhiiga ku wareegsan wuxuu muujiyaa unugyada B ee maqan laakiin unugyada T caadiga ah. Soo ogow daciifnimada difaaca (X-linked agammaglobulinemia - BTK mutation). Sharax saldhigga molecular: sida BTK ay caadiyan u calaamadiso inta lagu jiro korriinka unugyada B, waxa khaldan, iyo sida daawaynta immunoglobulin (IVIG) ee xididku u shaqeyso.
learnUni_biology_f5_tp1: Difaaca la qabsiga iyo unugyada B
learnUni_biology_f5_tp2: Dulqaadka, difaac-is-difaaca jirka, iyo daaweynta difaaca kansarka
learnUni_computer_science_f2_desc: Algorithms iyo qaab-dhismeedka xogta waa udub dhexaadka aragtida sayniska kombiyuutarka. Qaab dhismeedka xogta saxda ah wuxuu ka dhigayaa algorithm wax ku ool ah; Midda qaldan ayaa ka dhigaysa mid aan macquul ahayn. Falanqaynta Big-O, algorithms-garaafyada, iyo barnaamijyada firfircooni waa aaladaha aasaasiga ah ee injineer kastaa waa inuu si fiican u yaqaan.
learnUni_computer_science_f2_kp0: Big-O: O (1) joogto ah, O(log n) raadinta binary, O(n) scan linear, O(n log n) nooc isku dar ah, O(n²) nooca xumbo, O(2ⁿ) jibbaaran. Ω (kiis ugu fiican), Θ (si adag u xidhan). Falanqaynta Amortized ee qaababka firfircoon.
learnUni_computer_science_f2_kp1: Qaab dhismeedka asaasiga ah: array (O (1) gelis), liiska isku xidhan (O (1) madaxa gelin), miiska xashiishka (celcelis ahaan O (1) dhammaan ops), BST (O (log n) dheellitiran), taallo (O (log n) gelid/saarid), tijaabi (xakamaynta horgalayaasha hawlgallada).
learnUni_computer_science_f2_kp2: Algorithms-yada: BFS (wadada ugu gaaban ee aan miisaan lahayn, O(V+E)), DFS (ogaanshaha meertada, nooca topological), Dijkstra (dariiqa ugu gaaban ee miisaanka leh, O((V+E)log V)), Bellman-Ford (miisaanka taban, O(VE)), Floyd-Warshall (dhammaan lammaane, O(V³)).
learnUni_computer_science_f2_kp3: Barnaamijyada firfircoon: qaab-dhismeed hoose oo wanaagsan + dhibaatooyin hoose oo is dulsaaran. Xusuusin (kor-hoos) vs. tabulation (hoos-sare). Dhibaatooyinka caadiga ah: 0/1 Knapsack, LCS, Fogaanta wax ka beddel, Isku dhufashada silsiladda Matrix, Isbedelka Lacagta.
learnUni_computer_science_f2_kp4: NP-dhameystiran: P (waqtiga-badanaa la xalin karo), NP (waqtiga- polynomial-la xaqiijin karo). Dhibaatooyinka NP-dhameystiran (SAT, TSP, Clique) - lama yaqaan algorithm-ka badan. Aragtida Cook-Levin: SAT waa NP-dhameystiran. Dhimista ayaa caddaynaysa NP-adkaynta.
learnUni_computer_science_f2_task: Ku hirgali algorithm Dijkstra (pseudocode oo leh safka mudnaanta leh) ee garaaf 6-node ah. U wad si tallaabo-tallaabo ah, adigoo tusinaya miiska masaafada iyo gobolka safka mudnaanta leh mar kasta. Xaqiiji kakanaanta wakhtiga O((V+E)log V). Kadib sharax: haddii garaafku leeyahay geeso taban, muxuu Dijkstra u guuldareystay, sideese Bellman-Ford u maareeyaa?
learnUni_computer_science_f3_desc: Nidaamyada hawlgalku waa lakabka software-ka ee u dhexeeya qalabka iyo codsiyada - maaraynta hababka, xusuusta, kaydinta, iyo amniga. Fahamka gudaha OS wuxuu awood kuu siinayaa inaad qorto si hufan, kood isku xidhan, fahanto waxqabadka nidaamka, oo aad naqshadayso nidaamyo qaybsan oo sugan.
learnUni_computer_science_f3_kp0: Geedi socodka vs. dunta: nidaamku waxa uu leeyahay meel ciwaan u gaar ah iyo ilo; duntu waxay wadaagaan meesha ciwaanka habsocodka. Beddelka macnaha guud: OS wuxuu kaydiyaa/soo celiyaa gobolka CPU (diiwaangeliyayaasha, PC, tilmaame raso). Jadwalka: FCFS, SJF, Round Robin, Mudnaanta, Safka kala duwan.
learnUni_computer_science_f3_kp1: Khataraha is-dhaafsiga: xaaladaha jinsiyadda, xannibaadda (Xaaladaha Coffman: ka saarista labada dhinac, is-hayn-iyo-sugid, wax ka-hor-istaag ah, sugid wareeg ah), gaajo, xannibaad nool. Isku-dubarid: mutex, semaphore, monitor (condition variables), qufulka wax-akhriska.
learnUni_computer_science_f3_kp2: Maareynta xusuusta: bogsiinta - u qaybi booska ciwaanka farsamada bogag cabbirkoodu go'an yahay oo lagu sawiray shaxanka bogga. TLB waxay kaydisaa turjumaadii dhawaa Algorithms-ka beddelka bogga: FIFO, LRU, saacad (fursad labaad). Tuug marka shaqada la dhigay> RAM.
learnUni_computer_science_f3_kp3: Nidaamyada faylka: VFS (Nidaamka Faylka Virtual) lakabka qaadida Inodes: faylka metadata + xogta xannibaadaha tilmaamayaasha. Qorista (ext4, NTFS) ee joogteynta shilka. B-geedaha loo isticmaalo HFS+, NTFS ee tusaha tusaha. Heerarka RAID 0,1,5,6 - waxqabadka iyo ka-ganacsiga dib-u-noqoshada.
learnUni_computer_science_f3_kp4: Nashqada amniga: ilaalinta giraanta (qaabka isticmaalaha vs. kernel mode, syscalls sida xadka la xakameeyey), kontoroolka helitaanka awoodda ku salaysan, xakamaynta gelitaanka qasabka ah (SELinux / AppArmor), hypervisors (nooca 1 birta qaawan: VMware ESXi, Xen; nooca 2 martigeliyay: VirtualBox). Konteenarada (Docker) waxay isticmaalaan kooxo iyo meelo magacyo - ma aha VMs run ah.
learnUni_computer_science_f3_task: Saddex hab ayaa wadaaga kheyraadka R1 iyo R2. P1: wuxuu hayaa R1, wuxuu u baahan yahay R2. P2: wuxuu hayaa R2, wuxuu u baahan yahay R1. P3: labaduba waxay u baahan yihiin. (a) Sawir garaafka qoondaynta kheyraadka oo ogow xannibaadda. (b) Muuji xaalad badbaado leh adigoo isticmaalaya Algorithm-ka Bangiga: Max=[R1:2,R2:1], [R1:1,R2:2], [R1:2,R2:2]; La heli karo=[R1:1,R2:1]. Soo hel taxanaha fulinta ammaan ah. (c) Soo jeedi hab-maamuus looga hortagayo xannibaaddan.
learnUni_computer_science_f3_tp1: Maamulka xusuusta iyo xusuusta casriga ah
learnUni_computer_science_f4_desc: Injineerinka software wuxuu quseeyaa habab nidaamsan si loo dhiso software la isku halayn karo, la ilaalin karo, la miisaami karo. Dhaqannada casriga ah - Agile, DevOps, microservices, CI/CD - ayaa bedelay sida software loo bixiyo. Maadooyinka injineernimada asaasiga ah - shuruudaha, qaab-dhismeedka, tijaabinta, iyo amniga - ayaa ah kuwo muhiim ah iyadoon loo eegin habka.
learnUni_computer_science_f4_kp0: Agile (Scrum, XP, Kanban): 2-usbuuc oo is daba joog ah, is taag maalinle ah, dib u eegis sprint, dib u hagaajin. DevOps: horumarinta iyo hawlgallada isku dhafan; Dhuumaha CI/CD (GitLab CI, Jenkins, GitHub Actions) waxay si otomaatig ah u dhisaan, tijaabiyaan, u geeyaan ballan kasta.
learnUni_computer_science_f4_kp1: Nidaamyada qaab dhismeedka software: lakabka ah (UI → macquulka ganacsiga → helitaanka xogta), microservices (adeegyo si madax-banaan loo geyn karo oo leh xog ururin u gaar ah, la xiriir REST/gRPC/farriin), dhacdo-gaar ah (adeegyadu waxay ka falceliyaan dhacdooyinka - Kafka, RabbitMQ), CQRS + Event Sourcing.
learnUni_computer_science_f4_kp2: Qaababka nakhshadeynta (GoF): Hal-abuur (Singleton, Warshad, Dhisme, Prototype), Dhisme ( Adapter, Decorator, Facade, Proxy), Dabeecad ( Kormeere, Istaraatiijiyad, Amarka, Habka Template, Iterator). Ogow goorta la codsanayo - ha ka badin injineernimada.
learnUni_computer_science_f4_kp3: Istaraatiijiyada tijaabinta: cutub (dhakhso ah, go'doon ah - ku tiirsanaanta jeesjeeska), isdhexgalka (qaybo badan), qandaraas (waafaqsanaanta API), nidaamka (dhamaadka-ilaa-dhamaadka), aqbalaadda (aqbalitaanka sheekada isticmaalaha). TDD: casaan-cagaar-refactor. Tijaabada isku beddelka ayaa xaqiijisa tayada imtixaanka.
learnUni_computer_science_f4_kp4: Badbaadada injineernimada software (OWASP Top 10): duritaanka (SQL, amarka), xaqiijinta jaban, XSS, tixraacyada sheyga tooska ah ee aan sugnayn, qaabaynta amniga khaldan. Qaabaynta khatarta ah (STRIDE), dib u eegis kood sugan, iskaanka u nuglaanta ku tiirsanaanta (Snyk, Dependabot).
learnUni_computer_science_f4_task: Nakhshad arjiga wadaagga raacitaanka: (a) Qor 5 sheeko isticmaale leh shuruudo aqbalaad. (b) Sawir jaantuska dhismaha C4 (macnaha guud, weelka, heerarka qaybaha). (c) Aqoonso 3 qaab naqshadeed oo la isticmaalo oo caddeeyo. (d) U qor imtixaannada cutubka (pseudocode) ee ' xisaabi qiimaha' shaqada daboolaysa: qiimaha saldhiga, qiijinta kor u kaca, qiimaha ugu yar, iyo kiisaska cidhifyada (masaafada eber, wax soo saarka taban). (e) Aqoonso 3 OWASP khataraha amniga iyo yaraynta.
learnUni_computer_science_f5_desc: Barashada mashiinka (ML) waxay awood u siisaa nidaamyada inay wax ka bartaan xogta. Barashada qoto dheer - shabakadaha neerfaha oo leh lakabyo badan - ayaa horseeday horumar xagga aragtida, luqadda, iyo ciyaaraha. Fahamka aragtida ML (eexda-kala duwanaanshaha, cabbirka VC, joogtaynta) iyo ku celcelinta (PyTorch, hyperparameter tuning, deployment) hadda waa aqoonta udub-dhexaadka u ah sayniska kombiyuutarka.
learnUni_computer_science_f5_kp0: Barashada la kormeero: yaree khasaaraha L(θ) ee xogta tababarka iyadoo loo sii marayo farcanka gradient θ ← θ - α∇L. Dhererka jaan-gooyaha Stochastic (SGD), Adam optimiser. Nidaaminta: L2 (miisaanka qudhunka, miisaanka oo yaraada), L1 (sparsity), hoos u dhigista (si aan kala sooc lahayn eber neurons inta lagu jiro tababarka).
learnUni_computer_science_f5_kp1: Nashqadaynta shabakada neerfaha: si buuxda ugu xidhan (cufan), convolutional (CNN - miisaanka wadaaga, isbedbeddelka turjumaada - ku habboon sawirada), soo noqnoqda (RNN, LSTM, GRU - xogta taxanaha ah), habka fiiro gaar ah (Transformer - self-ttention, O(n²) kakanaanta, laakiin isbarbar socda).
learnUni_computer_science_f5_kp2: Eexda-kala-duwanaanshaha is-dhaafsiga: khaladka tababarka ≈ eexda²; qaladka imtixaanka - khalad tababarka ≈ kala duwanaanshuhu. Hoos-u-habboonaanta: eexda sare (qaabka aad u fudud). Ku-habboonaanta xad dhaafka ah: kala duwanaansho sare ( moodeelku wuxuu xasuustaa xogta tababarka). Nidaaminta, xog badan, iyo moodooyinka fudud ayaa wax ka qabta ku-habboonaanta xad dhaafka ah.
learnUni_computer_science_f5_kp3: Qiimaynta ka baxsan saxsanaanta: fasallada aan dheellitirnayn - saxnaanta (TP/TP+FP), xasuuso (TP/TP+FN), F1 = 2PR/(P+R), AUC-ROC (aagga hoos yimaada qalooca hawl-qabsiga ee qaataha). Xaqiijinta iskutallaabta k-laab waxay siinaysaa qiyaas guud oo adag.
learnUni_computer_science_f5_kp4: Qaababka aasaasiga ah iyo AI mas'uulka ka ah: moodooyinka luqadaha waaweyn (GPT, BERT) horay loogu tababaray xog ballaaran, si fiican loo habeeyey hawlo gaar ah. Mala-awaalka, eexda, iyo si xun u isticmaalka waa khataro halis ah. Sharciga EU AI (2024) wuxuu u kala saaraa nidaamyada AI khatar wuxuuna soo rogayaa shuruudaha codsiyada khatarta sare leh.
learnUni_computer_science_f5_task: Waxaad dhistaa kala-soocida dareenka (faallooyinka togan/negative). Saxnaanta tababarka: 97%; saxnaanta ansaxinta: 68%. (a) Soo ogow dhibaatada. (b) Liis garee 4 farsamood oo lagu hagaajinayo. (c) Xogtaagu waa 90% togan - xisaabi saxnaanta, saxnaanta, dib u celinta, iyo F1 haddii aad wax walba u kala saartid kuwa togan. Maxay F1 u tahay mitir ka wanaagsan? (d) U sawir qaloocyada dib-u-celinta saxda ah ee laba nooc oo sharax ta aad dooranayso hawsha ogaanshaha caafimaadka.
learnUni_computer_science_f5_tp2: Qiyaasaha qiimaynta iyo AI masuulka ka ah
learnUni_economics_f1_desc: Microeconomics waxay falanqaysaa go'aan qaadashada qoysaska, shirkadaha, iyo suuqyada. Aragtida macaamilka iyo adag, qaab-dhismeedka suuqa laga bilaabo tartanka saxda ah ilaa keli keli-taliska, dibadda, iyo aragtida ciyaarta ayaa bixiya agabka lafaguridda xudunta u ah fahamka qiimaha, natiijooyinka suuqa, iyo saamaynta daryeelka siyaasadda.
learnUni_economics_f1_kp0: Aragtida macaamiisha: sareynta utility ee ku xiran culeyska miisaaniyada. Marka ugu fiican: MU_x/P_x = MU_y/P_y (Utility marginal per pounds). Curyaaminta danayn la'aanta + khadadka miisaaniyada → xaalada cakiran ee MRS = saamiga qiimaha.
learnUni_economics_f1_kp1: Aragtida adag: sare u qaadida faa'iidada halka MR = MC. Tartanka saxda ah: P = MR = MC ee dheellitirka muddada dheer, faa'iidada dhaqaale ee eber. Socod gaaban: xidhidh haddii P <min(AVC).
learnUni_economics_f1_kp2: Qaab dhismeedka suuqa: monopoly (MR <P, deadweight loss = welfare loss, monopoly natural oo lagu nidaamiyo qiimaha koonta ama kharashka iyo kharashka); oligopoly (Cournot - tartanka tirada, Bertrand - tartanka qiimaha → qiimaha kharashka yar).
learnUni_economics_f1_kp3: Waxyaabaha dibadda iyo alaabta dadweynaha: dibadda taban → wax-soo-saarka xad-dhaafka ah (canshuurta Piigouvian = MEC ayaa saxaysa). Dibadeed togan → hoos u dhac (kabka ayaa saxaya). Alaabaha dadweynaha: aan la saari karin + aan la xifaaltami karin → dhibatada darawalka bilaashka ah → hoos u dhaca suuqa.
learnUni_economics_f1_kp4: Aragtida ciyaarta: Nash equilibrium (ma jiro leexasho faa'iido leh oo midaysan). Dhibka maxbuuska: istaraatiijiyadda ugu weyn waxay keentaa natiijada Pareto-hoose. Ciyaaraha soo noqnoqda: iskaashiga waara iyada oo loo marayo xeeladaha kicinta haddii qiimo dhimisku uu sarreeyo. Aragtida xaraashka: qiimaha koowaad (dalab ka hooseeya qiimaha), qiimaha labaad/Vickrey (istaraatijiyad weyn oo lagu dalbanayo qiimaha dhabta ah).
learnUni_economics_f1_task: Laba diyaaradood ayaa ku tartamaya dariiq. Mid kastaa wuxuu dejin karaa qiimo sare ama mid hooseeya. Matrix lacag-bixineed (faa'iido £m): {H,H}=(10,10), {H,L}=(2,15), {L,H}=(15,2), {L,L}=(5,5). (a) Hel dheelitirnaanta Nash. (b) Pareto ma u fiicna? (c) Haddii ciyaarta lagu soo celiyo si aan xad lahayn, goorma ayaa la sii wadi karaa iskaashiga (d) Sidee ayuu sharciga tartanka u arkaa isku-duwidda qiimaha diyaaradda?
learnUni_economics_f2_desc: Econometrics ayaa bixisa agabka tirakoobka si loo tijaabiyo aragtiyaha dhaqaalaha iyo qiyaasida cilaaqaadka sababa ee xogta indha-indheynta. Dib-u-celinta OLS, doorsoomayaasha qalabka, iyo hababka xogta guddigu waa faras-shaqeedka. 'Kacaanka kalsoonida' ee casriga ahi waxa uu xooga saarayaa in si adag loo aqoonsado saamaynta sababaha iyadoo la isticmaalayo tijaabooyin dabiici ah.
learnUni_economics_f2_kp0: OLS: yaree Σεᵢ² si loo qiyaaso β̂ = (X'X)⁻¹X'y. Gauss-Markov: OLS waa buluug oo aan lahayn endogeneity, khaniisnimada, ma laha multicollinearity kaamil ah. Eex la'aan: E[β̂] = β. Joogteynta: β̂ →_p β as n → ∞.
learnUni_economics_f2_kp1: Endogeneity: E[ε|X] ≠ 0 iyadoo ay ugu wacan tahay eexda doorsoome ee laga tagay, sababta oo kale, ama qalad cabbirka → OLS eexasho iyo iswaafaq la'aan. Xalka IV: hel qalabka Z oo ku xidhan X (kuxiran: Cov(Z,X) ≠ 0) laakiin aan la socon ε (ka reeban: Cov(Z,ε) = 0).
learnUni_economics_f2_kp2: Xogta guddiga: Yᵢₜ = α + βXᵢₜ + μᵢ + εᵢₜ. Saamaynta go'an (qiyaasta dhexdeeda): waxay meesha ka saaraysaa kala duwanaanshiyaha aan la arki karin ee wakhtiga-kala-duwan ee μᵢ. Saamaynta random: aad u hufan haddii μᵢ aan xidhiidh la lahayn X (tijaabi: Hausman). Farqiga koowaad: Δyᵢₜ = βΔxᵢₜ + Δεᵢₜ.
learnUni_economics_f2_kp3: Farqiga u dhexeeya (DiD): is barbar dhig daaweynta iyo kooxaha xakamaynta ka hor/kadib isbeddelka siyaasadda. β_DiD = ( Ȳ_{daawaynta, boostada} - Ȳ_{daawaynta, ka hor}) - (Ȳ_{control, post} - Ȳ_{control, pre}). Malaha muhiimka ah: isbeddellada is barbar socda (daawaynta maqan, labada kooxoodba si isku mid ah ayay u kobci lahaayeen).
learnUni_economics_f2_kp4: Joojinta dib u noqoshada (RD): daawaynta waxaa loo qoondeeyay iyadoo ku saleysan in doorsoomaha socda uu ka gudbayo xadka. Isbarbardhigga natiijooyinka ka sarreeya iyo ka hooseeya goynta - kala soocida maxalliga ah. RD fiiqan: dhamaantood waxay ka gudbaan marinka. Fuzzy RD: kaliya qaar - u isticmaal qalab ahaan.
learnUni_economics_f2_task: Waxaad doonaysaa inaad qiyaasto saamaynta ay waxbarashada jaamacaddu ku leedahay dakhliga. OLS waxay siisay β̂ = 0.08 (8% mushaharka mushaharka sanadkiiba waxbarashada). (a) Maxay OLS u badan tahay inay eexday? (b) Soo jeedi qalab - sheeg sababta ay u qanciso xaddidaadaha khuseeya iyo ka saarida. (c) Qeex xeeladda DiD adoo isticmaalaya tijaabo dabiici ah (tusaale isbeddelka kharashka waxbarashada) oo leh isbarbar socda male. (d) Turjumaan nashqada joojinta dib-u-noqoshada agagaarka heerka u-qalmitaanka deeqaha waxbarasho.
learnUni_economics_f2_tp2: DiD iyo joojinta dib u noqoshada
learnUni_economics_f3_desc: Dhaqaalaha dhaqanku waxa uu ku daraa aragtiyo nafsi ah oo la xidhiidha falanqaynta dhaqaalaha. Dadku ma ahan kuwo caqli-gal ah - waa lumay-nacayb, eex-joog ah, saameeya qaabaynta iyo caadooyinka bulshada. Weecanadaasi waa kuwo la saadaalin karo oo habaysan, oo awood u siinaya qaabaynta siyaasad wanaagsan iyada oo loo marayo nudges iyo qaab dhismeedka doorashada.
learnUni_economics_f3_kp0: Aragtida rajada (Kahneman & Tversky, 1979): dadku waxay qiimeeyaan natiijooyinka marka loo eego barta tixraaca. Shaqada qiimaha: isku-duubnaanta faa'iidooyinka (khatarta ka-hortagga), isku-dhafan khasaaraha (khatar-raadinta), khasaare ka badan faa'iidooyinka (λ ≈ 2 - isugeynta nacaybka khasaare).
learnUni_economics_f3_kp1: Miisaanka itimaalka: dadka miisaanka xad-dhaafka ah itimaalka yaryar (wuxuu sharxayaa bakhtiyaanasiibka iyo caymiska) iyo miisaanka yar ee suurtogalka ah. Aragtida rajada ee isugeynta waxay wax ka qabataa bakhtiyaa-nasiibka isku dhafan.
learnUni_economics_f3_kp2: Eexda hadda jirta: qiimo dhimis ku-meel-gaar ah U = u₀ + βΣδᵗuₜ oo leh β <1. Waxay abuurtaa iswaafaq la'aan waqti - qorshayaasha hadda la sameeyay lama raaci doono. Wuxuu sharxayaa cunista xad-dhaafka ah, wax-u-badbaadinta, dib-u-dhigista. Sofistikyadu way ogyihiin inay eex yihiin; naives ma - saamayn siyaasadeed oo kala duwan.
learnUni_economics_f3_kp3: Aragtida Nudge (Thaler & Sunstein, 2008): qaab dhismeedka doorashada ayaa qaabeeya go'aamada iyada oo aan la xaddidin xorriyadda. Xeerarka caadiga ah (is-diiwaangelinta lacagta hawlgabka), farriimaha caadiga ah ee bulshada ('qoysaska intooda badani waxay bixiyaan waqtigeeda'), iyo fududaynta waxay yareeyaan caqabadaha habdhaqanka wanaagsan.
learnUni_economics_f3_kp4: Tijaabada dhaqaalaha iyo RCT-yada: Tijaabada shaybaadhka waxay tijaabiyaan aragtida goobaha la xakameeyey. Tijaabooyin goobeed (RCTs) waxqabadyada tijaabinta qiyaasta. Randomistas (Banerjee, Duflo - Nobel 2019) waxay wax ka beddeshay dhaqaalaha horumarka iyagoo si adag u tijaabiyay faragelin gaar ah.
learnUni_economics_f3_task: Model shakhsi hadda-eex ah (β=0.7, δ=0.95) go'aaminta in la jimicsado maanta (qiimaha c=5 agabka) faa'iidada mustaqbalka (B=10 agabka la helayo usbuuca soo socda). (a) Shakhsigu ma qorsheynayaa Axadda inuu jimicsi sameeyo Isniinta? (b) Markay Isniinta timaado, dhab ahaantii ma jimicsadaan? (c) Sharax waqti la'aanta. (d) Samee qalab ballan qaad si aad iyaga u caawiso, oo barbar dhig ganaax lacageed.
learnUni_economics_f3_tp2: Nuji aragtida iyo dhaqaalaha tijaabada ah
learnUni_economics_f4_name: Horumarinta Dhaqaalaha || Dhaqaalaha horumarku waxa uu daraaseeyaa sababaha saboolnimada iyo siyaasadaha horumariya barwaaqada. Dhaqaalaha horumarka casriga ahi waxa uu ka soo guuray aragtiyo waaweyn una dhaqaaqay cadaymo adag oo la taaban karo oo ku saabsan waxqabadyo gaar ah - iyada oo la adeegsanayo RCTs, tijaabooyin dabiici ah, iyo xog weyn. Goobtu waxay ku hawlan tahay koritaanka, machadyada, caafimaadka, waxbarashada, iyo sinnaan la'aanta.
learnUni_economics_f4_desc: Development economics studies the causes of poverty and the policies that promote prosperity. Modern development economics has moved from grand theories toward rigorous empirical evidence on specific interventions — using RCTs, natural experiments, and big data. The field engages with growth, institutions, health, education, and inequality.
learnUni_economics_f4_kp0: Qaab korriin hoose: Y = AK^α L^{1−α}. Xaalad deggan: maalgashi = qiimo-dhac; heerka kaydka iyo kobaca dadweynaha ayaa go'aamiya saamiga K/L. Soo laabashada sii yaraanaya → isku xidhka shuruudaysan. Hadhaaga A (wadarta wax-soo-saarka wax soo saarka) ayaa dhaqaajiya kobaca muddada-dheer - laakiin waa ka baxsan Solow.
learnUni_economics_f4_kp1: Kobaca endogenous (Romer 1990): aqoonta K̃ waxay gashaa wax soo saarka iyada oo aan la dhimin soo celinta. Qaybta R&D waxay soo saartaa fikrado cusub. Daadinta aqoonta (aan ahayn xafiiltanka, qayb ka mid ah laga saari karo) → hoos u dhigista hal-abuurka iyada oo aan la ilaalin IP-ga ama kaalmada R&D.
learnUni_economics_f4_kp2: Machadyada iyo kobaca (Acemoglu & Robinson): hay’ado loo dhan yahay (xuquuqda hantida, ku dhaqanka sharciga, suuqyada tartanka) waxay kobciyaan kobaca. Hay'adaha soo jiidashada leh (dhaxalka gumeysiga - dhimashada dadka deggan ee qaabeeya hay'adaha gumeysiga) waxay dabin ku dhigaan waddamada saboolnimada. Arrimaha taariikhda - adkaysi.
learnUni_economics_f4_kp3: RCTs ee horumarinta: Duflo & Banerjee (Abdul Latif Jameel Poverty Action Lab, J-PAL) waxay isticmaalaan RCT-yada si ay u qiimeeyaan waxqabadyada gaarka ah - gooryaanka, microcredit, xawilaadaha lacageed ee shuruudda ah, bacriminta bacriminta. Natiijooyinka inta badan la yaab leh - aragti aan marin habaabin xogta.
learnUni_economics_f4_kp4: Dabinnada saboolnimada iyo CCT-yada: dabinada faqriga ayaa ka dhasha kharashyada joogtada ah ee maalgashiga (waxbarashada, caafimaadka, bacriminta) ee qoysaska dakhligoodu yar yahay aanay awoodin, taas oo ka hortagaysa faa'iidooyinka wax soo saarka. Xawaalad lacageed oo shuruudaysan (Mexico's Oportunidades, Bolsa Família ee Brazil) waxay bixisaa dakhli shuruud ku xidhan imaanshaha dugsiga iyo daryeelka caafimaadka - jebinta dabinka iyadoo la qiyaasayo saamaynta muddada-dheer.
learnUni_economics_f4_task: Is barbar dhig South Korea iyo Nigeria: labaduba waxay lahaayeen heerar dakhli oo isku mid ah (~$300 GDP/capita) 1960. 2023 South Korea waxay haysataa ~$33,000, Nigeria ~$2,100. Isticmaalka (a) Qaabka Solow - maxay kaydinta iyo kala duwanaanshaha raasamaal ee bini'aadamka sharaxaya kala duwanaanshaha? (b) Qaabka Romer - sidee bay awoodda hal-abuurnimadu muhiim ugu tahay? (c) Acemoglu & Robinson - waxay isbarbardhigaan taariikhda gumeysiga iyo dariiqooyinka hay'adaha. Ku soo gunaanad hal talobixin siyaasad ku salaysan caddaynta Nigeria, adoo daliishanaya RCT khuseeya.
learnUni_law_f0_desc: Sharciga dastuuriga ah ayaa qeexaya xiriirka ka dhaxeeya dowladda iyo shaqsiyaadka, iyo laamaha dowladda. Sharciga dawliga ah ayaa xukuma ku-dhaqanka awoodda dawladda. Fahamka mabaadi'da dastuuriga ah - kala-soocidda awoodaha, ku dhaqanka sharciga, xuquuqda aasaasiga ah - waxay aasaas u tahay dhammaan daraasadda sharciga iyo dhalashada dimuqraadiga ah.
learnUni_law_f0_kp0: Dastuurka: waa la habayn karaa (Maraykanka, Jarmalka, Faransiiska - hal dukumeenti qoran) ama aan la aqoonsanayn (UK - qaanuunka sharciga, sharciga guud, iyo heshiisyada). Heerarchy of standards: Xeerarka dastuuriga ah ayaa ka sarreeya sharciga caadiga ah.
learnUni_law_f0_kp1: Kala saarida awoodaha (Montesquieu): sharci-dejinta (Baarlamaanka/Congress), fulinta (dawlad/madaxweyne), garsoor (maxkammad). Jeegaga iyo isku dheelitirka waxay ka hortagaan xooga saarida. Dib-u-eegis Garsoor: Maxkamaduhu waxay ku joojin karaan sharciyo aan waafaqsanayn dastuurka.
learnUni_law_f0_kp2: Xukunka sharciga (Dicey): ma jiro qof sharciga ka sarreeya; ciqaabta kaliya ee jebinta sharciga cad; si siman loo galo maxkamadaha. Ficil ahaan: madax-bannaanida garsoorka, mamnuucidda xabsiyada sharci-darrada ah (habeas corpus), saami-qaybsiga tallaabo dawladeed.
learnUni_law_f0_kp3: Xuquuqda aasaasiga ah: Heshiiska Yurub ee Xuquuqda Aadanaha (Qodobada 2-14: Xuquuqda nolosha, mamnuucida jirdilka, maxkamadaynta cadaalad ah, sirnimada, xoriyada hadalka, mamnuucida takoorka). Horizontal vs. toosan u adeegsiga xuquuqda.
