learnUni_law_f0_kp4: Nidaamka dastuuriga ah ee EU: sarraynta sharciga EU (Costa v. ENEL, 1964), saameyn toos ah (Van Gend en Loos, 1963), mabda'a saamiga, hoosaadka. Kaddib-Brexit: UK hadda kuma hoos jirto sharciga Midowga Yurub.
learnUni_law_f0_task: In la falanqeeyo mawqifka dastuuriga ah ee garsoorka madax-banaan ee dimoqraadiyadda. Isticmaalka tusaalooyin laga soo qaatay saddex hab oo sharci oo kala duwan (UK, USA, Germany), is barbar dhig: sida madaxbannaanida garsoorka loo ilaaliyo, baaxadda dib-u-eegista sharciga, iyo hal kiis oo maxkamaduhu ay ku dhufteen ama xaddideen tallaabada fulinta. Qiimee in dib u eegista garsoorku ay waafaqsan tahay sharcinimada dimuqraadiga ah.
learnUni_law_f0_tp1: Ku dhaqanka sharciga iyo xuquuqda aasaasiga ah
learnUni_law_f1_desc: Sharciga heshiisku wuxuu maamulaa heshiisyada si sharci ah loo fulinayo. Waxay go'aamisaa marka heshiiska la samaynayo, waxa dhinacyada ay ku qasban yihiin inay sameeyaan, waxa dhacaya marka waajibaadka la gudan waayo (jebinta), iyo waxa la heli karo. Sharciga qandaraasku wuxuu taageeraa ganacsiga, shaqada, iyo inta badan xiriirka sharciga ah ee ka dhexeeya dhinacyada gaarka ah.
learnUni_law_f1_kp0: Qodobbada heshiis ansax ah: soo jeedin (soo jeedin qeexan oo lagu xirayo aqbalaadda), aqbalaadda (aan leexleexad lahayn, oo u dhiganta dalabka - qaanuunka 'sawirka muraayadda'), tixgelin (wax qiimo leh oo la beddelay - tixgalin hore maaha tixgalin), ujeedo ah in la abuuro xiriir sharci ah.
learnUni_law_f1_kp1: Shuruudaha qandaraaska: shuruudaha qeexan (si cad loo sheegay), ereyo maldahan (oo lagu macneeyay qaanuun - Sharciga Iibka Alaabta; ama maxkamadaha - imtixaanka waxtarka ganacsiga). Shuruudaha (jebintu waxay ogolaataa joojinta + waxyeelada), dammaanad qaadyada (jebinta waxay ogolaataa waxyeelada kaliya), shuruudaha aan la magacaabin (daawadu waxay kuxirantahay cawaaqibka jebinta).
learnUni_law_f1_kp2: Waxyeellooyinka soo jiidashada leh: been-abuur (hadal been ah oo xaqiiqda ah oo keenaya qandaraas → dib-u-celin + waxyeelo), cadaadis (cadaadiska aan sharciga ahayn → madhan), saameyn aan habboonayn (faa'iido aan caddaalad ahayn oo la qaato → madhan), qalad (khalad aasaasi ah oo wadaag ah / mid-mid ah → faaruq ah ama lama huraan ah).
learnUni_law_f1_kp3: Jebinta iyo daawaynta: jebinta odoroska ah (diidmada in la fuliyo kahor waxqabadka → qolo aan waxba galabsan ayaa laga yaabaa inay aqbalaan oo dacweeyaan isla markiiba). Daawooyinka: waxyeelada (primary - waxay dhigtaa qolo aan waxba galabsan sida haddii qandaraas la sameeyay), waxqabad gaar ah (sinnaan - waxay ku qasbeysaa waxqabadka, la siiyay halka waxyeelladu aysan ku filneyn), amar, quantum meruit.
learnUni_law_f1_kp4: Qodobbada ka-dhaafitaanka: waa in lagu daraa ( ogeysiis, saxiix, ama koorsada macaamilka); si adag loo fasiray (contra proferentem - madmadow ka dhanka ah qolo ku tiirsan qodobka); ku xiran UCTA 1977 iyo CRA 2015 (Qodobo aan macquul ahayn oo aan la fulin karin qandaraasyada macaamiisha).
learnUni_law_f1_task: Qofka wax dhisaya wuxuu soo xiganayaa £50,000 si uu guri u cusboonaysiiyo. Mulkiilaha guriga wuu aqbalay. Inta lagu jiro shaqada, dhisuhu wuxuu ogaanayaa dhibaatooyin dhismeed oo aan la filayn wuxuuna dalbanayaa £70,000 dheeraad ah. Mulkiilaha gurigu wuxuu saxeexaa heshiis cusub cadaadis. Marka la dhammeeyo, mulkiilaha gurigu wuxuu diidaa inuu bixiyo £20,000 oo dheeraad ah. Talo: (a) Heshiiskii asalka ahaa ma jiraa? (b) Kala duwanaanshiyaha ma la dhaqan gelin karaa? (c) Maxaa dawooyin ah oo uu leeyahay wax-dhisuhu? (d) Maxaa difaac ah oo laga yaabaa in mulkiilaha gurigu kor u qaado?
learnUni_law_f2_desc: Sharciga ciqaabtu waxa uu qeexayaa hab-dhaqanka ay dawladu mamnuucday waxana uu dhigayaa ciqaabta dambiilayaasha. Waxay ka ilaalisaa shakhsiyaadka iyo bulshada waxyeellada, waxay joojisaa xumaanta, waxayna muujisaa cambaarayn wadajir ah. Fahamka sharciga dembiilaha waxa uu u baahan yahay ku guulaysiga actus reus, mens rea, difaacyada, iyo mabaadi'da masuuliyada dembiga.
learnUni_law_f2_kp0: Qaybaha dembiga: actus reus (fal dembiilaha - waxaa ka mid ah fal ikhtiyaari ah, ka tagid meesha waajibaadku jiro, natiijada, duruufaha) iyo ragga rea ​​(maskaxda dembiilaha - ujeedo, taxadar la'aan, ama dayacaad). Mabda'a isku dhaca: AR iyo MR waa in ay waqti ku beegaan.
learnUni_law_f2_kp1: Heerarka nimanku waxay dib u eegaan: ujeeddo toos ah (ujeedadu waa inay keento natiijo), ujeedo qarsoon (natiijadu waa natiijo gaar ah, oo la saadaaliyay sida - R v Woolin), taxadar la'aan shakhsi ahaaneed (Cunningham - khatarta miyir-qabka ah), dayacaad ujeedo ah (ka leexashada guud ee heerka qof macquul ah).
learnUni_law_f2_kp2: Dil: dil (dil sharci darro ah + ujeedo dil ama sabab GBH — xukun daa’im oo khasab ah); gowrac ikhtiyaari ah (dilku hoos u dhacay xakamaynta ama masuuliyadda oo yaraaday); dil aan ikhtiyaari ahayn (fal sharci darro ah ama dayacaad weyn - dil ma jiro MR).
learnUni_law_f2_kp3: Difaaca: is-difaaca (xoog u dhigma si looga hortago hanjabaad sharci-darro ah - macquul ah laakiin aan ahayn xukun qumman); oggolaanshaha (xaddidaadda waxa lagu oggolaan karo - R v Brown); sarkhaansanaan (sakhraan ikhtiyaari ah oo aan lahayn difaac ujeedo gaar ah, difaac qayb ahaan ujeedo aasaasiga ah); waalli (xeerarka M'Naghten - cilladda sababta oo ka timaadda cudurka maskaxda → dambiile ma aha sabab la'aan).
learnUni_law_f2_kp4: Dembiyada iyo ka-qaybgalka xad-dhaafka ah: isku day (in ka badan kaliya fal diyaarin ah oo ujeedo leh); shirqool (heshiiska dembiga); dhiirigelin/caawin (Xeerka Dambiyada Daran ee 2007). Shirkad wadajir ah: ka qaybqaatayaasha hawlaha kooxda ayaa mas'uul ka ah haddii ay saadaaliyaan suurtogalnimada maamulaha dugsigu inuu ku galo dembiga loo baahan yahay MR.
learnUni_law_f2_task: D iyo V waa ay isku dhaceen. D feero V isagoo damacsan inuu keeno dhaawac halis ah. V, aan la aqoon D, ayaa leh xaalad dhafoor dhif ah ('eggshell skull'). V wuu dhimanayaa La talinta D ee ku saabsan masuuliyadda dembiyeed: (a) Waa maxay falcelinta dilku? (b) D ma u haystaa MR dil? (c) Xeerka dhakada khafiifka ah ma khuseeyaa sharciga dembiyada? (d) Ma jiraan wax difaac ah oo qayb ah? Maxaa ka dhalan kara?
learnUni_law_f3_name: Sharciga Caalamiga ah || Sharciga caalamiga ah ayaa xukuma xiriirka ka dhexeeya dowladaha iyo, sii kordhaya, shakhsiyaadka iyo ururada caalamiga ah. Si ka duwan sharciga gudaha, waxa ka maqan awood fulineed dhexe - u hoggaansanaantu waxay ku xidhan tahay oggolaanshaha, is-dhaafsiga, iyo cadaadiska caalamiga ah. Sharciga caalamiga ah ee dadweynaha wuxuu daboolaa heshiisyada, adeegsiga xoogga, madaxbannaanida, iyo xuquuqda aadanaha.
learnUni_law_f3_desc: Ilaha sharciga caalamiga ah (Qod. 38 Xeerka ICJ): heshiisyada (binding on xisbiyada - pacta sunt servanda - Vienna Convention 1969), sharciga caalamiga ah (dhaqanka dawladeed oo joogto ah + opinionio juris - ku xidhan dhammaan dawladaha), mabaadi'da guud ee sharciga, iyo go'aamada garsoorka/qoraal cilmiyeed (ilo hoose).
learnUni_law_f3_kp0: Madaxbanaanida dawladeed: mabda'a ah in dawladuhu awood sare ku leeyihiin dhulkooda ayna u siman yihiin sharciga caalamiga ah. Faragelin la'aan: Waa waajib in aan la faragelin arrimaha gudaha ee dawladaha kale - oo ay wiiqday caqiidada Mas'uuliyadda Ilaalinta (R2P).
learnUni_law_f3_kp1: Isticmaalka xoog: Qodobka 2(4) Axdiga Qaramada Midoobay waxa uu mamnuucayaa hanjabaada ama adeegsiga awood ka dhan ah dowlad kasta. Waxa ka reebban: is-difaacida (Qodobka 51 - waa in uu ahaadaa mid lagama maarmaan ah oo loo siman yahay, oo loo gudbiyo Golaha Ammaanka) iyo oggolaanshaha Golaha Ammaanka (Cutubka VII - khatarta nabadda, jebinta nabadda, fal gardaro ah).
learnUni_law_f3_kp2: Sharciga dembiyada caalamiga ah: Maxkamadaha Nuremberg waxay dejiyeen mas'uuliyadda dembiyada shakhsi ahaaneed ee hoos yimaada sharciga caalamiga ah. Rome Statute (2002) waxay abuurtay ICC - xukunka xasuuqa, dambiyada ka dhanka ah aadanaha, dembiyada dagaalka, iyo gardarada. 'Raacitaanka amarada' maaha difaac dhammaystiran.
learnUni_law_f3_kp3: Sharciga badaha (UNCLOS 1982): dhul-badeed (12 mayl-badeed - madaxbannaani buuxda), aagga dhaqaale ee gaarka ah (200 nm - xuquuqaha kheyraadka ee madaxbannaan), badaha sare (oo ka baxsan xukunka qaranka - xorriyadda navigation). Xallinta khilaafaadka: Maxkamadda Caalamiga ah ee Sharciga Badaha (ITLOS).
learnUni_law_f3_kp4: Gobolka A ayaa ku soo duulay Gobolka B, isagoo sheeganaya is-difaac ka dib weerar dhanka internetka ah oo loo aaneeyay adeegyada sirdoonka B. Falanqaynta: (a) Weerarka internetku ma ka dhigan yahay weerar hubaysan marka loo eego qodobka 51aad? (b) Jawaabta A ma tahay mid lama huraan ah oo loo siman yahay? (c) Doorkee ayay ka ciyaari karaan Golaha Ammaanka ee Qaramada Midoobay? (d) Madaxda Dawlad Goboleedka A ma wajihi karaan dacwad ICC? Maxay tahay in la caddeeyo? Soo qaado qodobbada heshiisyada khuseeya iyo kiisaska caalamiga ah.
learnUni_law_f3_tp1: Xeerarka dambiyada caalamiga ah iyo UNCLOS
learnUni_law_f4_name: Hababka sharcigu waa xirfadaha sababaynta sharciga: akhrinta kiisaska, tarjumaadda qawaaniinta, dhisidda doodaha, iyo qorista si sharci ah. Xeer-beegtida (aragti sharci/falsafada sharciga) waxay baartaa dabeecadda, ilaha, iyo ujeedooyinka sharciga laftiisa - weydiinaya in sharciga iyo akhlaaqdu ay kala duwan yihiin, maxaa sharciga ka dhigaya mid sharci ah, iyo sida garsoorayaashu ay u go'aaminayaan kiisaska adag.
learnUni_law_f4_desc: Sababaynta sharciga kiiska: ratio decisionndi (mabda'a sharciga ah ee kiis lagu go'aamiyo - ku xidhida maxkamadaha hoose ee hoos yimaada go'aanka stare), obiter dicta (hadalo dhacdo - qancin kaliya). Kala soocida (xaddidaynta horudhac), xad-gudbid (maxkamad sare waxay ka soo horjeedaa kiis hore), iyo bixitaan (Maxkamadda Sare waxay ka baxaysaa horteedkeedii).
learnUni_law_f4_kp0: Tafsiir qaanuuneed: qaanuun suugaaneed (ku dhaqmo macnaha caadiga ah ee ereyada), xeer dahab ah (iska ilaali natiijooyinka aan macquul ahayn), xukunka xumaanta (maxay barlamaanku doonayeen inay ku daweeyaan - Kiiskii Heydon). Habka ujeeddooyinka casriga ah (maxay ahayd ujeeddada baarlamaanka?). ECHR s.3 HRA 1998: sharciga waa in loo akhriyaa si waafaqsan xuquuqaha Axdiga ilaa inta suurtogalka ah.
learnUni_law_f4_kp1: positivism Legal (Austin, Hart): sharcigu waa xaqiiqo bulsheed - xeerar sax ah oo ay abuureen habab la aqoonsan yahay, iyada oo aan loo eegin nuxurka akhlaaqda. Hart's 'xukunka aqoonsiga' ayaa tilmaamaya sharci ansax ah. Cilmiga kala-soocidda sharciga/akhlaaqda.
learnUni_law_f4_kp2: Aragtida sharciga dabiiciga ah: sharcigu waa inuu waafaqsan yahay mabaadi'da akhlaaqda - sharciga aan caddaaladda ahayn maaha sharci run ah (lex iniusta nonest lex - Aquinas, Fuller's inner morality of law). Sharciyada Nazi ayaa lagu dabaqay maxkamadaha - doodii dagaalka ka dib ee ku saabsan in positivism sharci ay awood u siisay shar.
learnUni_law_f4_kp3: Ronald Dworkin's 'Sharciga sida daacadnimada': sharciga kuma koobna xeerar kaliya laakiin mabaadi'da (xaqa loo siman yahay dareenka iyo ixtiraamka). Garsoorayaashu waa inay helaan hal 'jawaab sax ah' oo ku habboon go'aannadii hore iyo anshaxa siyaasadeed. Kiisaska adag: mabaadi'da, ma aha oo kaliya xeerar, hagaya go'aannada. Dhaleecaynta positivism ee Hart.
learnUni_law_f4_kp4: Ronald Dworkin's 'law as integrity': law contains not just rules but principles (right to equal concern and respect). Judges must find the single 'right answer' that best fits past decisions and political morality. Hard cases: principles, not just rules, guide decisions. Critique of Hart's positivism.
learnUni_law_f4_task: Xeer ayaa odhanaya 'ma jiro baabuur ku jira beerta'. La tali in mid kasta oo kuwan ka mid ahi uu mamnuuc yahay: (a) Baaskiil, (b) gaadhiga carruurta ee ay carruurtu ku ciyaaraan, (c) ambalaas ka jawaabaysa xaalad degdeg ah, (d) taangiga xusuusta dagaalka. Dalbo dhammaan saddexda xeer-dhaqameed ee tarjumaada qaanuunka. Kadib, adoo isticmaalaya positivism Hart iyo sharciga Dworkin sida daacadnimada, sharax sida uu aragti kastaa u wajihi doono 'penumbra of uncertainty' ee qaanuunka.
learnUni_law_f4_tp2: Wanaagga sharciga iyo sharciga dabiiciga ah
learnUni_medicine_f0_desc: Anatomy waa daraasadda qaab-dhismeedka jidhka bini'aadamka - xubnihiisa, unugyadiisa, iyo nidaamyada. Aqoonta buuxda ee anatomy waa aasaaska aan la bedeli karin ee daawada kiliinikada: ma baari kartid ama ma daaweyn kartid waxa aadan arki karin. Anatomy caafimaad waxa uu isku daraa anatomi-ga guud, histology, embryoloji, iyo anatomi shucaaca.
learnUni_medicine_f0_kp0: Eray bixinta anatomical: diyaaradaha (sagittal, coronal, transverse), jihooyin (dhexdhexaad / lateral, sare / hoose, hore / dambe, u dhow / fogaan), gobollada, iyo dhaqdhaqaaqa (rogrogmi / fidsan, afduub / kororsi, wareeg, pronation / supination).
learnUni_medicine_f0_kp1: Nidaamka wadnaha iyo xididdada anatomy: wadnuhu wuxuu ku jiraa mediastinum. Dhinaca midig (dhiigga xididka habaysan) → wareegga sambabada. Dhinaca bidix (oxygenated) → wareegga nidaamka. Halbowlayaasha halbowlayaasha: bidix ee hore ee soo degaya (LAD), wareegga bidix (LCx), halbowlaha wadnaha midig (RCA). LAD infarct = 'Carmal sameeye'.
learnUni_medicine_f0_kp2: Nidaamka murqaha: 206 lafo oo ku jira qalfoofka qaangaarka. Kala-goysyada: fibroes (tolliin), cartilaginous (symphysis pubis), synovial (kala-goysyada ugu dhaq-dhaqaaqa badan - sinta, jilibka, garabka). plexus Brachial (C5-T1) waxay xakameysaa addinka sare - nabarrada xididada dareemayaasha waxay soo saaraan qaabab gaar ah.
learnUni_medicine_f0_kp3: Caloosha caloosha: peritoneum (xariijimaha parietal gidaarka caloosha, visceral xubnaha daboolaya). Xubnaha Retroperitoneal (SADPUCKER): qanjidhada suprarenal, aorta, duodenum (2-4aad), xameetida, kaadi mareenka, mindhicirka (kor u kaca / soo degaya), kelyaha, hunguriga, malawadka.
learnUni_medicine_f0_kp4: Neuroanatomy: 12 neerfaha cranial (I Olfactory, II Optic, III Oculomotor, IV Trochlear, V Trigeminal, VI Abducens, VII Facial, VIII Vestibulocochlear, IX Glossopharyngeal, X Vagus, XI Accessory, XII Hypoglossal). Xudunta laf dhabarta waxay ku dhammaataa L1-L2 - daloolinta lumbar ee L3-L4.
learnUni_medicine_f0_task: Bukaanku wuxuu soo bandhigaa daciifnimo cududdooda midig, luminta dareenka bini'aadamka ee farta yar iyo cudud dhexdhexaad ah, iyo luminta murqaha gacmaha. Degmeey nabarka si anatomical ah: (a) dareemehee ayaa saameeya? (b) Aaway nabarkii - ee xuubka brachial ama neerfaha magacaaban? (c) Maxay tahay sababta laga yaabo? (d) Qaab dhismeedkee ayaa la cufan? Ku dar jaantus calaamadeysan ee plexus-ka khuseeya.
learnUni_medicine_f1_desc: Cilmi-nafsiyeedka wuxuu sharxayaa sida nidaamyada jirku u shaqeeyaan - sida wadnuhu u shubo dhiigga, sida kelyuhu u shaandheeyaan oo u habeeyaan electrolytes, sida sambabku u beddelaan gaasaska, iyo sida hormoonnada isku xidhka xubnaha fog. Waxay ku xidhaa anatomi (qaab-dhismeedka) iyo daawaynta bukaan-socodka (shaqo la'aan). Physiology waa saldhigga makaaniga ee cudurka.
learnUni_medicine_f1_kp0: Cilmi-nafsiga wadnaha: Farnk-Starling habka - mugga istaroogga wuxuu kordhiyaa korodhka mugga dhammaadka-diastolic (horay) - wadnahu wuu sii fidayaa → xoog weyn. Soo saarista wadnaha = garaaca wadnaha × mugga istaroogga. Cadaadiska halbowlaha dhexdhexaadka ah = wax soo saarka wadnaha × wadarta caabbinta dhinaceeda.
learnUni_medicine_f1_kp1: Cilmi-nafsiga neefsiga: mugga qulqulka (500 mL ee nasashada), awoodda muhiimka ah, meel dhintay (~ 150 mL - hawo-mareennada aan ku lug lahayn beddelka gaaska). Hawo-qaadid (V/Q) oo isbarbar dhigaya: V/Q habboon = 1. Isku-dheelli-tir la'aantu waxay sababtaa hypoxaemia (O₂ hoose). Hypercapnia (CO₂ sare) waa kicinta neefsashada aasaasiga ah.
learnUni_medicine_f1_kp2: Fiisigiska kelyaha: heerka sifaynta glomerular (GFR caadi ~ 100 mL/min). Dib u nuugista tubbada (Na⁺, glucose, amino acids) iyo dheecaanka (H⁺, daawooyinka). Nidaamka Renin-Angiotensin-Aldosterone (RAAS): cadaadiska dhiigga oo hooseeya → renin → Ang II → aldosterone → Na⁺ iyo haynta biyaha → BP ayaa kor u kacda.
learnUni_medicine_f1_kp3: Cilmi-nafsiga Endocrine: insulin (β-unugyada, gulukooska qaadashada muruqa / dufanka, glycogen synthesis, waxay joojisaa gluconeogenesis), glucagon (α-unugyada, waxay ka soo horjeedaa insulin - glycogenolysis, gluconeogenesis), cortisol (axis HPA - jawaab celinta cadaadiska, anti-bararka, waxay kordhisaa gulukooska dhiigga), hormoonnada tayroodh (heerka dheef-shiid kiimikaadka, koritaanka).
learnUni_medicine_f1_kp4: Neurophysiology: awoodaha ficilka, isgoysyada neuromuscular (acetylcholine → nicotinic reseptor → suurtagalnimada saxan-dhamaadka → suurtagalnimada ficilka → murqaha murqaha iyada oo loo marayo habka fiilooyinka silbashada). Nidaamka neerfaha ee madaxbannaan: naxariista (dagaalka / duulista - noradrenaline) vs. parasympathetic (nasasho / dheefshiidka - acetylcholine).
learnUni_medicine_f1_task: Bukaan ayaa la helay isagoo leh BP 80/50, garaaca wadnaha 120, iyo neefsashada 28 neefs/daqiiqo. Gaaska dhiigu wuxuu muujinayaa pH 7.25, pCO₂ 30 mmHg, HCO₃⁻ 13 mEq/L. Falanqaynta: (a) Waa maxay nooca qaska aashitada-saldhiga kani? (b) Ma jirtaa magdhow xagga neefsashada ah? (c) Xisaabi farqiga anion (Na=138, Cl=100, HCO₃=13). (d) Waa maxay hababka jireed (RAAS, neefsashada, kelyaha) ee shaqayn doona saacadaha ilaa saacadaha soo socda si loo saxo tan?
learnUni_medicine_f2_desc: Pathology waa daraasad cilmiyeed ee cudurka - sababaha (aetiology), hababka (pathogenesis), isbeddellada qaabdhismeedka (morphology), iyo cawaaqib functional. Cilmi-nafsiga guud wuxuu baara hababka caadiga ah ee cudurro badan: bararka, neoplasms, thrombosis, iyo xumaanshaha. Cilmi-nafsiyeedka habaysan ayaa kuwan khuseeya xubnaha iyo cudurrada gaarka ah.
learnUni_medicine_f2_kp0: Caabuqa: ba'an (daqiiqado-maalmo - isbeddellada xididdada dhiigga, qulqulka neutrophil, dhexdhexaadinta histamine, prostaglandins, kinins, dhammaystirka). Chronic (bilo-sano-makrophages, lymphocytes, fibroblasts - granuloma formation in TB, Crohn's, sarcoidosis).
learnUni_medicine_f2_kp1: Neoplasia: benign (si fiican u kala duwanaansho, la isku duubay, aan dhicin) vs. malignant (si liidata loo kala soocay, invasive, metastasissing). Astaamaha kansarka (Hanahan & Weinberg): kororka joogtada ah, ka ilaalinta xakamaynta koritaanka, iska caabinta dhimashada unugyada, dhimashada soo noqnoqda, angiogenesis, duulaanka / metastasis, xasillooni la'aanta genome, caabuqa kor u qaada burada.
learnUni_medicine_f2_kp2: Thrombosis: Virchow's triad - dhaawaca endothelial (ka ugu muhiimsan), socodka dhiigga aan caadiga ahayn (qalalan ama stasis), iyo hypercoagulability. Dhiig-xinjirow halbowle ah:- taajir ah, caddaan. Xididdada xididdada dhiigga (DVT): casaan (RBC-fibrin). Dhiig-baxa sambabada: jajabka DVT wuxuu hoy u yahay wareegga sambabada.
learnUni_medicine_f2_kp3: Dhaawaca unugyada iyo dhimashada: ischaemia (Dhaawaca ATP → Na⁺/K⁺ bamka bamka → bararka unugyada → necrosis). Apoptosis (dhimashada unugyada la qorsheeyay - caspase cascade, uumiga nukliyeerka, jirrooyinka apoptotic - ma jiro caabuq). Necrosis (dassive, dilaac unugyada → bararka). Noocyada: xinjirowga dhiigga, liquefactive (maskaxda), kiis (TB), gangrenous.
learnUni_medicine_f2_kp4: Atherosclerosis: dufanku kaxeeyo, cudur bararka joogtada ah ee darbiyada halbowlaha ah. Unugyada xumbo (macrophages engulf oxidised LDL) → xariijimaha dufanka leh → dhogorta fibroeska ah → lakabyo adag ( boogo, dhiigbax, calcification, thrombosis). Waxyaabaha khatarta ah: hypertension, hyperlipidemia, sigaar cabbista, sonkorowga, taariikhda qoyska.
learnUni_medicine_f2_task: Sigaar cabba 65 jir ah oo qaba nooca 2-aad ee xanuunka macaanka waxa uu soo bandhigaa xanuunka laabta oo si lama filaan ah ugu bilaabmay gacanta bidix, diiforesis, iyo sare u qaadista ST ee ECG. Troponin I aad buu u sarreeyaa. Sharax: (a) habka bayoolajiga ee keena MI ba'an iyadoo la adeegsanayo Virchow's triad iyo atherosclerosis, (b) waxa ku dhaca wadnaha 30 daqiiqo, 6 saacadood, iyo 24 saacadood ee ischaemia ka dib, (c) nooca necrosis ee ka dhasha, iyo (d) bararka iyo bogsashada isku xigxiga toddobaadyada soo socda.
learnUni_medicine_f3_desc: Pharmacology waxay barataa sida ay dawooyinku ula falgalaan hababka noolaha. Pharmacokinetics (waxa jidhku ku sameeyo dawada) iyo farmacodynamics (waxa ay daawadu jidhka ku samayso) ayaa hoosta ka xariiqaysa qoritaan macquul ah. Dawo kastaa waxay leedahay soo-qabeyaal, farsamayn, iyo astaan ​​saamayn xun oo ay tahay in lagu yaqaan ku-dhaqanka caafimaad ee badbaadsan.
learnUni_medicine_f3_kp0: Pharmacokinetics - ADME: Nuugista (bioavailability F = jajab gaarey wareegga nidaamka), Qaybinta (mugga qaybinta Vd = dose / [plasma], aadka u borotiinka ku xidhan daawooyinka leeyihiin Vd hoose), Metabolism (inta badan beeryarada CYP450 enzymes - saamaynta koowaad-pass), Ciribtirka (kelyaha nus-nolosha t₁/. CL3)
learnUni_medicine_f3_kp1: Pharmacodynamics: dawooyinku waxay ku shaqeeyaan reseptors (GPCRs, channels ion, reseptors nuclear, enzyme-linked). Agonist (wuxuu kiciyaa receptor), antagonist (blocks - tartan ama aan tartan lahayn). EC50: fiirsashada oo soo saarta 50% saamaynta ugu badan. Waxtarka (saamaynta ugu badan) vs. awoodda (EC50).
learnUni_medicine_f3_kp2: Isdhexgalka daawada qaataha: kor u qaadida soo dhaweynta (ka dib antagonism dabadheeraad ah - wuxuu sharxayaa ifafaale dib u soo noqoshada), hoos u dhigista (ka dib xanuunka daba-dheeraada - dulqaadka). Receptors spare. Qayb ka mid ah agonistayaasha: waxtarka hoose ee xitaa 100% deganaanshaha reseptor - waxay u dhaqmi karaan sidii ka soo horjeeda joogitaanka agonist buuxa.
learnUni_medicine_f3_kp3: Qaybaha daroogada ee muhiimka ah: beta-blockers (antagonists tartanka at β₁/₂-adrenoceptors - waxay yareeyaan garaaca wadnaha iyo BP), ACE inhibitors (xitaa angiotensin beddelidda enzyme → ka yar Ang II → vasodilation + ka yar aldosterone → hoos u dhaca BP), statins (HMG-CoA hoos u dhigista kolesteroolka → hoos u dhigista kolestaroolka → reseptors → hoose ee plasma LDL).
learnUni_medicine_f3_kp4: Dareen-celinta daroogada xun (ADR): Nooca A (kordhinta - la saadaalin karo, qiyaasta-ku-tiirsanaanta, tusaale ahaan dhiigbaxa warfarin), Nooca B (la yaab leh - aan la saadaalin karin, difaac dhexdhexaad ah, tusaale ahaan anaphylaxis oo leh penicillin), Nooca C (isticmaalka daba-dheeraada), Nooca D (daahday - kansarka, teratogenesis), Nooca E (dhamaadka isticmaalka - ka-noqoshada). Isdhexgalka daroogada: kiciniyeyaasha CYP (rifampicin waxay yareysaa saameynta ka hortagga uurka), CYP inhibitors (erythromycin waxay kordhisaa heerarka simvastatin → myopathy).
learnUni_medicine_f3_task: Bukaanka qaba fibrillada atrial waxaa lagu bilaabay warfarin (bartilmaameedka INR 2-3) ka dibna waxaa ku dhaca caabuq neef-mareenka oo u baahan erythromycin. Laba toddobaad ka dib INR = 5.8 oo leh dhiig-bax cirid ah. Sharax: (a) Habka warfarin iyo sababta INR loola socdo, (b) dhexgalka farmashiyaha ee erythromycin, (c) daawaynta loo baahan yahay hadda, (d) taxaddar qorista mustaqbalka waa in la sameeyaa. Ku dar fasalka daroogada, reseptor/enzyme, iyo cabbiro gaar ah oo kinetic ah.
learnUni_medicine_f3_tp2: Noocyada daroogada muhiimka ah iyo falcelinta xun
learnUni_medicine_f4_desc: Daawooyinka kiliinikada waxay isku daraan anatomy, physiology, pathology, iyo pharmacology daryeelka bukaanka. Taariikhda-qaadashada iyo baaritaanka jireed waa xirfadaha asaasiga ah ee keena ogaanshaha kala duwan. Xirfad-yaqaannimada, anshaxa caafimaadka, iyo daawada caddaynta ku salaysan ayaa ah aasaaska dhaqanka caafimaad ee wanaagsan.
learnUni_medicine_f4_kp0: Taariikhda qaadashada: cabashada soo jeedinta (PC), taariikhda soo jeedinta cabashada (HPC - SOCRATES: goobta, bilawga, dabeecadda, shucaaca, ururada, koorsada wakhtiga, arrimaha ka sii daraysa/yaraynta, darnaanta), taariikh caafimaad ee hore (PMH), taariikhda daroogada (DHx), taariikhda qoyska (FHx), taariikhda bulshada (SHx - sigaarka, khamriga, shaqada, xiriirka), dib u eegista nidaamka.
learnUni_medicine_f4_kp1: Baaritaanka bukaan-socodka: kormeerka guud → calaamadaha muhiimka ah (BP, HR, RR, SpO₂, heerkulka, GCS) → baaritaan nidaam-gaar ah. Habka ABCDE ee qiimaynta degdega ah: Jidka hawada, Neefsashada, wareegga, Naafanimada (neuro), Soo-gaadhista. Dhibcaha NEWS2 ee bukaannada sii xumaanaya.
learnUni_medicine_f4_kp2: Anshaxa caafimaadka (afar mabda'a - Beauchamp & Childress): madax-bannaani (ixtiraamka xaqa bukaanka si uu u go'aamiyo), faa'iido (ku dhaqmaan danta ugu wanaagsan ee bukaanka), non-maleficence (marka hore, waxba ha yeelin - Primum non nocere), cadaalad (qaybinta cadaalad ah ee khayraadka, sinnaan ula dhaqmo). Isku dhacyada u dhexeeya mabaadi'da ayaa caan ku ah ficil ahaan.
learnUni_medicine_f4_kp3: Oggolaansho xog-ogaal ah: waxay u baahan tahay karti (fahm, hayn, miisaan, xidhiidh), macluumaadka (khatarta maaddiga ah, beddelka, cawaaqibka daawaynta), iyo iskaa-wax-u-qabso (ma qasbid). Sharciga Awoodda Maskaxda 2005 (UK): haddii ay ka maqan tahay awoodda, go'aanka danaha ugu wanaagsan ee kooxda ± awoodda qareenka waarta.
learnUni_medicine_f4_kp4: Daawooyinka caddaynta ku salaysan (EBM): dib u eegis nidaamsan + falanqaynta-meta (caddeymaha ugu sarreeya ee su'aalaha kiliinikada), RCTs, daraasadaha kooxeed, daraasaadka xakamaynta kiis, taxane kiis, ra'yi khabiir. Qiimaynta muhiimka ah: qiimee ansaxnimada gudaha (daraasadu miyay si fiican u dhacday?), ansaxnimada dibadda (natiijooyinka ma khuseeyaan bukaankayga?), iyo muhiimada caafimaad (NNT, cabbirka saamaynta).
learnUni_medicine_f4_task: Haweeney 45 jir ah oo qaba xanuunka suuxdinta ee la og yahay ayaa la dhigey iyadoo suuxsan. Lammaanteeda ayaa sheegtay in aanay qaadan daawada xiskeeda ka hortagta muddo toddobaad ah. Awood qareenimo ma leh mana ogolaan karto. Adigoo isticmaalaya afarta mabda'a ee anshaxa caafimaadka iyo sharciga awoodda maskaxda, falanqayn: (a) daawaynta ma la bixin karaa ogolaansho la'aan? (b) waa maxay habka danta ugu wanaagsan? (c) Markay awooddeeda dib u hanato, maxaa laga hadlayaa? (d) sidee baad ula xidhiidhi lahayd heshiiska dawada?
learnUni_psychology_f0_desc: Cilmi-nafsiga jaamacadeed waa edbin saynis ah - waxay isticmaashaa habab tijaabo ah, tirokoobyo, iyo caddaynta asaagga la eegay si loo barto maskaxda iyo dhaqanka. Qaab-dhismeedkeeda aragtiyeed ee ugu weyn waxay u dhexeeyaan dhimista nafleyda ilaa dhisidda bulshada. Fahamka taariikhda iyo falsafada cilmi-nafsiga waxay ka tarjumaysaa dhammaan daraasadda xigta.
learnUni_psychology_f0_kp0: Aragtiyo waaweyn: bayooloji (maskaxda, genetics, hormoonnada), garashada (habaynta macluumaadka, matalaadda maskaxda), dabeecadda (Skinner - conditioning, operant learning), psychodynamic (Freud - miyir la'aan, cadaadis, hababka difaaca), bani'aadamnimada (Maslow, Rogers - is-dhaqdhaqaaqa), bulsho (Tajfel, Milgram - saamaynta bulshada).
learnUni_psychology_f0_kp1: Hababka cilmi-baarista: tijaabinta (wax-ka-beddelka IV, cabbirka DV, xakameynta jahwareerka), isku-xirnaanta (xidhiidhka cabbirka, r = -1 ilaa +1, ma sheegi karo sabab), indho-indheyn (dabiiciga ah, ka qaybqaata), daraasad kiis (qoto dheer laakiin xaddidan guud ahaan), sahan (muunado waaweyn, is-sheegid eexda). Gudaha vs. inta u dhaxaysa naqshadaynta maadooyinka.
learnUni_psychology_f0_kp2: Aasaaska tira-koobka: Imtixaanka muhiimka ah ee mala-awaalka (NHST) - p-qiimaha <0.05 heshiiska (Kalluumeysatada). Cabbirka saamaynta (Cohen's d, η²) - dhab ahaantii waa mid muhiim ah xitaa haddii aan xisaab ahaan. Qalalaasaha soo noqnoqda: natiijooyin badan oo qadiimi ah ayaa ku guul darraystay in ay dib u soo celiyaan (bulshada priming, ego dhimista) - sayniska furan iyo isdiiwaangelinta ka hor ayaa jawaabo ah.
learnUni_psychology_f0_kp3: Anshaxa ( code BPS): ogolaansho la wargaliyay, xaqa ka noqoshada, ka ilaalinta waxyeelada, sirta, ka warhaynta. Tijaabada xabsiga Stanford (Zimbardo 1971) iyo daraasadaha Milgram waxay kiciyeen dood waarta oo ku saabsan khatarta cilmi-baarista ee la aqbali karo. IRB/gudiga anshaxa ee dib u eegista hadda waa qasab.
learnUni_psychology_f0_kp4: Saldhigyada nafleyda ee dabeecadda: habdhiska dareenka (CNS + PNS + ANS). Qaab dhismeedka maskaxda: maskaxda (shaqooyinka muhiimka ah), nidaamka limbic (dareen, xusuusta - hippocampus, amygdala), ganglia basal ( xakamaynta mootada, abaal-marinta), kiliyaha maskaxda (garashada sare, shakhsiyadda). Neuroimaging: fMRI (qulqulka dhiigga), EEG (waqtiga), PET (khariidad neurotransmitter).
learnUni_psychology_f0_task: Si dhab ah u qiimee sheegashada 'cilmu nafsigu waa saynis'. Jawaabtaada: (a) qeex 'sayniska' adiga oo isticmaalaya shuruudaha been-abuurka ah ee Popper, (b) qiimee heerka ay hababka cilmi-nafsiga ee cilmi-nafsiga ay buuxiyaan shuruudahan, (c) ka wada hadal xiisadda taranka iyo waxa ay ka muujinayso NHST, (d) soo jeedi laba hab-habayn oo habaysan oo xoojin kara aqoonsiga cilmi-nafsiga ee cilmi-nafsiga.
learnUni_psychology_f1_desc: Cilmi-nafsiga korriinka waxa uu daraaseeyaa sida aadamuhu isu beddelo cimriga oo dhan - laga bilaabo korriinka dhalmada ka hor illaa dhallaanka, carruurnimada, qaan-gaarka, qaan-gaarnimada, iyo da'da. Waxay baartaa horumarka garashada, bulshada, shucuurta, iyo akhlaaqda, iyo isdhexgalka ka dhexeeya korriinka noolaha iyo waayo-aragnimada deegaanka.
learnUni_psychology_f1_kp0: Heerarka horumarka garashada ee Piaget: sensorimotor (0-2y, shayga joogtada ah), preoperational (2-7y, egocentrism, ilaalin la'aan), hawlgal la taaban karo (7-12y, ilaalinta, dib u celinta), hawlgal rasmi ah (12+y, sabab aan la taaban karin, fikirka mala awaalka).
learnUni_psychology_f1_kp1: Aragtida dhaqan-bulsheed ee Vygotsky: Zone of Proximal Development (ZPD) - faraqa u dhexeeya waxa ilmuhu keligiis samayn karo iyo marka laga eego qof kale oo aqoon badan. Luuqadu waa aaladda garashada aasaasiga ah. Isbarbardhigga diiradda Piaget ee sahaminta kelida ah.
learnUni_psychology_f1_kp2: Aragtida lifaaqa (Bowlby, Ainsworth): dhallaanku waxay samaystaan ​​isku xidhka aasaasiga ah ee muhiimka u ah horumarka. Nidaamka qalaad ayaa kala saaraya lifaaqa: sugan (65%), amni-darro ka fogaan ah (20%), ammaan-la'aan (15%), aan habaysanayn. Moodooyinka shaqada gudaha ayaa haga xiriirka mustaqbalka.
learnUni_psychology_f1_kp3: Horumarinta dhalinyarada: aqoonsiga Erikson vs. heerka jaahwareerka doorka. Kobcinta anshaxa ee Kohlberg: dhaqan ka hor (dano gaar ah), mid caadi ah (xeerarka bulshada), ka dib (mabaadi'da caalamiga ah). Maskaxda qaan-gaarka: nidaamka limbic wuxuu bislaa ka hor kiliyaha hore - khatarta-qaadista, kacsanaanta shucuureed.
learnUni_psychology_f1_kp4: Kobcinta dadka waaweyn iyo da'da: Heerarka dambe ee Erikson - isu soo dhawaansho vs. gooni-goosad (qof da'yar), wax-soo-saarka iyo fadhiidnimada (dadka qaangaarka dhexe), daacadnimada vs. quusta (qof weyn). Da'da garashada: xawliga habaynta ayaa hoos u dhacaya; sirdoonka crystallized (aqoon urursan) waxay ku sugnaadaan ilaa 70s. Da'da guusha leh: Qaabka SOC ee Baltes (doorashada, hagaajinta, magdhowga).
learnUni_psychology_f1_task: Ilmaha 4-jirka ah waxa la tusaa laba koob oo biyo isleeg ah, ka dib biyaha hal galaas ayaa lagu shubaa galaas ka dheer oo cidhiidhi ah. Ilmuhu wuxuu sheegay in muraayadda dheer ay leedahay biyo badan. (a) Marxaladdee Piagetian ayuu ilmuhu ku jiraa? (b) Waa maxay xaddidaadaha garashada ee sharaxaya tan? (c) Sidee buu Vygotsky u fasiri lahaa isla dhacdada si ka duwan? (d) Naqshad daraasad lagu tijaabinayo in is-daba-marintu ay dardargelin karto awoodda ilaalinta. Tixgeli arrimaha anshaxa.
learnUni_psychology_f2_desc: Cilmi-nafsiga kiliinikada waxay khusaysaa cilmiga nafsiga ah qiimaynta, ogaanshaha, iyo daaweynta xaaladaha caafimaadka dhimirka. Cilmi-nafsiga aan caadiga ahayn wuxuu baaraa dabeecadda, sababaha, iyo habka ciladaha nafsiga ah. Waxay isku daraysaa faham qoto dheer oo ku saabsan cilmi-nafsiga cilmi-nafsiga iyo faragelinta caddaynta ku salaysan sida CBT, DBT, iyo daawaynta cilmi nafsiga.
learnUni_psychology_f2_kp0: Qeexida cillad la'aanta: yaraanta tirakoobka, ka leexashada caadooyinka bulshada, ku guuldareysiga in ay si ku filan u shaqeyso (Rosenhan), iyo shuruudaha caafimaadka maskaxda ee ugu habboon (Jahoda). DSM-5 (APA) iyo ICD-11 (WHO) waxay bixiyaan shuruudo lagu ogaanayo xanuunka dhimirka - nidaamyo kala duwan oo leh xaddidaadyo la yaqaan.
learnUni_psychology_f2_kp1: Xanuunka weyn ee niyad-jabka: triad garashada (Beck - aragtida xun ee naftiisa, adduunka, mustaqbalka), caawin la'aanta bartay (Seligman), mala-awaalka monoamine (horumarin serotonin iyo noradrenaline). Daaweynta: SSRIs (farmako-daaweynta safka hore), CBT (dib u habeynta garashada, firfircoonida dabeecadda), daaweynta isku dhafka ah ee sare.
learnUni_psychology_f2_kp2: Schizophrenia: Calaamadaha togan (hallucination, dhalanteed, hadal aan habaysan lahayn), calaamadaha xun (saamaynta fidsan, alogia, avolition). Dopamine hypothesis (dhaafka ah D2 dhaqdhaqaaqa receptor ee dariiqa mesolimbic). Antipsychotics: D2 ka soo horjeeda. Hiddaha dhaxalka ~ 80% (MZ concordance 48%).
learnUni_psychology_f2_kp3: Daawaynta habdhaqanka garashada (CBT): Aaron Beck - fikradaha tooska ah ee khaldan iyo qorshayaasha ayaa ilaaliya xanuunada. Qaabka ABC: Dhaqdhaqaaqa dhacdada → Caqiidooyinka → Natiijooyinka. Waxqabadyada: diiwaanka fikirka, tijaabooyinka habdhaqanka, soo-gaadhista iyo ka-hortagga jawaabta (ERP for OCD). Saldhigga caddaynta: taageerada xooggan ee RCT ee niyad-jabka, walaaca, OCD, PTSD.
learnUni_psychology_f2_kp4: Habka biopsychosocial model (Engel): xanuunada maskaxdu waxay ka dhashaan bayooloji ( hiddo-sideyaasha, kimistariga maskaxda), cilmi nafsiga (garashada, shakhsiyadda, taariikhda barashada), iyo arrimaha bulshada (dhaawac, saboolnimo, xidhiidhada, dhaqanka). Wuxuu sharxayaa sababta aysan hal daawayn ugu shaqayn qof walba iyo sababta qiimaynta guud ay lama huraan u tahay.
learnUni_psychology_f2_task: Haweeney 28 jir ah ayaa soo bandhigtay niyad jab, 6kg miisaan lumis, subaxdii hore ee hurdada, awood la'aanta in ay xoogga saarto, iyo dareenka qiimo la'aanta 3 bilood. Ma laha calaamado nafsi ah. (a) Bixi ogaanshaha kala duwan adoo isticmaalaya DSM-5. (b) U sharax astaamaheeda adigoo isticmaalaya qaabka garashada Beck. (c) Sharaxaad ka bixi 4-ta kulan ee ugu horreeya ee CBT iyo waxa aad hiigsanayso inaad ku guulaysato mid kasta. (d) Isticmaalka qaabka biopsychosocial, aqoonso hal bayooloji, hal nafsi, iyo hal qodob ilaalinta bulshada.
learnUni_psychology_f2_tp0: Qeexitaanka aan caadiga ahayn iyo DSM-5
learnUni_psychology_f3_desc: Cilmi-nafsiga garaadka wuxuu daraaseeyaa hababka maskaxda - dareenka, aragtida, xusuusta, luqadda, fikirka, iyo xalinta dhibaatada - iyadoo la adeegsanayo tusaalaha habaynta macluumaadka. Waxay hoosta ka xariiqaysaa cilmi-nafsiga waxbarashada (sida wax loo baro si wax ku ool ah) iyo codsiyada bukaan-socodka (sababta xasuustu u xumaato, sida dareenka ADHD ugu guuldareysto, sida fekerku u khaldan yahay niyad-jabka).
learnUni_psychology_f3_kp0: Noocyada xusuusta: Qaabka dukaanka badan ee Atkinson-Shiffrin (dareenka → STM → LTM iyada oo loo marayo ku celcelinta). Qaabka xusuusta shaqaynaysa (Baddeley & Hitch): loop phonological, sketchpad muuqaal-muuqaal ah, bakhti dhexe, fulinta dhexe. Heerarka habaynta (Craik & Lockhart): qoto dheer, kood ka sii tafatiran → sii hayn wanaagsan.
learnUni_psychology_f3_kp1: Khaladaadka xusuusta: qeexida qeexida (Thomson & Tulving - tibaaxaha soo saarista waa inay waafaqaan macnaha codaynta). Saamaynta khaldan ee macluumaadka (Loftus): macluumaadka dhacdada ka dib ayaa beddesha xusuusta. Markhaati-furka indhihiisu waa mid aan la isku halayn karin - kalsoonidu ma saadaaliso saxnaanta. Xusuus been ah ayaa lagu dhex beeraa.
learnUni_psychology_f3_kp2: Fiiro gaar ah: dareenka xulashada (saamaynta xisbiga Cherry's cocktail, Treisman's attenuation model). Dareen kala qaybsan: waxqabadka laba-shaqo xaddidan habaynta hal-channel ee heerarka garashada. Indho la'aan aan fiiro lahayn (Simons & Chabris - tijaabo gorilla). Feejignaanta joogtada ah iyo feejignaanta oo hoos u dhacda.
learnUni_psychology_f3_kp3: Luqadda: Chomsky naxwaha caalamiga ah - Aaladda barashada luqadda ee gudaha (LAD). Mala-awaalka xilliga xasaasiga ah: luqadda waa in la helaa ka hor qaan-gaarnimada si loo helo aqoon buuxda (Genie case study). Isku-xirnaanta luqadda (Sapir-Whorf): luqaddu waxay saamaysaa fikirka - nooca xooggan oo la diiday, nooca daciifka ah oo la taageeray.
learnUni_psychology_f3_kp4: Xallinta mushkiladaha iyo sababaynta: heuristics (helitaanka - waxay ku xukumaysaa suurtogalnimada sida ugu fudud ee tusaalayaashu maskaxda ugu soo galaan; wakiilnimada - garsoore iyagoo la mid ah tusaalaha; ku dhejinta). Xaqiijinta eexda (ujeedka raadinta caddaynta xaqiijinta). Aragtida labada hab-socodka (Kahneman): Nidaamka 1 (dhakhso, toos ah, heuristic) vs. Nidaamka 2 (gaabis, ula kac, falanqayn).
learnUni_psychology_f3_task: Loftus & Palmer (1974) waxay tuseen in falka loo isticmaalo marka la waydiinayo shil baabuur ('jab'',' ku dhuftey', 'bumped') uu saameeyay xawaaraha lagu qiyaasay iyo warbixinada danbe ee muraayadaha jabay. (a) U sharax natiijada adigoo isticmaalaya aragtida schema iyo saamaynta macluumaadka khaldan. (b) Nakhshad ku-noqosho leh laba hagaajin oo ansaxnimada gudaha ah. (c) Ka hadal saamaynta ay ku yeelan karto waraysiga booliiska iyo markhaatiga markhaatiga ee maxkamadda. (d) Qiimee ansaxnimada deegaanka ee cilmi-baarista xusuusta shaybaadhka.
learnUni_psychology_f3_tp2: Fiiro gaar ah, luqadda, iyo sababaynta
learnUni_psychology_f4_desc: Cilmi-nafsiga bayoolojigu wuxuu baaraa neerfaha, hoormoonka, iyo saldhigyada hidaha ee hab-dhaqanka iyo hababka maskaxda. Waxay isku xirtaa cilmi-nafsiga iyo cilmiga neerfayaasha - iyadoo sharraxaysa sida maskaxdu u soo saarto miyir-qabka, sida hormoonnada u qaabeeyaan niyadda iyo dabeecadda, iyo sida kala duwanaanshiyaha hidde-socodka u saameeya shakhsiyadda iyo caafimaadka maskaxda.
learnUni_psychology_f4_kp0: Hormoonnada iyo habdhaqanka: cortisol (jawaab celinta cadaadiska - dhidibka HPA: hypothalamus → CRH → pituitary → ACTH → kortex adrenal → cortisol). Cadaadiska daba-dheeraada: Hoos-u-dhaca mugga hippocampal (kortisol toxic to neurons), xusuusta daciifka ah iyo shaqada difaaca. Testosterone: isku xirka gardarrada dhexdhexaad ah iyo macnaha guud.
learnUni_psychology_f4_kp1: Hidde-yaqaanka hab-dhaqanka: dhaxal-galka = saamiga kala duwanaanshiyaha kala duwanaanshaha hidde-sidaha. Daraasado mataano ah: MZ (isku mid ah) vs. DZ ( walaalo ah). Daraasadaha korsashada. Dhaxalka sirdoonka ~ 50-80% (ku-tiirsanaanta macnaha). Schizophrenia: h²≈80%, ma jiro hal hidde-socod-badane, hidde-heterogeneity sare. GWAS waxay tilmaamaysaa noocyo badan oo caan ah oo leh saameyno yaryar.
learnUni_psychology_f4_kp2: Kobcinta iyo dabeecada: fayoobid loo dhan yahay (Hamilton), xulashada xigtada, isdhaafsiga altruism (Trivers). Cilmi-nafsiga korriinka: Qaybaha aqoonsiga wejiga, ogaanshaha khiyaanada, dookha lammaanaha, barashada luqadda. Naqdin: Sheekooyinka la qabsiga inta badan waa kuwo aan been ahayn - waxay u baahan yihiin caddayn horumarineed.
learnUni_psychology_f4_kp3: Miyir: dhibaato adag (Chalmers - maxay u jirtaa waayo-aragnimada shakhsi ahaaneed?) vs. dhibaatooyinka fudud (isku xidhka miyirka iyo xaaladaha maskaxda). Xidhiidhka dareenka miyir-qabka (NCC): aragtida goobta shaqada ee caalamiga ah (Baars / Dehaene), aragtida macluumaadka isku dhafan (Tononi). Cilmi-baarista maskaxda ee kala-baxa (Sperry): laba hemispheres waxay yeelan karaan wacyigelin madax-bannaan.
learnUni_psychology_f4_kp4: Hurdada iyo riyooyinka: marxaladaha hurdo: marxaladaha NREM 1-3 (N1 iftiin → N3 qunyar socodka, dib u soo celinta) iyo REM (dhaqdhaqaaqa degdega ah ee indhaha - riyooyin, xoojinta xusuusta). Hurdo la'aanta: waxay daciifisaa dareenka, xusuusta, shaqada difaaca, niyadda. Sayniska neerfayaasha ee riyada: kortex prefrontal dorsolateral deactivated (hoosay fikirka muhiimka ah - waxay sharraxaysaa yaabka riyada).
learnUni_psychology_f4_task: Ka dooda saldhigga bayooloji ee walaaca. (a) Sharaxaad ka bixi dhidibka SAM (naxariis leh-adrenal medullary - adrenaline, dhakhso) iyo HPA (kortisol, gaabis) jawaabaha kadeedka degdega ah. (b) Waa maxay cawaaqibta mustaqbalka fog ee walbahaarka joogtada ah ee hippocampus iyo habka difaaca jirka? (c) Sharaxaad ka bixi naqshad daraasad mataano ah si loo kala saaro wax ku biirinta hidaha iyo deegaanka ee nuglaanshaha walbahaarka. (d) Qiimee sharraxaadda bayooloji ee PTSD (xanuunka kadeedka traumatic stress ka dib) iyo saameynteeda caafimaad.
learnUni_sociology_f0_desc: Cilmi-bulshadu waxay baartaa bulshada guud ahaan - qaab-dhismeedkeeda, hay'addeeda, sinnaan la'aanta, iyo dhaqdhaqaaqyada. Aragtiyahannada aasaaska u ah - Marx, Weber, iyo Durkheim - waxay bixiyeen xisaabaadyo iska soo horjeeda sida bulshada casriga ahi u shaqeyso. Aragtiyada casriga ahi waxay dhisaan oo caqabad ku noqdaan aasaasyadan. Farbarashada aragtidu waa lama huraan si loo sameeyo macnaha caddaynta bulsheed.
learnUni_sociology_f0_kp0: Durkheim: bulshadu waa xaqiiq sui generis - oo ka weyn wadarta shakhsiyaadka. Xaqiiqooyinka bulsheed (hay'adaha, caadooyinka, qiyamka) ayaa xannibaya dhaqanka. Anomie: burburka caadiga ah ee isbeddel bulsheed oo degdeg ah → kor u kaca leexashada iyo heerarka is-dilka. Midnimada makaanikada (bulshooyinka dhaqameed) vs. midnimo organic (casri, ku tiirsanaan gaar ah).
learnUni_sociology_f0_kp1: Marx: maaddada taariikhiga ah - saldhigga bulshada (xidhiidhka dhaqaalaha, xoogagga / xiriirka wax soo saarka) ayaa qaabeeya qaab-dhismeedka sare (sharci, dhaqanka, diinta, siyaasadda). Hantiwadaaga: bourgeoisie ayaa leh habka wax soo saarka; proletariat waxay iibisaa awooda shaqada, waa laga faa'iidaystaa (qiimaha dheeriga ah), iyo khibrad fogaansho. Aragtidu waxay dabiiciyanaysaa sinnaan la'aanta.
learnUni_sociology_f0_kp2: Weber: ficil bulsho - fahamka macnaha dabeecadda (Verstehen). Saddex nooc oo maamulka ah: dhaqan, soo jiidasho, caqli-sharci. Bureaucracy: Nooca ugu habboon - kala sareynta, xeerarka, khibradda - labadaba wax ku ool ah iyo bani'aadantinimada ('qafiska birta'). Anshaxa Protestant iyo ruuxa hanti-wadaaga: fikraduhu waxay keeni karaan isbeddel maadi ah.
learnUni_sociology_f0_kp3: Waxqabad (Parsons, Merton): bulshadu waa nidaam is-xakameeya; machadyadu waxay fuliyaan hawlaha dayactirka nidaamka. Naqdin: waxay iska indha tirtaa isku dhaca, si xad dhaaf ah oo la isku raacsan yahay, teleological. Fikradaha isku dhaca (Dahrendorf): khilaafku waa caadi waana isha isbeddel bulsho ee maaha cudur-sidaha.
learnUni_sociology_f0_kp4: Aragtida casriga ah: Giddens (qaab-dhismeedka - qaab-dhismeedka iyo wakaaladu waa wada-dhammaan), Bourdieu (caasimadda: dhaqaale, dhaqameed, bulsho, calaamad; caado; beerta), Habermas (ficil isgaarsiinta vs. fal istiraatijiyadeed - lifeworld gumeysan by nidaamyada). Dib-u-casriyeynta (Baudrillard, Lyoard): Sheekooyin waaweyn ayaa burburay; xaqiiqadu waa jilitaanka.
learnUni_sociology_f0_task: Adigoo isticmaalaya ugu yaraan saddex aragtiyood oo aragtiyeed, taxliilin sababaha cilmi-bulsheed ee sinnaan la'aanta waxbarashada. Aragti kasta: sheeg sheegashada aragtiyeed ee muhiimka ah, cadee habka soo saaraya sinnaan la'aanta, soo qaado hal daraasad oo dhab ah, oo qiimee saamaynta siyaasadda. Ku soo gunaanad adiga oo qiimeeya aragtida bixinaysa sharraxaadda ugu dhammaystiran.
learnUni_sociology_f1_desc: Qaab-dhismeedka bulshadu waa qaababka joogtada ah ee xidhiidhada bulsheed iyo hay'adaha qaabeeya dabeecadaha shakhsi ahaaneed iyo fursadaha nolosha. Qoyska, waxbarashada, diinta, dhaqaalaha, warbaahinta, iyo dawladda ayaa ah machadyada ugu waaweyn. Cilmi-yaqaannada bulshadu waxay baadhaan sida qaababkani u soo saaraan sinnaan la'aanta iyo sida ay isu beddelaan waqti ka dib.
learnUni_sociology_f1_kp0: Qoyska: aragtida functionalist (Murdock - universal, qoyska nuclear oo leh afar hawlood: galmada, taranka, dhaqaalaha, waxbarashada). Aragtida Marxist (English — qoysku waxay soo saaraan nidaamka dabaqadda hantiwadaaga iyo aabbanimada). Dhaleeceynta dheddigga (Oakley - shaqada guriga oo aan mushahar lahayn, qaybta jinsiga). Casriga dambe: kala duwanaanshaha qaababka qoyska.
learnUni_sociology_f1_kp1: Waxbarasho: hawl-wadeen (Durkheim - wadajirka iyo xirfadaha bulshada; Davis/Moore - kala-soocidda meritocratic). Marxist (Bowles & Gintis - manhajka qarsoon ayaa soo saara xiriirka fasalka; mabda'a waraaqaha - muraayadaha dugsiga ee goobta shaqada). Taran dhaqameed (Bourdieu - raasamaalka dhaqameed ayaa go'aamiya guusha waxbarashada).
learnUni_sociology_f1_kp2: Diinta: Durkheim - diintu waxay naqdisay qiyamka wadajirka ah ee bulshada; Waxay qabataa shaqada isdhexgalka. Marx — diintu waa 'opium of the people' - fikradda sharciysa sinnaan la'aanta. Weber - diintu waxay noqon kartaa xoog isbeddel bulsho (Calvinism iyo capitalism). Cilmi-nafsiyeedka: diintu hoos u dhac weyn ku keenaysa bulshooyinka casriga ah (la tartamay).
learnUni_sociology_f1_kp3: Dawladda iyo awoodda: Aragtida jamac (kooxo badan oo danaynaya oo tartamaya). Aragtida Elite (Mills, Pareto) - awoodda ku urursan in yar oo caan ah. Aragtida Marxist - Dawladdu waxay u adeegtaa danaha dabaqadda xukunka. Hegemony Gramscian - dabaqada xukunka waxay ku ilaalisaa awooda ogolaanshaha fikradeed, kaliya maahan qasab.
learnUni_sociology_f1_kp4: Warbaahinta iyo bulshada: Aragti dejineed ajande (McCombs & Shaw — Warbaahintu waxay go'aamisaa waxa ay dadweynuhu ka fekerayaan, ee ma aha waxa loo malaynayo). Qaabka cirbadda Hypodermic (warbaahintu waxay durtaa fariimaha si qarsoodi ah) vs. isticmaalka iyo aragtida ku qanacsanaanta (dhegaystayaasha ayaa si firfircoon u dooranaya warbaahinta baahidooda). Warbaahinta dhijitaalka ah: shaandhaynta goobooyin, daawaynta algorithm, macluumaad khaldan.
learnUni_sociology_f1_task: Codso laba aragtiyood oo bulsho oo is burinaya (sida functionalism iyo Marxism) si aad u falanqayso nidaamka waxbarasho ee dalkaaga. Aragti kasta: sharax doorka waxbarashadu ku leedahay bulshada, cadee cidda faa'iido u leh iyo cidda liidata, soo qaado hal daraasad oo la taaban karo, oo soo jeedi siyaasad saamaynaysa. Kadibna qiimee aragtida bixisa xisaabin ku filan oo ku saabsan natiijooyinka waxbarasho ee ardayda fasalka shaqeeya.
learnUni_sociology_f1_tp0: Qoyska iyo diinta || Waxbarasho iyo taran bulsho
learnUni_sociology_f2_name: Sinnaan la'aanta bulshada - sinnaan la'aanta qaybinta kheyraadka, fursadaha, iyo awoodda - waa welwelka asaasiga ah ee cilmiga bulshada. Fasalka, jinsiga, sinjiga/qowmiyaadka, iyo da'da ayaa ah cabbirada ugu muhiimsan ee habaynta. Isgoysyadu waxay daaha ka qaadayaan in cabbirradan ay isku daraan oo is dhexgalaan. Fahamka sinnaan la'aanta waxay u baahan tahay falanqayn qaabdhismeed iyo fiiro gaar ah u leh waayo-aragnimada nolosha.
learnUni_sociology_f2_desc: Heerka bulshada: Aragtida dhinacyo badan leh ee Weber (class + status + party). Qorshaha fasalka Goldthorpe (NS-SEC): oo ku salaysan xiriirka shaqada. Savage et al.'s Sahanka Heerka Sare ee Ingiriiska (2013): todoba fasal oo ay ku jiraan 'elite' iyo 'precariat'. Fasalka wuxuu saameeyaa caafimaadka, waxbarashada, cadaalada dembiyada, iyo ka qaybgalka siyaasadda.
learnUni_sociology_f2_kp0: Sinnaan la'aanta jinsiga: abtirsiinyo - xukunka ragga ee habaysan ee hay'adaha bulshada, dhaqaalaha, iyo siyaasadda. Farqiga mushaharka jinsiga: haweenku waxay helaan ~80% dakhliga saacadii ragga gudaha UK (2023). Saqafka dhalada ah (caqabadaha aan muuqan ee jagooyinka sare) iyo dhagaxa dhalada ah (haweenka loo magacaabay hogaanka xaaladaha xasaradaha). Cilmi-nafsiga ee ragganimada: Connell's hegemonic masculinity.
learnUni_sociology_f2_kp1: Gender inequality: patriarchy — systematic male domination of social, economic, and political institutions. Gender pay gap: women earn ~80% of men's hourly earnings in UK (2023). Glass ceiling (invisible barriers to senior roles) and glass cliff (women appointed to leadership in crisis situations). Sociology of masculinity: Connell's hegemonic masculinity.
learnUni_sociology_f2_kp2: Jinsiyada iyo qowmiyadaha: asal ahaan (aqoonsiga qowmiyadeed sida dabiiciga ah, go'an) vs. dhismo (jinsi/jinsi sida bulsho ahaan loo dhisay - jinsiyado kala duwan ayaa si kala duwan loo qeexay bulshooyin iyo waqtiyo kala duwan). Cunsurinimada hay'adaha (Macpherson Report - Metropolitan Police): hababka takoorka ee ku dhex jira ururada, ma aha oo kaliya nacaybka shakhsi ahaaneed.
learnUni_sociology_f2_kp3: Isgoysyada (Kimberlé Crenshaw): cabbirro aqoonsi oo kala duwan (fasalka, jinsiga, jinsiga, naafanimada, jinsiga) waxay u falgalaan si isku dhufasho ah, oo aan ahayn wax lagu daro. Khibradda naag madow ee takoorku maaha si fudud 'cunsurinimo + jinsi' - isgoysku wuxuu abuuraa qaabab khasaare ah oo gaar ah oo aan kaligiis qaban.
learnUni_sociology_f2_kp4: Dhaqdhaqaaqa bulsheed: isdhexgalka (fasalka carruurta ee qaraabada waalidka) iyo fac-dhexe (habka shaqo ee qofka). Dhaqdhaqaaqa bulsheed ee UK: si aad ah ugu xidhan fasalka/dakhliga waalidka. Dhaqdhaqaaqa saxda ah (dhaqdhaqaaqa sare ee bulshada oo dhan) vs. dhaqdhaqaaqa qaraabada ah (booska qaybinta). Fur vs. nidaamyada stratification xiran.
learnUni_sociology_f2_task: Isticmaalka is-goysyada sida qaab-dhismeedkaaga falanqaynta, falanqee booska haweenka Madaw ee naafada ah ee suuqa shaqada ee UK. U sawir: caddaynta saamaynta cabbir kasta si gaar ah, caddaynta sida ay u falgalaan, hal xisaab aragti, iyo saamaynta siyaasadda takoorka. Ku soo gunaanad adiga oo qiimeeya in isgoysyadu ka faa'iido badan tahay falanqaynta marka loo eego falanqaynta dhidibka keliya.
learnUni_sociology_f3_desc: Cilmi-baadhista bulsheed waxay isticmaashaa habab tiro iyo tayo leh si ay u baarto dhacdooyinka bulshada. Doorashada habka waxay ka tarjumaysaa caqabadaha la taaban karo iyo ballanqaadyada qotodheer ee cilmi-baarista - oo ku saabsan waxa loo xisaabiyo aqoonta bulsheed ee ansax ah. Dib-u-celinta - ka warqabka cilmi-baaraha ee booskooda cilmi-baarista - waa sifo gaar ah oo ka mid ah sayniska bulshada tayada leh.
learnUni_sociology_f3_kp0: Hababka tirada: sahanka bulsheed (su'aalaha habaysan, muunado waaweyn, wakiil, guud ahaan), tirokoobyada rasmiga ah (xogta dawladda - dembiyada, dhalashada, dakhliga - laakiin ka tarjumaysa habdhaqanka duubitaan, ma 'xaqiiqda bulshada'), falanqaynta content (kumbuyuutar habaysan qoraalada ama warbaahinta). Cilmi-nafsiga togan: dunida bulshada waxa loo baran karaa si dhab ah iyadoo la adeegsanayo habab cilmiyeed.
learnUni_sociology_f3_kp1: Hababka tayada leh: waraysi qotodheer (semi-formed or unstructured — hodan, data contextual), kooxaha diiradda (dhaqdhaqaaqa kooxeed, samaynta macnaha wadareed), ethnography (fiiri ka qaybqaatayaasha - cilmi immerses in goobaha bulshada, inta badan bilo ama sanado). Tafsiir tarjumaad: macnaha waa la dhisay, lama qiyaaso.
learnUni_sociology_f3_kp2: Muunad: ixtimaalka ( random, stratified, cluster — generalisable ) vs. ujeedo (aragti, kubbadda barafka - loo doortay qoto dheer iyo ku habboonaanta, ma aha wakiil). Tusaalaha cabbirka vs. qoto dheer: baahiyo tiro badan n; tayo leh ayaa gaadha saturation aragtiyeed.
learnUni_sociology_f3_kp3: Isku halaynta (natiijo isku mid ah haddii lagu celiyo - xoogga sahaminta tirada), ansaxnimada (waxay cabbirtaa waxa ay sheegato - xoogga tayada). Oggolaanshaha la wargeliyey, qarsoodi, ka ilaalinta waxyeellada. Dib-u-celinta cilmi-baadhaha: qirashada sida aqoonsiga cilmi-baaraha u saameeyo xog ururinta iyo tarjumaada.
learnUni_sociology_f3_kp4: Hababka isku dhafan: taxane ah (tayo ka dibna tiro, ama lid ku ah), isku xigta (labadaba isku mar, natiijooyinka la isku daray). Saddex-xagal: iyadoo la adeegsanayo habab badan si la isugu keeno gunaanad isku mid ah. Tusaale: Sahan tiro-koob ayaa tilmaamaya farqiga u-gaadhista fasalka; waraysiyo tayo leh ayaa sharaxaya hababka.
learnUni_sociology_f3_task: Waxaad doonaysaa inaad barato sababta ardayda fasalka-shaqaysa ay ugu yar yihiin jaamacadaha sare. Naqshad daraasad habab isku dhafan: (a) weji tireed iyadoo la adeegsanayo sahan iyo xog rasmi ah - cadee su'aashaada cilmi-baarista, muunada, cabbirada, iyo falanqaynta. (b) Weji tayo leh oo isticmaalaya waraysiyo - istaraatijiyad muunad, hagaha waraysiga (8 su'aalood), iyo hab gorfayn. (c) Sideed isugu dari doontaa labada weji? (d) Aqoonso laba caqabadood oo anshaxeed oo u gaar ah cilmi-baarista dhalinyarada nugul.
learnUni_history_f0_desc: Taariikh-qoraalku waa daraasadda sida taariikhda loo qoray - aragtiyaha, hababka, iyo fasiraadaha taariikhyahanadu isticmaalaan. Waxay waydiinaysaa: aqoonta taariikheed ee ujeedada laga leeyahay suurtogal ma tahay? Sidee bay u qaabeeyaan aqoonsiga taariikhyahanka, aragtidiisa, iyo wakhtiga la joogo taariikhda ay qoraan? Aqoonta taariikh-qorista waxay lama huraan u tahay qiimaynta dood kasta oo taariikheed.
learnUni_history_f0_kp0: Ilaha taariikhiga ah: aasaasiga ah (abuuray wakhtiga - dukumentiyada, artefacts, marag-furka afka, sawiro), secondary (falanqaynta ilaha aasaasiga ah by taariikhyahanada), jaamacadeed (syntheses - buugaagta, encyclopaedias). Dhaliilaha isha: qoraaga, taariikhda, dhagaystayaasha, ujeedada, eexda, xaqiijinta.
learnUni_history_f0_kp1: Taariikhda Rankean: Taariikhda 'sidii ay dhab ahaan ahayd' (wie es eigentlich gewesen) - ka soo kabashada ujeeddada ee la soo dhaafay iyada oo loo marayo ilaha aasaasiga ah. Qarnigii 19-aad ee xirfad-yaqaannimada taariikhda. Naqdin: suurtagal maaha in si buuxda ujeedo; ilaha laftoodu waa qayb.
learnUni_history_f0_kp2: Dugsiga Annales (Braudel, Bloch, Febvre): ka beddelka dhacdooyinka iyo ragga waaweyn una beddelaan qaab-dhismeedyada muddada-dheer ( longgue durée - juqraafiga, dhaqaalaha, maskaxda). Wadarta taariikhda - isku-dhafka dhammaan dhinacyada waayo-aragnimada aadanaha. Saamayn wayn ku leh taariikhda bulshada.
learnUni_history_f0_kp3: Casrinimada ka dib iyo 'rogadka luqadda': Caddaan (Metahistory) - Sheekooyin taariikhi ah ayaa loo qaabeeyey sida noocyada suugaanta (majaajilada, musiibada, jaceylka, sariirta) - taariikhyahanadu waxay dhisaan halkii ay ogaan lahaayeen wixii hore. Derrida: qoraalka ka saar. Saamaynta: relativism, 'taariikho' badan oo sax ah.
learnUni_history_f0_kp4: Aqoonsiga iyo taariikhda: waa ayo taariikhda? Taariikhda gumaystaha waxaa qoray gumaystayaasha - daraasaadka subaltern (Spivak, Guha) waxay dib u soo ceshadaan aragtida gumeysiga. Taariikhda haweenka, taariikhda madow, taariikhda shaqada - dhammaan waxay caqabad ku noqdeen sheeko-dhaqameedka 'nin-weyn'. Daraasadaha xusuusta: sida ay bulshadu u xasuusato una iloobaan wixii hore.
learnUni_history_f0_task: Is barbar dhig saddexda hab-taariikheed (Rankean positivism, Annales, postmodernism) sida ay ula dhaqmaan dhacdo isku mid ah - tusaale; Kacaankii Faransiiska. Hab kasta: sheeg hab-raaceeda asaasiga ah, su'aalaha ay waydiiso, ilaha/hababka ay isticmaasho, iyo waxa ay ku soo gabagabeyn doonto. Qiimee: aqoonta taariikheed ee ujeedada laga leeyahay suurtogal ma tahay?
learnUni_history_f0_tp0: Dhaliilaha isha iyo ilaha aasaasiga ah
learnUni_history_f0_tp2: Casrinimada ka dib iyo taariikhda aqoonsiga
learnUni_history_f1_desc: Dunidii hore waxay soo saartay aasaaska ilbaxnimada reer galbeedka iyo Aasiya: poliskii Giriiga, jamhuuriyadii Roomaanka iyo boqortooyadii, boqortooyadii Shiinaha, dawladaha magaalada Mesobotaamiya, iyo boqortooyadii Masar. Fahamka nidaamkooda siyaasadeed, dhaqaalahooda, iyo guulaha dhaqameed waxay muujinayaan asalka hay'adaha maanta jira - sharciga, dimuqraadiyadda, falsafada, diinta, iyo magaalada.
learnUni_history_f1_kp0: Giriiggii hore: poliska (magaalada-gobolka) oo ah unugga siyaasadda aasaasiga ah. Dimuqraadiyada Ateenay (qarnigii 5aad BC): golaha (ekklesia), golaha (boule), maxkamadaha sharciga. Sparta: oligarchy millatari. Dagaalkii Faaris (490-479 BC). Dagaalkii Peloponnesia (431-404 BC - falanqaynta dhabta ah ee Thucydides). Qabsashadii Makedoniya iyo dunida Hellenistic.
learnUni_history_f1_kp1: Rome Qadiimiga ah: Jamhuuriya (509-27 BCE) - SPQR (Senate iyo Roman People), tribunes, qunsuliyada, populares vs. optimates. Julius Caesar, dayrta Jamhuuriyadda, Augustus iyo maamulaha. Sharciga Roomaanka, injineernimada (biyo mareennada, waddooyinka), iyo maamulka gobolka. Hoos u dhac iyo dhac - Gibbon, doodda Pirenne.
learnUni_history_f1_kp2: Mesopotamia iyo Masar: Dawladaha magaalada Sumerian (qoraal, ziggurat, Code of Ur-Nammu c.2100 BCE). Xeerkii Hammurabi (c.1754 BCE) — 282 sharci, 'Isha il'. Dawlad fircooniga Masar - boqornimada rabbaaniga ah, nashqada dhismaha. Boqortooyada Cusub (1550-1070 BCE) - Tutankhamun, Ramesses II.
learnUni_history_f1_kp3: Han Shiinaha (206 BCE-220 CE): Xafiisyada dhexe ee dhexe (Confucian meritocracy iyada oo loo marayo imtixaannada adeegga bulshada), Ganacsiga Waddada Silk, hal-abuurnimo (warqad, kombuyuutar, seismograph). Is barbar dhig Boqortooyada Roomaanka - ilbaxnimooyinka 'classical' ee isku mar ah ee darafyada ka soo horjeeda shabakada ganacsiga.
learnUni_history_f1_kp4: Dhaqaalaha qadiimiga ah: inta badan beeralayda, oo leh shaqaale addoon ah oo udub dhexaad u ah wax soo saarka Giriigga iyo Roomaanka. Ganacsiga fogfog ( Waddada Silk, Mediterranean): alaabo qaali ah, hadhuudh, biraha. Dood: Finley aragtidiisa 'primitivist' (dhaqaalaha qadiimka ah asal ahaan wuu ka duwan yahay - jihayn korriin ma jirto)
learnUni_history_f1_task: Is barbar dhig nidaamyada siyaasadeed ee Athens qadiimiga ah iyo Jamhuuriyadda Roomaanka. Mid kasta: sharax dastuurka, cadee cidda leh xuquuqda siyaasadeed, sharax sida awoodda loo qaybiyay iyo sida loo hubiyay, oo qiimee sida 'dimuqraadi' ama 'oligarchic' mid kastaa uu ahaa. Kadibna falanqee sababta labada nidaam ay ugu dambeyntii u baneeyeen xukun ka madax bannaan - maxay tani nooga sheegaysaa shuruudaha lagama maarmaanka u ah dimuqraadiyadda?
learnUni_history_f1_tp1: Rome qadiimiga ah: Jamhuuriyadda iyo Boqortooyada
learnUni_history_f2_desc: Xilligii hore ee casriga ahaa ayaa dunida beddelay: Farshaxankii dib-u-cusboonaysiinta iyo waxbarashada, dib-u-habaynta ayaa kala qaybisay Masiixiyadda, ballaarinta Yurub waxay daahfurtay boqortooyooyin caalami ah iyo ganacsigii addoonsiga, iyo Kacaankii Sayniska ahaa ayaa beddelay sida dadku u fahmaan dabeecadda. Iftiinku wuxuu soo saaray fikradaha siyaasadeed - xorriyadda, xuquuqaha, sababta - ee keenay Kacaannada Mareykanka iyo Faransiiska.
learnUni_history_f2_kp0: Renaissance The (14-17aad c.): Dib u soo noolaynta barashada qadiimiga ah, aadanaha (Erasmus, More - diiradda saaraya kartida aadanaha halkii ay awood rabaani ah), farshaxanka cusub (Leonardo, Michelangelo, Raphael - aragti, naturalism), saxaafadda daabacaadda (Gutenberg c.1440 - faafin macluumaadka bedelay).
learnUni_history_f2_kp1: Dib-u-habaynta (1517): Luter's 95 Thes - waxay ka horyimaadeen indulgences, awoodda papal, iyo dhexdhexaadinta wadaadnimada. Sola scriptura, sola fide. Dagaalkii Beeralayda, Golaha Trent, Dagaallada Diinta (Faransiiska: 1562-98, Dagaalkii Soddon Sano: 1618-48 - Nabadda Westphalia 1648 → mabda'a madaxbannaanida gobolka).
learnUni_history_f2_kp2: Balaadhinta Yurub iyo gumeysiga: Sahaminta Boortaqiiska iyo Isbaanishka (1490-1500), Isweydaarsiga Columbian (dalagyada, cudurrada, dadka la addoonsado), qabsashada Ameerika (Cortés, Pizarro - masiibada dadweynaha ee dadka asaliga ah). Ganacsiga addoonta ee Transatlantic: 12 milyan oo Afrikaan ah ayaa la addoonsaday, 2 milyan ayaa ku dhintay iyagoo ka gudbaya.
learnUni_history_f2_kp3: Kacaanka Sayniska (16-17-aad c.): Copernicus (heliocentrism, 1543), Galileo (farsamoyaqaan iyo telescope), Kepler (sharciga meeraha), Newton (Principia Xisaabta 1687 - cuf-jiidka caalamiga ah, sharciyada dhaqdhaqaaqa). Habka cusub: tijaabada, xisaabta, shakiga maamulka qadiimiga.
learnUni_history_f2_kp4: Iftiinka (18aad c.): sababta, xorriyadda, iyo horumarka. Locke (xuquuqda dabiiciga ah, dawlada ogolaanshaha), Voltaire (dulqaadka diinta, hadalka xorta ah), Rousseau (dardaaranka guud), Montesquieu (kala qaybinta awoodaha). Kacaanka Mareykanka (1776 - Saamaynta Locke ee ku dhawaaqida Madaxbanaanida), Kacaanka Faransiiska (1789 - Liberté, Égalité, Fraternité).
learnUni_history_f2_task: Falanqee sababihii keenay Kacaankii Faransiiska ee 1789. Isticmaal falanqeyn dhowr sababood ah: (a) Sababaha qaabdhismeedka muddada dheer (dhibaatada dhaqaale, sinnaan la'aanta bulshada ee hoos timaada nidaamka Estates, Fikradaha Iftiinka), (b) Kiciyeyaasha muddada-gaaban (ku guuldareysiga goosashada, Dhibaatada Guud ee Estates), (c) doorka fikradaha iyo xaaladaha maaddiga ah. Qiimee hal arin oo aad u aragto in ugu muhiimsan, oo ka difaac jawaabtaada fasiraad kale.
learnUni_history_f3_desc: Qarnigii 20aad iyo 21aad waxay keeneen burbur aan hore loo arag (laba dagaal adduun, xasuuq, hub nukliyeer ah) oo ay weheliso horumar aan caadi ahayn (gumaysiga, xuquuqul insaanka, kacaanka farsamada). Fahamka muddadani waxay u baahan tahay ka-qaybgalka ilaha aasaasiga ah, tafsiirrada tartamaya, iyo dhaxalka aan la xallin ee qaabeeya haddayada.
learnUni_history_f3_kp0: Dagaalkii Dunida I (1914-1918): wuxuu keenaa dood - khilaafka Fischer (gardarrada Jarmalka iyo ujeeddooyinka dagaalka) vs. Albertini (xisaabtan khaldan iyo isbahaysiga isbahaysiga). Dagaal qadhaadh, burbur tignoolajiyadeed (~ 17 milyan ayaa dhintay). Treaty of Versailles (1919): faqradda dembiga dagaalka, magdhowga - "abuurka WWII" tesis.
learnUni_history_f3_kp1: Totalitarianism: Nazi Germany (Hitler - fikradda jinsiyadeed, Führerprinzip, xasuuq - Holocaust, 6 milyan oo Yuhuud ah; dagaal guud iyo Holocaust sida ula kac ah vs. functionalist historiographical dood). Midowgii Soofiyeeti (Stalin - ururinta, gulags, Argagax weyn). Hannah Arendt 'Asalka Totalitarianism'.
learnUni_history_f3_kp2: Decolonization (1945-1975): dhaqdhaqaaqyada madaxbannaanida ee Aasiya, Afrika, iyo Kariibiyaanka. Xornimada iyo qaybinta Hindiya (1947 - rabshado, ~ 1 milyan ayaa dhintay). Dagaalkii Aljeeriya (1954-62). Dhibaatada Congo. Xaaladda dagaalka qaboobaha: USA iyo USSR labadaba gumeysi-diidka xagga odhaahda laakiin waxay taageereen xulafada kali-taliska ah. Neo-colonialism: madaxbannaani siyaasadeed oo aan lahayn madaxbannaani dhaqaale.
learnUni_history_f3_kp3: Dagaalkii qaboobaa (1947-1991): Fikir, dhaqaale, iyo xafiiltan juquraafiyeed oo u dhexeeya USA iyo USSR. Caqiidada haynta (Kennan), Dagaalka Kuuriya, Xiisadda Gantaalaha Kuuba (1962 - ee ugu dhow dagaalka nukliyeerka), Dagaalkii Vietnam, Détente, tartanka hubka ee Reagan. Burburkii USSR (1991): Gorbachev's glasnost/perestroika, burburkii darbiga Berlin (1989).
learnUni_history_f3_kp4: Adduunka ka dib 1991: midnimo (Fukuyama's 'Dhammaadka Taariikhda' vs. Huntington's 'Clash of Civilisations'), 9/11 iyo Dagaalka Argagixisada, 2008 xiisadda dhaqaale, Guga Carabta, kor u kaca Shiinaha, COVID-19 masiibo, xiisadda cimilada. Caalamiyaynta iyo xumaanteeda - populism, sinnaan la'aanta, iyo dib u dhaca ka dhanka ah caalamiga ah ee xorta ah.
learnUni_history_f3_task: Qiimee sababihii Holocaust. Qormadaadu waa in ay: (a) la falgalaan ulajeedka/ shaqaynta doodaha taariikhiga ah, (b) falanqeeyaan xaaladaha qaabdhismeedka (antisemitism, awood dawladeed, dagaal) oo ay weheliyaan wakaalada (doorka Hitler, SS, agjoogayaasha), (c) adeegso ugu yaraan saddex ilo hoose ama sare, (d) qiimee in Holocaust uu ahaa arin casri ah oo casri ah Holocaust') ama ugu horrayn natiijada fikradda Nazi-ga daran.
learnUni_history_f3_tp2: Wixii ka dambeeyay 1991 aduunka iyo caqabadaha casriga ah
learnUni_philosophy_f0_desc: Epistemology waa laanta falsafada khuseysa aqoonta - dabeecadeeda, ilaha, baaxadda, iyo xadka. Maxay ka dhigan tahay in wax la ogaado? Sideen uga soocnaa aqoonta iyo rumaynta kaliya? Waa maxay ilaha aqoonta (sabab, khibrad, markhaati)? Su'aalahani waxay ku xiran yihiin shakiga, sayniska, iyo caadooyinka maalinlaha ah.
learnUni_philosophy_f0_kp0: Falanqaynta soo jireenka ah ee aqoonta: qofka S waxa uu og yahay in P iff (i) P ay run tahay, (ii) S rumaystay P, (iii) S in ay xaq tahay in la rumaysto P. The justified true faith (JTB) account. Gettier (1963): Tusaalooyinka liddi ku ah waxay muujinayaan JTB kuma filna aqoonta - dhibaatada Gettier waxay dhashay 60 sano oo jawaabo ah.
learnUni_philosophy_f0_kp1: Ilaha aqoonta: empiricism (Locke, Hume, Berkley) - dhammaan aqoonta laga helay khibradda; ma jiraan fikrado asal ah. Rationalism (Descartes, Leibniz, Kant) - aqoonta qaarkood waa mudnaanta (ka hor waayo-aragnimada), oo ku salaysan sabab. Isku-dhafka Kant: maskaxdu waxay ku soo rogtay qaybaha (meel, waqti, sabab) waayo-aragnimada.
learnUni_philosophy_f0_kp2: Shaki: Habka Descartes ee shakiga - Doodda shaydaanka - kaliya 'cogito ergo sum' ayaa ka badbaaday shaki xagjir ah. Shakiga Pyrrhonia: hakinta xukunka dhammaan arrimaha aan caddayn. Casriga ah: Maskaxda Putnam oo ku jirta vatanka, Moore's 'halkan waa gacan' jawaab celinta dareenka caadiga ah, macnaha guud.
learnUni_philosophy_f0_kp3: Aqoon sayniseed: Been abuurnimada Popper - sayniska waxa uu ku horumaraa malo-awaal dhiirranaan leh iyo isku dayo adag oo lagu been-abuuro, ee maaha in la soo bandhigo. Miisaanka Kuhn ayaa isbedelaya - sayniska caadiga ah ee ay xardheen kacaanku. Lakatos: barnaamijyo cilmi baaris ah (suunka adag ee adag + suunka ilaalinta). Feyerabend: 'wax kastaa wuu socdaa' - anarchism epistemological.
learnUni_philosophy_f0_kp4: Cilmi-baarista bulshada iyo marag-furka: in badan oo aan ognahay waxay ka yimaaddaan kuwa kale. Marqaatigu waa isha aasaasiga ah ee aqoonta (anti-yaraynta - Coady). Laakin eexda maamulka, xumbo kala shaandheynta, iyo khilaafka khubarada ayaa abuuraya caqabado hor leh. Caddaalad-darro baahsan (Fricker): caddaalad-darro markhaati ah (siinta kalsoonida yar ee nacaybka awgeed), caddaalad-darrada tariikhda (la'aanta fikrado lagu fahmo waayo-aragnimada u gaarka ah).
learnUni_philosophy_f0_task: Si aad ah u qiimee sheegashada ah in aan shakiga xagjirka ah la beenin karin. Jawaabtaada: (a) sheeg Descartes doodaha shakiga leh (riyo, jinni shar leh) iyo jawaabta cogito, (b) soo bandhig dareenka caadiga ah ee Moore iyo jawaabaha 'Hubaal' ee Wittgenstein, (c) sharax macnaha guud oo qiimee haddii ay kala dirto ama ay ka fogaato dhibaatada, (d) tixgeli haddii ay diidi karto arrimaha maalin kasta.
learnUni_philosophy_f1_desc: Anshaxu waxa uu baadhaa dabeecadda akhlaaqda iyo sida ay tahay in aan u dhaqmo. Saddexda aragtiyood ee ugu waaweyn ee anshax - consequentialism, deontology, iyo anshaxa suubban - waxay bixiyaan jawaabo kala duwan. Metaethics waxay waydiisaa in weedhaha akhlaaqdu ay run yihiin ama been yihiin, haddii ay sidaas tahay, macno noocee ah. Anshaxa la dabaqay waxay isticmaashaa aragti si ay wax uga qabato jaahwareerka akhlaaqda dhabta ah ee daawada, siyaasadda, iyo deegaanka.
learnUni_philosophy_f1_kp0: Ka faa'iidaysiga (Bentham, Mill): ficilka saxda ahi waxa uu kordhiyaa farxad wadareedka/ utility (wanaagga ugu weyn ee tirada ugu badan). Sharciga ka faa'iidaysiga (ficil kasta waxaa lagu qiimeeyaa cawaaqibka) vs. qaanuunka faa'iidaysiga (raac sharciyada guud ahaan kor u qaada isticmaalka). Diidmada: caddaaladda (goynta xubnaha), daacadnimada, baahida.
learnUni_philosophy_f1_kp1: Kantian deontology: qiimaha akhlaaqda ee ujeedada (waajib, ma aha cawaaqib). Qaybta Muhiimka ah: (1) ku dhaqan kaliya ugu badnaan ee aad ka dhigi karto mid caalami ah, (2) ula dhaqmaan dadka had iyo jeer sida darafyada naftooda, waligoodna kaliya macne, (3) u dhaqmaan sidii xubin ka mid ah boqortooyooyinka darafyada. Waajibaadka saxda ah (tusaale, waligiis been masheegin) vs. waajibaadyada aan dhamaystirnayn (noqo samada marka ay suurtogal tahay).
learnUni_philosophy_f1_kp2: Anshaxa Wanaagga (Aristotle): diiradda saara dabeecadda halkii aad ka ahaan lahayd xeerar ama natiijooyin. Wanaagga (geesinimada, caddaaladda, dulqaadka, xigmadda) waa dabeecado deggan oo si fiican u dhaqma, oo lagu helo ku-dhaqanka Caqiidada celceliska: wanaagga ayaa u dhexeeya xad-dhaafka iyo yaraanta.
learnUni_philosophy_f1_kp3: Metaethics: Xaqiiqda akhlaaqda (xaqiiqadaha damiirka ujeedo jira - Moore's non-dabiiciga ah, Cornell Realism), anshax-dabiiciga ah (aragti qalad: Mackie - dhammaan sheegashooyinka akhlaaqdu waa been; muujinta: Ayer, Blackburn - sheegashooyinka akhlaaqdu waxay muujinayaan dabeecadaha; relativism: akhlaaqdu way kala duwan tahay dhaqamada). Dhibka la rabo (Hume): kama soo saari karo 'wax' ka 'waa'.
learnUni_philosophy_f1_kp4: Anshaxa la dabaqay: ilmo iska soo ridid ​​(qofnimo, madax-bannaani jireed - Thomson's violinist), euthanasia ( madaxbannaani vs. xurmada nolosha, jiirada sibiqsan ), caddaaladda caalamiga ah (Fannaaniinta - dadka hodanka ah waxay ku qasban yihiin inay bixiyaan si ay u yareeyaan saboolnimada caalamiga ah; Rawls - mabda'a kala duwanaanshaha caalamiga ah), anshaxa xayawaanka (aragtida fannaaniinta u til).
learnUni_philosophy_f1_task: Dhibaatada trolleyga: trolley-ga carartay waxa ay dili doontaa 5 qof ilaa aad u leexiso wado dhinaceed ah oo ay ku dili doonto 1. (a) Maxay mid kasta oo ka mid ah saddexda aragtiyood ee akhlaaqeed ee waaweyni uu leeyahay waa in aad samayso, waayo? (b) Kala duwanaanshaha 'footbridge', waxaad joojin kartaa trolleyga adiga oo nin weyn ka riixaya buundada. Tani ma beddelaysaa jawaabtaada? Waa maxay sababta ama maya? (c) Maxay xaqiiqada dhabta ah ee ah in dadka intooda badan ay beddelaan kiiska koowaad laakiin aan ahayn tan labaad waxay nooga sheegaysaa saldhigga nafsiga ah (halkii caqli-gal) ee akhlaaqda?
learnUni_philosophy_f2_desc: Falsafadda maskaxdu waxay baartaa dabeecadda xaaladaha maskaxda - miyir-qabka, ula-ka-tagga, iyo xiriirka maskaxda-jirka. Dhibaatada adag ee miyirku waxay waydiisaa sababta ay u jirto khibrad shakhsi ahaaneed. Dhaqan-galnimada, jir-dhisnimada, iyo laba-geesoodka waxay bixiyaan xisaabaadka tartanka. Doodahani waxay si toos ah ula xidhiidhaan garaadka macmalka ah iyo cilmiga garashada.
learnUni_philosophy_f2_kp0: Dhibaatada jidhka-maskaxda: laba-la'aanta walxaha (Descartes - maskaxda iyo jidhku waa walxo kala duwan; dhibaatada isdhexgalka), laba-geesoodka hantida ( guryaha maskaxdu waa kuwa aan jidhka ahayn ee maskaxda), jidh-dhiska / maadiga (dawladaha maskaxdu waxay la mid yihiin ama ay xaqiiqsadeen dawladaha maskaxda jirka). Maaddada baabi'inta (Khurchland) - cilmi-nafsiga dadku waa been; cilmiga neerfaha ayaa bedeli doona.
learnUni_philosophy_f2_kp1: Functionalism (Putnam, Fodor): xaaladaha maskaxeed waxaa lagu qeexaa doorkooda shaqo (xidhiidhka wax soo saarka), ee ma aha substrate jirkooda. Xaqiiqo badan: isla xaalad maskaxeed ayaa lagu xaqiijin karaa nidaamyo jireed oo kala duwan (silikon iyo sidoo kale neerfaha). Diidmada: Ned Block's qualia rogan, maqan qualia.
learnUni_philosophy_f2_kp2: Miyir-qabka iyo qualia: qualia waa dabeecadda, sifooyinka cajiibka ah ee waayo-aragnimada ('waxa ay u eg tahay' si loo arko casaan, dareemo xanuun). Dhibaatada adag (Chalmers): xitaa xisaabinta jirka oo dhamaystiran ee maskaxdu ma sharxi doonto sababta ay jirto khibrad shakhsiyeed. Zombie falsafadeed wuxuu u maleeyay tijaabo: ahaanshaha jir ahaan aniga ila mid ah laakiin aan miyir qabin.
learnUni_philosophy_f2_kp3: ula kac: 'wax ku saabsan' xaaladaha maskaxda - aaminsanaanta iyo rabitaanku waxay ku saabsan yihiin waxyaabo. Brentano: ula kac waa calaamadda maskaxda. Doodda Qolka Shiineeska ee Searle ee ka dhanka ah AI xooggan: kumbuyuutarka calaamaduhu wax ka qabanayo ma fahmo - waxaa ka maqan ula kac. Jawaabta Dennett: mawqif ula kac ah.
learnUni_philosophy_f2_kp4: Aqoonsiga shakhsi ahaaneed: maxaa kaa dhigaya isku qof muddo ka dib? Joogitaanka cilmi nafsiga (Locke - xusuusta; Parfit - isku xirnaanta nafsaaniga ah iyo sii wadida, xaqiiqo qoto dheer oo ku saabsan aqoonsiga), sii wadida nafleyda (maskaxda), aqoonsiga sheeko (Ricoeur). Parfit's 'la qaybsanay waanu taaganahay': kiisaska fission waxay muujinayaan aqoonsiga shakhsi ahaaneed ma aha waxa muhiimka ah - badbaadada ayaa ah waxa muhiimka ah.
learnUni_philosophy_f2_task: Sharax dhibaatada adag ee miyir-qabka iyo sababta jir-dhisnimadu ula halgamayso. (a) Si sax ah u sheeg dhibaatada (Chalmers). (b) Soo bandhig laba jawaab-celin jireed (tusaale nooca aqoonsiga aragtida, aragtiyaha sare ee miyir-qabka) iyo diidmada. (c) Qiimee in zombies falsafadeed ay tahay wax la maleeynayo iyo waxa soo socda haddii ay yihiin. (d) Ka wada hadal saamaynta dhibaatada adag ee miyir-qabka macmalka ah - AI waligaa si dhab ah ma u miyirsan karaa?
learnUni_philosophy_f2_tp2: Ku talagalnimada iyo aqoonsiga shakhsi ahaaneed
learnUni_philosophy_f3_desc: Falsafadda siyaasadeed waxay baartaa aasaaska caadiga ah ee hay'adaha siyaasadeed - maxaa sabab u ah awoodda dawladda, waa maxay caddaaladda, sidee loo qaybsan karaa awoodda siyaasadeed? Laga soo bilaabo falsafada-boqorrada Plato ilaa xijaabka jaahilnimada ee Rawls ilaa xorriyadda Nozick, qaababkani waxay abuuraan xisaabaadyo kala duwan oo dawlad sharci ah iyo bulsho cadaalad ah.
learnUni_philosophy_f3_kp0: Xaqsiinta gobolka: dhaqanka heshiis bulsheed. Hobbes (Leviathan, 1651): Dawlad la'aanteed, noloshu waa 'keli, miskiin, xumaan, doqon, iyo gaaban'; wakiilada macquulka ah waxay qandaraas ku siinayaan xoriyadda dabiiciga ah ee amniga. Locke: xaaladda dabiiciga ahi waa nabad; dawlad loo sameeyay ilaalinta xuquuqda dabiiciga ah (nolol, xoriyad, hanti); dawladu ogolansho, kacaanku waa xaq haddii ay ku xad gudubto xuquuqda.
learnUni_philosophy_f3_kp1: Rousseau (Heshiiska Bulshada, 1762): guud ahaan doonista - waxa ay muwaadiniintu u rabaan danta guud, oo ka duwan rabitaanka dhammaan (wadarta danaha gaarka ah). Awoodda sharciga ah waxay u baahan tahay dimoqraadiyad ka qaybqaadasho. Alienation: lahaanshaha hantidu waxay abuurtaa sinnaan la'aan waxayna kharribtaa wanaagga dabiiciga ah.
learnUni_philosophy_f3_kp2: Rawls (Aragtida Caddaaladda, 1971): booska asalka ah + xijaabka jaahilnimada - wakiilada macquulka ah waxay doortaan mabaadi'da iyagoon garanaynin booskooda bulsho. Laba mabda'a: (1) xorriyadaha aasaasiga ah ee siman, (2) mabda'a kala duwanaanshaha - sinnaan la'aanta la oggol yahay oo keliya haddii ay ka faa'iidaystaan ​​kuwa ugu faa'iidada yar. Falsafaddii siyaasadeed ee ugu saamaynta badnayd qarnigii 20-aad.
learnUni_philosophy_f3_kp3: Nozick (Anarchy, State, iyo Utopia, 1974): Jawaabta xoriyada Rawls. Aragtida xaqa: qaybinta kaliya = waxa lagu helay wareejin kaliya ama iibsi asal ah. Gobolka ugu yar waa gobolka ugu cadcad. Mabaadi'da qaabaysan ee qaybinta (sida Rawls') waxay u baahan yihiin xad-gudub joogto ah oo xuquuqda shakhsiga ah.
learnUni_philosophy_f3_kp4: Caqabadaha casriga ah: Wada-wadaaga (MacIntyre, Sandel, Taylor) - Shakhsinimada xorta ah waxay iska indha tirtaa dastuurka bulshada ee aqoonsiga; bulshooyinka, caadooyinka, iyo alaabta la wadaago waa arrin. Feminism: Wollstonecraft, Beauvoir ('jinsiga labaad'), Okin - aragtida xorta ah ayaa iska indha-tiraysa qaab-dhismeedka jinsiga ee qaybta 'gaarka ah'. Gumeysi ka dib: Fanon - falsafada siyaasadeed ee reer galbeedku way iska indhatirtay rabshadaha gumeysiga.
learnUni_philosophy_f3_task: Rawls iyo Nozick waxay matalaan laba ka mid ah falsafadaha siyaasadeed ee ugu muhiimsan qarnigii 20aad. (a) Sharax mawqifka asalka ah ee Rawls iyo labada mabda'a ee caddaaladda. (b) Sharax aragtida xaq u yeelashada Nozick iyo doodda Wilt Chamberlain. (c) Inay caddeeyaan khilaafka aasaasiga ah ee u dhexeeya iyaga oo ku saabsan nooca caddaaladda. (d) Isticmaalka tusaale la taaban karo (tusaale, dib u qaybinta hantida cashuurta), tus sida faylsoof kastaaba u sababaynayo. Ku soo gabagaboow mawqifkaaga qiil.
learnUni_philosophy_f4_desc: Metaphysics-ku waxa ay baartaa sifooyinka aasaasiga ah ee xaqiiqada: waxa jira, maxay yihiin qaybaha aasaasiga ah ee jiritaanku, ma jiraan rabitaan xor ah, waa maxay wakhti, ma jiraan walxo aan la taaban karin? Ontology waa daraasadda sida ahaanshaha. Kuwani waa su'aalaha ugu badan ee falsafada, haddana jawaabahoodu waxay leeyihiin cawaaqib xagga sayniska, anshaxa, iyo nolol maalmeedka.
learnUni_philosophy_f4_kp0: Jiritaanka iyo ontology: Heerka Quine - inay noqoto waa qiimaha doorsoomayaasha xidhan. Waa maxay qaybaha ontological ee jira? Gaar ahaan (walxaha gaarka ah) vs. universals (hantida, xiriirka - xaqiiqada: caalamiga ah ayaa jira si madax-bannaan; magac-u-dhigis: kaliya tafaasiisha jira).
learnUni_philosophy_f4_kp1: Go'aaminta xorta ah iyo go'aaminta: go'aaminta adag (dhammaan dhacdooyinka si gaar ah loo go'aamiyo → majirto doonista xorta ah), iswaafajinta (rabitaanka xorta ah waxay la jaan qaadayaan go'aaminta - ficilka xorta ah = aan lagu qasbin arrimo dibadda ah, xitaa haddii la go'aamiyo, aragtida mesh hierarchical Frankfurt), xorriyadda xorta ah (sababta wakiilka, go'aaminta). Caqabadda cilmiga neerfaha: Tijaabooyinka Libet waxay muujinayaan waxqabadka neerfaha ka horreeya ujeeddada miyirka leh.
learnUni_philosophy_f4_kp2: Dabeecadda wakhtiga: Taxane A-taxane ah (la soo dhaafay, imminka, mustaqbalka) vs. taxane B (aan kacsanayn - hore/dabe/isku mid ah). Presentism (kaliya hadda ayaa jira), daa'imnimo/afar-cabbir (tagey, imminka, iyo mustaqbalka ayaa si isku mid ah u dhab ah - ' caalamka block'). Isku-xirnaanta isku-midnimada caqabadaha horyaalnimada.
learnUni_philosophy_f4_kp3: Hab-dhaqanka iyo adduunyada suurtogalka ah: semantics-ka adduunka ee suurtogalka ah (Lewis) - odhaahyada hab-dhaqanka waxaa lagu sameeyaa run waxa ka jira adduunyada suurtogalka ah. Habka dhabta ah ee dhabta ah: dhammaan adduunyada suurtagalka ah ayaa jira. Dhab ahaantii: kaliya adduunka dhabta ah ayaa jira; Adduunyada suurtagalka ah waa abstract (Plantinga). Loo isticmaalo in lagu falanqeeyo xaqiiqooyinka lidka ku ah, lama huraanka, iyo nuxurka.
learnUni_philosophy_f4_kp4: Sababta: Joogteynta Humean (sababta = xiriir joogto ah - ma jiro xiriir lama huraan ah). Falanqaynta ka-hortagga ah (Lewis): C waxay sababtay E haddii adduunka ugu dhow ee suurtogalka ah halkaasoo C uusan ka dhicin, E ma dhicin. Aragtida dhex dhexaadinta (Woodward): C waxay sababtaa E haddii faragelinta C ay bedeli doonto E. Awoodaha Sababta (Armstrong, Shimbir): dabeecaduhu waa asal ahaan asal ahaan.
learnUni_philosophy_f4_task: Doonista xorta ah miyay la socotaa go'aaminta? Qor qormo falsafadeed habaysan: (a) qeex go'aaminta oo caddeeya in aanay ku habboonayn doonista xorta ah, (b) soo bandhig jawaabta iswaafajinta - kala saar in 'lagu go'aamiyay' in lagugu qasbo, adoo daliishanaya Frankfurt ama Dennett, (c) soo bandhig diidmada is-khilaafsan (cawaaqibta natiijada - van Inwagen) qiimayntaada (d) qiimayntaada ee doodda. Ujeedo dood falsafadeed sax ah oo dhan.
